metadata.note: Field names preserved from v1 for backward compatibility; enriched with rarity, source_book, prerequisites, etc.

feats.name: A Home in Every Port
feats.description: You have a reputation in towns and villages you've visited, and residents are always willing to open their doors to you.
notes: Exposure to the Well of Axuma
Exposure of the well of Axuma has given you some arcane magic.

feats.name: A Miracle of Science!
feats.description: Once, you dreamed of creating life. Now you know that merely creating life lacks ambition.

feats.name: A Tale to Believe In
feats.description: You recite a tale of prowess that rewrites the combat unfolding around you.

feats.name: Aberration Kinship
feats.description: Your mind resonates with the inscrutable thought processes that inhuman aberrations use to communicate.

feats.name: Abjure the False Kin
feats.description: Your vow reminds you that there can be brackish vinegar hiding within honeyed words, helping you detect attempts to influence your mind.

feats.name: Able Ritualist
feats.description: Your readings on rituals make you a skilled participant.
feats.source: Pathfinder #164: Hands of the Devil pg. 76

feats.name: Aboleth Transmutation
feats.description: You have tapped into the ancient magic used by alghollthu masters to mold the flesh of your ancestors.
feats.source: Absalom, City of Lost Omens pg. 395, Azarketi Ancestry Web Supplement pg. 5
feats.source_book: Absalom, City of Lost Omens pg. 395, Azarketi Ancestry Web Supplement

feats.name: Abscission Shards
feats.description: You twist your claw, breaking off a piece in your target.

feats.name: Absorb Spell
feats.description: You absorb a spell and store it in your body.
feats.prerequisites: Spellmaster Dedication; spell repertoire or ability to prepare spells

feats.name: Absorb Strength
feats.description: You consume a piece of your enemy, absorbing their strength.

feats.name: Absorb Toxin
feats.description: Your skin readily absorbs poison and can consciously draw toxins into your body to spare others.
feats.prerequisites: You are not immune to diseases or poisons

feats.name: Accelerating Touch
feats.description: Your healing energies are infused with bounding energy.

feats.name: Acclimated Mount
feats.description: By the grace of your god, your mount can overcome the natural challenges and hazards present in a specific terrain.

feats.name: Accommodating Mount
feats.description: You've trained to serve as a mount, if only for your most trusted allies.

feats.name: Accompany
feats.description: You use your performance to supplement an ally’s spellcasting, providing magical energy for their spell in their stead.

feats.name: Accurate Flurry
feats.description: You refine the precision of your unbelievable storm of blows.

feats.name: Accurate Swing
feats.description: You strike cleanly with wide, sweeping attacks to inflict maximum damage
feats.source: Night of the Gray Death pg. 65
feats.prerequisites: Vigilante Dedication; Harsh Judgment; member of the Gray Gardeners

feats.name: Accursed Claws
feats.description: Your claws carry your mother’s hag magic.

feats.name: Accursed Clay Fist
feats.description: You have replaced one of your forearms with one made of clay and infused with cursed arcane magic.
feats.prerequisites: Golem Grafter Dedication; expert in unarmed attacks

feats.name: Accursed Magic
feats.description: When the curse within you spills out, you can lay curses on others and claim them for yourself with ease.

feats.name: Accursed Touch
feats.description: You've learned to harness the supernatural curse that animates you, imbuing your most powerful attacks with a terrible curse.

feats.name: Achaekek's Grip
feats.description: You sense if a creature you have slain in the last year has been restored to life

feats.name: Acknowledge Fan
feats.description: Your reputation as a Firebrand precedes you, and you need only make a simple gesture or give a look of recognition to amaze those around you.

feats.name: Acrobat Dedication
feats.description: You become an expert in Acrobatics.

feats.name: Acrobatic Performer
feats.description: You're an incredible acrobat, evoking wonder and enrapturing audiences with your prowess.

feats.name: Acupuncturist
feats.description: You’ve studied the routes by which qi flows through the body.

feats.name: Acute Scent
feats.description: When your anger is heightened, your sense of smell improves.

feats.name: Acute Vision
feats.description: When you are raging, your visual senses improve, granting you darkvision.

feats.name: Adamantine Body
feats.description: With your strong will and even stronger body, you shrug off an otherwise devastating blow.

feats.name: Adamantine Fists
feats.description: You imbue your unarmed strikes with one of the strongest metals.
feats.source: Pathfinder #195: Heavy is the Crown pg. 82

feats.name: Adamantine Mantra
feats.description: You attain your true potential as a tutelary spirit.

feats.name: Adapted Cantrip
feats.description: Through study of multiple magical traditions, you’ve altered a spell to suit your spellcasting style.

feats.name: Adaptive Adept
feats.description: You’ve continued adapting your magic to blend your class’s tradition with your adapted tradition.

feats.name: Adaptive Mask Familiar
feats.description: Your mask familiar adapts quickly to material form, allowing it to gain more familiar and master abilities.

feats.name: Adaptive Stratagem
feats.description: Your constant training and strong bond with your allies allow you to change tactics on the fly.

feats.name: Adaptive Vision
feats.description: After years of using black powder weaponry in dimly lit spaces, you've become accustomed to dazzling flashes of light and sudden shifts in illumination.

feats.name: Add Element
feats.description: Choose a second kinetic element to add to the one you already have.

feats.name: Additional Follower
feats.description: Another follower joins you in your travels.

feats.name: Additional Ikon
feats.description: Your story has grown rich enough that three ikons can’t contain its full complexity.

feats.name: Additional Lore
feats.description: Become trained in another Lore subcategory

feats.name: Additional Recollection
feats.description: You scan the battlefield quickly, remembering critical details about multiple opponents you face.

feats.name: Additional Servings
feats.description: Your number of versatile vials per day increases to 5.
feats.prerequisites: Wandering Chef Dedication; Expert in Crafting or Cooking Lore

feats.name: Adept Storyteller
feats.description: Your ability to tell stories rivals those of the finest bards.
feats.prerequisites: Uzunjati Storytelling; master in a Recall Knowledge skill

feats.name: Adhyabhau
feats.description: You descend from the rare psychic vampires known as vetalaranas.

feats.name: Adopted Ancestry
feats.description: Gain access to ancestry feats from another ancestry

feats.name: Adrenaline Rush
feats.description: In the heat of battle, you are capable of amazing feats of strength.

feats.name: Adroit Manipulation
feats.description: You’ve fiddled with knots, locks, and blacksmith’s puzzles since you were a child to give your hands something to do.

feats.name: Advanced Alchemy
feats.description: Alchemist Dedication
feats.campaign: You gain the advanced alchemy benefits

feats.name: Advanced Arcana
feats.description: You gain one wizard feat.

feats.name: Advanced Blood Potency
feats.description: You gain one sorcerer feat.

feats.name: Advanced Bloodline
feats.description: You draw more power from your bloodline.

feats.name: Advanced Breakthrough
feats.description: You gain one inventor feat.

feats.name: Advanced Concoction
feats.description: You gain one alchemist feat.

feats.name: Advanced Construct Companion
feats.description: You've upgraded your construct companion's power and decision-making ability.
notes: Your corpselike construct companion becomes much more powerful and can act with limited autonomy to follow your greater directives.

feats.name: Advanced Deduction
feats.description: You gain one investigator feat.

feats.name: Advanced Defender
feats.description: You gain one guardian feat.

feats.name: Advanced Deific Power
feats.description: Like a muscle, the more you flex your divine power, the stronger it gets.

feats.name: Advanced Deity's Domain
feats.description: Through your conviction, you have glimpsed the deeper secrets of your deity's domain.

feats.name: Advanced Devotion
feats.description: You gain one champion feat.

feats.name: Advanced Dogma
feats.description: You gain one cleric feat.

feats.name: Advanced Domain
feats.description: Your prayers have unlocked deeper secrets of your deity’s domain.

feats.name: Advanced Domain Spirit
feats.description: Your connection with your domain spirit has deepened.

feats.name: Advanced Efficient Alchemy
feats.description: You make an even-larger batch of alchemical items each morning.

feats.name: Advanced Element Control
feats.description: You gain one kineticist feat.

feats.name: Advanced Elemental Spell
feats.description: Your connection to one of the great elemental aspects of nature deepens, allowing you further control over its powers.
feats.prerequisites: flame order, stone order, storm order, or wave order

feats.name: Advanced Field Training
feats.description: You gain a commander feat.

feats.name: Advanced Firearm Familiarity
feats.description: You have familiarity with advanced firearms, treating them as martial weapons for the purposes of proficiency.
feats.prerequisites: Gunslinger Dedication; expert in any kind of weapon or unarmed attack

feats.name: Advanced First Aid
feats.description: Use First Aid to reduce frightened and sickened condition values

feats.name: Advanced Flair
feats.description: You gain one swashbuckler feat.

feats.name: Advanced Fury
feats.description: You gain one barbarian feat.

feats.name: Advanced General Training
feats.description: Over the long course of your adventuring life, your adaptability has let you pick up numerous useful abilities.

feats.name: Advanced Glory
feats.description: You gain an exemplar feat.

feats.name: Advanced Hallowed Spell
feats.description: You dig deeper into the magical tools found in wizard schools and divine domains.
feats.prerequisites: Hallowed Necromancer Dedication; necromancer initial school spell or death initial domain spell

feats.name: Advanced Hunter's Trick
feats.description: You gain one ranger feat.

feats.name: Advanced Kata
feats.description: You gain one monk feat.

feats.name: Advanced Maneuver
feats.description: You gain a fighter feat.

feats.name: Advanced Martial Magic
feats.description: You gain one magus feat.

feats.name: Advanced Monastic Weaponry
feats.description: Your rigorous training regimen allows you to wield complex weaponry with ease.
feats.source: Tian Xia Character Guide pg. 120, Player Core 2 pg. 121
feats.source_book: Tian Xia Character Guide pg. 120, Player Core 2

feats.name: Advanced Muse's Whispers
feats.description: You gain one bard feat.

feats.name: Advanced Mysteries
feats.description: You gain one oracle feat.

feats.name: Advanced Order Training
feats.description: You gain the greater order benefit for the Hellknight order to which you belong.

feats.name: Advanced Order Training (Uncommon)
feats.description: You gain the greater order benefit for the Hellknight order to which you belong.
feats.prerequisites: Hellknight Armiger Dedication; Hellknight Dedication or Hellknight Signifer Dedication

feats.name: Advanced Qi Spells
feats.description: Your talent at controlling your qi has reached new heights.

feats.name: Advanced Revelation
feats.description: Divine power reveals greater mysteries to you.

feats.name: Advanced Runic Mind-Smithing
feats.description: Your mind can hold onto more complicated patterns than ever before.

feats.name: Advanced School Spell
feats.description: You gain access to the advanced teachings of your arcane institution, learning a powerful new school spell.

feats.name: Advanced Seeker of Truths
feats.description: You have unlocked deeper secrets to uncovering and hoarding lore.
feats.source: Pathfinder #164: Hands of the Devil pg. 76
feats.prerequisites: Eldritch Researcher Dedication; Seeker of Truths

feats.name: Advanced Shooter
feats.description: You've dedicated your training to the most complex and weird weapons of your favorite group.

feats.name: Advanced Shooting
feats.description: You gain one gunslinger feat.

feats.name: Advanced Synergy
feats.description: You gain one summoner feat.

feats.name: Advanced Targeting System
feats.description: Your ocular processors are augmented with advanced targeting systems, which allow you to more easily pinpoint your enemy and read their movements.

feats.name: Advanced Thaumaturgy
feats.description: You gain one thaumaturge feat.

feats.name: Advanced Thoughtform
feats.description: You gain one psychic feat.

feats.name: Advanced Trickery
feats.description: You gain one rogue feat.

feats.name: Advanced Warden
feats.description: You unlock more powerful primal spells.

feats.name: Advanced Weapon Training
feats.description: You’ve studied the art of wielding an advanced weapon.

feats.name: Advanced Weaponry
feats.description: Your eidolon's attack evolves.

feats.name: Advanced Wilding
feats.description: You gain one druid feat.

feats.name: Advanced Witchcraft
feats.description: You gain one witch feat.

feats.name: Advantageous Assault
feats.description: After compromising your enemy’s movement, you deliver a more deadly blow.

feats.name: Aegis of Arnisant
feats.description: Inspired by the tale of Arnisant, you transform your shield into a magic ward.
feats.prerequisites: Knight Vigilant; Shield Block; Master in Religion

feats.name: Aegis of the Dissolution
feats.description: You are a friend of shadows and know how to avoid the troubles they bring.

feats.name: Aeon Resonance
feats.description: You gain the resonant power of one embedded aeon stone as if it were placed in a wayfinder.

feats.name: Aeonbound
feats.description: Your lineage is influenced or directly tied to the supernatural inhabitants of the Perfect City of Axis, a realm of pure and absolute order.

feats.name: Aerial Boomerang
feats.description: A blade of shearing wind races away from you in a 60-foot line.

feats.name: Aerial Piledriver
feats.description: Heaving both yourself and your opponent into the air, you bring them crashing to the ground.

feats.name: Aerobatics Mastery
feats.description: You move with grace in flight and can perform amazing aerial stunts.

feats.name: Affliction Mercy
feats.description: The divine grace that flows through you grants reprieve from an affliction.

feats.name: Affliction Resistance
feats.description: Your diet has strengthened you against diseases and poisons.

feats.name: After You
feats.description: You allow your foes to make the first move in a show of incredible confidence.

feats.name: Agathion Magic
feats.description: The harmonious magic of Nirvana flows through you.

feats.name: Ageless Patience
feats.description: You work at a pace born from longevity that enhances your thoroughness.

feats.name: Ageless Spirit
feats.description: You remember more about your previous incarnations than most leshys.

feats.name: Agent of All Holds
feats.description: Orcs across Belkzen recognize you as an honored lorekeeper.

feats.name: Aggravating Scratch
feats.description: Your claws carry an irritant that is harmless to you but can be damaging to others.

feats.name: Aggressive Block
feats.description: You push back as you block, knocking your foe away or off balance.

feats.name: Agile Grace
feats.description: Your graceful moves with agile weapons are beyond compare.

feats.name: Agile Hand
feats.description: When you cast mage hand, you can modify it to control a set of thieves' tools.
feats.prerequisites: Spell Trickster Dedication; ability to cast mage hand

feats.name: Agile Maneuvers
feats.description: Your easily maneuver against your foes.

feats.name: Agile Shield Grip
feats.description: You change your grip on the shield, allowing you to combine rapid attacks with your shield boss or shield spikes and your main weapon's Strikes in a series of swift motions.

feats.name: Agonizing Rebuke
feats.description: When you terrorize your enemies, you also cause them painful mental distress.

feats.name: Air Cushion
feats.description: Air currents flow upward to slow the target's fall to 60 feet per round.

feats.name: Air Shroud
feats.description: Turbulent air suffuses your kinetic aura.

feats.name: Airborne Form
feats.description: Your eidolon can fly.

feats.name: Airy Step
feats.description: You create a blanket of fog in a 5–foot burst centered on one corner of your space.

feats.name: Alabaster Eyes
feats.description: In place of the normal vishkanyan golden eyes, you were born with especially perceptive snow-white eyes.

feats.name: Alacritous Action
feats.description: Your eidolon moves more quickly.

feats.name: Alarming Disappearance
feats.description: Your ability to move unseen is startling for one your size, causing panic among your enemies.

feats.name: Alchemical Assessment
feats.description: You can identify alchemical items quickly.

feats.name: Alchemical Crafting
feats.description: Trained in Crafting

feats.name: Alchemical Discoveries
feats.description: You've devoted extra time in the lab to improve your knowledge of alchemy.

feats.name: Alchemical Familiar
feats.description: You have used alchemy to create life, a simple creature formed from alchemical materials, reagents, and a bit of your own blood.

feats.name: Alchemical Power
feats.description: You become an expert in the alchemist class DC.

feats.name: Alchemical Revivification
feats.description: If you die while under the effect of at least one elixir, the alchemical compounds in your bloodstream bring you back to life at the start of your next turn.

feats.name: Alchemical Scholar
feats.description: You gain the Alchemical Crafting feat.

feats.name: Alchemical Shot
feats.description: You've practiced a technique for mixing alchemical bombs with your loaded shot.

feats.name: Alchemist Dedication
feats.description: You put your alchemical interest into practice.

feats.name: Aldori Duelist Dedication
feats.description: Your Aldori duelist training teaches you martial techniques and increases your dedication to the Aldori dueling sword.

feats.name: Aldori Parry
feats.description: You can parry attacks against you with your Aldori dueling sword.

feats.name: Aldori Riposte
feats.description: You riposte with your Aldori dueling sword when your enemy leaves an opening.

feats.name: Aldori Swordlord
feats.description: You are an Aldori swordlord.
feats.prerequisites: Aldori Duelist Dedication; you have taken the last name of Aldori, sworn to the Aldori swordpact, and demonstrated skill at swordplay by winning a duel using only a sword in the presence of an Aldori swordlord.

feats.name: Aldori's Retort
feats.description: You can flow through combat reactions with graceful ease.

feats.name: Alghollthu Bound
feats.description: Although you may not even be aware, the alghollthus your ancestors once served maintain a stranglehold on the deepest, tethered parts of your mind.
feats.source: Absalom, City of Lost Omens pg. 394, Azarketi Ancestry Web Supplement pg. 4
feats.source_book: Absalom, City of Lost Omens pg. 394, Azarketi Ancestry Web Supplement

feats.name: Align Qi
feats.description: The power of your qi soothes your wounds and energizes you for battle.

feats.name: Alkenstar Agent Dedication
feats.description: You put on the persona of a rough and tumble outlaw, but your real goals are to report threats to Alkenstar back to the grand duchess.
feats.source: Pathfinder #178: Punks in a Powderkeg pg. 78
feats.prerequisites: Trained in Deception; trained at least one firearm

feats.name: All in my Head
feats.description: Using your occult connections and incredible powers of persuasion, you convince yourself that the triggering damage is a figment of your imagination.

feats.name: All in your Head
feats.description: Flames scouring at your body, venom coursing through your veins—you refuse to believe they exist, and nothing can affect you if you don't believe in it.

feats.name: All of the Animal
feats.description: You know how to make the best and most efficient use of a hunted animal's carcass.

feats.name: All Shall End in Flames
feats.description: White-hot fire consumes everything in a cataclysmic sphere of death.

feats.name: All the Time in the World
feats.description: Your firsthand experience of the subjective nature of time and space has given you new observational insights.
feats.source: Pathfinder #168: King of the Mountain pg. 75

feats.name: All This Has Happened Before
feats.description: You instantly recall a memory from one of your countless past lives that heightens your awareness of your surroundings and quickens your response.

feats.name: All This Will Happen Again
feats.description: Even in the face of overwhelming tribulation, you find solace in the notion that this feeling is fleeting; all things are merely part of a never-ending cycle.

feats.name: Allegro
feats.description: You can quicken your allies with a fast-paced performance.

feats.name: Alloy Flesh and Steel
feats.description: Elemental energy replaces every cell of your body with raw metal.

feats.name: Alluring Performance
feats.description: You command the attention of those around you with an elegant display.

feats.name: Ally's Shelter
feats.description: You follow your allies' example.

feats.name: Along the Deep River
feats.description: Once per year, when you die, you turn into an immaterial ball of light.

feats.name: Alter Admixture
feats.description: Ambushing Knockdown
feats.prerequisites: Sometimes, you need to adapt your alchemical mixtures to new situations.
notes: You emerge from hiding and deliver a blow that can knock an enemy sprawling to the ground.

feats.name: Alter Ego Dedication
feats.description: You make yourself into a living mirror, becoming a double of someone unremarkable, and you slip into exactly the role that can get you past security or into a sensitive facility.
feats.prerequisites: Trained in Deception; Trained in Stealth

feats.name: Alter Resistance
feats.description: You focus on your protean forebears to change your energy resistance.

feats.name: Always Ready
feats.description: Extensive training against undead has taught you to cover your weak points, even when you think that you're alone.

feats.name: Ambersoul
feats.description: Your elemental heritage is reflected in the oils and fragrances of plants, in tree resin that fossilizes into amber, or in the gentle smell of a flower.

feats.name: Ambush Awareness
feats.description: You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to Perception checks attempted as initiative rolls.

feats.name: Ambush Bladderwort
feats.description: You plant the seed of a giant bladderwort in an unoccupied square of ground or water within 30 feet.

feats.name: Ambush Hunter
feats.description: You are always searching for the perfect opportunity to ambush your enemies.

feats.name: Ambush Tactics
feats.description: You've made a study of the best practices for laying ambushes in terrains you've spent time learning about, be it the best way to ambush foes or the best methods of reacting to surprise attacks in those terrains.
feats.prerequisites: trained in Lore about a specific terrain

feats.name: Ammunition Thaumaturgy
feats.description: You're so used to handling your implement, weapon, and esoterica in the heat of combat that adding a few bullets or arrows to the mix is no extra burden.

feats.name: Among Humanity
feats.description: Your talents in shapechanging allow you to pass unseen.

feats.name: Amorphous Aspect
feats.description: Your body is supremely flexible.

feats.name: Amp Focus
feats.description: You've glimpsed the furthest recesses of your mind.

feats.name: Amphibious Form
feats.description: Your eidolon adapts to life on land and underwater.

feats.name: Amplifying Touch
feats.description: Your healing energies empower attacks.

feats.name: Anadi Lore
feats.description: You've learned how to provide for your community, be it through hard-earned sustenance or useful crafts.

feats.name: Analyze Information
feats.description: You can stoke your mind into a burst of analytical prowess.

feats.name: Analyze Weakness
feats.description: Your knowledge of a creature’s physiology helps you attack with pinpoint accuracy.

feats.name: Anarchic Arcana
feats.description: The magic in your blood is unpredictable.

feats.name: Ancestor's Rage
feats.description: You transform into an enormous, otherworldly hyena.

feats.name: Ancestor's Transformation
feats.description: You can commune with ancestor spirits to assume the form of an enormous primeval strix.

feats.name: Ancestral Blood Magic
feats.description: The magic of your bloodline mixes with that of your ancestry.

feats.name: Ancestral Form
feats.description: Casting your memory back deep into the past, you take the form of an ancestral guardian.
feats.prerequisites: Bakuwa Lizardfolk heritage or Makari Lizardfolk heritage

feats.name: Ancestral Healer
feats.description: Following the traditions of those who came before you, you’ve learned how to banish effects that cloud the mind, body, and spirit.

feats.name: Ancestral Insight
feats.description: You have extensive knowledge of your ancestors' ancient origins.

feats.name: Ancestral Linguistics
feats.description: Over your extensive lifespan, you've studied many languages.

feats.name: Ancestral Longevity
feats.description: You have accumulated a vast array of lived knowledge over the years.

feats.name: Ancestral Mage
feats.description: The magic of your ancestry and bloodline are one and the same.

feats.name: Ancestral Mind
feats.description: By unraveling memories and connections passed down from your progenitors and buried within your unconscious mind, you learn to convert your inherent magic into psychic power.

feats.name: Ancestral Paragon
feats.description: Gain a 1st-level ancestry feat

feats.name: Ancestral Suspicion
feats.description: Long-lived elves have seen civilizations rise and fall, often at the hands of outside forces. As a result, they have developed a wariness of others who might seek to influence or control them.

feats.name: Anchor Stance
feats.description: You tense your muscles to make yourself neutrally buoyant and more difficult to move.

feats.name: Anchoring Arrow
feats.description: You can prevent demonic foes from fleeing your wrath via teleportation.
feats.source: Pathfinder #210: Whispers in the Dirt pg. 81

feats.name: Anchoring Roots
feats.description: Small roots sprout from your feet, steadying you as you move.

feats.name: Ancient Memories
feats.description: In the long years since Ghorus's day, you've done pretty much everything at one time or another.

feats.name: Ancillary Motes
feats.description: You can use Crystalline Dust one more time per day.

feats.name: And Will Do So Once More
feats.description: You’ve learned how to let go of most worries and move past them.

feats.name: Android Lore
feats.description: You have a keen interest in the origins of your people.

feats.name: Angel of Vindication
feats.description: To aid with your mission of destroying undead, you've specialized in techniques to destroy them, much as other assassins learn to kill the living.

feats.name: Angelkin
feats.description: You descend from an angel, a winged messenger from Nirvana or one of the other celestial realms.

feats.name: Animal Accomplice
feats.description: You build a rapport with an animal, which becomes magically bonded to you.

feats.name: Animal Actor
feats.description: You participated in a performance of The Leaping Lion, a play focusing on Cyricas, the animal-loving adventurer who traveled with his ape friend Mardu and remains a favorite hero among Taldan youth.

feats.name: Animal Companion
feats.description: You gain the service of a young animal companion (page 206) that travels with you on your adventures and obeys any simple commands you give it to the best of its abilities.

feats.name: Animal Elocutionist
feats.description: You hear animal sounds as conversations instead of unintelligent noise, and you can respond in turn.

feats.name: Animal Empathy (Druid)
feats.description: You have a connection to the creatures of the natural world that allows you to communicate with them on a rudimentary level.

feats.name: Animal Empathy (Ranger)
feats.description: You have a connection to the creatures of the natural world that allows you to communicate with them on a rudimentary level.

feats.name: Animal Fleetness
feats.description: You're adept at using your animal shape's natural means of locomotion.

feats.name: Animal Magic
feats.description: Your shapeshifting grants you a magical connection to the animal world.

feats.name: Animal Senses
feats.description: You gain one of the following senses available to your inherent animal: darkvision, low-light vision, or scent (imprecise) 30 feet.

feats.name: Animal Shape
feats.description: You have full control over your shape and can transform into your inherent animal.

feats.name: Animal Skin
feats.description: Your proficiency in unarmored defense increases to expert.

feats.name: Animal Soul Siblings
feats.description: Your eyes have been opened to the spiritual essence suffusing the world.

feats.name: Animal Speaker
feats.description: You can speak to all animals, not just a particular subset.
feats.prerequisites: ability to communicate with some type of animals (such as bats or arthropods)

feats.name: Animal Strength
feats.description: You tap into the primal strength of your animal feature.

feats.name: Animal Summoner
feats.description: The connection between you and primal magic deepens.

feats.name: Animal Swiftness
feats.description: You move like an animal.

feats.name: Animal Trainer Dedication
feats.description: You gain a young animal companion.
feats.source: Pathfinder #152: Legacy of the Lost God pg. 76
feats.source_book: Pathfinder #152: Legacy of the Lost God

feats.name: Animalistic Brutality
feats.description: You deepen the connection into your animal instincts.

feats.name: Animalistic Resistance
feats.description: Your animalistic connections help you resist natural afflictions.

feats.name: Animate Net
feats.description: When you cast animate rope, you can modify it to animate a net.
feats.prerequisites: Spell Trickster Dedication; ability to cast animate rope

feats.name: Animist Dedication
feats.description: You have formed a bond with an apparition and can cast divine spells.

feats.name: Animist's Power
feats.description: You gain one animist feat.

feats.name: Ankle Bite
feats.description: Whenever someone grabs onto you, you instinctively bite down hard.
feats.prerequisites: Fang Sharpener or Razortooth Goblin heritage

feats.name: Ankle Biter
feats.description: You fight just as well on the ground as you do standing up.

feats.name: Annihilating Swing
feats.description: You have embraced brute destructive power.

feats.name: Annotate Composition
feats.description: By putting composition to paper, you can create a source of stirring words or song that others can read and understand.

feats.name: Anoint Ally
feats.description: You forge a mystical connection with an ally using a drop of your blood, allowing them to benefit from your magic.

feats.name: Antagonize
feats.description: Your taunts and threats earn your foes' ire.

feats.name: Anthemic Performance
feats.description: Your music, speech, or other performance inspires your allies to dive into battle.

feats.name: Anthropomorphic Shape
feats.description: Humanoids’ supposed place apart from animals is folly—taking on their forms just requires some extra practice.

feats.name: Anticipate Ambush
feats.description: You keep watch for any hidden creatures or dangerous sites, moving at half your travel Speed.

feats.name: Antler Rush
feats.description: Stride twice.

feats.name: Apex Companion
feats.description: Gain the apex companion focus spell.

feats.name: Aphet Flash
feats.description: Your swarm can emit a bright flash, much like aphet beetles, a genus of flash beetles once used by Osirian miners as sources of light.

feats.name: Apparition Cloud
feats.description: With a mere thought, you discorporate your familiar into a thousand shards of spiritual magic, protecting both it and yourself from physical harm while making it difficult for enemies to move near you.

feats.name: Apparition Magic
feats.description: You can cast more divine spells each day.

feats.name: Apparition Sense
feats.description: You can see and interact with things others can’t.

feats.name: Apparition Stabilization
feats.description: Your attuned apparition ensures that even if you would be distracted or disrupted, your magic does not go to waste.

feats.name: Apparition's Enhancement
feats.description: Spiritual power encases your weapon or unarmed attack.

feats.name: Apparition's Quickening
feats.description: If your next action is to cast a cantrip or a spell that is at least 2 ranks lower than the highest-rank spell slot you have, you can draw power from one of your attuned apparitions to reduce the number of actions to cast it by 1 (minimum 1 action).

feats.name: Apparition's Reflection
feats.description: Your apparition infuses your body with additional power.

feats.name: Apprentice Sea Witch
feats.description: You're familiar with the basic spells that most educated merfolk know.

feats.name: Aquatic Adaptation
feats.description: If you and up to four other creatures are in contact with a body of water deep enough for you to fully submerge, you can spend 10 minutes adapting the creatures to that specific body of water.

feats.name: Aquatic Camouflage
feats.description: You blend into the waves.

feats.name: Aquatic Conversationalist
feats.description: You can ask questions of, receive answers from, and use the Diplomacy skill with animals with the amphibious or aquatic traits.

feats.name: Aquatic Eyes
feats.description: As your connection to water grows, you can see more easily in places with less light, such as the depths of the ocean.

feats.name: Aqueous Dragonblood
feats.description: Your blood surges with the might of dragons who master the waters, and you can move freely in their domain.

feats.name: Arboreal Conversationalist
feats.description: With your close connection to primal energies and the First World, you can communicate with trees.
feats.prerequisites: Kijimuna Gnome heritage or at least one primal innate spell from a gnome heritage or feat

feats.name: Arcana of Iron
feats.description: You eschew wands and staves for more advanced weaponry.
notes: Pathfinder #157: Devil at the Dreaming Palace pg. 79
You can sense the presence of the supernatural, even if you don't have any magical ability yourself.

feats.name: Arcane Breadth
feats.description: Your thorough studies allow you to cast more arcane spells each day.

feats.name: Arcane Camouflage
feats.description: You have developed magical techniques to aid you with stalking your prey.

feats.name: Arcane Communication
feats.description: You can deliver silent messages.

feats.name: Arcane Dragonblood
feats.description: You descend from a dragon that wields mastery of their magical abilities, such as a fortune dragon or mirage dragon.

feats.name: Arcane Evolution
feats.description: Your arcane legacy allows you to perceive how magic affects everything.

feats.name: Arcane Eye
feats.description: Your eye has been magically enhanced to pierce darkness.

feats.name: Arcane Fists
feats.description: Your physical training encompasses unarmed combat forms.

feats.name: Arcane Locomotion
feats.description: You've modified your body to allow you to augment your movement.

feats.name: Arcane Propulsion
feats.description: You redirect energy from your core to ports on your back or feet, allowing you to fly for a short time.

feats.name: Arcane Safeguards
feats.description: The magic powering you makes it difficult for outside magic to affect you.

feats.name: Arcane School Spell
feats.description: You gain your school’s initial school spell.

feats.name: Arcane Sense
feats.description: Trained in Arcana
feats.campaign: Cast detect magic at will as an arcane innate spell

feats.name: Arcane Shroud
feats.description: Your magic has a powerful aftereffect, briefly granting you a certain spell.

feats.name: Arcane Sight
feats.description: You've trained yourself to constantly be on the lookout for magical effects, even when focusing on looking out for other things.
feats.prerequisites: ability to cast the detect magic cantrip

feats.name: Arcane Slam
feats.description: You channel magical power from your core into your arm, empowering your attack as you attempt to slam your foe into the ground.

feats.name: Arcane Tattoos
feats.description: You have tattoos on your body corresponding to one of the ancient Thassilonian schools of magic.

feats.name: Archaeologist Dedication
feats.description: You are a student of peoples and their histories, and are in constant pursuit of knowledge and artifacts from the past.
feats.prerequisites: Trained in Society; Trained in Thievery

feats.name: Archaeologist's Luck
feats.description: You are more than just skillful; your drive to find the secrets of the past manifests as a strange kind of luck.

feats.name: Archer Dedication
feats.description: You have familiarity with all weapons in the bow and crossbow weapon groups.

feats.name: Architect of Flame
feats.description: Flames rise and shape to your will, forming a wall or dome of your design.

feats.name: Archwizard's Might
feats.description: You have mastered the greatest secrets of arcane magic.

feats.name: Ardent Armiger (Lvl 4) #1
feats.description: You have been trained to resist the manipulations of fiends.

feats.name: Ardent Armiger (Lvl 4) #2
feats.description: You've trained to resist the manipulations of fiends, and your Hellknight discipline makes you difficult to influence.

feats.name: Area Armor
feats.description: The armor you wear protects you and shelters your allies against explosions and other large-scale assaults.

feats.name: Arise, ye Worthy!
feats.description: A touch of valkyrie magic in your blood lets you hold back death’s grasp.

feats.name: Armament Paragon
feats.description: Add the following property runes to the list you can choose for your blessed armament: animated, greater fearsome, grievous, keen, and greater vitalizing.

feats.name: Armed and Armored
feats.description: You're used to juggling defensive equipment and your firearms.
feats.prerequisites: Golden Legionnaire Dedication; trained in martial firearms

feats.name: Armiger's Mobility
feats.description: You’ve learned how best to move in heavy armor.
feats.prerequisites: expert in heavy armor; Hellknight Armiger Dedication

feats.name: Armiger's Protection
feats.description: You've learned to wear the iconic Hellknight armor.

feats.name: Armor Assist
feats.description: You are practiced in helping yourself and others don heavy gear.
feats.prerequisites: Trained in Warfare Lore or Trained in Athletics

feats.name: Armor Break
feats.description: You flex your muscles to crack your damaged armor, blasting jagged shards into nearby enemies.

feats.name: Armor in Earth
feats.description: Stone encases you like armor.

feats.name: Armor Proficiency
feats.description: Become trained in a type of armor

feats.name: Armor Regiment Training
feats.description: You've trained for grueling marches in full battle kit.

feats.name: Armor Rune Shifter
feats.description: You learn the secrets of armor runes by viewing them through gems and can alter them at your discretion.
feats.source: Pathfinder #148: Fires of the Haunted City pg. 75
feats.source_book: Pathfinder #148: Fires of the Haunted City

feats.name: Armored Counterattack
feats.description: With the might of your armor behind you, you hit back at a foe who would dare try to hurt your allies.

feats.name: Armored Courage
feats.description: You take comfort in the safety of your armor.

feats.name: Armored Resistance
feats.description: While you are wearing medium or heavy armor, you gain resistance to physical damage equal to half your character level when you use the Intercept Attack reaction to take damage instead of your ally.

feats.name: Armored Stealth
feats.description: You have learned techniques to adjust and modify your armor and movements to reduce the noise you make.

feats.name: Aroden's Innovation
feats.description: As befits the god of humanity and innovation, Aroden left teachings that continue to inspire.

feats.name: Artery Map
feats.description: While you’ve learned all the places a scalpel can cause extensive bleeding to avoid disasters in surgery, such knowledge can serve other purposes.

feats.name: Artillerist Dedication
feats.description: Artillery is a team sport, where every member of the crew has to rely on the other members.

feats.name: Artisanal Crafter
feats.description: Like many minotaurs, you take pride in creating items made from stone or metal.

feats.name: Artokus's Fire
feats.description: Artokus developed a mixture of volatile materials that burns hotter and longer than typical alchemist's fire.

feats.name: As a Thousand Soldiers
feats.description: Though you may have stolen from the hive, you’ve nothing but respect for the armies guarding it, and you borrow their strength to overwhelm your foes.
feats.source: Pathfinder #217: Death Sails a Wine-Dark Sea pg. 79
feats.source_book: Pathfinder #217: Death Sails a Wine-Dark Sea

feats.name: As in Life, So in Death
feats.description: Specific memories of your old life are hard to hold onto, but you know things without remembering why.

feats.name: Ascendant Blood
feats.description: Twice per week, you can cast interplanar teleport as an innate spell of the tradition corresponding to your draconic exemplar.
feats.prerequisites: draconic exemplar associated with a specific plane (such as a diabolic dragon or empyreal dragon)

feats.name: Ascended Dragonet Heritage
feats.description: You’ve awoken the power of your draconic heritage.

feats.name: Ash Strider
feats.description: You discorporate into a cloud of whirling ash and Stride.

feats.name: Ash-piercing Gaze
feats.description: Neither cinders nor winds shall prevent you from seeing those who need help.

feats.name: Ashen Veil
feats.description: By smearing ash or tainted earth over your skin and armor, you shroud yourself from the dead.
feats.prerequisites: Knight Reclaimant Dedication; Expert in Religion; Master in Stealth

feats.name: Ask the Bones
feats.description: You keep the bone of an ancestor or a friend to call upon for advice.

feats.name: Assisting Shot
feats.description: Using your last shot to gauge your accuracy, you can fire off a quick shot to interfere with a foe in combat.

feats.name: Assume Earth's Mantle
feats.description: Enormous pieces of rock cluster around your body.

feats.name: Assurance
feats.description: trained in at least one skill
feats.campaign: Receive a fixed result on a skill check

feats.name: Assured Identification
feats.description: You rarely misidentify an item.
feats.prerequisites: Expert in Arcana, Expert in Nature, Expert in Occultism, or Expert in Religion

feats.name: Assured Knowledge
feats.description: You can procure information with confidence.

feats.name: Astonishing Explosion
feats.description: Your bomb incorporates an explosive spark of wonder that leaves witnesses dumbfounded.

feats.name: Astral Blink
feats.description: You've attuned your core to allow you to phase in and out of the Astral Plane, allowing you to teleport periodically.

feats.name: Astral Tether
feats.description: You spin out a thread of psychic energy that connects you to an ally, using it as a conduit for your abilities.

feats.name: Asura Magic
feats.description: You can cast blood vendetta and death knell once per day each as 2nd-level divine innate spells.

feats.name: Athamaru Lore
feats.description: You've immersed yourself in community learning, particularly around navigating the waters and tending to animals.

feats.name: Athamaru Weapon Familiarity
feats.description: You wield weapons designed to work underwater with ease.

feats.name: Athletic Might
feats.description: Surviving in hostile terrain has given you a great talent for mobility.

feats.name: Athletic Strategist
feats.description: You know how to calculatedly manipulate joints and body weight.

feats.name: Attuned Electroreceptors
feats.description: You grow specialized organs that allow you to detect even the faintest of heartbeats.

feats.name: Attuned Stride
feats.description: You can move freely through terrain you're attuned to.

feats.name: Attunement Shift
feats.description: The magic of your spell floods into you, overriding your connection to the land around you.

feats.name: Attunement to Stone
feats.description: You can feel vibrations through the ground.

feats.name: Augment Senses
feats.description: You open vestigial eyes, unfurl tympanic flaps of skin, or otherwise enhance your senses.

feats.name: Aura Enhancement
feats.description: You’ve enhanced your training with your battle magic, allowing you access to a more potent divine font.

feats.name: Aura Expertise
feats.description: You’ve become so accustomed to maintaining your battle auras that it’s become second nature to you.

feats.name: Aura of Confidence
feats.description: Your will and your faith in your nation is unassailable, and the feeling is contagious.

feats.name: Aura of Courage
feats.description: You stand strong in the face of danger and inspire your allies to do the same.

feats.name: Aura of Despair
feats.description: Your presence as an avatar of evil makes your foes more susceptible to terror and makes it almost impossible for them to shake off fear when you are near.
notes: Gatewalkers Player's Guide (Remastered) pg. 9, Dark Archives (Remastered) pg. 100
Your power spontaneously evolves or reconfigures itself.

feats.name: Aura of Determination
feats.description: Your aura protects against powers that would twist the mind and body.

feats.name: Aura of Faith
feats.description: You radiate an aura of belief that imbues your attacks and those of nearby allies with divine power.

feats.name: Aura of Life
feats.description: Your aura protects against the power of the Void.

feats.name: Aura of Preservation
feats.description: Your aura protects against the twisting powers of aberrations.

feats.name: Aura of Righteousness
feats.description: Your righteous aura dampens evil's might and prevents the unholy from escaping you.

feats.name: Aura of Unbreakable Virtue
feats.description: Overwhelm evil creatures with your aura.

feats.name: Aura Shaping
feats.description: You control the size of your kinetic aura.

feats.name: Aura Sight
feats.description: You've learned how to read the natural auras of other living creatures.

feats.name: Aurochs-Headed
feats.description: Your words and body language can subconsciously unsettle orcs, giving you an advantage when convincing them to see things your way.
feats.prerequisites: Trained in Diplomacy or Trained in Intimidation
notes: Recover from Unrest more quickly and lessen its effects

feats.name: Auspicious Mount
feats.description: Guided by your ongoing care, your steed has developed incredible intelligence and skill.

feats.name: Automatic Knowledge
feats.description: expert in a skill with the Recall Knowledge action; Assurance in that skill
feats.campaign: Recall Knowledge as a free action once per round

feats.name: Automatic Psychic Action
feats.description: Your power wants to be free.

feats.name: Automatic Writing
feats.description: When confronted with the unknown, you can receive knowledge beyond your own experience via written messages delivered by your hand.

feats.name: Automaton Armament
feats.description: You've been provided a body part designed for combat.

feats.name: Automaton Lore
feats.description: You have come to better understand the process that made your body and the magic that powers it.

feats.name: Avatar's Audience
feats.description: Your extensive service affords you certain divine privileges.

feats.name: Avatar's Protection
feats.description: In moments of danger, you can call upon your god’s form in an instant.

feats.name: Avenge Ally
feats.description: Though you know that you will eventually outlive your companions, seeing them at death's door brings clarity to your attacks.

feats.name: Avenge in Glory
feats.description: You honor your ally’s life, gaining temporary Hit Points equal to your level for 1 minute.

feats.name: Avenger Dedication
feats.description: Your training regimen has given you particular advantages when it comes to enforcing the interests of your faith.

feats.name: Avowed Insight
feats.description: You become trained in the Lore skill corresponding to one creature type mentioned by your vow (for example, Fey Lore if your heritage is deny the firstborn pursuit).
feats.prerequisites: Yaksha heritage with an edict that requires you to confront a certain type of creature.

feats.name: Awaken Others
feats.description: You can awaken others just through contact and communication.

feats.name: Awaken the Obake
feats.description: Not every tool is well cared for, and those that are treated badly might awaken as malevolent spirits.

feats.name: Awakened Animal Lore
feats.description: You have taken the time to learn about the process of awakening and the experiences of your fellow awakened animals.

feats.name: Awakened Jewel
feats.description: You once held the head gem of a deceased ancestor or loved one, and it awakened a mysterious power in your own.

feats.name: Awakened Magic
feats.description: When you awakened, primal magic was released within you.

feats.name: Awakened Stride
feats.description: You blend your instinct and intellect to move so fast you seem to be a blur.

feats.name: Awakened Yaoguai Heritage
feats.description: You’ve delved into the power of your legacy.

feats.name: Awesome Blow
feats.description: Your attacks are so powerful, they can flatten your opponents.

feats.name: Axe Climber
feats.description: You can climb wooden surfaces using axes.

feats.name: Axe Thrower
feats.description: You have mastered the weight and balance of a variety of axes and can lob them with ease.

feats.name: Axial Recall
feats.description: You have reconfigured the magical resonance of your core to attune to the planar energies of Axis.

feats.name: Axiomatic Lore
feats.description: You possess a strong understanding of process among mortals and lawful outsiders alike.

feats.name: Axuma's Vigor
feats.description: Your vigor makes it easier for others to heal you.
feats.prerequisites: Exposure to the Well of Axuma

feats.name: Azaersi's Roads
feats.description: Azaersi has granted you limited access to the Stone Roads, attuning you to the tiniest sliver of the Onyx Key.

feats.name: Azarketi Lore
feats.description: You have learned the history and origins of your people and how to connect to both your land and sea heritage.
feats.source: Absalom, City of Lost Omens pg. 394, Azarketi Ancestry Web Supplement pg. 4
feats.source_book: Absalom, City of Lost Omens pg. 394, Azarketi Ancestry Web Supplement

feats.name: Azarketi Purification
feats.description: You can cast purify food and drink as a primal innate spell, but only on liquids.

feats.name: Azarketi Weapon Aptitude
feats.description: You become familiar with using your weapons both in and out of water.
feats.source: Absalom, City of Lost Omens pg. 395, Azarketi Ancestry Web Supplement pg. 5
feats.source_book: Absalom, City of Lost Omens pg. 395, Azarketi Ancestry Web Supplement

feats.name: Azarketi Weapon Expertise
feats.description: Your mastery with weapons both above and below water is unmatched.
feats.source: Absalom, City of Lost Omens pg. 395, Azarketi Ancestry Web Supplement pg. 5
feats.source_book: Absalom, City of Lost Omens pg. 395, Azarketi Ancestry Web Supplement

feats.name: Azarketi Weapon Familiarity
feats.description: You are familiar with weapons that excel underwater.
feats.source: Absalom, City of Lost Omens pg. 394, Azarketi Ancestry Web Supplement pg. 4
feats.source_book: Absalom, City of Lost Omens pg. 394, Azarketi Ancestry Web Supplement

feats.name: Azata Magic
feats.description: Your lineage traces back to the realm of Elysium, and you can harness its magic using this connection.

feats.name: Azure Fins
feats.description: When submerged in water or another liquid, you form small fin-like arms along your body, granting you far greater maneuverability while swimming.
feats.source: Pathfinder #194: Cult of the Cave Worm pg. 81
feats.source_book: Pathfinder #194: Cult of the Cave Worm

feats.name: Backup Disguise
feats.description: You have a specific disguise that you keep at the ready, worn underneath your outer garment.

feats.name: Bamboo and Silt Repose
feats.description: At home among mire and copse, you flit from river to tree with a dragonfly’s shimmering grace.

feats.name: Banish Falsehoods of Flesh
feats.description: Your ability to manipulate supernatural energy allows you to deploy divine magic directly against a disguised enemy to reveal them as they truly are, or to cleanse an ally from an unwilling transformation.

feats.name: Banishing Blow
feats.description: The erratic teleportation magic you experienced in the Kortos Mounts has taught you a few tricks.

feats.name: Banner Twirl
feats.description: You spin your banner in an elaborate pattern that your enemies find inscrutable.

feats.name: Banner's Inspiration
feats.description: You wave your banner, inspiring allies to throw off the shackles of fear.

feats.name: Banshee Cry Display
feats.description: You’ve learned how to unleash a sudden and disruptive noisemaker at just the right moment in your display, a technique that can cause a spellcaster to fumble the phrasing of their magic
feats.source: Guns & Gears (Remastered) pg. 135, Guns & Gears (Remastered) pg. 134

feats.name: Barbarian Dedication
feats.description: You become trained in Athletics; if you were already trained in Athletics, you instead become trained in a skill of your choice.

feats.name: Barbarian Resiliency
feats.description: You gain 3 additional Hit Points for each barbarian archetype class feat you have.
feats.prerequisites: Barbarian Dedication; class granting no more Hit Points per level than 10 + your Constitution modifier

feats.name: Bard Dedication
feats.description: You cast spells like a bard and gain the Cast a Spell activity.

feats.name: Bardic Lore
feats.description: Your studies make you informed on every subject.

feats.name: Bargain Hunter
feats.description: Trained in Diplomacy
feats.campaign: Earn Income by searching for deals

feats.name: Bark and Tendril
feats.description: You wield primal magic.

feats.name: Barreling Charge
feats.description: You rush forward, moving enemies aside to reach your foe.
feats.source: Player Core pg. 143, Player Core 2 pg. 78

feats.name: Barricade Snare
feats.description: Using clever gnomish engineering, you can quickly erect small barriers in which your snares are hidden.

feats.name: Barrier of Boreal Frost
feats.description: You form an intricate structure of ice, such as a wall of bricks made of packed snow or a screen of enormous icicles.

feats.name: Barrier Shield
feats.description: When you cast shield, you can modify the spell to create a solid barrier you can use for cover, but not for blocking.
feats.prerequisites: Spell Trickster Dedication; ability to cast shield

feats.name: Base Kinesis
feats.description: You gain the Base Kinesis impulse.

feats.name: Bashing Charge
feats.description: You smash, bust, and charge through solid obstacles without hesitation.

feats.name: Basic Animist Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the basic spellcasting benefits as a prepared divine caster.

feats.name: Basic Arcana
feats.description: You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level wizard feat of your choice.

feats.name: Basic Bard Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the basic spellcasting benefits.

feats.name: Basic Beast Gunner Spellcasting
feats.description: You've unlocked the first secrets of beast guns, granting you the power of their synergistic magic.

feats.name: Basic Blood Potency
feats.description: You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level sorcerer feat.

feats.name: Basic Bloodline Spell
feats.description: You gain your bloodline’s initial bloodline spell.

feats.name: Basic Breakthrough
feats.description: You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level inventor feat of your choice.

feats.name: Basic Captivator Spellcasting
feats.description: Your innate ability to fascinate others develops into full-fledged spellcasting.

feats.name: Basic Cathartic Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the basic spellcasting benefits.

feats.name: Basic Cleric Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the basic spellcasting benefits.

feats.name: Basic Concoction
feats.description: You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level alchemist feat.

feats.name: Basic Deduction
feats.description: You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level investigator feat of your choice.

feats.name: Basic Defender
feats.description: You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level guardian feat.

feats.name: Basic Devotion
feats.description: You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level champion feat.

feats.name: Basic Dogma
feats.description: You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level cleric feat.

feats.name: Basic Druid Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the basic spellcasting benefits.

feats.name: Basic Field Training
feats.description: You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level commander feat.

feats.name: Basic Flair
feats.description: You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level swashbuckler feat of your choice.

feats.name: Basic Fury
feats.description: You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level barbarian feat.

feats.name: Basic Glory
feats.description: You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level exemplar feat.

feats.name: Basic Hunter's Trick
feats.description: You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level ranger feat.

feats.name: Basic Kata
feats.description: You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level monk feat.

feats.name: Basic Lesson
feats.description: Your patron grants you a special lesson, revealing a hidden facet of its nature.

feats.name: Basic Magus Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the basic bounded spellcasting benefits.

feats.name: Basic Maneuver
feats.description: You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level fighter feat.

feats.name: Basic Martial Magic
feats.description: You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level magus feat of your choice.

feats.name: Basic Modification
feats.description: You've learned to modify your innovation in order to enhance its capabilities beyond what an ordinary piece of equipment can accomplish.

feats.name: Basic Muse's Whispers
feats.description: You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level bard feat.

feats.name: Basic Mysteries
feats.description: You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level oracle feat of your choice.

feats.name: Basic Oracle Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the basic spellcasting benefits.

feats.name: Basic Prophet Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the basic spellcasting benefits.

feats.name: Basic Psychic Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the basic spellcasting benefits.

feats.name: Basic Red Mantis Magic
feats.description: You have learned limited divine magic from your Red Mantis training.

feats.name: Basic Rivethun Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the basic spellcasting benefits.

feats.name: Basic Shooting
feats.description: You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level gunslinger feat of your choice.

feats.name: Basic Skysage Divination
feats.description: The stars move, granting you a sliver of their magic.

feats.name: Basic Sorcerer Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the basic spellcasting benefits.

feats.name: Basic Spellcasting
feats.description: You increase your ability to cast spells.

feats.name: Basic Summoner Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the basic bounded spellcasting benefits.

feats.name: Basic Synergy
feats.description: You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level summoner feat of your choice.

feats.name: Basic Thaumaturgy
feats.description: You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level thaumaturge feat of your choice.

feats.name: Basic Thoughtform
feats.description: You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level psychic feat.

feats.name: Basic Trickery
feats.description: You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level rogue feat.

feats.name: Basic Wilding
feats.description: You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level druid feat.

feats.name: Basic Witch Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the basic spellcasting benefits.

feats.name: Basic Witchcraft
feats.description: You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level witch feat of your choice.

feats.name: Basic Wizard Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the basic spellcasting benefits.

feats.name: Bat Form
feats.description: You can transform into a bat.
notes: Pathfinder #222: Hellbreakers pg. 217, Hellbreakers Players Guide pg. 9
You've faced enough opponents that your experience is written across your skin, toughening you against your fiendish foes.

feats.name: Battering Wings
feats.description: Though not powerful enough for flight, your wings can deliver a thrashing to anyone who gets close.

feats.name: Battle Cry
feats.description: Master in Intimidation
feats.campaign: Demoralizes foes when you roll for initiative

feats.name: Battle Harbinger Dedication
feats.description: You have trained extensively in combat, battlefield tactics, and stamina, focusing on being an exceptional warrior for your faith in exchange for less time studying the traditional spells and scriptures.

feats.name: Battle Hymn to the Lost
feats.description: Your movements in combat are an artistic dirge to those spirits who could not fight to see another day.
feats.prerequisites: of verse unbroken or peerless under heaven

feats.name: Battle Medicine
feats.description: Trained in Medicine
feats.campaign: Heal yourself or an ally in battle

feats.name: Battle Planner
feats.description: You are constantly drawing up plans and battle scenarios, assembling strategies and gathered intelligence for later use.

feats.name: Battle Prayer
feats.description: Calling out to your deity, you recite scripture to harm a foe
feats.prerequisites: Master in Religion; you follow a deity

feats.name: Battle-Hardened Companion
feats.description: Accompanying you across countless battlefields has allowed your companion to unleash its full potential.

feats.name: Battle-Tested Companion
feats.description: Your companion is a tried and tested ally of unshakable reliability.

feats.name: Battleblooded
feats.description: You descend from those whose lives were touched by legendary einherjars, who were crafted from the souls of mighty warriors slain in battle and chosen by valkyries to serve as foot soldiers to many gods.

feats.name: Battlefield Agility
feats.description: Your enemies might think they have you surrounded, but you know just how to extricate yourself.
notes: You snatch at your opponent with your claws, pulling them close in a ferocious bear hug.

feats.name: Battlefield Arcana
feats.description: You have learned to safely cast spells even in the heat of battle.

feats.name: Battleforger
feats.description: You can sharpen weapons, polish armor, and apply special techniques to temporarily gain better effects from your armaments.

feats.name: Battlefront Sabotage
feats.description: You know methods of sabotaging your enemy's war machines and weaponry.
notes: You have a magical affinity for bears and can speak to them through sounds and body language.

feats.name: Beacon Mark
feats.description: When you cast sigil, you can modify the spell to allow you to determine the target's location.

feats.name: Bear Hug
feats.description: You hug your opponent.

feats.name: Beast Dynamo Howl
feats.description: You've incorporated beast tech from Arcadia into your dynamo, adding in components from various terrifying creatures to enhance your prosthesis's capabilities.

feats.name: Beast Gunner Dedication
feats.description: You've bonded to your beast gun and unlocked the first hints of its hidden potential.
feats.prerequisites: Trained in Arcana; Trained in Crafting; expert with at least one type of firearm, you own a beast gun and have slain the type of creature associated with your beast gun in a fair hunt (see above)

feats.name: Beast of Burden
feats.description: Your broad frame can allow you to carry weights that immobilize smaller creatures.

feats.name: Beast Speaker
feats.description: You can speak with animals.
feats.source: Pathfinder #152: Legacy of the Lost God pg. 76
feats.source_book: Pathfinder #152: Legacy of the Lost God

feats.name: Beast Trainer
feats.description: You have an impressive innate ability to tame and command ferocious beasts.

feats.name: Beastbrood
feats.description: One of your ancestors was a rakshasa, the corrupt and aristocratic reincarnated souls that call Golarion home.

feats.name: Beastkin Resilience
feats.description: You've regained beastkin protections after becoming a full werecreature.

feats.name: Beasts of Slumbering Steel
feats.description: You conjure metal elemental mounts made of interlocking metal pieces.

feats.name: Beautiful Knifework
feats.description: You perform surgical adjustments to disguise a willing ally or your construct companion.
feats.prerequisites: Lepidstadt Surgeon Dedication; Master in Medicine

feats.name: Become Thought
feats.description: You shed some of your material form, becoming a being of pure thought.

feats.name: Begin Stampede
feats.description: The sight of you charging forward into battle emboldens your allies to follow.

feats.name: Behold My Creation!
feats.description: You have rebuilt your creation once more.

feats.name: Belay That!
feats.description: You can recognize when a strategy isn’t working and advise your ally to change course.

feats.name: Bellflower Dedication
feats.description: You dedicate yourself to freeing slaves and escorting them to freedom.
feats.prerequisites: Charisma 14; Expert in Stealth; Expert in Survival; member of the Bellflower Network

feats.name: Belly Flop
feats.description: You crush an enemy under the enormous weight of your armor.

feats.name: Bend Space
feats.description: Not even space itself is a match for the unleashed power of your mind.

feats.name: Beneath Notice
feats.description: You are skilled at hiding from your foes and targets among the common populace.
feats.prerequisites: Golden League Xun Dedication; Expert in Deception

feats.name: Benefactor's Majesty
feats.description: You tap into the grandeur of your warren's benefactor.

feats.name: Benefactor's Resistance
feats.description: Your scales have taken on the characteristics of your draconic benefactor and insulate you from certain damage types.

feats.name: Benefactor's Strike
feats.description: Your benefactor’s blood flows through your veins, and you channel their power into your body.

feats.name: Benefactor's Wings
feats.description: Calling on your draconic gift, spectral wings carry you to your destination.

feats.name: Benevolent Spirit Deck
feats.description: You manifest a ghostly deck of harrow cards that seek to protect you or an ally.

feats.name: Bespell Strikes
feats.description: You siphon spell energy into one weapon you’re wielding, or into one of your unarmed attacks, such as a fist.
feats.source: Player Core pg. 202, Player Core 2 pg. 139

feats.name: Bestial Brutality
feats.description: Your animalistic unarmed attack grows more dangerous.

feats.name: Bestial Manifestation
feats.description: Part of your body has an animalistic influence from a planar creature.

feats.name: Bestial Protection
feats.description: Your companion's mere presence is enough to rattle creatures that fall under its shadow.
feats.prerequisites: Beastmaster Dedication; animal companion that’s Large or larger

feats.name: Bestial Snarling
feats.description: You can convey the subtle menace of a low growl or predatory rumble.

feats.name: Betraying Shank
feats.description: While your usual diplomacy is well intentioned, you know that sometimes those same skills will need to be turned to deception.

feats.name: Between the Scales
feats.description: You've learned to take advantage of slips in your foes' defenses.

feats.name: Big Debut
feats.description: Now's your chance! You're a Firebrand, and the world must know it.

feats.name: Big Game Trapper
feats.description: You can set snares specifically for big prey, leaving smaller creatures unscathed.

feats.name: Big Mouth
feats.description: Instead of storing up to four items of Light Bulk in your cheek pouches, you can store up to 1 Bulk worth of items.

feats.name: Billowing Wings
feats.description: You've trained your winged companions to gather air in their wings, whipping up a concentrated gust of wind at opponents, potentially staggering them.
feats.prerequisites: Beastmaster Dedication; animal companion with wings

feats.name: Binding Serpents Celestial Arrow
feats.description: As you prepare to shoot your weapon, you invoke divine serpents that bind your enemies.

feats.name: Biographical Eye
feats.description: In even a brief conversation or social interaction, you pick up on subtle social and visual cues to learn a great deal about a person's origin and history.

feats.name: Bizarre Magic
feats.description: Master in Occultism
feats.campaign: Your magic becomes more difficult to identify

feats.name: Bizarre Transformation
feats.description: The forms you take on defy belief—chimerical sights of twisted antlers or acidic drool.

feats.name: Black Cat Curse
feats.description: You hiss a spiteful curse.

feats.name: Black Powder Blaze
feats.description: You learn to take advantage of every shot, flying across the battlefield with the help of your weapon's recoil.

feats.name: Black Powder Boost
feats.description: You fire your weapon as you jump, using the kickback to go farther.

feats.name: Black Powder Embodiment
feats.description: You merge your body with your ammunition, enabling you to travel the same path as your bolt or bullet.

feats.name: Black Powder Flash
feats.description: You ignite a pinch of black powder in a foe's face.
feats.source: Pathfinder #178: Punks in a Powderkeg pg. 79

feats.name: Blackjacket Dedication
feats.description: You have entered the ranks of the Mercenary League and now wear the black uniform that’s the source of the organization’s popular epithet.
feats.prerequisites: trained in medium armor and martial weapons

feats.name: Blade Brake
feats.description: Blasting Beams
feats.prerequisites: You plow your weapon into a floor, wall, or another sturdy surface, anchoring yourself in place.
notes: Gatewalkers Player's Guide (Remastered) pg. 9, Dark Archives (Remastered) pg. 100
A directed beam of heat or an arc of lightning is one of the simplest ways to project energy.

feats.name: Blade of Law (Lvl 10)
feats.description: You call upon the power of law against a foe who would dare stand against you.

feats.name: Blade of Law (Lvl 12)
feats.description: You call upon the power of law and make a weapon or unarmed Strike against a foe you have witnessed breaking or disrespecting the law or otherwise acting disorderly.

feats.name: Blade of the Crimson Oath
feats.description: You call upon the Crimson Oath to smite undead and then make a weapon or unarmed Strike against an undead foe.

feats.name: Blade of the Heart
feats.description: The bonds of the heart are stronger than any steel, more powerful than any magic.

feats.name: Blank Slate
feats.description: Your deceptions confound even the most powerful magic that could spy on you.

feats.name: Blanket Defense
feats.description: You become a bulwark against foes' attacks that target you and your allies.

feats.name: Blast Lock
feats.description: Sometimes taking the shortest distance between two points involves removing an obstacle or two.

feats.name: Blast Resistance
feats.description: You're used to the clamor of steel, the crack of a firearm, and the thunderous blast of explosions.

feats.name: Blast Tackle
feats.description: You throw yourself at an enemy, bracing your weapon against it and pulling it close before releasing a destructive shot.

feats.name: Blaze of Revelation
feats.description: Your mind and body can, for a short time and with great peril, surpass the final limits of your curse.

feats.name: Blazing Aura
feats.description: You explode in flame.

feats.name: Blazing Spirit
feats.description: Your apparition grants fiery defenses.

feats.name: Blazing Streak
feats.description: Stride twice, making Strikes against up to four different creatures within reach at any point during your movement.

feats.name: Blazing Wave
feats.description: Flames flow out of you in a cascade, engulfing everyone in a 30-foot cone.

feats.name: Bleak Humorist
feats.description: You’ve watched dozens of morbid comedies depicting Beldam I, Taldor’s prankster emperor whose wife accidentally killed him when she struck him with a marble bust after he jumped out from behind curtains to frighten her.

feats.name: Bleed Out
feats.description: You channel the residual energy from the last spell you cast into a ranged bloodletting.

feats.name: Bleeding Finisher
feats.description: Your blow inflicts profuse bleeding.

feats.name: Bless Shield
feats.description: Your uttered prayers become an aegis, drawing the blessing of your deity across the surface of your shield.
feats.prerequisites: Lastwall Sentry Dedication; you worship a good-aligned deity

feats.name: Bless Tonic
feats.description: You channel positive energy into restoratives that ward against harm
feats.prerequisites: Master in Crafting; deity who grants heal divine font

feats.name: Bless Toxin
feats.description: You pour negative energy into toxins you create to further debilitate your targets
feats.prerequisites: Master in Crafting; deity who grants harm divine font

feats.name: Blessed Blood (Nephilim)
feats.description: Your spilled blood is sanctified, with effects similar to those of holy water.

feats.name: Blessed Blood (Sorcerer)
feats.description: Your deity’s blessings manifest in your blood-borne power
feats.prerequisites: bloodline that grants divine spells; you follow a deity

feats.name: Blessed Counterstrike
feats.description: You call upon divine power and make a weapon or unarmed Strike against the enemy who triggered your champion's reaction.
feats.prerequisites: champion’s reaction that grants an ally resistance to an enemy’s damage (including the grandeur, justice, liberation, and redemption causes)

feats.name: Blessed Medicine
feats.description: Your experience battling undead has uniquely prepared you to fight the diseases they inflict on the survivors, and you know that leaving these maladies untreated for long will eventually lead to more undead.

feats.name: Blessed Sentinel
feats.description: You infuse a weapon with the blessing of Ketephys and attack.

feats.name: Blessed Thorn Strike
feats.description: When you see a foe hurt one of your allies, your righteous retribution causes your weapon to sprout holy thorns.

feats.name: Blessing of the Sun Gods
feats.description: The Old Sun Gods share their power with you.
feats.source: Pathfinder #172: Secrets of the Temple City pg. 79
feats.source_book: Pathfinder #172: Secrets of the Temple City

feats.name: Blind-Fight
feats.description: Your battle instincts make you more aware of concealed and invisible opponents.
feats.source: Player Core pg. 145, Player Core 2 pg. 109

feats.name: Blood and Spirit
feats.description: Your connection to the divine has sanctified your blood, but the power only manifests when you are shedding it.

feats.name: Blood Ascendancy
feats.description: When you would benefit from a blood magic effect through Blood Rising, you can choose to benefit from two different blood magic effects you know.

feats.name: Blood Calls Blood
feats.description: The magical potency of your blood will not be denied.

feats.name: Blood Component Substitution
feats.description: You can bypass the need for incantations and gestures by drawing energy directly from your blood, causing you to visibly glow the color of your blood and crackle with magical energy.

feats.name: Blood Frenzy
feats.description: Your eidolon flies into a frenzy.

feats.name: Blood in the Air
feats.description: Once you've locked on to a target, little can obscure your aim.

feats.name: Blood Like Water
feats.description: The watery fluid in your veins doesn’t flow in the same way as traditional blood.

feats.name: Blood Must Have Blood
feats.description: You tap into a bottomless hunger for carnage.

feats.name: Blood Rising
feats.description: The magic in your blood surges in response to your foe's spell.

feats.name: Blood Shield
feats.description: You raise a barrier of your own blood to protect you.

feats.name: Blood Sovereignty
feats.description: You wield blood magic masterfully.

feats.name: Bloodletting Claws
feats.description: Your eidolon inflicts bleeding wounds on a telling blow.

feats.name: Bloodletting Fangs
feats.description: You emulate your vampiric parent's techniques for drawing blood from a victim.

feats.name: Bloodline Breadth
feats.description: Your repertoire expands, and you can cast more spells of your bloodline’s tradition each day.

feats.name: Bloodline Conduit
feats.description: Your inborn magical nature lets you redirect ambient energies to fuel your spells.

feats.name: Bloodline Focus
feats.description: By listening to the beating of your heart, your focus recovers faster.

feats.name: Bloodline Metamorphosis
feats.description: Swap out spells from your repertoire more easily.

feats.name: Bloodline Mutation
feats.description: You permanently mutate to become more like the creatures of your bloodline.
feats.prerequisites: a bloodline based on a specific type of creature

feats.name: Bloodline Perfection
feats.description: You command the ultimate powers of your bloodline and tradition.

feats.name: Bloodline Resistance
feats.description: Your magical blood makes you more resistant to magic.

feats.name: Bloodrager Dedication
feats.description: Drinking powerful blood has awakened magical potential within you.

feats.name: Bloodsense
feats.description: You’re extraordinarily sensitive to the presence of blood.

feats.name: Bloodsoaked Dash
feats.description: Injuries don’t bother you anymore—in fact, the pain invigorates you.

feats.name: Bloody Blows
feats.description: Your lethal unarmed attacks leave bloody gouges or cause severe internal bleeding.

feats.name: Bloody Debilitation
feats.description: Your attacks slice arteries and veins.

feats.name: Bloody Denial
feats.description: You strike a foe with force to prevent them from reacting.

feats.name: Bloom Cabaret Entrance
feats.description: In socially exclusive venues like the Ivy District's Bloom Cabaret, you've learned how to make an entrance.

feats.name: Blowgun Poisoner
feats.description: You can capably deliver toxins with a blowgun.

feats.name: Boarding Party
feats.description: You're practiced at scaling ships, and even a wet and slippery exterior won't stand in your way.

feats.name: Boaster's Challenge
feats.description: You call out a foe, causing them to become flustered and easier to defeat.
feats.prerequisites: Expert in Deception, Expert in Diplomacy, or Expert in Intimidation; Firebrand Braggart Dedication
notes: Pathfinder #157: Devil at the Dreaming Palace pg. 79
You can force a creature to tell the truth

feats.name: Body Barrier
