feats.description: When your allies are in danger, you don’t hesitate to take the brunt of the blow for them.

feats.name: Body of Air
feats.description: Bodysnatcher
feats.prerequisites: Your gathered air consumes your body, leaving only a cloud of living vapor.
notes: Your secret-stealing maggots reveal how to devour more than just the flesh and secrets of a victim; you can ingest and assume their whole physical appearance.

feats.name: Bodyguard
feats.description: You swear a vow to protect one of your allies at all costs, regardless of the risk this might pose to you.

feats.name: Bold Defiance
feats.description: You harden your form as you dance between shapes.

feats.name: Bolster Ally
feats.description: You shout encouragement to your embattled ally.

feats.name: Bolster Soul Cage
feats.description: Your constant efforts to augment and perfect your soul cage have bolstered its efficiency.

feats.name: Bombing Run
feats.description: Using your elevation and speed to your advantage, you deliver aerial payloads with greater force.

feats.name: Bon Mot
feats.description: You launch an insightful quip at a foe, distracting them.

feats.name: Bond Companion
feats.description: You form a close bond with a companion, similar to that of a master and familiar, that lets you gift them with a touch of your inherent magic.

feats.name: Bond Conservation
feats.description: By efficiently and carefully manipulating the arcane energies unleashed by your bonded item, you can conserve just enough power to cast another spell, though this second spell is slightly weaker.

feats.name: Bonded Animal
feats.description: An animal becomes permanently easier to command
notes: Gatewalkers Player's Guide (Remastered) pg. 12, Dark Archives (Remastered) pg. 101
Sharp shards of bone tear forth from your elbows, wrists, or other parts of your body.
Your touch opens a conduit into the mind of your target, the emptiness within you pulling skills and memories through

feats.name: Bonded Focus
feats.description: Your connection to your bonded item increases your focus pool.

feats.name: Bonds of Death
feats.description: You sway with the motions of your spells that animate the dead, channeling your power to sustain two at the same time.

feats.name: Bone Caller
feats.description: Using a mixture of dinosaur bones and the bones of your ancestors to focus your magic, you animate lizards and dinosaurs to carry messages or serve as mounts.

feats.name: Bone Investiture
feats.description: You encase yourself in spiritual dinosaur bones to become a Huge dinosaur.

feats.name: Bone Magic
feats.description: Your connection to your iruxi ancestors manifests as a simple primal spell that you cast using a fragment of an ancestor's bones.

feats.name: Bone Missile
feats.description: You can remove your ribs to use them as arrows or bolts.

feats.name: Bone Swarm
feats.description: You scatter your body and transform into a whirling storm of bones for up to 1 minute or until you spend a single action to return to your normal shape.

feats.name: Bonekeeper's Bane
feats.description: Whenever an enemy starts its turn adjacent to you, it must attempt a Will saving throw against your class DC or spell DC, whichever is highest.

feats.name: Boneyard Acquaintance
feats.description: Before your soul returned from death, you interacted with a host of other souls on their way to the Boneyard.

feats.name: Boneyard's Call
feats.description: You have a powerful connection to the Boneyard and its courts, granting you the ability to travel to and from the Boneyard.

feats.name: Boost Modulation
feats.description: You aren't satisfied with keeping to just one kind of boost from your constant tinkering, so you've learned to modulate between several possibilities at once.

feats.name: Boost Summons
feats.description: Augmenting your eidolon extends to creatures you summon.

feats.name: Born to the Trees
feats.description: You adapt a creature to live among the trees, improving its ability to climb, balance, and leap.
feats.source: Pathfinder #202: Severed at the Root pg. 73

feats.name: Borrow Memories
feats.description: Knowing how someone thinks makes it much easier to know where they'll be, or even replace them altogether.

feats.name: Borrow Time
feats.description: You reach ahead and make use of time that's yet to be.

feats.name: Boulder Roll
feats.description: Your dwarven build allows you to push foes around, just like a mighty boulder tumbles through a subterranean cavern.

feats.name: Bounce Back
feats.description: You recover from near-death experiences with astounding resilience.

feats.name: Bouncy Goblin
feats.description: You have a particular elasticity that makes it easy for you to bounce and squish.

feats.name: Bound in Ice
feats.description: You become a hybrid of your ancestry and a saumen kar.

feats.name: Boundless Reprisals
feats.description: With a sixth sense for the flow of combat, you can quickly react to any situation as required.

feats.name: Brain Drain
feats.description: With a wresting of will, you siphon off a creature's mental energy to replenish your own.

feats.name: Brains!
feats.description: You consume the brains of your foe, causing synapses long rotten to fire and enabling you to shake off your mental torpor.

feats.name: Branched Tree Of Pain
feats.description: Immanence When you Strike with the ikon, you critically succeed if you roll a 19 on the die as long as that result would be a success.
feats.prerequisites: The blade of your ikon takes one or more notches, capable of dealing mortal pain to your foes.

feats.name: Branding Spell
feats.description: The flames of your magic mark a target as an enemy of order.
notes: Acid, Archetype, Divine, Incapacitation, Necromancy, Occult, Rare

You have uncovered occult mysteries that allow you to unleash the devastating hunger of Kabriri upon your foes with a single exhalation, releasing a massive cloud of flesh-eating gas that glows with a sickly green light.

feats.name: Brandishing Draw
feats.description: You draw and attack with the same motion.

feats.name: Brastlewark Snare Engineering
feats.description: You've trained with the Brastlewark gnomes or studied their teachings, and learned the art of crafting their more magical snares.

feats.name: Bravo's Determination
feats.description: Your confidence borders on self-delusion, but it keeps you going against overwhelming odds.
feats.prerequisites: Expert in Deception; Firebrand Braggart Dedication

feats.name: Breached Defenses
feats.description: You can find the one weak point in a creature's scales, wards, or armor to get past its resistances.

feats.name: Break Curse
feats.description: Master in Occultism or Master in Religion
feats.campaign: Use your knowledge to break curses

feats.name: Breath Control
feats.description: Hold your breath longer and gain benefits against inhaled threats

feats.name: Breath Like Honey
feats.description: You smell of honey and savory things.

feats.name: Breath of Calamity
feats.description: Your roar shakes the earth and splits the heavens.

feats.name: Breath of the Dragon
feats.description: Tapping into the physiology of your draconic ancestor, you can exhale a torrent of energy in a 15-foot cone or a 30-foot line, dealing 1d4 damage.

feats.name: Breath of Vital Ash
feats.description: Reddish ash stains your ikon, impossible to clean off.

feats.name: Breath Unleashed
feats.description: You’re able to channel more of your draconic benefactor’s power and focus it into your Kobold Breath, increasing its effectiveness but requiring more time to recover.

feats.name: Briar Battler
feats.description: When you're in difficult terrain from an environmental feature, you can Take Cover, even if the feature wouldn't ordinarily be large enough for you to Take Cover.

feats.name: Bright Lion Dedication
feats.description: You are one of the Bright Lions, part revolutionary warrior, part undercover spy.
feats.source: Pathfinder #172: Secrets of the Temple City pg. 79, Legends pg. 101
feats.source_book: Pathfinder #172: Secrets of the Temple City pg. 79, Legends
feats.prerequisites: member of the Bright Lions; not a worshipper of Walkena; Trained in Stealth

feats.name: Brightness Seeker
feats.description: Once per day, you can spend 10 minutes studying your surroundings in search of omens related to a particular course of action to cast augury as an innate divine spell.

feats.name: Brightsoul
feats.description: The fire inside you asserts itself as beaming, radiant light.

feats.name: Brilliant Crafter
feats.description: Your skill at crafting is unparalleled.

feats.name: Brilliant Flash
feats.description: Your light cleanses souls of fear.

feats.name: Brilliant Vision
feats.description: You ignore concealment from clouds, dust, fog, mist, smoke, and similarly loose matter.

feats.name: Brine May
feats.description: Your mother was a sea hag, granting you one sea-green or blue eye.

feats.name: Brinesoul
feats.description: Your elemental ancestor's legacy asserts itself as brackish water, like the seawater of the ocean.

feats.name: Briny Beverage
feats.description: You can survive off the sea as well as gain insight from its waters.

feats.name: Bristle
feats.description: You curl into a posture that splays out your bone spines.

feats.name: Broad Snare
feats.description: You can create longer snares for quick deployment, creating lines on the battlefield.

feats.name: Broadside Buckos
feats.description: Shimali Manux trains every Salt Breaker to fight in the cramped quarters below deck, and you've learned how to use these techniques with your crew.

feats.name: Brutal Beating
feats.description: Your critical hits shakes your foes’ confidence.

feats.name: Brutal Bully
feats.description: You push your foes around and leave bruises.

feats.name: Brutal Critical
feats.description: Your critical hits are particularly devastating.

feats.name: Brutal Crush
feats.description: You've learned how to cloud your foes' minds with the brutal impact of your repeated attacks.

feats.name: Brutal Finish
feats.description: Your final blow can make an impact even if it rebounds off a foe’s defenses.

feats.name: Brutish Shove
feats.description: Using the momentum of your last attack to throw your weight into another, you make your opponent stumble back.

feats.name: Buckler Dance
feats.description: You spin your buckler defensively toward every attack.

feats.name: Build the First Walls
feats.description: The powers of creation that run through you allow you to conjure a temporary wall.

feats.name: Built-In Tools
feats.description: You've built tools into your innovation so you can access and use them easily.

feats.name: Bullet Dancer Burn
feats.description: The fiery blaze of your weapons combined with your unorthodox technique leaves your opponents with little opportunity to capitalize on any gaps in your defenses, or properly defend themselves against your onslaught.

feats.name: Bullet Dancer Dedication
feats.description: You've learned how to synchronize traditional martial arts and guns.
feats.prerequisites: expert in unarmored defense and trained in unarmed attack

feats.name: Bullet Dancer Reload
feats.description: You've learned to reload your simple firearms with uncanny grace, the ammunition simply falling into place as though part of a well-practiced kata.

feats.name: Bullet Split
feats.description: You carefully align your weapon with the edge of your blade, splitting the projectile in two as you fire to attack two different targets.

feats.name: Bullseye
feats.description: You carefully take aim to avoid your foe’s concealment and cover.

feats.name: Bullying Staff
feats.description: You can Shove and Trip larger creatures.
feats.source: Pathfinder #151: The Show Must Go On pg. 75
feats.source_book: Pathfinder #151: The Show Must Go On

feats.name: Burn Identity
feats.description: You transport yourself up to 1 mile, as a 5th-rank translocate spell.

feats.name: Burn It!
feats.description: Fire fascinates you.

feats.name: Burning Jet
feats.description: A condensed burst of flame shoots behind you, propelling you forward with its sheer force.

feats.name: Burning Spell
feats.description: You enhance your spell with elemental fire, causing it to set the target on fire.
feats.prerequisites: Elementalist Dedication; fire is in your elemental philosophy

feats.name: Burrowing Form
feats.description: Your eidolon can burrow through loose dirt.

feats.name: Burrowing Shot
feats.description: You tune light mortar to maximize penetration into hard surfaces.

feats.name: Butterfly Blade Dedication
feats.description: You've trained in one of Goka's oldest traditions of espionage, intimidation, and combat mastery.
feats.source: Pathfinder #166: Despair on Danger Island pg. 78

feats.name: Butterfly's Kiss
feats.description: You can make nonlethal Strikes with a butterfly sword without taking a penalty.
feats.source: Pathfinder #166: Despair on Danger Island pg. 78

feats.name: Butterfly's Sting
feats.description: You gain the sneak attack class feature.
feats.source: Pathfinder #166: Despair on Danger Island pg. 78

feats.name: Buzzing Death Cicadas
feats.description: Your swarm takes on characteristics of the death cicadas of the Mana Wastes, whose distinctive buzz is said to be a herald of imminent demise.

feats.name: Cackle
feats.description: Your patron’s power fills you with confidence, letting you sustain a magical working even as a quick burst of laughter leaves your lips.

feats.name: Cadre
feats.description: Between your daring adventures, people seek you out.
feats.prerequisites: Captain Dedication; expert in Diplomacy or Intimidation

feats.name: Calaca's Showstopper
feats.description: You've spent many an evening learning songs and tales featuring calacas, death's wandering minstrels.

feats.name: Calcifying Sand
feats.description: Your flesh gives way as you're struck, becoming coarse sand that can magically turn your enemy to stone.

feats.name: Call and Response
feats.description: Your composition takes the form of a call-and-response chant that lets your allies continue the effect without you.

feats.name: Call Draconic Ally
feats.description: Either by beseeching a dragon or bending it to your will, you conjure a mighty creature to assist you.

feats.name: Call Gun
feats.description: You build a powerful magical connection with a chosen gun or crossbow, gaining the ability to conjure it directly to your hand from any distant location.

feats.name: Call Implement
feats.description: You can tug on the bonds of ownership between yourself and your implement, causing it to find its way back to you.

feats.name: Call of Elysium
feats.description: The wild wonder of Elysium harmonizes within you, and in dire straits, you can share its benefits with your allies.

feats.name: Call of the Green Man
feats.description: You can call forth nearby nature spirits to augment your body.

feats.name: Call of the Wild
feats.description: You call upon the creatures of nature to come to your aid.

feats.name: Call the First Tools
feats.description: You can call upon the ancient powers bestowed on you by the gods to create any tools you might need at a moment’s notice.

feats.name: Call The Hunt
feats.description: You instruct your allies on how best to defeat your prey.
notes: You can dodge away from damaging effects.
When you’ve decided to quash a story, no one can escape from you with any incriminating information.

feats.name: Call the Hurricane
feats.description: Call Ursine Ally
feats.prerequisites: Massive waves spiral around you, with you as the eye of the hurricane.
notes: You can cast a 3rd-rank summon animal as an innate spell, but only to summon a black bear.

feats.name: Call the Swarm
feats.description: You give a shrill whistle and point, and a massive swarm of rats pours forth from the surrounding terrain to fill a 30-foot burst within 120 feet.

feats.name: Call the Worm
feats.description: You gain summon animal, heightened to 9th level, as an innate primal spell that you can cast once per day, but can only summon a purple worm.
feats.source: Pathfinder #194: Cult of the Cave Worm pg. 81
feats.source_book: Pathfinder #194: Cult of the Cave Worm

feats.name: Call to Battle
feats.description: You channel the undying spirit of the einherjar to join to fight.

feats.name: Call Wizardly Tools
feats.description: You’re mystically connected to your wizardly tools, ensuring you can always find them when you’ve misplaced them.

feats.name: Call Worm Spirit
feats.description: You call forth a ghostly manifestation of the worm spirit.
feats.source: Pathfinder #194: Cult of the Cave Worm pg. 81
feats.source_book: Pathfinder #194: Cult of the Cave Worm

feats.name: Called
feats.description: You’ve heard the Call, and by resisting it, you’ve developed a bulwark against effects that target your mind.

feats.name: Called Shot
feats.description: You target a specific area of your foe's anatomy to debilitating effect.

feats.name: Callow May
feats.description: You are among the most common of changelings—those born to sweet hags—and a vibrant green eye signifies that parentage.

feats.name: Calm and Centered
feats.description: Your occult connection to the world helps you deal with being frightened or stupefied.

feats.name: Camoflage Coat
feats.description: You've learned to use your natural camouflage to your advantage, enhancing your ability to blend with your surroundings through careful movements and additional markings or attire.

feats.name: Camouflage
feats.description: You alter your appearance to blend in to the wilderness.

feats.name: Campfire Chronicler Dedication
feats.description: You’ve gained Isthralei’s attention and can now offer stories up to him

feats.name: Can't Fall Here
feats.description: You physically help an ally remain standing and encourage them to push through their pain against dire odds.

feats.name: Can't You See?
feats.description: The eye rebels, the mind recoils—no matter how much those who can see you try to explain what's there, their friends' gazes just skitter over you, like a bird afraid to land.
feats.prerequisites: Trained in Occultism; Expert in Stealth

feats.name: Cannibalize Magic
feats.description: The fey magic inside of you is a vital part of your body, and you can steal other sources of magic to replenish yours.

feats.name: Cannon Corner Shot
feats.description: By loading special ammunition in a particular way, you can make your siege weapons do all manner of tricks that other siege engineers can barely even imagine.

feats.name: Canny Acumen
feats.description: Become an expert in a saving throw or Perception

feats.name: Canopy Predator
feats.description: You are as at home in the treetops as you are beneath their branches.
feats.prerequisites: Verduran Shadow Dedication; Trained in Athletics

feats.name: Canopy Sight
feats.description: You can see equally well even in dense jungles where only a small amount of light shines through.

feats.name: Cantorian Reinforcement
feats.description: The life energy that helped create the first hobgoblins is particularly potent in you, protecting you from ongoing maladies.

feats.name: Cantorian Rejuvenation
feats.description: The life-giving energy that flows in your blood revitalizes you.

feats.name: Cantorian Restoration
feats.description: The energy that flows in your blood can save a life in the direst of times.

feats.name: Cantrip Casting
feats.description: You increase your ability to cast simple spells.

feats.name: Cantrip Expansion
feats.description: Study broadens your range of simple spells.
feats.source: Player Core pg. 101, Player Core 2 pg. 138

feats.name: Captain Dedication
feats.description: You become trained in your choice of Diplomacy or Intimidation; if you are already trained in both of these skills, you become trained in a skill of your choice.
feats.prerequisites: Charisma +2; you don't have an animal companion, construct companion, or other companion that functions similarly

feats.name: Captivating Curiosity
feats.description: You can snare the attentions of onlookers with your unique appearance.

feats.name: Captivating Intensity
feats.description: Your ability to captivate others has grown, and you can use your captivator abilities more often.

feats.name: Captivator Dedication
feats.description: Your ability to captivate others borders on the preternatural.
feats.prerequisites: Charisma 14; Trained in Deception or Trained in Diplomacy

feats.name: Capture Magic
feats.description: When you resist a spell, you capture some of its magic for your own use.

feats.name: Caravan Leader
feats.description: You know how to get the most effort out of your allies on the road.
notes: Gain RP when you critically succeed at Kingdom skills

feats.name: Cardinal Guardians
feats.description: You focus your divine magic to allow your apparitions to work in concert using the magic from one to weaken an enemy against the power of the next.

feats.name: Careful Explorer
feats.description: You gain a sixth sense for traps, noticing them even when you're not trying to.

feats.name: Caretaker's Intuition
feats.description: Your forebears had a deep understanding of the natural world around them, and you’ve learned some of their knowledge and techniques.

feats.name: Caretaker's Restoration
feats.description: The stewarding abilities of your forebears allows you to repair objects important to you.

feats.name: Carried with the Swarm
feats.description: When your swarm is sharing your space and Strides, you can choose to have your swarm carry you with it.

feats.name: Cascade Bearer's Flexibility
feats.description: You call upon your Cascade Bearer training to help you adjust a spell for the current situation.
feats.prerequisites: Magaambyan Attendant Dedication; Cascade Bearers affiliation

feats.name: Cascade Bearer's Spellcasting
feats.description: Your Cascade Bearer training allows you to broaden the horizons of your halcyon spells further than most Magaambyans, weaving in spiritual magic.
feats.prerequisites: Magaambyan Attendant Dedication; Cascade Bearers affiliation

feats.name: Cascade Countermeasure
feats.description: When in Arcane Cascade, you can make yourself resistant to magic.

feats.name: Cascading Ray
feats.description: Magical energy spills out to extend beyond the creature you struck.

feats.name: Cast Down
feats.description: The sheer force of your faith can bring a foe crashing down.

feats.name: Cast Out
feats.description: You attempt to cast a malevolent entity out of the creature or object it's possessing.

feats.name: Castigating Weapon
feats.description: The force of your deity’s castigation strengthens your body so you can strike down the enemy and its allies.

feats.name: Cat Fall
feats.description: Trained in Acrobatics
feats.campaign: Treat falls as shorter than they are

feats.name: Cat Nap
feats.description: You can regain your energy quickly with a brief nap.

feats.name: Cat's Luck
feats.description: You instinctively twist away from danger.

feats.name: Catch the Details
feats.description: You are quick at recognizing broad details about people and things around you.

feats.name: Catchy Tune
feats.description: You create a tune so catchy, your foes can't help but dance along.

feats.name: Caterwaul
feats.description: You give a daring yowl, calling your companion back from the brink of unconsciousness.

feats.name: Catfolk Dance
feats.description: You have a habit of always being in the way when other creatures attempt to move.

feats.name: Catfolk Lore
feats.description: Growing up among catfolk has taught you the traditional values of freedom, stewardship, and quick reactions to trouble.

feats.name: Catfolk Weapon Familiarity
feats.description: You gain access to all uncommon weapons with the catfolk trait.

feats.name: Cathartic Focus Spell
feats.description: You learn the focus spell listed under your emotion's entry.

feats.name: Cathartic Mage Dedication
feats.description: You've learned to harness a particular emotion and mix it into your magic.
feats.prerequisites: Charisma 14 or ability to cast spells from spell slots

feats.name: Catrina's Presence
feats.description: You've adopted the calming presence of catrinas, the festive dead..

feats.name: Cattle Speech
feats.description: You can understand the lowing of cattle and similar animals as its own language.

feats.name: Cauldron
feats.description: You can brew magic in your cauldron, creating useful magical concoctions.

feats.name: Caustic Nectar
feats.description: You have specialized glands inside your throat, which produce acidic nectar that you can spit long distances.
feats.source: Pathfinder #202: Severed at the Root pg. 69

feats.name: Cauterize
feats.description: You use the smoking barrel of your firearm to sear shut a bleeding wound.

feats.name: Cautious Curiosity
feats.description: You've learned a few magical techniques for getting yourself both into and out of trouble unnoticed.
feats.prerequisites: at least one arcane or occult innate spell gained from a gnome heritage or gnome ancestry feat

feats.name: Cautious Word
feats.description: You let your words defend you, just as your allies in the Vellumis Scholars defend through knowledge.
feats.prerequisites: Uzunjati Storytelling; ability to cast shield

feats.name: Cave Climber
feats.description: After years of clambering through caverns, you can climb easily anywhere you go.

feats.name: Cayden's Freedom
feats.description: Even if you've never downed a tankard of ale nor indulged in a night of rowdy revelry, you appreciate the dedication to freedom from Cayden Cailean and his worshippers.

feats.name: Ceaseless Shadows
feats.description: You excel at going unnoticed, especially among a crowd.

feats.name: Cel Rau
feats.description: You are a cel rau, child of a strigoi, one of the first vampires to walk Golarion.

feats.name: Celestial Cacophony
feats.description: Your weapon contains a detonation chamber that launches fireworks, sparklers, and black powder pellets that sizzle, twist, and scatter on the ground in a cacophonous manner liable to annoy the entire Celestial Court.

feats.name: Celestial Form
feats.description: You take on a celestial countenance, gaining the features of a type of celestial who serves your deity; for example, as an angel, you gain a halo and feathery wings.

feats.name: Celestial Magic
feats.description: You possess celestial magic.
feats.prerequisites: Angelkin, Lawbringer, Musetouched, or another lineage feat associated with celestials

feats.name: Celestial Mercy
feats.description: Your celestial powers allow you to remove lesser afflictions with ease.
feats.prerequisites: Angelkin, Lawbringer, Musetouched, or another lineage feat associated with celestials
notes: Your connection to good arms all your attacks against forces of evil.

feats.name: Cellular Reconstruction
feats.description: Your ostilli takes control of your nervous system and kicks your cellular functions into overdrive when you're about to die.

feats.name: Cenotaph Stance
feats.description: You take on a stance that marks your location as a place where none will fall.

feats.name: Centaur Lore
feats.description: You've learned how to nurture your environment and to care for your people.

feats.name: Centaur Weapon Familiarity
feats.description: You've trained in the weapons favored by your people, becoming a skilled archer and jouster.

feats.name: Ceremonial Knife
feats.description: You have prepared a special knife to direct energies when spellcasting.

feats.name: Ceremony of Aeon's Guidance
feats.description: Your patron aeon has allowed you to call upon their gifts to serve their ends.

feats.name: Ceremony of Aeon's Shield
feats.description: Your patron aeon graced you with powers of protection.

feats.name: Ceremony of Fortification
feats.description: Your exoskeleton arranges itself into an optimal defensive shape.

feats.name: Ceremony of Growth
feats.description: You can alter your exoskeleton's size.

feats.name: Ceremony of Knowledge
feats.description: You tap into aeon knowledge.

feats.name: Ceremony of Protection
feats.description: You manipulate your exoskeleton to overlap itself.

feats.name: Ceremony of Sun's Gift
feats.description: Your connection to the sun has become an unbreakable bond.

feats.name: Ceremony of Sunlight
feats.description: You have learned how to master the power contained within sunlight, just like the trees that form your body.

feats.name: Ceremony of the Evened Hand
feats.description: You have cultivated your exoskeleton's form for close combat, using knots, whorls, and reinforced branches.

feats.name: Ceremony of the Strengthened Hand
feats.description: Your exoskeleton's weapons are even more potent.

feats.name: Certain Strategem
feats.description: You know exactly where to strike a foe to target their weak spots.

feats.name: Certain Strike
feats.description: Even when you don’t hit squarely, you can still score a glancing blow.

feats.name: Chain Infusion
feats.description: The elemental matter in your blast keeps reconstituting itself to travel onward, no matter how many bodies it collides with.

feats.name: Chain Reaction
feats.description: You fire your gun once, creating a devastating and unpredictable chain of events; perhaps your bullet strikes exactly the right spot on a water tower, causing it to flood and incite a stampede of horses which knock over a lantern that sets a city on fire.

feats.name: Chaining Mutation
feats.description: The dart fired by your ostilli can ricochet to strike another creature.

feats.name: Challenge Insight
feats.description: Your deep grasp of the mystical lets you know exactly what to say to make others doubt how well they understand the source of their own power.

feats.name: Champion Dedication
feats.description: Choose a deity.

feats.name: Champion Resiliency
feats.description: You gain 3 additional Hit Points for each champion archetype class feat you have.
feats.prerequisites: Champion Dedication; class granting no more Hit Points per level than 8 + your Constitution modifier

feats.name: Champion's Reaction
feats.description: You can gain and use the champion’s reaction associated with your cause

feats.name: Champion's Sacrifice
feats.description: You can suffer so that others might live.

feats.name: Chance Death
feats.description: Your previous life ended due to sheer poor luck, struck by lightning or choking on a fish bone.

feats.name: Change of Face
feats.description: You know that for the best disguise to work, one requires not only the right skills but also the right look—luckily you can copy both using special magical techniques.

feats.name: Changeling Lore
feats.description: Channeler's Stance
feats.prerequisites: All too aware of your true nature, you’ve studied hags and their powers.
notes: You enter a stance that allows power to flow through you.

feats.name: Channel Rot
feats.description: You've learned to channel your curse through weapons you wield instead of solely through your flesh.

feats.name: Channel Smite
feats.description: You siphon the energies of life and death through a melee attack and into your foe.

feats.name: Channel the Godmind
feats.description: You tap into the collective consciousness of the Godmind, the governing entity of axiomite society, to rapidly parse near-infinite variables to read your surroundings.

feats.name: Channeled Protection
feats.description: Your apparition uses excess energy to protect you.

feats.name: Channeling Block
feats.description: You pour divine energy into a desperate block.

feats.name: Chaotic Spell
feats.description: Your foe can hardly predict and counter your moves if you yourself have no idea what will happen.

feats.name: Charged Creation
feats.description: Your magic is drawn to your persistent creations.

feats.name: Charlatan
feats.description: You’ve learned to mimic the abilities of spellcasters by studying their flourishes and words

feats.name: Charmed Life
feats.description: When danger calls, you have a strange knack for coming out on top.

feats.name: Charmed Sleep
feats.description: When you sleep, you turn into an inanimate object a little smaller than a human’s thumb—easily overlooked and carried.

feats.name: Charming Liar
feats.description: Trained in Deception
feats.campaign: Improve a target’s attitude with your lies

feats.name: Charred Remains
feats.description: Your next fire spell leaves embers in its wake.

feats.name: Chastise
feats.description: With but a mere word from your deity, you exploit a foe’s fear to see their inner being brought low.

feats.name: Cheat Death
feats.description: Somehow you always escape the reaper by a hair's breadth.

feats.name: Cheek Pouches
feats.description: Your cheeks are stretchy, and you can store up to four items of light Bulk or less in these cheek pouches.

feats.name: Chemical Purification
feats.description: You developed a method to chemically purify and consecrate your bombs on the fly.

feats.name: Chemical Trail
feats.description: You can leave a faint chemical trail as you move and can use the chemical trails of other surkis to navigate.

feats.name: Childlike Plant
feats.description: You’re adept at hiding your plantlike features to pass as a human.
feats.prerequisites: Chrysanthemum Leshy heritage or Peachchild Leshy heritage

feats.name: Choking Smoke
feats.description: When you cast fireball, you can modify it to create a cloud of smoking smoke.

feats.name: Chorus Companion
feats.description: Animals can be musical partners as much as the subjects or audience.

feats.name: Chosen of Lamashtu
feats.description: You bear the favor and blessings of Lamashtu, the Mother of Monsters.

feats.name: Chromotherapy
feats.description: You firmly believe in the technique of strengthening one's life force, spiritual energies, and bodily fluids through the application of colored light.

feats.name: Chronocognizance
feats.description: The flows and ebbs of time are obvious to you, as are the tangles that form when it's distorted.
feats.prerequisites: Time Mage Dedication; master in Perception

feats.name: Chronomancer's Secrets
feats.description: The secrets of time peel back, revealing deeper truths.

feats.name: Chronoskimmer Dedication
feats.description: You became partially unstuck from time and have learned how to manipulate your place in the flow of time.

feats.name: Cindersoul
feats.description: The fire of your elemental ancestor manifests like dying embers of a blaze, and your inner charcoal helps staunch bleeding, purify simple poisons, and absorb acid.

feats.name: Circle of Spirits
feats.description: With a thought, word, or gesture, you reach your mind out to another spirit.

feats.name: City Scavenger
feats.description: Civil Service
feats.prerequisites: You know that the greatest treasures often look like refuse.

feats.name: Claim the Field
feats.description: You hurl your banner forward with precision, claiming the battlefield for yourself and your allies.

feats.name: Clan Lore
feats.description: Your identity as a member of your clan is as central to your sense of self as your dwarven ancestry.

feats.name: Clan Pistol
feats.description: Raised in the ancient halls of Dongun Hold or the surrounding region, you display your lineage with a clan pistol, rather than a clan dagger.

feats.name: Clan Protector
feats.description: Your clan dagger can protect your allies as easily as yourself.

feats.name: Clan's Edge
feats.description: By moving your clan dagger with rapid precision, you can protect yourself more effectively.

feats.name: Clang!
feats.description: You make a foe pay for attacking you as its blow or spell glances off your armor.

feats.name: Claw and Talon Flow
feats.description: You fluidly shift between your two stances.

feats.name: Claw Snag
feats.description: You hook into the target, pulling yourself forward and rending flesh.

feats.name: Clawdancer Dedication
feats.description: You've practiced the art of fighting with your natural claws, hooking them into prey and thrashing at targets surrounding you.
feats.prerequisites: permanent unarmed claw or talon attack (such as one granted by your ancestry or a graft)

feats.name: Clean Take
feats.description: Thanks to many long hours of rehearsals, your acting skill is infinitely adaptable.

feats.name: Cleansing Light
feats.description: A burst of light from your horn cleanses your allies of ailments and sends your foes reeling.

feats.name: Cleansing Subroutine
feats.description: Your nanites help purge your body of harmful chemicals and toxins.

feats.name: Cleansing Transformation
feats.description: You learn to cleanse bodily toxins alongside the transformations of your shape-changing magic.

feats.name: Clear as Air
feats.description: Compact layers of air diffract and bend light around your body, making you appear as clear as the sky on a perfect day.

feats.name: Cleave
feats.description: You swing clear through one foe and into another.

feats.name: Cleric Dedication
feats.description: You cast spells like a cleric.

feats.name: Clever Counterspell
feats.description: You creatively apply your prepared spells to Counterspell a much wider variety of your opponents’ magic.

feats.name: Clever Gambit
feats.description: Your battle tactics are aided by assessing your foe’s capabilities and range.
notes: You can animate corpses through cunning engineering.

feats.name: Clever Improviser
feats.description: You’ve learned how to handle situations when you’re out of your depth.

feats.name: Clever Shadow
feats.description: You can perform simple Interact actions with your shadow, such as opening an unlocked door.

feats.name: Climate Adaptation
feats.description: Like evergreen trees, which stay healthy and vibrant from winter through summer, you too can adapt to a variety of extreme climates.

feats.name: Climbing Claws
feats.description: You can extend your claws to aid you in climbing.

feats.name: Climbing Tail
feats.description: Your tail makes it much easier for you to climb.

feats.name: Cling
feats.description: You hang onto a foe to harry them into submission.

feats.name: Clinging Climber
feats.description: You climb like a spider.

feats.name: Clinging Shadows Initiate
feats.description: You learn a mystical stance that transforms your qi into sticky smoke that shrouds your limbs.

feats.name: Clinging to Life
feats.description: This life still holds much for you, and you aren’t ready to fall back into the River of Souls just yet.

feats.name: Cloak of Poison
feats.description: You secrete a cloak of concentrated poison that harms any who dare attack you.

feats.name: Cloaking Pulse
feats.description: Your ostilli can emit illusion magic to mask your position, granting you the Drape Ambient Magic action.
feats.campaign: Drape Ambient Magic [one-action] (illusion) Frequency once per round; Effect Your ostilli turns clear as it converts its stored magic into a bubble of refracting light around you.

feats.name: Clobber
feats.description: With a mighty blow, you send an enemy flying backward and onto the ground.

feats.name: Clockwork Celerity
feats.description: You can use unstable clockwork devices in your innovation to push your invention to act more quickly.

feats.name: Clone-Risen
feats.description: You were formed from a clone ritual or alchemical experiment.

feats.name: Close Contract
feats.description: You’re bolstered when a plan comes together.

feats.name: Close Formation
feats.description: You practiced fan dance as a member of a large group, coordinating your moves together to create living art and heightening your sense of spatial awareness.
feats.prerequisites: Fan Dancer Dedication; Master in Performance

feats.name: Close Quarters
feats.description: If you're Small or smaller, you can end your movement in the same square as a Small or smaller ally.

feats.name: Clotting Elixirs
feats.description: Your restorative concoctions have a clotting effect on the drinker's blood.

feats.name: Cloud Gazer
feats.description: Your connection to air allows you to see through obscuring mists.

feats.name: Cloud Jump
feats.description: Legendary in Athletics

feats.name: Cloud Step
feats.description: Using fantastic acrobatic skill, you can walk for brief stretches across insubstantial surfaces.

feats.name: Cloud Walk
feats.description: Your growing link to cloud dragons has granted you the ability to walk on clouds.

feats.name: Clue Them All In
feats.description: You can clue in all your allies at once.

feats.name: Coating of Slime
feats.description: An acidic ooze coats your limbs.

feats.name: Cobble Dancer
feats.description: You know how to take advantage of foes thrown off-balance by unstable flooring, loose cobblestones, or similar impediments.

feats.name: Cobra Envenom
feats.description: You slightly dislocate your joints to lash out with devious intent and the power to envenom your foe.
feats.prerequisites: Cobra Stance; expert in unarmed strikes

feats.name: Cobra Stance
feats.description: You enter a tightly coiled stance, with your hands poised as venomous fangs.

feats.name: Coffin Bound
feats.description: You bind your spirit to a coffin filled with soil of your homeland, making it a place of recovery.

feats.name: Cognitive Loophole
feats.description: You can find a loophole in a mental effect to temporarily overcome it.

feats.name: Cold Iron Stomach
feats.description: You have steeled yourself against potent odors.
feats.source: Pathfinder #210: Whispers in the Dirt pg. 81

feats.name: Cold Minded
feats.description: The subtle strands of beguiling magic leave little impression on your mind.

feats.name: Collapse
feats.description: You collapse into a pile of bones, mitigating the worst of the damage you would have taken, and the triggering attack deals only the amount it would deal on a hit (typically full damage instead of double damage).

feats.name: Collapse Armor
feats.description: You've modified your armor innovation to collapse into a more compact form so you can don or remove it in an instant.

feats.name: Collapse Construct
feats.description: You've modified your construct companion and built it out of light materials, enabling you to collapse it into a carrying case or other compact and innocuous form.

feats.name: Collapse Wall
feats.description: You detonate the required bombs in order to bring a wall down on a creature.

feats.name: Collateral Thrash
feats.description: You smack the foe you're thrashing into someone else.

feats.name: Colugo's Traversal
feats.description: Forbidding valleys and sheer cliffs can’t curb your vows to reunite the lost.

feats.name: Combat Assessment
feats.description: You make a telegraphed attack to learn about your foe.

feats.name: Combat Climber
feats.description: Trained in Athletics
feats.campaign: Fight more effectively as you Climb

feats.name: Combat Grab
feats.description: Using your prior attack to shift your opponent’s guard, you take another swing and grab them.

feats.name: Combat Premonition
feats.description: By narrowing your sense of the future, you can improve that of your allies.

feats.name: Combat Reading
feats.description: Command Corpse
feats.prerequisites: You use a performer’s cold reading techniques, aura reading, and other tricks to discover your foe’s strengths and weaknesses.
notes: Corpse Tender Dedication; ability to cast harm
You gain the Command Undead feat, but you can use it only to transform the effects of harm spells you cast on mindless undead.

feats.name: Combination Finisher
feats.description: You combine a series of attacks with a powerful finishing blow.

feats.name: Combine Elixirs
feats.description: You can add the full ingredients of a second elixir to an elixir you make to create a hybrid concoction.

feats.name: Combined Form
feats.description: Cooperation and coordination are the secrets to getting by in tanuki society.

feats.name: Come and Get Me
feats.description: You open yourself to attacks so you can respond in turn.

feats.name: Come at Me!
feats.description: You're a legendary duelist, welcoming all challengers, enabling you to challenge many foes even while other challenges are active.

feats.name: Comforting Presence
feats.description: Your occult connection to your allies lets you take on fear and confusion they feel.

feats.name: Command Elemental
feats.description: You grasp the animating force within an elemental creature and bend it to your will.

feats.name: Commander Dedication
feats.description: You gain the tactics class feature like a commander and gain your own folio; this folio contains two common mobility or offensive tactics of your choosing.

feats.name: Commander's Companion
feats.description: You gain the service of a young animal companion. You can affix your banner to your companion.

feats.name: Commitment to Equality
feats.description: You help an ally shake off any impediment that would give an enemy an unfair advantage.
feats.prerequisites: Eagle Knight Dedication; Expert in Diplomacy

feats.name: Commitment to Justice
feats.description: When your allies are harmed, you deliver retribution.

feats.name: Commitment to Liberty
feats.description: You can’t abide when a foe has one of your allies in its grip.

feats.name: Commitment to Protection
feats.description: You attempt to guide an ally into a more defensive pose against a particular danger.
feats.prerequisites: Golden Legionnaire Dedication; Expert in Warfare Lore

feats.name: Commitment to Valor
feats.description: While fear might distract you from your duty, it'll never cause you to abandon it.

feats.name: Commitment to Vigilance
feats.description: Your foes find it difficult to maneuver around you without attracting your attention.

feats.name: Communal Crafting
feats.description: Expert in Crafting
feats.campaign: Other PCs can help you Craft

feats.name: Communal Healing
feats.description: You’re an exceptional conduit for vitality and, as you channel it through you, you can divert some to heal yourself or another creature.

feats.name: Communal Tale
feats.description: Stories are an experience meant to be shared as a group.
feats.source: Pathfinder #170: Spoken on the Song Wind pg. 78
feats.source_book: Pathfinder #170: Spoken on the Song Wind

feats.name: Community Knowledge
feats.description: You commune with the psychic echoes of your ancestors and community, channeling their experiences into yourself.

feats.name: Community-Minded
feats.description: You are familiar with all the members of your community and their typical movements, and you have learned how to apply these patterns outside those circles.

feats.name: Companion's Cry
feats.description: You can urge your companion to do its utmost.

feats.name: Complete the Hero's Journey
feats.description: As your divine spark travels through each of your ikons in turn, it gains power, culminating its journey when it enters your third ikon.

feats.name: Compliant Gold
feats.description: You can command your weapon to shrink or grow, for convenience or power.

feats.name: Conceal Spell
feats.description: Through sheer mental effort, you can simplify the incantations and gestures needed to spellcast, leaving them barely noticeable.

feats.name: Concealing Legerdemain
feats.description: Rather than hide an object somewhere the inspectors won't search, you're skilled at keeping the object on the move so it's never where they look.

feats.name: Conceited Mindset
feats.description: Because you know your mind is superior, you scoff at anyone who would alter your mental state—but this hubris gets the better of you when you're wrong.

feats.name: Concentrated Assault
feats.description: You and your spotter combine your efforts to bring down your target.

feats.name: Conductive Sphere
feats.description: A floating metal ball forms in a space within 30 feet, flashing with electricity.

feats.name: Conductor's Redirection
feats.description: You conduct electrical damage through your body.

feats.name: Conduit of Void and Vitality
feats.description: You use the unstable energy of your curse to manipulate the most basic of divine magic.

feats.name: Confabulator
feats.description: Reduce the bonuses against your repeated lies
notes: Gatewalkers Player's Guide (Remastered) pg. 9, Dark Archives (Remastered) pg. 100
Your connection to energy is so much stronger than the offending display in front of you, allowing you to claim it for yourself.

feats.name: Conflux Focus
feats.description: You imagine how you'll weave magic and combat into future battles, improving your focus.

feats.name: Conflux Wellspring
feats.description: You've achieved perfect magical and physical balance, allowing magic to flow into and through you more easily.

feats.name: Confounding Image
feats.description: When you cast mirror image, you can modify it to create a duplicate of yourself.
feats.prerequisites: Spell Trickster Dedication; ability to cast mirror image

feats.name: Confusing Commands
feats.description: You shout out bewildering but authoritative commands while imitating the voices, linguistic quirks, and speech patterns of your opponents.

feats.name: Conjure Hell
feats.description: Though you might not worship Asmodeus or other devils, you've studied enough of Hell to call forth a brief burst of its fire.

feats.name: Connect the Dots
feats.description: Ephemeral connections between people, places, and concepts are invisible to most, but seeing them is your stock and trade.

feats.name: Conrasu Lore
feats.description: You have learned about your history and your people from shapers.

feats.name: Conrasu Weapon Expertise
feats.description: Whenever you gain a class feature that grants you expert or greater proficiency in certain weapons, you also gain that proficiency for conrasu weapons.

feats.name: Conrasu Weapon Familiarity
feats.description: You have taken it upon yourself to learn the ways of combat to aid with your tasks, perhaps in a role as a corrector.

feats.name: Conrasu Weapon Understanding
feats.description: You have come to know conrasu weapons as you know yourself.

feats.name: Conscious Spell Specialization
feats.description: You become more adept with the spells that are always in your mind.

feats.name: Consecrate Spell
feats.description: You infuse a spell with the power of your faith, consecrating it.
feats.prerequisites: ability to cast focus spells, divine spells

feats.name: Consecrated Aura
feats.description: Your body radiates positive energy, making your very presence disorienting to undead and encouraging them to move away from you.

feats.name: Consistent Surge
feats.description: Your nanites are incredibly effective, capable of improving your body's efficiency regularly.

feats.name: Consolidated Overlay Panopticon
feats.description: You volunteered for a controversial experimental procedure to install clockwork prosthetic eyes.

feats.name: Constant Gaze
feats.description: Your eyes keep a continual watch for dangers from all sides.

feats.name: Constant Levitation
feats.description: Your power has unbound you from the earth below.

feats.name: Constricting Hold
feats.description: Your eidolon constricts the creature, dealing bludgeoning damage equal to your eidolon's level plus its Strength modifier, with a basic Fortitude save against your spell DC.

feats.name: Construct Shell
feats.description: You've adjusted your construct innovation so that when you ride it, special plates, hollows, or similar form partial barriers around you to add additional protection.

feats.name: Consult the Spirits
feats.description: You have learned rites or meditations that enable you to perceive minor, invisible spirits within a place.
feats.prerequisites: Master in Occultism, Master in Nature, or Master in Religion

feats.name: Consult the Spirits (Rivethun Emissary)
feats.description: You spend 1 hour communing with powerful spirits of the world to gain insight, information, or advice.

feats.name: Consult the Stars
feats.description: You find wisdom in the movements of the heavens.

feats.name: Consume Magic
feats.description: You consume the magic of an incoming spell or effect to protect your allies, though you might give yourself indigestion.

feats.name: Consume Power
feats.description: You absorb energy and hold it in your kinetic gate.

feats.name: Contact with the Enemy
feats.description: You know that even the best-laid plans rarely survive contact with the enemy, and you have prepared your allies to adapt with a wide array of contingencies.

feats.name: Contagious Rage
feats.description: You can drive your allies into a frenzy, granting them incredible benefits.

feats.name: Contingency Gadgets
feats.description: You are too brilliant to be caught off guard, and you always have just the right gadget for the situation.
notes: You distract an opponent from the fact that one of your allies is about to attack them.

feats.name: Continual Recovery
feats.description: Expert in Medicine
feats.campaign: Treat Wounds on a patient more often

feats.name: Continuous Assault
feats.description: You can use Elemental Assault once per hour instead of once per day.

feats.name: Contortionist
feats.description: You can squeeze out of tight situations by twisting and bending your body into unnatural positions, gaining an advantage against foes that try to pin you down.
notes: You easily tend to the wounds of the dead.

feats.name: Contract Negotiator
feats.description: Your experience with bargaining and deciding terms as part of Highhelm's guilds helps you make deals in other situations.
notes: Leaders gain increased bonuses to aid each other

feats.name: Control Tower
feats.description: Your keen senses and ability to process battlefield information have dramatically improved, allowing you to drastically reduce the advantage of unseen foes.

feats.name: Controlled Blast
feats.description: You maximize the effectiveness of your explosives by controlling every possible parameter of the blast meticulously.

feats.name: Controlled Bullet
feats.description: You create a direct magical connection with your beast gun, allowing you to guide the beast gun's next shot by taking control of the projectile directly.

feats.name: Converge
feats.description: Informing your ally of an opening created by your shot, you coordinate to set them up to hit the target at the same time.

feats.name: Convergent Tides
feats.description: Your footwork is like the convergence of tides, granting your body supernatural power and fluidity.

feats.name: Convincing Illusion
feats.description: You use your deceptive skills to make your illusions seem even more real.

feats.name: Convocation of Earth and Moon
feats.description: You call upon Mother Earth and Father Moon to fill you with light.

feats.name: Cooperative Crafting
feats.description: You've learned to make the most of working with others on your crafting projects, a must when working with the various guilds of Highhelm.
notes: You have a connection to mindless undead that allows you to communicate your intentions to them on a rudimentary level.

feats.name: Cooperative Nature
feats.description: The short human life span lends perspective and has taught you from a young age to set aside differences and work with others to achieve greatness.

feats.name: Cooperative Soul
feats.description: You have developed a soul-deep bond with your comrades and maintain an even greater degree of cooperation with them.

feats.name: Coordinated Tactics
feats.description: You and your follower fight in tandem.

feats.name: Coral Detoxification
feats.description: The coral colony that you've tended has merged with your kidneys to add an additional layer of filtration.

feats.name: Coral Growth
feats.description: The difference between yourself and your coral symbiotes is nearly impossible to tell apart as your bodies are so intertwined.

feats.name: Coral Lifeline
feats.description: Your coral symbiotes have grown into your bloodstream and are now curled around your heart.

feats.name: Coral Reserve
feats.description: Your coral symbiotes provide a store of energy that you can call upon when needed.

feats.name: Coral Symbiotes
feats.description: You've tended to your coral jewelry so well that you have formed a symbiotic relationship with it.

feats.name: Core Attunement
feats.description: Your core allows you to draw more power from it.

feats.name: Core Cannon
feats.description: Your body transforms into a powerful magical cannon.

feats.name: Core Rejuvenation
feats.description: Your soul taps into your core's power to push against the grasp of death and allow you to recover consciousness.

feats.name: Corgi Mount
feats.description: The smallest of fey have ridden corgis as mounts since time immemorial, leading to a pattern on corgis' backs called a “faerie saddle.

feats.name: Cornered Animal
feats.description: You become more dangerous when surrounded by enemies.

feats.name: Cornered Fury
feats.description: If a foe of a larger size than you critically hits and damages you, that foe is off-guard to you for 1 round.

feats.name: Corpse Stench
feats.description: Your body exudes an overwhelming scent of decay in a 10-foot emanation, so putrid that it nauseates creates within that range.

feats.name: Corpse-Killer's Defiance
feats.description: You defy Tar-Baphon with every undead you destroy, using your victory to rally your allies.

feats.name: Corrupted Shield
feats.description: Your shield ally is more than just a spirit of protection— it's a conduit for deadly divine magic.

feats.name: Cosmic Cocktail
feats.description: Using the liquors, vinegars, and fruits or herbs at your disposal, you spend 1 minute to create a cocktail with colors reminiscent of space and its stars.

feats.name: Costume Change
feats.description: Enough of your life has been spent performing that you’ve mastered the art of the quick change—especially when it comes to armor or invested items.
feats.prerequisites: Acrobat Dedication or Celebrity Dedication; Quick Disguise; Master in Performance

feats.name: Coughing Dragon Display
feats.description: This display emits a cascade of loud bangs or glittering trails.
feats.source: Guns & Gears (Remastered) pg. 134, Guns & Gears (Remastered) pg. 134

feats.name: Counter Curse
feats.description: You gather the energy of your maelstrom and fling its unleashed power into the enemy's curse, attempting to neutralize it.

feats.name: Counter Element
feats.description: Your absolute dedication to a single element lets you attempt to gain control over it, even when the element is in service to another entity.

feats.name: Counter Perform
feats.description: You gain the counter performance composition spell.

feats.name: Counter Thought
feats.description: When a foe Casts a Spell that has the mental trait and you can see its manifestations, you can use your own mental magic to disrupt it.

feats.name: Countercharm
feats.description: Your enchantments and illusions are so dominant that you can use them to counteract similar magic cast by others.

feats.name: Counterclockwork Focus
feats.description: You understand the need for law enforcement doctrine to adapt to the ever-changing innovations in technology and arcana.

feats.name: Counterspell
feats.description: When a foe Casts a Spell and you can see its manifestations, you can use your magic to disrupt it.

feats.name: Courageous Advance
feats.description: With a rousing call, you exhort an ally to advance.

feats.name: Courageous Assault
feats.description: With a mighty shout, you can stir an ally to attack.

feats.name: Courageous Onslaught
feats.description: You use your performance to orchestrate an onslaught against your enemies.

feats.name: Courteous Comeback
feats.description: You grew up in the proud Padishah Empire, where even insults have a certain poetic wit.

feats.name: Courtly Graces
feats.description: Trained in Society

feats.name: Coven Spell
feats.description: You rhyme with your ally’s incantations or echo their movements, linking your magic to empower their spell in one of two ways.

feats.name: Cover Fire
feats.description: You lay down suppressive fire to protect allies by forcing foes to take cover from your wild attacks.

feats.name: Covering Stance
feats.description: Your very presence on the field of battle protects nearby allies from harm.

feats.name: Covet Hoard
feats.description: You have a dragon’s desire for treasure.

feats.name: Cozy Campfire
feats.description: You spend 1 hour building a campfire in a single unoccupied square and whispering the stories of those you’ve met on your journeys.

feats.name: Crack Retort
feats.description: You can use Reactive Strike with a loaded firearm you're wielding.
feats.prerequisites: Reactive Strike; trained in martial firearms

feats.name: Cracked Mountain
feats.description: You fight on, staying on your feet and lashing out at a foe.

feats.name: Craft Anything
feats.description: Legendary in Crafting
feats.campaign: Ignore most requirements for crafting items

feats.name: Craft Philosopher's Stone
feats.description: Your research has paid off, culminating in the legendary philosopher's stone.

feats.name: Crafter's Appraisal
feats.description: Your knowledge of items' construction allows you to discern their magical effects as well.

feats.name: Crafter's Instinct
feats.description: You sense a minor flaw in the weapon as you fire it, and quickly adjust your aim on the fly to avoid the flaw.

feats.name: Crane Flutter
feats.description: You interpose your arm between yourself and your opponent.

feats.name: Crane Stance
feats.description: Your arms flutter like a crane's wings.

feats.name: Cranial Detonation
feats.description: As your overwhelming psyche fells a creature, you use its flickering consciousness to detonate psychic energy from the creature's head.

feats.name: Crashing Slam
feats.description: You can dash your foe to the ground with a single blow.

feats.name: Cratering Drop
feats.description: You follow up your enemy's fall, driving you both to the earth in a meteoric descent.

feats.name: Crawling Fire
feats.description: You mimic the motions of a beast of your devising, and it becomes real, with a flaming pelt and searing claws.

feats.name: Crawling Form
feats.description: You can transform into a small animal or celestial creature to scurry and spy.
feats.prerequisites: Born of Animal heritage or Born of Celestial heritage

feats.name: Creative Prodigy
feats.description: You have a powerful creative drive that is clear to any who interact with you.

feats.name: Creature Comforts
feats.description: You've found comfort in the forms of other creatures, insulating yourself from feelings of fear.

feats.name: Creed Magic
feats.description: You’ve expanded your divine capabilities, granting you magic that better supports your combat focus.

feats.name: Cremate Undead
feats.description: Your overwhelming vitality sets undead alight.

feats.name: Crescent Cross Training
feats.description: You have familiarity with the crescent cross, an ingenious weapon that combines an arm-mounted, multi-chamber crossbow with a crescent-shaped blade.

feats.name: Crimson Breath
feats.description: You gain a fire breath weapon similar to that of a crimson worm.
feats.source: Pathfinder #194: Cult of the Cave Worm pg. 81
feats.source_book: Pathfinder #194: Cult of the Cave Worm

feats.name: Crimson Oath Devotion
feats.description: You've made the Crimson Oath a part of yourself; you mumble it in your sleep and recite it under your breath as you march.
feats.prerequisites: Knight Reclaimant Dedication; ability to cast focus spells

feats.name: Crimson Shroud
feats.description: You swathe yourself in a veil of red mist for 1 minute.

feats.name: Cringe
feats.description: With pitiful posturing, you cause your foe to pull back a deadly attack.

feats.name: Critical Debilitation
feats.description: Your debilitations are especially effective on your most powerful attacks.

feats.name: Critter Shape
feats.description: Once per hour, you can use Change Shape to enter a critter shape.

feats.name: Croak Talker
feats.description: You can communicate with the simplest of frogs and other similar creatures using longwinded croaks.

feats.name: Crocodile's Twin
feats.description: Your egg contained your twin, a crocodile.
feats.prerequisites: Bakuwa Lizardfolk heritage or Makari Lizardfolk heritage

feats.name: Crone's Cruelty
feats.description: Filled with rancor and hate, you rend the minds of those who displease you.

feats.name: Cross the Final Horizon
feats.description: You Stride up to your Speed and your ki enshrouds your limbs in a terrifying stormy energy.
notes: You Stride up to your Speed and your ki enshrouds your limbs in a terrifying stormy energy, increasing the reach of your Sky and Heaven Stance unarmed attacks by 5 feet.
Pathfinder #174: Shadows of the Ancients pg. 78
Your mask carries the legacy of Verdant Spider, the Speaker of Needs, allowing you to deceive and outwit your foes.

feats.name: Cross the Threshold
feats.description: You can cast ethereal jaunt as an occult innate spell once per day.
feats.source: Pathfinder #166: Despair on Danger Island pg. 79

feats.name: Crossblooded Evolution
feats.description: Odd interactions in your bloodline provide you with unexpected effects.

feats.name: Crossbow Ace
feats.description: Your deep understanding of the crossbow allows you to reload efficiently while moving yourself out of the line of return fire.

feats.name: Crossbow Crack Shot
feats.description: You have a deep understanding of the crossbow.

feats.name: Crossbow Infiltrator Dedication
feats.description: You have mastered stealthy weapons that allow you to strike carefully from a distance far enough to avoid reprisal, yet close enough to confirm your kills.

feats.name: Crosscurrent Counter
feats.description: You counter the creature with the power of elemental water, a tendril of it encasing your limb or weapon.

feats.name: Crowd Mastery
feats.description: You use the crowd to your advantage, diverting your foes’ attention to potential hidden dangers in the crowd.

feats.name: Crown of Bone
feats.description: When you came of age, you were blessed by the Mother Earth with a thickened skull, which was celebrated as an auspicious sign among your community.

feats.name: Crown of Rule
feats.description: This badge of office proclaims your sovereignty.

feats.name: Crown of the Saumen Kar
feats.description: Your body begins to evolve and adapt, taking the first steps towards blending your very self with the ancient curse of the saumen kar.

feats.name: Crowned in Tempest's Fury
feats.description: You become one with a devastating thunderstorm from the Plane of Air, placing a crown of lightning upon your brow.

feats.name: Cruel Piercing
feats.description: You learn to impale your targets.

feats.name: Cruelty
feats.description: The harm you deal with your corrupting touch saps the strength from your enemy's body.

feats.name: Crunch
feats.description: Crush Dissent
feats.prerequisites: Your jaws can crush bone and bite through armor.

feats.name: Crusader's Masquerade
feats.description: Your mask can hide you from the undead.

feats.name: Crushing Grab
feats.description: Like a powerful constrictor, you crush targets in your unyielding grasp.

feats.name: Crushing Step
feats.description: The weight of your armored feet casts aside natural impediments.

feats.name: Cryptic Spell
feats.description: You hide your magic in the croak of a frog, in the sway of the trees, in the howl of the wind, and the flicker of the will-o'- wisp.

feats.name: Crystal Healing
feats.description: You know how to stimulate a body's natural healing abilities through the application of resonant crystals.

feats.name: Crystal Keeper Dedication
feats.description: You can use Arcana, Occultism, Religion, or Society to Decipher Writing by meditating before a crystal, regardless of the type of writing.
feats.source: Pathfinder #148: Fires of the Haunted City pg. 74
feats.source_book: Pathfinder #148: Fires of the Haunted City
feats.prerequisites: Trained in Elven Lore or Trained in Society

feats.name: Crystal Luminescence
feats.description: Your horn glows with bioluminescent color, casting bright light in a 20-foot emanation (and dim light for the next 20 feet).

feats.name: Crystal Ward Spells
feats.description: Your study of crystals and the energies held within a gem’s facets grants you special arcane crystal ward spells.
feats.source: Pathfinder #148: Fires of the Haunted City pg. 74
feats.source_book: Pathfinder #148: Fires of the Haunted City

feats.name: Cultivator Dedication
feats.description: Through an esoteric, often exacting, regimen of meditation, diet, and exercise, you’ve learned to transform your body’s inner workings into a crucible of planar and spiritual energies.

feats.name: Cultivator's Keen Eye
feats.description: Attuned to all arrangements of qi, you gain lifesense as an imprecise sense with a range of 30 feet.

feats.name: Cultural Adaptability
feats.description: During your adventures, you've honed your ability to adapt to the culture of the predominant ancestry around you.

feats.name: Culvert's Collapse
feats.description: Under your foes’ onslaught, the water within your violent blood stirs.

feats.name: Cunning Climber
feats.description: Whether you are climbing a ship’s rigging, a jungle tree, or a clock tower, you have an uncanny knack for finding footholds and handholds where larger creatures can’t.

feats.name: Cunning Hair
feats.description: Your hair moves under your control.

feats.name: Cunning Tinker
feats.description: Time spent tending to your own form has unlocked your ability to fix other things.

feats.name: Current Spell (Archetype)
feats.description: As you use your magic to manipulate air or water, you divert some of its currents to form a barrier around you.
feats.prerequisites: Elementalist Dedication; air or water is in your elemental philosophy

feats.name: Current Spell (Druid)
feats.description: As you use your magic to manipulate air or water, you spin off some of its currents to form a barrier around you.

feats.name: Curse Maelstrom Dedication
feats.description: A horrible curse has left a lingering stain on your soul, and its effects continue to plague you even if the curse's other effects have ended.
feats.prerequisites: You are cursed or have previously been cursed.

feats.name: Curse of the Saumen Kar
feats.description: You activate the runes on your body to create an icy prison around a Huge or smaller creature you can see within 60 feet.

feats.name: Cursebreaker
feats.description: Using various implements and esoteric methods, you can attempt to remove a curse from an unfortunate victim.

feats.name: Cursed Effigy
feats.description: After your attack, you grab a bit of blood, cut hair, or other piece of the creature's body.

feats.name: Cushion Landing
feats.description: As you fall, your mount dashes to your rescue.

feats.name: Cut from the Air
feats.description: You can knock aside ranged attacks.

feats.name: Cut the Bonds
feats.description: You can counteract a magical effect that impedes movement.
feats.prerequisites: Bellflower Dedication; expert in a melee weapon

feats.name: Cut them Down, Burn them Out
feats.description: Inspired by the sixth line of the Crimson Oath, when you oppose the enemies of Lastwall, you aim to excise the rot from the land itself.
feats.prerequisites: Knight Reclaimant Dedication; master proficiency in a weapon

feats.name: Cutting Flattery
feats.description: Repeated entries in Firebrand bragging and flyting contests have taught you how to twist pretty words into concealed insults.
feats.prerequisites: Dandy Dedication or Pirate Dedication; Trained in Intimidation

feats.name: Cutting Heaven, Crushing Earth
feats.description: Your skill in combining fist and blade has grown into a seamless art where each attack makes an opponent more vulnerable to the next.

feats.name: Cutting Without Blade
feats.description: While tales of your divine ikons have spread far and wide, you’ve realized that, as they are all manifestations of your soul, the object itself is unnecessary.

feats.name: Cycle of Souls
feats.description: Your spiritual allies guide your movements, allowing you to prepare for the trials before you at a speed faster than thought.
feats.prerequisites: liturgist practice; at least one animist stance

feats.name: Cycle Spell
feats.description: Your devotion to the cycle of souls grants you an additional divine spell.

feats.name: Cyclonic Ascent
feats.description: Whorls of wind surround your lower body, forming a cyclone that lifts you into the air.

feats.name: Cynical
feats.description: Dad Joke
feats.source: Absalom, City of Lost Omens pg. 394, Azarketi Ancestry Web Supplement pg. 4
feats.source_book: Absalom, City of Lost Omens pg. 394, Azarketi Ancestry Web Supplement
feats.prerequisites: You've been approached with suspicion and distrust throughout your life and return these sentiments back to the strangers you encounter.
notes: Using the power of punnery, you deliver a lovingly tailored joke at a creature within 60 feet.

feats.name: Dalang's Ally
feats.description: You move your shadow as a master puppeteer, allowing it to dance around your enemies and serve you in combat.

feats.name: Dance of Intercession
feats.description: You either performed in or stood witness to the dance used to invoke the Celestial Dragon and can harness a sliver of their power.
feats.source: Pathfinder #168: King of the Mountain pg. 75

feats.name: Dance of the Jester
feats.description: Through your incredible dance skill, you can embody the character of the Jester, able to take control of the shadows of other players on stage (much to your amusement).

feats.name: Dance of the Mousedeer
feats.description: You move your body in a pattern that evokes the small and clever Sister Mousedeer, misdirecting enemies and filling their vision with shadows to hide behind.

feats.name: Dance of the Tiger
feats.description: Tales tell of the Tiger stalking the Mousedeer for days, hidden and instilling dread upon its prey.

feats.name: Dance of Thunder
feats.description: Your steps echo with the thunderous retort of exploding black powder as you dance a dance of death.

feats.name: Dance Underfoot
feats.description: You dart under the legs of your enemies in combat.

feats.name: Dancing Leaf
feats.description: You are as light as a leaf on the breeze.

feats.name: Dangle
feats.description: You can hang by your tail from any suitable anchor point, such as a tree branch, balcony, or rocky outcropping (subject to the GM's discretion), typically while climbing.

feats.name: Dangle (Vanara)
feats.description: You can hang by your tail from any suitable anchor point, such as a tree branch, balcony, or rocky outcropping (subject to the GM's discretion), typically while climbing.

feats.name: Danse Macabre
feats.description: Your horde can drag unwilling victims along with it as it shambles forward.

feats.name: Daredevil's Gambit
feats.description: If you critically succeed at your Daring Act, you can enter the target’s space and remain there until the beginning of your next turn or until the target moves, whichever comes first.

feats.name: Daring Act
feats.description: You attempt a death-defying maneuver to distract your enemies.
feats.prerequisites: Trained in Acrobatics or Trained in Athletics; Firebrand Braggart Dedication

feats.name: Daring Flourish
feats.description: You make quick use of an opening from your daring stunts.

feats.name: Dark Persona's Presence
feats.description: When you Unleash your Psyche, all your rage and pain—the portion of your psyche dedicated to cruel retribution—come along with it.

feats.name: Darkseer
feats.description: Zon-Kuthon smiles upon you—even if you curse his name—granting you pitch-black eyes that allow you to see in shadows and darkness.

feats.name: Darting Monkey
feats.description: You have a heightened awareness in combat, and your darting strikes prevent your foes from distracting you or breaking your focus.

feats.name: Dash of Herbs
feats.description: A small cloud of medicinal herbs heal a creature.

feats.name: Dashing Pickup
feats.description: You Command an Animal to order your mount to Stride (or to Burrow, Climb, Fly, or Swim if it has the corresponding movement type).
feats.prerequisites: Cavalier Dedication; expert in Acrobatics or Athletics

feats.name: Dashing Pounce
feats.description: With a burst of speed, you leap into the air, slashing with your hands.

feats.name: Dashing Strike
feats.description: Springing away from one foe, you Strike at another.

feats.name: Dastardly Dash
feats.description: You dash past an opponent, confounding them with underhanded tactics.

feats.name: Daywalker (Abjuration)
feats.description: Through a profane pledge or a bloodline quirk, you can tolerate the sun's light.

feats.name: Daywalker (Dhampir)
feats.description: Whether through painstaking exposure, devoted prayer, or simple luck, you've found a greater affinity for life through the sun's light.

feats.name: Dazing Blow
feats.description: You pummel a held foe, hoping to stagger them.

feats.name: Dazzling Block
feats.description: When you use Shield Block, you can create a flash of brilliant, multicolored light in a 15-foot cone.
feats.prerequisites: Arcane Cascade, sparkling targe hybrid study

feats.name: Dazzling Bullet
feats.description: Your tricks discombobulate your opponent, leaving spots in their vision from the bright flash of your gunshot reflected straight into their eyes.

feats.name: Dazzling Display
feats.description: You perform a bewildering show of prowess, such as by whirling and flashing a weapon, that unnerves foes.

feats.name: Dazzling Dragonet Disappearance
feats.description: A brilliant sheen on your scales flashes when you’re hit, then you’re nowhere to be found.

feats.name: Deadeye
feats.description: You relax your eyes, taking in the presence of hidden things, granting you the ability to locate invisible creatures.

feats.name: Deadly Aim
feats.description: You aim for your prey’s weak spots, making your shot more challenging but dealing more damage if you hit.

feats.name: Deadly Aspect
feats.description: You have honed the unarmed attack your draconic heritage has granted you to a lethal degree.

feats.name: Deadly Butterfly
feats.description: You gain access to the butterfly sword's critical specialization effect.
feats.source: Pathfinder #166: Despair on Danger Island pg. 78

feats.name: Deadly Grace
feats.description: Your graceful attacks are especially powerful.

feats.name: Deadly Mutation
feats.description: The dart fired by your ostilli is more dangerous.

feats.name: Deadly Poison Weapon
feats.description: Your poisons are devastatingly potent.
feats.source: Pathfinder #149: Against the Scarlet Triad pg. 78

feats.name: Deadly Simplicity
feats.description: When you are wielding your deity’s favored weapon, increase the damage die size of that weapon by one step.
feats.prerequisites: deity with a simple or unarmed attack favored weapon, trained with your deity's favored weapon

feats.name: Deadly Strikes
feats.description: You have honed your body to attack with lethal focus.

feats.name: Death Dive
feats.description: You guide your mount into a plummet, diving headlong at a single foe.

feats.name: Death from Above
feats.description: You leap down on your target, using their body to cushion your fall and your momentum to empower your attack.
feats.prerequisites: Canopy Predator; Verduran Shadow Dedication; Expert in Athletics

feats.name: Death Rattle
