feats.description: When the time comes for your horde to be returned to its temporary rest, its departure carries those nearby closer to death.

feats.name: Death Roll
feats.description: You corkscrew your body, twisting your victim.

feats.name: Death Warden
feats.description: With your intimate familiarity with the duality of positive and negative energy, you're able to stand as a bulwark against death and undeath alike.

feats.name: Death's Door
feats.description: You continue to fight when others would fall.

feats.name: Death's Drums
feats.description: Your life has been spent challenging death itself, and proximity to that implacable foe only makes your heart beat harder.

feats.name: Deathblow
feats.description: Your carefully prepared and placed shot brings instant death to your target.
feats.prerequisites: Guerrilla Dedication; Poisoned Sticks and Stones

feats.name: Deathguard
feats.description: The twisting rotted limbs, clattering bones, or swirling ectoplasm of your horde can hide you from others' vision.

feats.name: Deathly Secrets
feats.description: No means of creating or ruling the undead is beyond your grasp, even those of magical traditions not your own.

feats.name: Debilitating Bomb
feats.description: You can add a crystalline additive to an alchemical bomb to have it undermine your enemy.

feats.name: Debilitating Breath
feats.description: Your breath causes lasting hindrance to those it harms.

feats.name: Debilitating Dichotomy
feats.description: You reveal a glimpse of the impossible conflicts between the divine anathema behind your curse, forcing you to reckon with another's conflicts as well.

feats.name: Debilitating Shot
feats.description: Aiming for a weak point, you impede your foe with a precise shot.

feats.name: Debilitating Venom
feats.description: Your venom is particularly potent, affecting targets in different ways.

feats.name: Deceptive Deduction
feats.description: You've had to take on many roles while working undercover, so you're practiced at following the example of those around you to pretend expertise in a variety of fields.

feats.name: Deceptive Tactics
feats.description: Your training has taught you that the art of war is the art of deception.

feats.name: Deceptive Worship
feats.description: Members of your cult frequently pass themselves off as worshippers of other religions.

feats.name: Declare Anathema
feats.description: You declare a creature you are aware of within 30 feet anathema, causing their friends and strangers to shy away from them.

feats.name: Decry Thief
feats.description: When you attempt to Demoralize, you can make it harder for the target to flee, in place of the action’s normal effects.
feats.source: Pathfinder #149: Against the Scarlet Triad pg. 81
feats.prerequisites: Zephyr Guard Dedication; Trained in Intimidation

feats.name: Deep Freeze
feats.description: You vent a jet of supercooled fluid from your innovation, damaging a foe and slowing it down.

feats.name: Deep Lore
feats.description: Your repertoire is vast, containing far more spells than usual.

feats.name: Deep Roots
feats.description: Your mind-control spells send burrowing mental roots that tear at your target's mind when they're removed or run their course.

feats.name: Deepening Devotion
feats.description: Your investment in your draconic gift has unlocked greater power.
notes: Look, getting caught in a lie is a normal part of venture-gossip life.

feats.name: Deepvision
feats.description: Your vision is suited for night or the underground.

feats.name: Defend Summoner
feats.description: Your eidolon blocks attacks against you.

feats.name: Defender's Grit
feats.description: You can’t protect anyone if you’re dead.

feats.name: Defensive Advance
feats.description: With the protection of your shield, you dive into battle! You Raise your Shield and Stride.

feats.name: Defensive Armaments
feats.description: You use bulky firearms or crossbows to shield your body from your foes' attacks.

feats.name: Defensive Coordination
feats.description: Like the storied heroes who persist in the face of overwhelming odds, you and your allies will hold the line.

feats.name: Defensive Dismissal
feats.description: You change your form as a means of evading a potentially fatal blow.

feats.name: Defensive Growth
feats.description: You grow a shield of woven flowers and branches, then Raise that Shield to defend yourself from the triggering attack.
feats.source: Pathfinder #202: Severed at the Root pg. 75

feats.name: Defensive Instincts
feats.description: Your body tenses up when surrounded, putting you on edge just enough to anticipate an attack.

feats.name: Defensive Needles
feats.description: Your body is covered in sharp needles or spines which you can use to defend yourself.
feats.prerequisites: Cactus Leshy heritage or Pine Leshy heritage

feats.name: Defensive Recovery
feats.description: Your faith provides temporary protection in addition to healing.

feats.name: Defensive Roll
feats.description: Dropping into a roll to disperse the force of the blow, you can partially evade a lethal attack and stay conscious.

feats.name: Defensive Stratagem
feats.description: By scrutinizing a foe, you learn how to better avoid its attacks.

feats.name: Defensive Swap
feats.description: You and your allies work together selflessly to protect each other from harm.

feats.name: Defiance Unto Death
feats.description: You loathe the alghollthus and their mind magic, and you’ve been trained to be willing to die rather than give into mental manipulation.

feats.name: Defiant Banner
feats.description: You vigorously wave your banner to remind yourself and your allies that you can and must endure.

feats.name: Deflect Projectile
feats.description: You gain a +4 circumstance bonus to AC against the triggering attack.

feats.name: Deflecting Cloud
feats.description: You've mastered a defensive technique unique to the ancient dragons of Bloodsalt: beating your wings to create a billowing cloud of mist.
feats.prerequisites: Dragon Disciple Dedication; dragon wings sorcerer bloodline spell

feats.name: Deflecting Jewel
feats.description: You walk the line between two sides of something, such as belonging to two clans, having a mixed allegiance or faith, or being caught between two possible fates.

feats.name: Deflecting Pulse
feats.description: Your ostilli can use its stored magic to protect you from other magic, granting you the Turn Aside Ambient Magic action.
feats.campaign: Turn Aside Ambient Magic [one-action] (concentrate) Your ostilli glows a faint yellow as it establishes a barrier.

feats.name: Deflecting Shot
feats.description: Defy Hell
feats.prerequisites: You're always ready to take a quick shot to deflect a weapon or distract a foe enough to render them off target.
notes: Pathfinder #222: Hellbreakers pg. 217, Hellbreakers Players Guide pg. 9
Your devotion to your cause gives you endless strength and courage to withstand the enemy's attacks.

feats.name: Deflecting Wave
feats.description: A cascade of water blunts or disperses the incoming attack.

feats.name: Deft Cooperation
feats.description: You gain a bonus to your own checks when Aiding an ally.

feats.name: Defy Chains
feats.description: You turn to face a fiend that attacked you, looking them squarely in the eyes (if it has them) and showing no fear.

feats.name: Defy Death
feats.description: You’re exceptionally difficult to kill.

feats.name: Defy Fey
feats.description: You are keen to the wiles of the fey and can usually shake off their magic.

feats.name: Defy Sorrow
feats.description: You draw on this spiritual pain to push your body to greater heights.

feats.name: Defy the Darkness
feats.description: Using ancient dwarven methods developed to fight enemies wielding magical darkness, you've honed your darkvision and sworn not to use such magic yourself.

feats.name: Deific Font
feats.description: Your life force can fuel the stuff of miracles.

feats.name: Deimatic Display
feats.description: Imitating animal threat displays, you make yourself appear larger and more imposing.

feats.name: Deity's Domain
feats.description: You embody an aspect of your deity.

feats.name: Deity's Protection
feats.description: When you call upon your deity’s power to fulfill the promise of their domain, you gain divine protection.

feats.name: Delay Trap
feats.description: You try to jam the workings of a trap to delay its effects.

feats.name: Deliberate Death
feats.description: Once, you died because someone—murderer, monster, or soldier— chose to strike you down.

feats.name: Delver
feats.description: Subterranean life taught you to swim through the ground like water.

feats.name: Demand Surrender
feats.description: Confident in your victory, you command your opponent's surrender.

feats.name: Demanding Challenge
feats.description: If your skill check to challenge a foe is a success, the target of your challenge takes a –1 circumstance penalty to attack rolls (or –2 if you critically succeed) until the end of your next turn.
notes: Keep opponents from flanking when you Feint them.

feats.name: Demolish Defenses
feats.description: With a powerful blow, you crack a foe's armor or tough hide, opening it up for further attacks.

feats.name: Demolition Charge
feats.description: You can rig your bombs to inanimate objects in order to cause destruction to the surrounding area.

feats.name: Demolitionist
feats.description: You know how to destroy objects with a well-placed explosion.

feats.name: Demolitionist Dedication
feats.description: You know how to set explosives to cause the maximum possible damage to buildings and other structures.

feats.name: Demon Hunter
feats.description: The demons of Tanglebriar have long haunted your dreams, just as they have long threatened Kyonin.
feats.source: Pathfinder #210: Whispers in the Dirt pg. 80
feats.prerequisites: Expert in Religion or Expert in Demon Lore

feats.name: Demon Slayer
feats.description: You can deliver a melee blow to a demon that creates an explosion of holy light to try to finish the demon off.
feats.source: Pathfinder #210: Whispers in the Dirt pg. 81

feats.name: Demon's Hair
feats.description: Your hair constantly wriggles and writhes.
feats.source: Pathfinder #168: King of the Mountain pg. 75

feats.name: Demon-Hunting Companion
feats.description: You gain a young animal companion that has been specially trained to help you fight demons.

feats.name: Demonbane Warrior
feats.description: You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to damage with weapons and unarmed attacks against demons.

feats.name: Demonblood Frenzy
feats.description: Just the taste of fiendish blood is enough to send blood rushing through your veins in a supernatural fury.

feats.name: Denier of Destruction
feats.description: You can manipulate the same energies that the aeon orbs use to sustain life.

feats.name: Denounce Tyranny
feats.description: You call out a creature's despicable or cowardly actions, disrupting its alliances or even making its allies ashamed to be seen with it.

feats.name: Deny the Songs of War
feats.description: To keep the peace, you disrupt those who seek to break it.
feats.source: Pathfinder #170: Spoken on the Song Wind pg. 79
feats.source_book: Pathfinder #170: Spoken on the Song Wind

feats.name: Derring-do
feats.description: When you compound panache with even more derring-do, it somehow tends to work out.

feats.name: Desert Wind
feats.description: A vortex of sand and dust surrounds you.

feats.name: Desiccating Inhalation
feats.description: You draw in the moisture from nearby creatures, draining them dry to heal your wounds.

feats.name: Desperate Finisher
feats.description: You throw everything you have into one last, reckless press.

feats.name: Desperate Prayer
feats.description: You call out to your deity in a plea for their aid.

feats.name: Desperate Resuscitation
feats.description: You can use your training in combat medicine to revive the recently deceased.
feats.prerequisites: Officer's Medical Training; Master in Medicine

feats.name: Desperate Wish
feats.description: You call out a desperate wish to the stars to save a friend.

feats.name: Desperate Wrath
feats.description: Your blood boils when you take a beating, and you throw caution to the wind to finish the fight.

feats.name: Destined Victory
feats.description: You demand a battle against your chosen enemy.

feats.name: Detective's Readiness
feats.description: When you're on a case, you stay watchful and resolute to avoid tricks your suspect might pull.

feats.name: Determination
feats.description: Your training allows you to shrug off your foes’ spells and conditions when the need is dire.

feats.name: Determined Dash
feats.description: Nothing can keep you from your enemy.

feats.name: Detonating Spell
feats.description: Your spell becomes volatile and explosive.

feats.name: Devastating Duelist
feats.description: You pointedly note your enemy's deficiencies, filling them with fear and dismay.

feats.name: Devastating Shield Wallop
feats.description: The impact of your shield sends foes tumbling to the ground.

feats.name: Devastating Spellstrike
feats.description: Your Spellstrike sweeps are so wide and devastating, they splash onto nearby foes.
feats.prerequisites: Arcane Cascade, inexorable iron hybrid study, Spellstrike
notes: Pathfinder #222: Hellbreakers pg. 216, Hellbreakers Players Guide pg. 8
Hellbreaker Dedication; Expert in Devil Lore or Expert in Hellknight Lore
Your knowledge of your enemies gives you an advantage against them, granting you a swift reaction to their devilry.

feats.name: Devastating Weaponry
feats.description: You release a volley of projectiles from your weapon, or power it to fly in every direction across the battlefield and Strike multiple creatures.

feats.name: Devil in Plain Sight
feats.description: You've learned to draw your fiendish nature into a small ball of corruption and hide it in your soul.

feats.name: Devil's Advocate
feats.description: You know more about the habits of devils than is entirely safe.

feats.name: Devil's Eye
feats.description: Your experience in the finer points of bargaining with a devil has awakened a sinister power that now inhabits your left eye.
feats.prerequisites: You made a bargain with a devil or won a legal case or other similar duel of wits against a devil.

feats.name: Devilish Wiles
feats.description: Traditionally, fiends are exceptionally good at persuading people to do things, even when their targets know it's a bad idea.

feats.name: Devoted Focus
feats.description: Your devotion is strong enough to increase your focus to incredible heights.

feats.name: Devoted Guardian
feats.description: You adopt a wide stance, ready to defend both yourself and your chosen ward.

feats.name: Devout Blessing
feats.description: Champion Dedication
feats.campaign: You gain the blessing of the devoted class feature

feats.name: Devout Magic
feats.description: You gain a devotion spell of your choice listed in the devotion spells class feature

feats.name: Devrin's Cunning Stance
feats.description: You've learned Devrin Arlos's guileful ways, and his sly teachings help you remind your allies to keep their wits about them.

feats.name: Devrin's Dazzling Diversion
feats.description: Devrin Arlos has a habit of using whatever is at hand to temporarily blind others in combat.

feats.name: Diabolic Certitude (Lvl 4) #1
feats.description: Your Hellknight training drilled details of Hell’s denizens deep into your mind.

feats.name: Diabolic Certitude (Lvl 4) #2
feats.description: Your Hellknight training drilled details of Hell's denizens deep into your mind.

feats.name: Diamond Fists
feats.description: Your body hardens as you combine your attacks, making your finishing blows more damaging.

feats.name: Didactic Strike
feats.description: When you find a glaring weakness, you can set your allies up to annihilate your foe.

feats.name: Diehard
feats.description: Die at dying 5, rather than dying 4

feats.name: Different Worlds
feats.description: Create a second identity for yourself with a different name, history, and background.
feats.prerequisites: ability to select ancestry feats from multiple ancestries

feats.name: Dig Quickly
feats.description: Your hands work as effectively as shovels when you need to dig a quick hole.

feats.name: Dig Up Secrets
feats.description: You are an endless well of knowledge and can remember several vital pieces of information at once.

feats.name: Digger
feats.description: You are used to building homes and defenses underground.
feats.prerequisites: Climbing Animal heritage or Running Animal heritage

feats.name: Dimensional Disappearance
feats.description: You take advantage of teleportation to better hide your position.
feats.prerequisites: dimensional assault focus spell, laughing shadow hybrid study

feats.name: Dire Form
feats.description: Your hybrid shape is a hulking beast.

feats.name: Dire Growth
feats.description: You transform into a primal reflection of your animal shape.
feats.prerequisites: Werecreature Dedication; your animal shape is not Small

feats.name: Directed Audience
feats.description: You can shape the area of your composition spells.

feats.name: Directed Channel
feats.description: You can shape the energy you channel in a single direction.

feats.name: Directed Poison
feats.description: When you cast cloudkill, you can modify it to be under your control.
feats.prerequisites: Spell Trickster Dedication; ability to cast cloudkill

feats.name: Directional Bombs
feats.description: You can lob bombs with great force and a precise trajectory to angle the splash in a cone that sprays in a single direction, potentially allowing you to avoid allies and splash deeper into enemy lines.

feats.name: Dirge of Doom
feats.description: You learn the dirge of doom composition cantrip (page 370), which frightens your enemies and keeps them from fully recovering from their fear.

feats.name: Dirty Trick
feats.description: You hook a foe's bootlaces together, pull their hat over their eyes, loosen their belt, or otherwise confound their mobility through an underhanded tactic.

feats.name: Disarming Assault
feats.description: You attack with enough force to knock the weapon out of your foe's hands.

feats.name: Disarming Flair
feats.description: You knock weapons from the hands of your foes with style.

feats.name: Disarming Intercept
feats.description: When you catch a weapon in your armor, you can move your body to wrench it from your foe's grasp.

feats.name: Disarming Smile
feats.description: With a wide and sincere smile, you give your attacker pause.

feats.name: Disarming Stance
feats.description: You adopt a fencing stance that improves your control over your weapon.

feats.name: Disarming Twist
feats.description: After your initial attack redirects your foe’s defenses, your follow-up wrests their weapon from their grasp.

feats.name: Discerning Gaze
feats.description: You have a sense for when people are lying.
feats.source: Night of the Gray Death pg. 65
feats.prerequisites: Vigilante Dedication; member of the Gray Gardeners

feats.name: Disciple of Shade
feats.description: You've delved deeper into the mysteries of shadow and become blessed with magical power that increases your skills in the arts of deception and persuasion.

feats.name: Discordant Voice
feats.description: Your courageous anthem lets loose a discordant shriek that imbues your allies’ attacks with powerful sonic reverberations.

feats.name: Discreet Inquiry
feats.description: You are subtle in your efforts to learn the things you need to know.
feats.prerequisites: Expert in Deception or Expert in Diplomacy

feats.name: Disk Rider
feats.description: When you cast floating disk, you can modify it to ride atop.
feats.prerequisites: Spell Trickster Dedication; ability to cast floating disk

feats.name: Dismal Harvest
feats.description: The expiring breaths of your enemies fuel your power.

feats.name: Dismounting Strike
feats.description: You leap from your horse, using the momentum of its movement to deal a devastating blow with your melee weapon.

feats.name: Disorienting Opening
feats.description: You use your foes’ openings to expose even greater weaknesses.

feats.name: Disorienting Venom
feats.description: The venom injected by your fangs disorients your foes.

feats.name: Dispelling Slice
feats.description: Your sneak attack slices through the threads binding magic to a target.

feats.name: Dispelling Spellstrike
feats.description: The spell you deliver tries to force out magic affecting your enemy.

feats.name: Disperse into Petals
feats.description: You merge with the blossoms sprouting from you and disperse, becoming a visible cloud of blossoms and petals.
feats.source: Pathfinder #202: Severed at the Root pg. 75

feats.name: Disrupt Prey
feats.description: Make a melee Strike against your prey.

feats.name: Disrupt Qi
feats.description: You carefully target a creature's pressure points to block its inner life force.

feats.name: Disrupting Strikes
feats.description: You call forth positive energy from within to help you destroy undead.
feats.source: Pathfinder #166: Despair on Danger Island pg. 79

feats.name: Disruptive Blur
feats.description: You use cacophonous blasts from your gun or distracting shots from your crossbow to cause momentary diversions, letting you move about the battlefield with impunity.

feats.name: Disruptive Stance
feats.description: Distant Wandering
feats.prerequisites: The slightest distraction can provoke your wrath, and you’re prepared to foil enemies’ actions.
notes: Gatewalkers Player's Guide (Remastered) pg. 13, Dark Archives (Remastered) pg. 103
Your body falls unconscious and your spirit projects out of it.

feats.name: Disruptive Stare
feats.description: Your frigid gaze can turn a foe's blood to ice.

feats.name: Dissolution's Clarity
feats.description: The Dissolution teaches that darkness can bring clarity and focus, serenity and strength—and so you draw on nearby shadows to replenish your magic.

feats.name: Dissolution's Sight
feats.description: Accepting your inner darkness means that no outer darkness can obscure your sight.

feats.name: Dissolution's Sovereignty
feats.description: With discipline born from a lifetime in darkness, you convince the shadow of an enemy to fight by your side.

feats.name: Distant Archer
feats.description: You've trained to harry your foes from great distances, using your swiftness to maintain distance and keen eyesight to stay on target.

feats.name: Distant Cackle
feats.description: It takes a very brave person to enter the laughter-haunted forest where you dwell.

feats.name: Distant Waterbird's Poise
feats.description: You flow around your foe, using the magic of your attack to carry you away.

feats.name: Distracting Bites
feats.description: You know how to take advantage of those your swarm has attacked.

feats.name: Distracting Explosion
feats.description: Your enemies think they can concentrate on something else while you're nearby? Oh, you'll give them a distraction, all right!

feats.name: Distracting Feint
feats.description: Your Feints are far more distracting than normal.

feats.name: Distracting Performance
feats.description: Your performances are especially distracting, allowing your allies to Sneak away with ease.

feats.name: Distracting Shadows
feats.description: You have learned to remain hidden by using larger folk as a distraction to avoid drawing attention to yourself.

feats.name: Distracting Shot
feats.description: The sheer power of your attacks, or the overwhelming number of them, leaves an enemy flustered.

feats.name: Distracting Spellstrike
feats.description: You weave distracting magic with one hand to enhance your Spellstrike.

feats.name: Distracting Toss
feats.description: You toss one weapon into the air as a distraction as you throw another.

feats.name: Disturbing Defense
feats.description: Your internal organs and blood vessels have shifted and changed, and even you don't know precisely where in your body they are.

feats.name: Disturbing Knowledge
feats.description: You utter a litany of dreadful names, prophecies, and descriptions of realms beyond mortal comprehension, drawn from your study of forbidden tomes and scrolls.

feats.name: Dive of the Divine
feats.description: You dive from the sky, bringing down the might of the divine with you.
feats.prerequisites: Mortal Herald Dedication; fly Speed of at least 20 feet

feats.name: Diverse Lore
feats.description: Your wandering studies mean you've heard rumors or theories about almost every topic.

feats.name: Diverse Mystery
feats.description: You have broadened your understanding of the divine and can tap into the wonders of a different mystery.

feats.name: Diverse Weapon Expert
feats.description: Your proficiency ranks for simple weapons and martial weapons increase to expert, and your proficiency rank for advanced weapons increases to trained.
feats.prerequisites: Fighter Dedication; expert in any kind of weapon or unarmed attack

feats.name: Divert Streamflow
feats.description: With a brief gesture, you adapt swiftly to an attack like a flowing stream.

feats.name: Diverting Vortex
feats.description: You use vestiges of magic to create a protective vortex.

feats.name: Divine Aegis
feats.description: A barrier offers protection against other magic but leaves you exposed to divine energy.

feats.name: Divine Apex
feats.description: You can pour divine power into an item, letting the wearer exceed their limits.

feats.name: Divine Breadth
feats.description: As your understanding increases, your god grants you more divine spells each day.

feats.name: Divine Castigation
feats.description: Your deity’s grace doesn’t extend to your sworn enemies.

feats.name: Divine Countermeasures
feats.description: You’ve studied your extraplanar heritage with the intent of better defending yourself, whether against creatures aligned with or opposed to your extraplanar lineage, and you’ve found that your techniques are equally powerful against celestials, fiends, and other divine entities.

feats.name: Divine Declaration
feats.description: You can call forth a holy or unholy word from the realms beyond to punish your foes.

feats.name: Divine Disharmony
feats.description: From your collection of religious trinkets, you pull out opposing divine objects.

feats.name: Divine Dragonblood
feats.description: You can trace your lineage to a dragon with almost deific powers, such as a diabolic dragon or empyreal dragon.

feats.name: Divine Effusion
feats.description: The power of your mystery surges through you like a font of divine energy, even when your own magic dwindles.

feats.name: Divine Emissary
feats.description: Your familiar is a divine emissary, sent to you by your deity or patron and infused with celestial powers.
feats.prerequisites: a familiar, you follow a good-aligned deity or patron

feats.name: Divine Evolution
feats.description: The divine might provided by your bloodline flows through you.

feats.name: Divine Grace
feats.description: You call upon your deity's grace

feats.name: Divine Guidance
feats.description: Legendary in Religion
feats.campaign: Find guidance in the writings of your faith

feats.name: Divine Healing
feats.description: Although you aren't a proper champion of your faith, your deity still recognizes your efforts and provides you with a small divine ability to help others.
feats.prerequisites: Knight Vigilant; Expert in Religion; worship a deity with a divine font that grants heal

feats.name: Divine Health
feats.description: Your faith makes you resistant to disease, protecting you as you offer succor to the ill.

feats.name: Divine Infusion
feats.description: You pour energy into the subject of your healing to empower its attacks.

feats.name: Divine Presence
feats.description: Your spirit becomes one with your deity, granting you the bearing of a god.

feats.name: Divine Rebuttal
feats.description: You strive against magical threats physically and spiritually.

feats.name: Divine Reflexes
feats.description: You gain an additional reaction that you can use only for your champion's reaction.

feats.name: Divine Wall
feats.description: You use your shield to harry your enemies, preventing them from stepping away from or around you.

feats.name: Divine Weapon
feats.description: You siphon residual spell energy into a weapon you’re wielding.

feats.name: Divine Wings
feats.description: With effort, you can call forth magical wings from your back, similar in appearance to those of your extraplanar forebear, whether they be elegantly feathered wings or ominous bat wings.

feats.name: Diving Armor
feats.description: You've modified your armor with fins, rotors, and other devices to make it easy for you to move through the water, plus mechanical gills that can help you extract breathable air from water.

feats.name: Dizzying Spin Dance
feats.description: You’re practiced in using your fans to spin with dizzying speed.

feats.name: Djinni Magic
feats.description: The magic of djinn runs through your blood.

feats.name: Do You Know Who I Am?
feats.description: Your reputation casts a long shadow, allowing you to throw your cultural weight around, especially in larger settlements.

feats.name: Dodge Away
feats.description: You use your acrobatic prowess to evade an attack, using momentum to keep yourself moving if you choose.

feats.name: Dodging Roll
feats.description: You dodge a blow at the last possible moment.

feats.name: Dogfang Bite
feats.description: You can swing your beak to slash your foes when piercing attacks won't do.

feats.name: Dokkaebi Fire
feats.description: You can create illusory wisps of ghostly blue flame.

feats.name: Domain Acumen
feats.description: Every oracle's mystery touches on a divine domain of the deities that fuel it; you can access that power.

feats.name: Domain Embodiment
feats.description: Your deity contains multitudes, and you can express any aspect of them you desire.

feats.name: Domain Fluency
feats.description: You command a deep understanding of the domains related to your mystery.

feats.name: Domain Focus
feats.description: Your devotion to your deity’s domains grows greater, and so does the power granted to you.

feats.name: Domain Initiate
feats.description: Your deity bestows a special spell related to their powers.

feats.name: Domain Spirit
feats.description: You forge an intense spiritual bond of mutual trust and appreciation with a single spirit that you have already bonded with using Bond with Spirit.

feats.name: Dominating Gaze
feats.description: You stare into your target's eyes and enthrall them, shattering their free will.

feats.name: Dominion Aura
feats.description: For a short time, you fully manifest the expectations of the god destroyer within you.

feats.name: Domino Effect
feats.description: You've learned to pull the invisible strings of magic to affect targets that wouldn't normally be.

feats.name: Dongun Education
feats.description: You're knowledgeable in trades that are important to your people's survival and commercial interests.

feats.name: Doom of Sailors
feats.description: Sailors know that the sight of an angry merfolk might well mean that they never see the shore again.

feats.name: Dormant Eruption
feats.description: A sweltering heat and sparks of flame that take the form of tiny copies of you surround your body.
feats.prerequisites: You've been brought to 0 Hit Points by an enemy that has the fire trait or an enemy's ability that has the fire trait.

feats.name: Double Poison
feats.description: You can apply two different infused injury poisons to the same weapon, though not to a piece of ammunition.

feats.name: Double Prey
feats.description: You can focus on two foes at once, hunting both of them down.

feats.name: Double Shot
feats.description: You shoot twice in blindingly fast succession.

feats.name: Double Slice
feats.description: You lash out at your foe with both weapons.

feats.name: Double, Double
feats.description: For each temporary oil or potion you brew during your daily preparations, you brew two copies of it.

feats.name: Doublespeak
feats.description: You're skilled at saying one thing and meaning something different.

feats.name: Dousing Spell
feats.description: You enhance your spell with elemental water, soaking the target.
feats.prerequisites: Elementalist Dedication; water is in your elemental philosophy

feats.name: Dracomancer
feats.description: The power infused into you by your draconic benefactor’s presence allows you to manifest their most iconic spells.
feats.source: Draconic Codex pg. 215, Advanced Player's Guide pg. 15
feats.source_book: Draconic Codex pg. 215, Advanced Player's Guide

feats.name: Draconic Acolyte Dedication
feats.description: As an acolyte of dragonkind, you have an item known as a draconic gift that you can use to summon a portion of the magical essence of the dragon you received it from.

feats.name: Draconic Arrogance
feats.description: Few can sway you from your goals while the fury of combat fills you.

feats.name: Draconic Aspect
feats.description: You have an obvious draconic feature, such as sharp claws, a snout full of sharp teeth, or strong reptilian tail, that you can use offensively.

feats.name: Draconic Familiar
feats.description: Your devotion to dragons has attracted a loyal servant.

feats.name: Draconic Fury
feats.description: You briefly summon spectral claws that lash out in a flurry.

feats.name: Draconic Paragon
feats.description: Your connection to your draconic benefactor becomes especially pronounced.

feats.name: Draconic Resilience
feats.description: Energy reminiscent of dragon scales shimmers over you, making it more difficult for attacks to penetrate your defenses.

feats.name: Draconic Resistance
feats.description: Draconic magic safeguards you against harm.

feats.name: Draconic Scent
feats.description: Your sense of smell has heightened to be as keen as that of a dragon.

feats.name: Draconic Sight
feats.description: You have a fraction of the senses of your draconic forebear.

feats.name: Draconic Sycophant
feats.description: You possess features that dragons find particularly cute or charming, making it easier to endear yourself to them, or at least cause them to momentarily forgive your insolence.

feats.name: Draconic Veil
feats.description: Like some dragons, your forebear had the supernatural ability to change their shape to walk among humanoids.

feats.name: Drag Down
feats.description: While swimming in water at least 10 feet deep, you grab an adjacent creature (on nearby land or in the water) and pull it below the surface.
feats.source: Absalom, City of Lost Omens pg. 395, Azarketi Ancestry Web Supplement pg. 5
feats.source_book: Absalom, City of Lost Omens pg. 395, Azarketi Ancestry Web Supplement

feats.name: Dragging Strike
feats.description: Draining Touch
feats.prerequisites: You aim your weapon to snag a foe's armor, clothing, or flesh to pull them closer.
notes: You reach out your arm, grasping hungrily for a source of energy.

feats.name: Dragon Grip
feats.description: Your hold has a unique draconic connection.

feats.name: Dragon Lore
feats.description: You've set your mind on learning more about your ancestor and their kin, and perhaps you were even raised by a dragon parent.

feats.name: Dragon Prince
feats.description: The blood of the Dragon Kings runs strong in your veins.

feats.name: Dragon Roar
feats.description: You bellow, instilling fear in your enemies.

feats.name: Dragon Shape
feats.description: You can take on the shape of some of the world’s most fearsome creatures.

feats.name: Dragon Spit
feats.description: Many Tian-Dan claim to have dragon blood in their veins, and in your case, this is true—you can spit energy, and you might have an especially visible sign of your draconic heritage.

feats.name: Dragon Stance
feats.description: You enter the stance of a dragon and make powerful leg strikes like a lashing dragon's tail.

feats.name: Dragon Transformation
feats.description: You transform into a ferocious Large dragon, gaining the effects of 6th-rank dragon form except that you use your own AC and attack modifier, you apply your extra damage from Rage, and the Dragon Breath action uses your class DC.

feats.name: Dragon's Flight
feats.description: You have grown a small pair of draconic wings or have honed your use of the wings you've had since birth.

feats.name: Dragon's Journey
feats.description: Your movements are like that of a dragon weaving a serpentine path between your enemies and allies.

feats.name: Dragon's Presence
feats.description: As kin to dragonkind, you project unflappable confidence (that collapses catastrophically against the deadliest foes).

feats.name: Dragon's Rage Breath
feats.description: You breathe deeply and exhale powerful energy in a 30-foot cone, dealing 1d6 damage per level to each creature in the area with a basic Reflex save against your class DC.

feats.name: Dragon's Rage Wings
feats.description: You sprout dragon wings from your back of the same color as your chosen dragon.

feats.name: Dragonet Breath
feats.description: You have developed your magical breath.

feats.name: Dragonet Immunities
feats.description: You will not fall asleep unless you choose to allow it, nor will you sit still.

feats.name: Dragonet Resistances
feats.description: You might be a little dragon, but you are still a dragon, which means it’s difficult to constrain you.

feats.name: Dragonscaled Lore
feats.description: The study of dragons is not merely academic to you but part of your family tree.

feats.name: Drain Emotion
feats.description: You touch an adjacent creature and attempt to draw out its excess emotion.

feats.name: Drain Soul Cage
feats.description: You make your soul cage into your bonded item, allowing you to harness its abundant magical energy.
feats.prerequisites: Lich Dedication; Drain Bonded Item, spellbook

feats.name: Drain Vitality
feats.description: You draw out the bestial magic energy within your bonded beast gun to fortify yourself, purge ongoing harm, and bolster your life force with a sheath of swirling life essence.

feats.name: Drake Rider Dedication
feats.description: You gain the service of a young riding drake, riding dragonet, or another animal companion with the dragon trait you have access to.

feats.name: Draw from the Land
feats.description: You pull strength from the surrounding terrain.

feats.name: Dread Blade
feats.description: Your strikes with your conjured dagger impart the chill of the grave.

feats.name: Dread Striker
feats.description: You capitalize on your enemies’ fear to slip past their defenses.

feats.name: Dream Guise
feats.description: You Stride into a willing ally's space, at which point both of your appearances shift into a shared third appearance, usually one that looks like a mix of the two of you.

feats.name: Dream Logic
feats.description: You can transmit a sense of dreamy nonchalance.

feats.name: Dream Magic
feats.description: You learn dream-related magic to aid your studies.

feats.name: Dream May
feats.description: You are the child of a cuckoo hag, making one of your eyes violet or even black.

feats.name: Drenching Mist
feats.description: When you cast obscuring mist, you can modify it to extinguish flames.
feats.prerequisites: Spell Trickster Dedication; ability to cast obscuring mist

feats.name: Drifter's Juke
feats.description: You move in and out of range to complement your attacks.

feats.name: Drifting Pollen
feats.description: A haze of pollen floats around you.

feats.name: Drilled Reflexes
feats.description: You leave a lasting impression on your squadmates that makes them particularly adept at following your commands.

feats.name: Drive Back
feats.description: You push the enemy back and attempt to intercede between the foe and your ally.

feats.name: Drive-By Attack
feats.description: You can smoothly line up an attack without disrupting your control.

feats.name: Driving Rain
feats.description: Heavy drops of rain batter down, hitting like sling stones and impeding vision.

feats.name: Druid Dedication
feats.description: You cast spells like a druid.

feats.name: Dual Energy Heart
feats.description: A second energy dwells in your eidolon.

feats.name: Dual Finisher
feats.description: You split your attacks.

feats.name: Dual Studies
feats.description: You and your eidolon have some skills you practice on your own.

feats.name: Dual-Form Weapon
feats.description: You've built your innovation with replaceable interlocking pieces that you can use to transform it into another type of weapon entirely.

feats.name: Dual-Handed Assault
feats.description: You snap your free hand over to grip your weapon just long enough to add momentum and deliver a more powerful blow to your opponent.

feats.name: Dual-Weapon Reload (Gunslinger)
feats.description: You carry your ammunition in a way that allows you to reload while holding two weapons.

feats.name: Dualborn
feats.description: Your suli heritage can be traced back to two geniekin ancestors of opposing elements, or to an elemental ancestor that embodied two combined elements.

feats.name: Dualistic Synergy
feats.description: If your next action is to Cast a Spell from your spell slots, you gain a benefit.

feats.name: Dubious Knowledge
feats.description: trained in a skill with the Recall Knowledge action
feats.campaign: Learn true and erroneous knowledge on failed check

feats.name: Duck!
feats.description: Your long experience with your erratic patrons and their peers has given you a lot of practice in hitting the deck when you hear the rumbling of a powerful entity.

feats.name: Duel Spell Advantage
feats.description: When you start a psychic duel, you gain a third natural psychic spell.

feats.name: Dueling Acumen
feats.description: You're always ready for a new duel, and you've been trained to start and end fights quickly.

feats.name: Dueling Dance (Fighter)
feats.description: Using a free hand as pivot and balance, you both attack and defend with your weapon.

feats.name: Dueling Parry (Fighter)
feats.description: You can parry attacks against you with your one-handed weapon.

feats.name: Dueling Riposte
feats.description: You elegantly counterattack against your flailing enemy.

feats.name: Duelist's Edge
feats.description: You hone your reaction time through duels and learn to draw your weapon seamlessly as you begin a fight.

feats.name: Duelist's Form
feats.description: Many assume that a duelist's habit of fighting with one hand behind their back or on their hip is an insult or self-restriction.

feats.name: Duo Dragon Kick
feats.description: You’ve practiced an impressive spin technique with your construct, automatically attacking in tandem as you launch each other through the air.

feats.name: Duo's Aim
feats.description: With assistance from your spotter, you aim for an especially accurate attack.

feats.name: Duskwalker Lore
feats.description: You either found another duskwalker who taught you the secrets of your kind, or you managed to research your unusual heritage.

feats.name: Duskwalker Magic
feats.description: Your connection to psychopomps gives you the power to glimpse the near future and protect corpses from the ravages of undeath.

feats.name: Duskwalker Weapon Familiarity
feats.description: You have familiarity with the bo staff, longbow, composite longbow, scythe, and staff

feats.name: Dustsoul
feats.description: Your earth elemental ancestor's influence manifests in you as dust and dirt, like the soil of a field or the hot desert sands.

feats.name: Dwarven Doughtiness
feats.description: You are naturally calm and collected in the face of imminent danger.

feats.name: Dwarven Lore
feats.description: You eagerly absorbed the old stories and traditions of your ancestors, your gods, and your people.

feats.name: Dwarven Reinforcement
feats.description: You can use your knowledge of engineering and metalwork to temporarily strengthen thick objects and structures.

feats.name: Dwarven Weapon Familiarity
feats.description: Your kin have instilled in you an affinity for hard-hitting weapons, and you prefer these to more elegant arms.

feats.name: Eagle Eye
feats.description: Your practice with crossbows and firearms has sharpened your attention to detail.

feats.name: Eagle Eyes
feats.description: You and your spotter are adept at watching out for one another.

feats.name: Eagle Knight Dedication
feats.description: Eagle Knights are the marshals and envoys of Andoran and are committed to keeping the peace.
feats.prerequisites: Trained in Diplomacy; Trained in Society
notes: Pathfinder #157: Devil at the Dreaming Palace pg. 79
You're a specially trained detective for the Edgewatch guard precinct in Absalom.
Gatewalkers Player's Guide (Remastered) pg. 13, Dark Archives (Remastered) pg. 102
Your body flickers momentarily into the Ethereal Plane.

feats.name: Earned Glory
feats.description: Elves often struggle with underestimating aiuvarins, and you are experienced at telling stories of your accomplishments to gain their respect.

feats.name: Ears of the Forest
feats.description: Beyond relying on your own senses, you keep an ear open for nearby creatures for help in exploring your surroundings.

feats.name: Earthbond
feats.description: Your bond to the terra firma under your feet increases as your connection to your draconic aspect grows.

feats.name: Earthsense
feats.description: Your connection to earth and stone allows you to feel the slightest displacement that disturbs them, down to the shift of a pebble.

feats.name: Earworm
feats.description: By endlessly repeating a motif, you implant a memorable song that repeats over and over again in your allies’ heads, preparing them to respond to it later.

feats.name: Ease the Burden
feats.description: You wash away a creature’s pain with a touch.

feats.name: Easily Dismissed
feats.description: You are practiced at blending into the background of the streets and halls of larger folk to ensure that you are overlooked.

feats.name: Eat Fortune
feats.description: As someone tries to twist fate, you consume the interference.

feats.name: Ebb and Flow
feats.description: You can pull forth both vitality and the void simultaneously to harm your enemies and heal your allies.

feats.name: Echo of the Fallen
feats.description: With the utmost gratitude for your help in releasing them from their unearthly coil, a tiny sliver of a ghostly entity has remained attached to you.
feats.prerequisites: You helped to lay a haunt, ghost, or spirit to rest.

feats.name: Echoes in Stone
feats.description: You pause a moment to attune your senses to the stone around you.

feats.name: Echoing Channel
feats.description: When you pull forth vitality or void energy, you also create a smaller pocket of that energy.

feats.name: Echoing Spell
feats.description: You time the components of your spell with exacting precision, setting up a resonance that duplicates the spell's effects.

feats.name: Echoing Violence
feats.description: Your powerful attack causes damage that reverberates through your opponent’s body, shaking muscle from bone.

feats.name: Echolocation
feats.description: When you take the Seek action, you can use hearing as a precise sense with a range of 40 feet until the start of your next turn.

feats.name: Eclectic Obsession
feats.description: Your desire for stimulation has led you from one pursuit to another and granted you a smattering of expertise with myriad crafts and professions.

feats.name: Eclectic Polymath
feats.description: Your flexible mind can quickly shift from one spell to another.

feats.name: Eclectic Skill
feats.description: Your broad experiences translate to a range of skills.

feats.name: Eclectic Sword Mastery
feats.description: You instinctively learn how to use a sword with just a few practice swings.

feats.name: Eclipsed Vitality
feats.description: You shroud yourself in ashes that hide the vital essence sought by life-sensing undead.
feats.prerequisites: Assassin Dedication or Scout Dedication; Master in Stealth

feats.name: Edict of Mortality
feats.description: You recite an excerpt of the Laws of Mortality, often the first law: “Let no mortal be beholden to a god.” Attempt an Intimidation check against all enemies within 60 feet that worship a deity, comparing your result against each target's Will DC.

feats.name: Educate Allies
feats.description: You tweak the properties of your composition spell to convey a bit of your defensive knowledge.

feats.name: Educated Assessment
feats.description: You attempt to Recall Knowledge about a creature, and the GM uses the same secret roll result against the creature’s Deception or Stealth DC, giving you the information from a Battle Assessment.

feats.name: Eerie Compression
feats.description: Your limbs and even your torso can collapse in on themselves, allowing you to fit through tight spaces as though you were a Small creature.

feats.name: Eerie Environs
feats.description: The natural world can be scary to those not used to it—and you make it scarier still.
feats.prerequisites: Trained in Intimidation; Trained in Stealth

feats.name: Eerie Proclamation
feats.description: You know there are places in the world that are just wrong— places where the birds don't sing and where you always feel like you're being watched.
feats.prerequisites: Expert in Occultism; Expert in Survival

feats.name: Eerie Traces
feats.description: The tracks you leave behind are strange, somehow disconcerting and unnerving—they might travel backward, or through places no one would think to pass through.
feats.prerequisites: Trained in Intimidation; Trained in Survival

feats.name: Efficient Alchemy
feats.description: Thanks to the time you've spent studying and experimenting, you know how to scale your formulas into larger batches that don't require any additional attention.

feats.name: Efficient Alchemy (Paragon)
feats.description: Age of Ashes
feats.prerequisites: Prepare more alchemical items from your infused reagents.
notes: Pathfinder #174: Shadows of the Ancients pg. 78
Your mask grants you the abilities of Whistling Kite, the Vigilant Seer, who emancipated thousands.

feats.name: Efficient Controls
feats.description: By reducing redundant systems and streamlining essential functions, you have made it easier for the vehicle to operate with fewer crew.
feats.prerequisites: Vehicle Mechanic Dedication; Master in Crafting

feats.name: Efficient Explorer
feats.description: You are more efficient at exploring uncharted territories.
feats.prerequisites: trained in Lore about a specific terrain

feats.name: Efficient Preparation
feats.description: You’ve developed techniques for drilling your allies on multiple tactics in a succinct and efficient manner.

feats.name: Effortless Captivation
feats.description: You maintain your innate enchantments and illusions with hardly a thought.

feats.name: Effortless Concentration
feats.description: You can maintain a spell with hardly a thought.
feats.source: Player Core pg. 106, Player Core 2 pg. 157

feats.name: Effortless Impulse
feats.description: A steady ripple from your kinetic gate maintains one of your impulses.

feats.name: Effortless Reach
feats.description: Focusing the powers of your ki to augment your blows, you stretch and lengthen your body in ways that defy logic.

feats.name: Efreeti Magic
feats.description: The magic of your efreeti ancestors flows through you.

feats.name: Eidetic Ear
feats.description: You have an amazing memory for sound.

feats.name: Eidolon's Opportunity
feats.description: Your eidolon makes a melee Strike against the triggering creature.

feats.name: Eidolon's Wrath
feats.description: Your eidolon gains the eidolon's wrath focus spell, which it casts, instead of you.

feats.name: Elaborate Flourish
feats.description: You embellish your spellcasting with entrancing flourishes and grand pronouncements, making it harder to identify or counter.

feats.name: Elaborate Scroll Esoterica
feats.description: You've picked up more scraps of magic texts, improving your makeshift scrolls.

feats.name: Elaborate Talisman Esoterica
feats.description: As you continue to collect talismanic esoterica, you improve your ability to create temporary talismans.

feats.name: Eldritch Calm
feats.description: Your fey heritage has altered your mindset to more resemble the uncanny perspective of the fey.

feats.name: Eldritch Debilitations
feats.description: You know how to apply debilitations that are particularly troublesome for spellcasters.

feats.name: Eldritch Researcher Dedication
feats.description: An eager student of occult lore, you enjoy reading rare or forgotten tomes with ancient rituals and hidden secrets.
feats.source: Pathfinder #164: Hands of the Devil pg. 76
feats.prerequisites: Trained in Arcana; Trained in Occultism

feats.name: Electric Counter
feats.description: You can charge yourself with lighting, gain resistance to electricity or shocking an attacker.

feats.name: Electrify Armor
feats.description: You electrify your armor to punish foes who dare to attack you.

feats.name: Electrogenesis
feats.description: Some animals and beasts have electric organs in their body that they can use to jolt their prey.
feats.prerequisites: Wild Mimic Dedication; you have seen a creature deal electricity damage with an unarmed Strike or have identified a creature capable of dealing electricity damage with an unarmed Strike in combat

feats.name: Elegant Buckler
feats.description: You've learned a flexible way to position your buckler to provide more protection.

feats.name: Elemental Apotheosis
feats.description: You take on an elemental countenance, appearing like a type of elemental of your element.
feats.prerequisites: Nourishing Gate; exactly one kinetic element

feats.name: Elemental Artillery
feats.description: Spinning wood and metal together, you create a rugged wooden ballista.

feats.name: Elemental Assault
feats.description: You shroud your arms and held weapons in elemental magic.

feats.name: Elemental Bulwark
feats.description: You call upon the corresponding elements of your suli heritage to resist the effect.

feats.name: Elemental Embellish
feats.description: You can summon a harmless but impressive elemental display.

feats.name: Elemental Evolution
feats.description: The elemental power within you is more mutable and versatile than most.

feats.name: Elemental Existence
feats.description: Your body becomes infused with elemental earth.
feats.source: Pathfinder #195: Heavy is the Crown pg. 83

feats.name: Elemental Explosion
feats.description: You unleash the energy roiling within you.

feats.name: Elemental Eyes
feats.description: You can see in the darkness as easily as an elemental.

feats.name: Elemental Familiar
feats.description: Your familiar becomes an elemental spirit capable of taking on aspects of the elements.

feats.name: Elemental Familiar (Kineticist)
feats.description: A small creature made of elemental matter springs forth from your kinetic gate.

feats.name: Elemental Fist
feats.description: You can color your qi in bright elemental energy.

feats.name: Elemental Lore
feats.description: You've devoted yourself to researching the secrets of the Inner Sphere.

feats.name: Elemental Overlap
feats.description: Though you've dedicated yourself to one element, you learn to mix that element with another.

feats.name: Elemental Shape
feats.description: You understand the fundamental elements of nature such that you can imbue them into your body and manifest as a living embodiment of those elements.

feats.name: Elemental Spark
feats.description: You’ve learned to alter the magic of your sprite’s spark, imparting them with elemental energies.

feats.name: Elemental Summons
feats.description: You can call the elements to you.

feats.name: Elemental Trade
feats.description: You have a strong connection with stone and metal.

feats.name: Elemental Transformation
feats.description: You open your kinetic gate, but rather than activating your kinetic aura, you instead become overwhelmed with transformative elemental energy.

feats.name: Elemental Wrath
feats.description: You are so attuned to the land that you can call forth a bolt of energy from your surroundings.

feats.name: Elementalist Dedication
feats.description: Each day when you make your daily preparations, you can attune yourself to one element of your choice from your elemental philosophy.

feats.name: Elf Atavism
feats.description: Your elven blood runs particularly strong, granting you features far more elven than those of a typical aiuvarin.

feats.name: Elf Step
feats.description: You move in a graceful dance, and even your steps are broad.

feats.name: Eliminate Red Herrings
feats.description: You have a keen sense for avoiding spurious lines of inquiry.

feats.name: Elite Dracomancer
feats.description: Your draconic power equals that of a lesser dragon.
feats.source: Draconic Codex pg. 215, Advanced Player's Guide pg. 15
feats.source_book: Draconic Codex pg. 215, Advanced Player's Guide

feats.name: Elucidating Mercy
feats.description: Your mercy grants clarity to those around you just when they need it most.

feats.name: Elucidating Vision
feats.description: Your eyes have seen many things in your past lives, and your sight seems to have grown more powerful over your lifetimes.

feats.name: Elucidation
feats.description: You can cut through illusions with such precision that all those around you find their senses sharpened as well.

feats.name: Elude the Divine
feats.description: You are able to escape inquisitions involving divine magic, allowing you to blend in well in Mzali but also to avoid unwanted attention in other oppressive theocracies.

feats.name: Elude Trouble
feats.description: Stride up to your Speed.

feats.name: Elven Aloofness
feats.description: As much as you might care for them, you've come to terms with the ephemeral nature of non-elves, and it makes their threats feel less troublesome.

feats.name: Elven Instincts
feats.description: Your senses let you react rapidly.

feats.name: Elven Lore
feats.description: You've studied traditional elven arts, learning about arcane magic and the world around you.

feats.name: Elven Persistence
feats.description: Elves don’t give up easily on their pursuits.

feats.name: Elven Verve
feats.description: While all elves are immune to the paralyzing touch of ghouls, you can shake off flesh-numbing magic of all kinds.

feats.name: Elven Weapon Familiarity
feats.description: You favor bows and other elegant weapons.

feats.name: Elver Pet
feats.description: Athamarus have bonded with eels more closely than any other fish.

feats.name: Elysium's Cadence
feats.description: You've been ensnared by an azata's infectious enthusiasm for life, love, and freedom.
feats.prerequisites: You've partied extensively with an azata or entered a romantic relationship with an azata.

feats.name: Embed Aeon Stone
feats.description: You discover the secrets to embedding aeon stones into your flesh.

feats.name: Ember's Eyes
feats.description: Your eyes blaze with inner flame.

feats.name: Emberkin
feats.description: A peri's roaring spirit burns in your soul.

feats.name: Emblazon Antimagic
feats.description: Your deity’s symbol protects against offensive magic.

feats.name: Emblazon Armament
feats.description: Carefully etching a sacred image into a physical object, you steel yourself for battle.

feats.name: Emblazon Divinity
feats.description: Emblazon more equipment at the same time.

feats.name: Emblazon Energy
feats.description: With elemental forces, you make your emblazoned symbols more potent.

feats.name: Embodied Dragoon Subjectivity
feats.description: When your allies call for swift reinforcements or lightning raids, you're ready to answer.

feats.name: Embodied Dreadnought Subjectivity
feats.description: Your colossal might marks you as a behemoth, the pride of Nex's Fleshforges, and the heaviest ordnance is a child's toy in your monumental grasp.

feats.name: Embodied Legionary Subjectivity
feats.description: Nex's Fleshforges shaped you not to achieve individual greatness at arms, but rather to become a part of a legion, a modular piece integral to the combined arms stratagems of Nexian battlemages.

feats.name: Embodiment Of The Balance
feats.description: Your place in the balance between the forces of life and entropy expands the spells you can pull from the spirit realms.

feats.name: Embolded With Glorious Purpose
feats.description: Communing with powerful spirits of the world and other powers far greater than yourself fills your heart with purpose and inspires you to strive for greater accomplishments.

feats.name: Embrace the Pain
feats.description: Ignoring your pain, you reach out and grab the creature or weapon that caused you harm.

feats.name: Emerald Boughs Accustomation
feats.description: You are comfortable and socially capable in almost any cultural context.
feats.prerequisites: Magaambyan Attendant Dedication; Expert in Society; Emerald Boughs affiliation

feats.name: Emerald Boughs Hideaway
feats.description: You use Emerald Bough techniques to create a small extradimensional space called a hideaway that lasts as long as you are conscious.
feats.prerequisites: Magaambyan Attendant Dedication; Emerald Boughs affiliation

feats.name: Emergency Regeneration
feats.description: You have battled against foes whose bodies naturally regenerate, and while yours doesn't do so all the time, it can happen in a pinch.
feats.prerequisites: Wild Mimic Dedication; you have deactivated a creature’s regeneration for at least 1 round or have identified a creature with regeneration in combat

feats.name: Emergency Targe
feats.description: You immediately Raise a Shield or cast shield.

feats.name: Emissary Assistance
feats.description: As an emissary, you have assisted land-bound creatures in journeying underwater to visit your settlements.

feats.name: Emissary Familiar
feats.description: You forge a mystical bond with a spirit or create a spirit from a fragment of your own soul.

feats.name: Emissary of Peace
feats.description: Even when bloodshed is inevitable, you would rather see your foes surrender.

feats.name: Emit Defensive Odor
feats.description: While athamarus' natural pheromones are typically used for communication, you have developed yours into a defense mechanism to ward off foes.

feats.name: Emotional Partitions
feats.description: You have created strong mental partitions in your mind to filter out negative emotional influences.

feats.name: Emotional Push
feats.description: Encouraging Words
feats.prerequisites: You prepare to take advantage of your enemy’s sudden change in emotions.
notes: Auditory, General, Linguistic, Mental, Skill, Stamina
You give an ally a quick pep talk, helping them recover.

feats.name: Emotional Surge
feats.description: Your heart soars, increasing your power for a moment.

feats.name: Emotionless
feats.description: Your malfunctioning emotional processors make it difficult for you to feel strong emotions.

feats.name: Empathetic Envoy
feats.description: You believe that treating others with respect is the fastest way into their hearts, and in turn others are more likely to believe in your good intentions and write off bad first impressions as flukes.

feats.name: Empathetic Plea
feats.description: The way you cringe or use those puppydog eyes you've been practicing elicits an empathetic response in the attacker.

feats.name: Empathic Calm
feats.description: Once per day, you can cast either calm emotions or sanctuary as an innate occult spell, heightened to half your level rounded up.

feats.name: Empathy Incarnate
feats.description: Reincarnation has given you a compassionate perspective and enabled you to relate to almost everyone you speak with, putting them at ease and quickly generating trust.

feats.name: Emphatic Emissary
feats.description: You can tell when diplomacy has failed and a meeting is close to unraveling or falling to blows.

feats.name: Empiricist's Eye
feats.description: Sharp and piercing, your eyes see all and convey more.

feats.name: Empowered Onslaught
feats.description: When your body and mind are perfectly in sync and pushed to the limit, it can produce even greater results.

feats.name: Empyreal Aura
feats.description: As an ultimate foe of evil and protector of the innocent, your very presence is a ward against evil.

feats.name: Endless Memories
feats.description: You've lived a thousand lives and done a hundred-thousand things.

feats.name: Endurance of the Rooted Tree
feats.description: Just as the Vale of Aroden retains light and life despite inhospitable surroundings, you can sustain yourself regardless of your environment.

feats.name: Endure Death's Touch
feats.description: Your conviction redirects the undead’s attack through your armor and then harmlessly away.
feats.prerequisites: Knight Vigilant; expert in medium or heavy armor

feats.name: Enduring Alchemy
feats.description: You've learned how to make your personal energy last just a little bit longer when quickly brewing ad hoc concoctions.

feats.name: Enduring Debilitation
feats.description: Your debilitations last for 1 minute.

feats.name: Enduring Quickness
feats.description: You move as fast and freely as the wind.

feats.name: Energetic Resonance
feats.description: Your blood resonates with magical energy, mitigating the effects of harmful spells.

feats.name: Energize Bite
feats.description: The deadly energy of your breath remains in your jaws to empower your attacks.
feats.prerequisites: Breath of the Dragon; jaws unarmed attack

feats.name: Energize Wings
feats.description: You stoke your magic to energize your wings, temporarily transforming them into glowing, majestic forms.

feats.name: Energized Font
feats.description: You can focus your mind more quickly thanks to the magic that flows within you.
feats.prerequisites: focus pool, at least one innate spell from a gnome heritage or ancestry feat that shares a tradition with at least one of your focus spells

feats.name: Energized Spark
feats.description: The energy of your spirit manifests as crackling lightning, the chill of winter, or the power of an element.

feats.name: Energy Ablation
feats.description: As you direct destructive energy at a foe, you can divert some of its power into a protective barrier that shields you from harm.

feats.name: Energy Beam
feats.description: You can channel your core's power through the magical gem that serves as your eye.

feats.name: Energy Blessed
feats.description: Energy runs through your blood more powerfully.

feats.name: Energy Fortification
feats.description: You learn Minkaian traditions about the void and know how to manipulate the five elements to fortify vitality and void energies in the body.
feats.prerequisites: Prepare Elemental Medicine; Expert in Occultism

feats.name: Energy Fusion
feats.description: You fuse two spells together, combining their energy types.

feats.name: Energy Heart
feats.description: Your eidolon's heart beats with energy.

feats.name: Energy Interceptor
feats.description: Though other guardians understand how to anticipate the flow of martial combat, you predict blasts of magical lightning, blazing trap runes, and more.

feats.name: Energy Resistance
feats.description: Your eidolon has stronger resistance.

feats.name: Energy Ward
feats.description: Enervating Wail
feats.prerequisites: You convert energy from the last spell you cast into a protective ward.
notes: Gatewalkers Player's Guide (Remastered) pg. 13, Dark Archives (Remastered) pg. 102
You release a terrible wail that tears at the spirits of all nearby.

feats.name: Enforce Oath
feats.description: You call on your oath to embolden you in combat.
feats.prerequisites: Any feat with the oath trait

feats.name: Enforced Order
feats.description: You never fail to strike down the ever-expanding reaches of chaos.

feats.name: Engine Bay
feats.description: You are practiced at working in vast garages of vehicles and can work on many machines at a time.
feats.prerequisites: Vehicle Mechanic Dedication; Expert in Crafting

feats.name: Engine of Destruction
feats.description: Your construct unleashes a broad swath of devastation by separating its limbs, deploying hidden armaments, or using a similar technique to wreak havoc.

feats.name: Enhanced Familiar
feats.description: You infuse your familiar with additional primal energy, increasing its abilities.
feats.source: Player Core pg. 129, Player Core 2 pg. 153

feats.name: Enhanced Psychopomp Familiar
feats.description: Your psychopomp's continued service in Pharasma's name brings it favor from the goddess.

feats.name: Enigma's Knowledge
feats.description: Your muse whispers knowledge to you at all the right times.

feats.name: Enjoy the Show
feats.description: You address an ally or any onlookers to your combat, flaunting to your foes how little attention they require.

feats.name: Enlarged Chassis
feats.description: You've empowered your core to support a larger body, granting you size and additional reach.

feats.name: Enshroud Soul Cage
feats.description: You wreathe your soul cage in an ever-growing collection of obfuscating illusions and protective abjurations to hide it from your enemies.

feats.name: Ensnaring Disarm
feats.description: You smack your foe's item out of their hand so that your student can grab it.

feats.name: Ensnaring Wrappings
feats.description: Some of your wrappings come loose to ensnare a creature you recently damaged.

feats.name: Enter Divine Realm
feats.description: You are granted access to your deity’s realm and can travel there quickly.

feats.name: Enthralling Allure
feats.description: The powers of domination employed by your progenitors have manifested in you as well.

feats.name: Enticing Dwelling
feats.description: Your spirit dwelling is particularly inviting to spirit wisps.

feats.name: Entities from Afar
feats.description: You can call in aberrations to fight for you or to answer questions.
feats.source: Pathfinder #164: Hands of the Devil pg. 76

feats.name: Entity's Strike
feats.description: The more you try to force your body to stay yours, the more it warps to channel the energy flowing through you.

feats.name: Entourage
feats.description: You have a small group of admirers who tend to follow you around while you’re in civilized settlements.

feats.name: Entreat with Forebears
feats.description: Something about your presence causes creatures of your bloodline to, consciously or not, recognize you as one of their own, and you become inured to their tricks.
feats.prerequisites: a bloodline that corresponds with a creature trait

feats.name: Entwined Energy Ki
feats.description: You can transform your inner power into a type of energy to empower your ki abilities.
feats.source: Pathfinder #166: Despair on Danger Island pg. 74

feats.name: Envenom Fangs
feats.description: You envenom your fangs.

feats.name: Envenom Strike
feats.description: You spit venom onto a weapon you're holding or a weapon held by a willing creature within 30 feet; you can also use this ability to envenom your nagaji fangs unarmed attack.
feats.prerequisites: you possess a Strike from a nagaji heritage or ancestry feat that deals poison damage

feats.name: Envenomed Edge
feats.description: With a combination of your poison glands and herbal concoctions, you can consistently deliver venomous attacks when you hit an enemy's weak points.

feats.name: Environmental Adaptability
feats.description: Having experienced the harshest environs that nature has to offer, your body is able to adapt to intense heat and cold.

feats.name: Environmental Grace
feats.description: You rapidly adapt to environments through a combination of skill, meditation, and divine grace
feats.prerequisites: Master in Survival; deity who grants the cold, fire, nature, or travel domain

feats.name: Environmental Guide
feats.description: You can rapidly adapt to climates and help others do the same.

feats.name: Epiphany at the Crossroads
feats.description: The crossroads between life and death is a place that can reveal many secrets.

feats.name: Equitable Defense
feats.description: Gritting your teeth through the pain, you position yourself to counterattack.

feats.name: Escape Timeline
feats.description: You step outside of the flow of time momentarily, allowing you to avoid dangers.

feats.name: Esoteric Polymath
feats.description: You keep a book of occult spells, similar to a wizard’s spellbook, and can use its spells to supplement your spell repertoire.

feats.name: Esoteric Reflexes
feats.description: Reacting with an implement becomes instinct.
feats.prerequisites: an implement that grants a reaction

feats.name: Esoteric Spellcasting
feats.description: Your study of a variety of esoteric texts and supernatural matters has broadened your mind and improved your spellcasting.

feats.name: Esoteric Warden
feats.description: When you apply antithetical material against a creature successfully, you also ward yourself against its next attacks.

feats.name: Essence Overflow
feats.description: Your Channel Draconic Essence ends, and all creatures (except you) in a 10-foot emanation from your spectral dragon take 6d6 damage with a

feats.name: Esteemed Visitor
feats.description: Your polite manners and natural ability to comfort others make it easy for you to break down cultural barriers and earn strangers’ trust.

feats.name: Eternal Bane
feats.description: Your life has made you a nexus for your deity’s vile power.

feats.name: Eternal Blessing
feats.description: Your deeds have brought your deity’s grace to you for all of eternity.

feats.name: Eternal Boost
feats.description: Your link with your eidolon is so intense that you continuously reinforce its abilities.

feats.name: Eternal Composition
feats.description: The world is a stage upon which you are always playing.

feats.name: Eternal Elixir
feats.description: Your body readily accepts and retains minor changes.

feats.name: Eternal Guide
feats.description: Your attuned apparitions recognize that you still have essential work to do and refuse to allow you to pass on, gathering up your essence to carry your soul back to the community you call home.

feats.name: Eternal Memories
feats.description: You have lived longer than most realize, and due to your many lifetimes of practice you remember almost everything from your previous incarnations now.

feats.name: Eternal Torch
feats.description: You open a connection to your kinetic gate, large enough for a torch flame to flow.

feats.name: Eternal Wings
feats.description: Your wings are now a permanent part of your body.

feats.name: Eternal Wings (Sylph)
feats.description: Your wings are now a permanent part of your body.

feats.name: Eternity-Incinerating Blaze
feats.description: The blaze of your divine spark is hot enough that it burns in not just the present, but the past and future as well.

feats.name: Evade Doom
feats.description: You can elude supernatural disaster.

feats.name: Evanescent Wings
feats.description: You've manifested wings that can flutter for brief spurts.

feats.name: Evangelize
feats.description: You point out a detail that incontrovertibly supports your faith, causing a listener's mind to whirl.
feats.prerequisites: Master in Diplomacy; follower of a specific religion or philosophy

feats.name: Evasiveness
feats.description: Your proficiency rank for Reflex saves increases to master.
feats.prerequisites: Swashbuckler Dedication; expert in Reflex Saves

feats.name: Evasiveness (Rogue)
feats.description: Your proficiency rank for Reflex saves increases to master.
feats.prerequisites: Rogue Dedication; expert in Reflex saves

feats.name: Even the Odds (Archetype)
feats.description: Even when overpowered, Eagle Knights hold out hope.

feats.name: Even the Odds (Swashbuckler)
feats.description: You shine brightest in desperate moments.

feats.name: Ever Dreaming
feats.description: You draw no distinction between the sleeping and waking worlds.

feats.name: Ever-Vigilant Senses
feats.description: Your eidolon has enhanced senses.

feats.name: Everdistant Defense
feats.description: You have learned that distance can foil enemies better than any armor.
feats.source: Pathfinder #168: King of the Mountain pg. 75

feats.name: Everstand Stance
feats.description: You brace your shield with both hands, enhancing its potential for both offense and defense.

feats.name: Everstand Strike
feats.description: Your follow-up blow leaves you an opening to set your shield.

feats.name: Everyday Form
feats.description: There’s nothing better than being a tanuki, but sometimes you need a less conspicuous form when going into the big city or other crowded places.

feats.name: Everyone Duck!
feats.description: You intentionally set off the trap, but you take special precautions to protect yourself and your allies from the trap’s effects.

feats.name: Everyone's a Suspect
feats.description: You are so suspicious of everyone you meet that you keep mental notes on how to defeat them all—even your own allies.

feats.name: Evolved Spellhorn
feats.description: Your inborn arcane power grows.

feats.name: Exacting Strike
feats.description: You make a controlled follow-up attack, fully accounting for your momentum.

feats.name: Exalted Greatness
feats.description: You improve your exalted reaction with the benefit listed for your cause.

feats.name: Exceptional Follower
feats.description: Your followers' abilities have soared to new heights.

feats.name: Execution
feats.description: You swing wide, attempting to behead your condemned foe.
feats.source: Night of the Gray Death pg. 65
feats.prerequisites: Harsh Judgment; Vigilante Dedication; member of the Gray Gardeners

feats.name: Executioner Weapon Training
feats.description: Your Gray Gardener training has made you deeply skilled with the weapons that execute with a swift chop to the neck.
feats.source: Night of the Gray Death pg. 64
feats.prerequisites: Vigilante Dedication; member of the Gray Gardeners

feats.name: Exemplar Dedication
feats.description: A spark of inherent divine power has lit itself within you.

feats.name: Exemplar Expertise
feats.description: Your soul has been further tempered in divine power.

feats.name: Exemplar Resilency
feats.description: You gain 3 additional Hit Points for each exemplar archetype class feat you have.
feats.prerequisites: Exemplar Dedication; class granting no more Hit Points per level than 8 + your Constitution modifier

feats.name: Exhort the Faithful
feats.description: Your knowledge of the tenets of your faith gives you insight into the best ways to get others of your faith to help you or to follow your directions.
feats.prerequisites: Expert in Religion; follower of a specific religion

feats.name: Exigent Aura
feats.description: The power of your deity and your own convictions leave an impression on creatures even when they normally would be unable to comprehend your words or the feelings spurred on by your god.

feats.name: Exorcist Dedication
feats.description: You've learned to attract, quell, and purify spirits, housing them in a special receptacle called a spirit dwelling until they're ready to move on.
feats.prerequisites: Trained in Occultism or Trained in Religion

feats.name: Expand Aura
feats.description: You focus your divine power to extend your influence and protection.

feats.name: Expand Spiral
feats.description: Your prayers encompass your companions, granting you the ability to share Pharasma's blessings.

feats.name: Expanded Domain Initiate
