feats.description: You have long venerated one of your deity’s lesser-known aspects.

feats.name: Expanded Elemental Magic
feats.description: You reach new understandings of the elements, taking an expansive view.

feats.name: Expanded Senses
feats.description: Your eidolon evolves more acute senses.

feats.name: Expanded Splash
feats.description: You can throw bombs at just the right trajectory to create especially large and powerful explosions.

feats.name: Expanded Swarm
feats.description: Your hive has grown to the point where it is difficult to keep your swarm contained within your body.

feats.name: Expansive Spellstrike
feats.description: You can blast the energy of a spell out around the target of your attack.

feats.name: Expeditious Advance
feats.description: You advance and retreat quickly.

feats.name: Expeditious Search
feats.description: master in Perception
feats.campaign: Search areas in half the time

feats.name: Experienced Follower
feats.description: Your followers' skills have developed over the course of your adventures.

feats.name: Experienced Harrower
feats.description: When you perform the harrowing ritual, the DC for the Primary Check is never more than the standard DC by level, and the cost for the ritual is halved.

feats.name: Experienced Professional
feats.description: Trained in Lore
feats.campaign: Prevent critical failures when Earning Income

feats.name: Experienced Smuggler
feats.description: Trained in Stealth
feats.campaign: Conceal items from observers more effectively

feats.name: Experienced Tracker
feats.description: Trained in Survival
feats.campaign: Track at your full Speed at a –5 penalty

feats.name: Expert Animist Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the expert spellcasting benefits as a prepared divine caster.
feats.prerequisites: Basic Animist Spellcasting; Master in Religion

feats.name: Expert Bard Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the expert spellcasting benefits.
feats.prerequisites: Basic Bard Spellcasting; Master in Occultism

feats.name: Expert Beast Gunner Spellcasting
feats.description: You've learned the deeper secrets of beast guns, making you an expert in the magic they grant you.
feats.prerequisites: Basic Beast Gunner Spellcasting or Basic Wizard Spellcasting

feats.name: Expert Captivator Spellcasting
feats.description: You learn more powerful spells to enchant and deceive.

feats.name: Expert Cathartic Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the expert spellcasting benefits.

feats.name: Expert Cleric Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the expert spellcasting benefits.
feats.prerequisites: Basic Cleric Spellcasting; Master in Religion

feats.name: Expert Combat Eidolon
feats.description: Your eidolon advances its capabilities in combat.

feats.name: Expert Drill Sergeant
feats.description: While exploring, when you are leading and allies are Following the Expert, instead of granting a +2 circumstance bonus in the applicable skill, you grant a +3 circumstance bonus if you're an expert and a +4 circumstance bonus if you're a master.

feats.name: Expert Druid Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the expert spellcasting benefits.
feats.prerequisites: Basic Druid Spellcasting; Master in Nature

feats.name: Expert Fireworks Crafter
feats.description: You’re particularly adept at crafting fireworks, allowing you to create more fireworks than you otherwise could.
feats.source: Guns & Gears (Remastered) pg. 135, Guns & Gears (Remastered) pg. 134
feats.prerequisites: Firework Technician Dedication; Expert in Crafting

feats.name: Expert Kinetic Control
feats.description: You become an expert in kineticist class DC and impulse attack rolls.

feats.name: Expert Longevity
feats.description: You've continued to refine the knowledge and skills you've gained through your life.

feats.name: Expert Magus Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the expert bounded spellcasting benefits.
feats.prerequisites: Basic Magus Spellcasting; Master in Arcana

feats.name: Expert Oracle Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the expert spellcasting benefits.
feats.prerequisites: Basic Oracle Spellcasting; Master in Religion

feats.name: Expert Prophet Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the expert spellcasting benefits.
feats.prerequisites: Basic Prophet Spellcasting; Master in Society

feats.name: Expert Psychic Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the expert spellcasting benefits.
feats.prerequisites: Basic Psychic Spellcasting; Master in Occultism

feats.name: Expert Red Mantis Magic
feats.description: Master in Religion; Basic Red Mantis Magic
feats.campaign: You gain the expert spellcasting benefits

feats.name: Expert Rivethun Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the expert spellcasting benefits.
feats.prerequisites: Basic Rivethun Spellcasting; Master in Religion
notes: You draw ever more magical cold into your being, learning how to manipulate it to your whims.

feats.name: Expert Skysage Divination
feats.description: Your studies of the stars have taught you about the mysteries of the cosmos.

feats.name: Expert Sorcerer Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the expert spellcasting benefits.
feats.prerequisites: Basic Sorcerer Spellcasting; master in Arcana, Nature, Occultism, or Religion, depending on bloodline

feats.name: Expert Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the expert spellcasting archetype benefits.

feats.name: Expert Summoner Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the expert bounded spellcasting benefits.
feats.prerequisites: Basic Summoner Spellcasting; master in the skill associated with your eidolon's tradition

feats.name: Expert Witch Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the expert spellcasting benefits.
feats.prerequisites: Basic Witch Spellcasting; master in the skill associated with your patron's tradition

feats.name: Expert Wizard Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the expert spellcasting benefits.
feats.prerequisites: Basic Wizard Spellcasting; Master in Arcana

feats.name: Exploit Blunder
feats.description: By watching your foes closely, you can make the most out of their mistakes.

feats.name: Exploit Opening
feats.description: You take advantage of your spotter’s devastating attack to unleash your own follow-up attack.

feats.name: Exploitive Bomb
feats.description: You can mix a refractile substance into an alchemical bomb to foil resistances.

feats.name: Explosion
feats.description: Your innovation can explode on command.

feats.name: Explosion of Power
feats.description: Your magic explodes.

feats.name: Explosive Arrival
feats.description: Your summoned creature appears in a detonation of arcane runes.

feats.name: Explosive Entry
feats.description: You know exactly how to make a memorable entrance.
feats.prerequisites: Demolitionist Dedication; Master in Engineering Lore

feats.name: Explosive Expert
feats.description: You have continued training in volatile weapons and gained a deeper understanding.

feats.name: Explosive Leap
feats.description: You aim an explosion from your innovation downward to launch yourself into the air.

feats.name: Explosive Maneuver
feats.description: Thanks to a hidden experimental feature you built into your weapon, your weapon explosively deploys levers, tangling hooks, or similar mechanisms to provide significant assistance when you perform a combat maneuver.

feats.name: Explosive Metamorphosis
feats.description: You use additional primal energy to transform, creating a burst of elemental energy to complement your transformation.

feats.name: Explosive Savant
feats.description: A lifetime wielding firearms and explosive ordinance amid the chaos of battle has granted you great skill with volatile weapons.

feats.name: Express Driver
feats.description: You can optimize your vehicle's performance, coaxing extra speed and choosing paths to avoid slowdowns.

feats.name: Express Rider
feats.description: You can encourage your mount to cover ground quickly.

feats.name: Exsanguinate
feats.description: After one of your attacks, you direct your foe’s blood to spray upon you, infusing you with life energy.

feats.name: Extend Boost
feats.description: You can increase the duration of your eidolon's boosts.

feats.name: Extend Elixir
feats.description: Integrating your own personal energy into the elixirs you create causes them to affect you for longer.

feats.name: Extended Kinesis
feats.description: You've refined the control you can exert over your elements.

feats.name: Extinguish Light
feats.description: You wrap shadow around a single unattended light source within 120 feet that's no larger than a torch.

feats.name: Extra Squishy
feats.description: Your rubbery physique makes it easier for you to wedge yourself into tight spaces and more difficult for your enemies to dislodge you.

feats.name: Extract Vow of Nonviolence
feats.description: You entice or threaten a weapon, making it swear not to harm you.

feats.name: Extradimensional Stash
feats.description: When you perform sleight of hand, you fold space so that objects really do disappear.
feats.source: Pathfinder #168: King of the Mountain pg. 75

feats.name: Extraplanar Cloud
feats.description: When you use Extraplanar Haze, you can spend 1 additional action to disperse the particles as a 10-foot-radius cloud centered on you instead of as a haze; the activity gains the concentrate trait.

feats.name: Extraplanar Haze
feats.description: Your body emits tiny particles of extraplanar matter, such as crystalline motes or smoky vapor, that surround you in a haze.

feats.name: Extraplanar Supplication
feats.description: You call upon divine power to place a benediction upon your allies or a malediction upon your foes.

feats.name: Extravagant Parry
feats.description: You use one-handed weapons to parry with style.

feats.name: Exude Demonic Corruption
feats.description: Most of the changes from the demon within you have harmed you so far, but you've found a way to expel some of the corruption within you to poison others.
feats.prerequisites: Living Vessel Dedication; your entity is a demon

feats.name: Exult in Violence
feats.description: You let out a war cry as your blow lands true, and judgment descends on an enemy.

feats.name: Exultant Blood Magic
feats.description: The magic in your blood sings an exultant song of battle.
feats.prerequisites: Surging Blood Magic; legendary in Arcana or Religion, depending on your chosen tradition

feats.name: Eye for Masonry
feats.description: Your familiarity with architecture allows you to easily spot subtle stonework.

feats.name: Eye for Numbers
feats.description: You've learned to quickly estimate the number of items in a group with relative accuracy at only a glance.

feats.name: Eye for Smugglers
feats.description: Your time checking seemingly innocent cargo ships for illicit goods has made you as canny as you are suspicious.

feats.name: Eye for Treasure
feats.description: You know good artisanship when you see it and can wax poetic about crafting techniques and forms.

feats.name: Eye for Weakness
feats.description: When you successfully Recall Knowledge about a creature you can see, you automatically learn if it has a weakness to holy or unholy in addition to any other results.
feats.prerequisites: Sister of the Golden Erinys Dedication

feats.name: Eye of Ozem
feats.description: Learn how to better spot danger at a distance.
feats.prerequisites: Lastwall Sentry Dedication; expert in Perception

feats.name: Eye of the Arclords
feats.description: The Arclords of Nex have achieved a unique mastery of magic.
feats.source: World Guide pg. 81, Wake the Dead #2 pg. 28
feats.source_book: World Guide pg. 81, Wake the Dead #2

feats.name: Eyes of God
feats.description: You can see things as they truly are.

feats.name: Eyes of Night
feats.description: You can see in the darkness as easily as a true vampire.

feats.name: Eyes of the City
feats.description: You can track down targets with the help of locals.
feats.prerequisites: Trained in Diplomacy or Trained in Society

feats.name: Fabricate Truth
feats.description: You invent a false truth by fast talking, switching arguments, shifting the standard of evidence, and generally confounding others.

feats.name: Fabricated Credentials
feats.description: You're so familiar with the paperwork necessary to maintain your cover that you can easily whip up documents that support your fabrications.
feats.prerequisites: Twilight Talon Dedication; Master in Deception

feats.name: Face Your Fears
feats.description: A lifetime of facing Nidal's terrors has taught you to fight through fear.

feats.name: Fade Away
feats.description: Your ability to blend into the background allows you to fade away entirely or appear innocuous even to magical effects.

feats.name: Fading
feats.description: You partially fade from reality.

feats.name: Faith in the Fallen
feats.description: The Gravelands are full of fallen spirits seeking to move on, and you consider it your obligation to assist in that regard.

feats.name: Faithful Steed
feats.description: False Faith
feats.prerequisites: You gain the service of a young animal companion as a mount.
notes: Pathfinder #148: Fires of the Haunted City pg. 63
Droskar knows you may need to disguise yourself in societies that oppose your faith.

feats.name: Faithful Stride
feats.description: Confident in your faith, you Command an Animal to order your mount to Stride up to twice its Speed (or up to three times its Speed if you used 3 actions for Faithful Stride).

feats.name: Fake It Till You Make it
feats.description: When you take on a role, you become more capable with all sorts of tasks involving that role.

feats.name: Fake Out
feats.description: With a skilled flourish of your weapon, you force an enemy to acknowledge you as a threat.

feats.name: Falcon Swoop
feats.description: Like the fastest of predatory birds, you soar toward your prey at great speeds.

feats.name: False Priest Form
feats.description: Nobody respects tanuki, but most everyone respects an esteemed priest, so what better form to take if you want to get by a little easier? When you Change Shape, you can assume the shape of a priest or other religious official from a religion of your choosing.

feats.name: Familiar
feats.description: You make a pact with a creature that serves you and assists your spellcasting.
feats.source: Player Core pg. 201, Player Core 2 pg. 152

feats.name: Familiar Foe
feats.description: You regularly face off against undead and can identify many with a glance.
feats.prerequisites: Lastwall Sentry Dedication; Expert in Religion or Expert in Undead Lore

feats.name: Familiar Oddities
feats.description: Perhaps due to the curse within you, curses occasionally perceive you as an extension of themselves and readily reveal themselves to you
feats.prerequisites: Curse Maelstrom Dedication; Trained in Occultism or Trained in Curse Lore

feats.name: Familiar Ritualist
feats.description: Your familiar’s magical presence can serve as an aspect of a ritual.
feats.prerequisites: Familiar Sage Dedication; ability to cast a ritual

feats.name: Familiar Sage Dedication
feats.description: You’ve forged an empowered mystical bond with your familiar.
feats.prerequisites: You have a familiar, and you're able to cast spells.

feats.name: Familiar's Eyes
feats.description: You use your familiar's senses as easily as your own.

feats.name: Familiar's Language
feats.description: You’ve learned to speak with your familiar and other creatures like it.

feats.name: Familiar's Resolve
feats.description: When you weave magic, your familiar traces symbols that throw off fear and doubt.

feats.name: Fan Dancer Dedication
feats.description: You sweep across the battlefield, manifesting both the gentle spring breeze and the crisp autumn gusts.

feats.name: Fang Sharpener
feats.description: You have filed your teeth into jagged points and have an unusually powerful jaw, making your mouth a dangerous weapon.
feats.prerequisites: Irongut Goblin heritage or Razortooth Goblin heritage

feats.name: Fangs
feats.description: Your incisors have grown into true fangs: long, sharp, and well-suited to drawing blood.

feats.name: Fantastic Leap
feats.description: You launch yourself through the air at a foe.

feats.name: Fantastic Leaps
feats.description: Your leaps seem to defy gravity as you soar through the air in a single bound.

feats.name: Far Lobber
feats.description: You've learned how to throw a longer distance.

feats.name: Far Shot
feats.description: Your experience in the field has taught you how to focus your aim at a distance, increasing your accuracy.

feats.name: Far Throw
feats.description: When you Strike with a thrown weapon, you take only a –1 penalty for each additional range increment between you and the target, rather than a –2 penalty.

feats.name: Fascinated by Society
feats.description: Just as some humanoids find themselves driven to study nature, you are obsessed with the artificial constructs of society and can't get enough.

feats.name: Fascinating Performance
feats.description: Trained in Performance

feats.name: Fast Channel
feats.description: Divine power is always at your fingertips, swiftly responding to your call.

feats.name: Fast Recovery
feats.description: Constitution +2
feats.campaign: Regain more HP from rest, recover faster from disease

feats.name: Fast Swimmer
feats.description: You move more quickly underwater.
feats.prerequisites: Undersea Privateer Dedication; you have a Swim speed

feats.name: Fatal Aria
feats.description: Your songs overwhelm the target with unbearable emotion, potentially striking them dead on the spot.

feats.name: Fatal Bullet
feats.description: Fearsome Fangs
feats.prerequisites: You're especially talented at striking your enemies in their most vulnerable areas.
notes: Your claws and jaws are brutally powerful and efficient, even by ursine standards.

feats.name: Faultspawn
feats.description: You bear a grudge, inherited from a blasphemous asura forebear in your bloodline, against a particular deity and their works.

feats.name: Favor of Heaven
feats.description: You're one of Hei Feng's chosen people and have the authority of the Celestial Court on your side.

feats.name: Favorable Winds
feats.description: You wrap a shell of favorable wind around a weapon you wield.

feats.name: Favored Prey
feats.description: You have studied a specific type of wild creature and can hunt it more easily.

feats.name: Favored Terrain
feats.description: You have studied a specific terrain to overcome its challenges.

feats.name: Fear No Pain!
feats.description: You have learned to endure pain without complaint and are capable of steeling your allies with similar resolve.

feats.name: Fear of God
feats.description: You embed a divine fear into the triggering foe that lasts for 10 minutes.
feats.prerequisites: Mortal Herald Dedication; Expert in Intimidation

feats.name: Fearful Symmetry
feats.description: You attack with a feline grace as captivatingly beautiful as it is deadly.

feats.name: Fearsome Brute
feats.description: Fear makes your foes weak and more vulnerable to your attacks.

feats.name: Fearsome Familiar
feats.description: Your elemental familiar trades places with an elemental from its elemental plane.

feats.name: Fearsome Form
feats.description: A fearsome illusion covers you, evoking the terror of the most dangerous animals.

feats.name: Feast
feats.description: You feast upon an adjacent restrained or unconscious creature, or a deceased creature that died in the past hour.

feats.name: Feast Planner
feats.description: You learn the fortifying brew ritual, but you instead prepare dishes for a lavish meal that have the same effect as the drinks from the normal version of the ritual.
notes: Deviant, Extradimensional, Magical, Mental, Rare, Spirit
The void within you manages to manifest itself temporarily, a black hole opening over your heart and threatening to draw everything in.

feats.name: Feather Step
feats.description: Dexterity +2

feats.name: Feathered Cloak
feats.description: To blend in with the grounded and wingless, you fold your wings just so on your back, creating the illusion of a feathered cloak.

feats.name: Feathered Flechettes
feats.description: Unfurling your wings in a quick snap, you send feathers scattering in all directions.

feats.name: Feed on Pain
feats.description: The psychic feedback of another creature's pain fills you with false life.

feats.name: Feeding Frenzy
feats.description: Your serrated teeth rip and tear at your prey.

feats.name: Feeling Your Oats
feats.description: You are incredible, impeccable, an icon of style and grace—and everyone knows it.
feats.prerequisites: Celebrity Dedication or Dandy Dedication; Trained in Deception

feats.name: Feign Innocence
feats.description: You convince a creature that, despite appearances, you're on its side.

feats.name: Felicitous Riposte
feats.description: You take advantage of your foe's openings with uncanny odds.

feats.name: Feline Dance
feats.description: You fluidly move between stances in the process of dodging.

feats.name: Fell Rider
feats.description: You have trained with your animal companion to become a terrifying juggernaut on the battlefield.

feats.name: Felling Shot
feats.description: Your ranged attacks can shoot an unprepared foe right out of the air.

feats.name: Felling Strike
feats.description: Your attack can ground an airborne foe.

feats.name: Feral Lunge
feats.description: You spring on an unsuspecting opponent, tearing at them with your teeth.
feats.prerequisites: Werecreature Dedication; your animal shape grants a fangs or jaws unarmed attack

feats.name: Feral Mending
feats.description: You can heal your wounds while reshaping your flesh.
feats.prerequisites: Werecreature Dedication; you were not afflicted with the curse of the werecreature

feats.name: Feral Scramble
feats.description: Sinking your claws in, you propel yourself at shocking speed.
feats.prerequisites: Werecreature Dedication; your animal shape grants a claw unarmed attack

feats.name: Feral Senses
feats.description: The eyes and noses of animals are naturally sharper than most humanoids.

feats.name: Feral Toss
feats.description: You hurl foes away with a shake of your head.
feats.prerequisites: Werecreature Dedication; your animal shape grants an antler, horn, or tusk unarmed attack

feats.name: Fermenting Liquors
feats.description: You always have a special batch of preserved liquor ready for each day.

feats.name: Ferocious Beasts
feats.description: Since ancient times, the mightiest orc beast tamers would draw out the true fighting spirit of their companion beasts by feeding the creatures a draft incorporating the orc’s own blood.
feats.prerequisites: Bonded Animal, animal companion, or Pet; Orc Ferocity

feats.name: Ferocious Charge
feats.description: You've taught your companions to charge directly at an enemy.
feats.prerequisites: Beastmaster Dedication; animal companion with an antlers, head, or horn unarmed attack

feats.name: Ferocious Gust
feats.description: With heavy wing beats, you whip up a furious gust and direct it at your opponents.

feats.name: Ferocious Shape
feats.description: You’ve mastered the shape of dinosaurs.

feats.name: Ferocious Will
feats.description: You send a blast of magical feedback at the effect's source, dealing 5d6 mental damage with a basic Will save against your class DC or spell DC, whichever is higher.

feats.name: Ferocity Mimicry
feats.description: You have trained yourself to continue fighting even when your body is screaming for you to stop.
feats.prerequisites: Wild Mimic Dedication; you have encountered a creature who has kept fighting or dealt damage after being reduced to 0 Hit Points (such as via death throes or Ferocity) or have identified a creature with such an ability in combat

feats.name: Ferrousoul
feats.description: The elemental metal in your soul resonates strongly with iron, bronze, and other sturdy, practical metals suitable for weaponry.

feats.name: Ferry Through Waves
feats.description: The waters around you permit you passage, a privilege you can share with a willing ally.

feats.name: Festering Wound
feats.description: Wounds you inflict with your unarmed attacks fester and rot, becoming infected and difficult to heal.

feats.name: Fetchling Lore
feats.description: You've learned obscure lessons about your fellow fetchlings.

feats.name: Feverish Enzymes
feats.description: Your claws and fangs exude an infectious enzyme, related to the necrotic effects of ghoul fever, that causes a creature's wounds to heal slowly.

feats.name: Fey Ascension
feats.description: The fey influence on your form and features grows even more powerful and notable.

feats.name: Fey Caller
feats.description: You have learned some of the tricks the fey use to bend primal magic toward illusions and trickery.

feats.name: Fey Cantrips
feats.description: You've learned the cantrips sprites have used since time immemorial.

feats.name: Fey Disguise
feats.description: You can disguise yourself with magical illusions.

feats.name: Fey Fellowship
feats.description: Your enhanced fey connection (either through your blood or via prolonged contact with their kind) affords you a warmer reception from creatures of the First World as well as tools to foil their tricks or withstand their magic.

feats.name: Fey Influence
feats.description: Your exposure to fey influence has given you some primal magic
feats.source: Impossible Lands pg. 126, PFS Scenario #1-17: The Perennial Crown Part 2, The Thorned Monarch pg. 30
feats.source_book: Impossible Lands pg. 126, PFS Scenario #1-17: The Perennial Crown Part 2, The Thorned Monarch

feats.name: Fey Life
feats.description: There are some fates worse than death–and you worked to save a fey from one such fate.
feats.prerequisites: You helped to save a fey from a terrible fate, and you're not a fey.

feats.name: Fey Magic
feats.description: You can use faerie magic to hide yourself and expose hidden foes.

feats.name: Fey Skin
feats.description: Fiendish Strikes
feats.prerequisites: While you are more susceptible to cold iron than most of the Wingless, you also have an incredible resilience and a deeper connection to the healing energies of the First World.
notes: Your festering connection to the forces of evil infuses your weapons with debilitating malevolence, tearing down creatures of good with every attack.

feats.name: Fey Tracker
feats.description: You are exceptionally skilled at noticing the subtle techniques fey use to avoid notice.

feats.name: Fey Transcendence
feats.description: You become a powerful fey creature, gaining strengths tied to the First World but also some of the weakness against which all fey must contend.

feats.name: Fey's Trickery
feats.description: You connect with the fey trickster within yourself to momentarily vanish from sight.
feats.prerequisites: Living Vessel Dedication; your entity is a fey

feats.name: Field Artillery
feats.description: While castles are generally obliging enough to stay in one place, out in the field positioning is of paramount importance—a gun in the wrong place is worse than useless.

feats.name: Field Propagandist Dedication
feats.description: Having devoted your life to crafting propaganda, you know that winning the hearts and minds of soldiers can be a deciding factor in securing the successful outcome of a war.
feats.prerequisites: Charisma +2; Trained in Deception; Trained in Diplomacy

feats.name: Fiend Slayer
feats.description: Your attack tears through a fiend, possibly sending it back to where it came from.

feats.name: Fiend-trampling Stature
feats.description: Fiends unfortunate enough to be trampled beneath your feet or rent within your grasp are swiftly granulated into bone kindling and blood powder, and the pain of your strikes prevents them from action.

feats.name: Fiendish Brand
feats.description: Make a Strike with a weapon or unarmed attack that deals piercing or slashing damage.
feats.prerequisites: Sister of the Golden Erinys Dedication

feats.name: Fiendish Form
feats.description: Your features reshape into those of a type of fiend who serves your deity; for example, as a demon you might have putrid scales, twisted horns, and red eyes.

feats.name: Fiendish Magic
feats.description: You possess fiendish magic.
feats.prerequisites: Grimspawn, Pitborn, or Hellspawn, or another lineage feat associated with fiends

feats.name: Fiendish Mount
feats.description: Your steed ally manifests a suite of powerful and sinister gifts granted to it by your deity.

feats.name: Fierce Competitor
feats.description: You challenge a single ally to a physical competition.

feats.name: Fierce Grasp
feats.description: Once you get your hands on someone, it's hard for them to get away.

feats.name: Fiery Retort
feats.description: Ignoring your pain, you sear your attacker with a wave of flame.

feats.name: Fight Choreography
feats.description: You’ve spent enough time training in stage fighting and teaching a wide range of stunts that you can prepare your companions with directions on how to avoid peril in battle.
feats.prerequisites: Acrobat Dedication or Gladiator Dedication; master in Theater Lore

feats.name: Fighter Dedication
feats.description: You become trained in martial weapons.

feats.name: Fighter Resiliency
feats.description: You gain 3 additional Hit Points for each fighter archetype class feat you have.
feats.prerequisites: Fighter Dedication; class granting no more Hit Points per level than 8 + your Constitution modifier

feats.name: Fighting Horn
feats.description: You can modify the size and shape of your horn over time using your mental powers.

feats.name: Final Form
feats.description: You embrace your monstrous blood and make it your own, screaming out to the heavens and hells alike in rage, pain, and defiance.

feats.name: Final Rest
feats.description: As stubborn in death as you are in life, you vow you'll never aid your hated enemies.

feats.name: Final Shot
feats.description: You jam a triple charge of black powder into your weapon to unleash a devastating but risky and inaccurate attack.

feats.name: Finessed Features
feats.description: You've learned how to build snares that trigger based on visual stimuli.

feats.name: Finest Trick
feats.description: Many fiends—rakshasa rajas and demonic succubi most famously—can take on the forms of others.

feats.name: Finishing Follow-through
feats.description: Finishing a foe maintains your swagger.

feats.name: Finishing Precision
feats.description: You’ve learned how to land daring blows when you have panache.

feats.name: Finned Ridges
feats.description: The ridges and flaps of your skin steer you through the water.

feats.name: Fire Lung
feats.description: A lifetime of proximity to flames has inured your lungs and eyes to smoke.

feats.name: Fire Resistance
feats.description: Your connection to heat and flame means that fire is reluctant to bring its full force to bear against you.

feats.name: Fire Savvy
feats.description: You've grown up around a forge and are well-suited to dealing with smoke and flame.

feats.name: Firebrand Braggart Dedication
feats.description: Your Firebrand training has taught you that achieving something is more satisfying if you boast about it first.
feats.prerequisites: Charisma 14; second mark member of the Firebrands

feats.name: Firesight
feats.description: You can see through the haze of flame.

feats.name: Firework Technician Dedication
feats.description: You’ve learned the secrets of making fire and sound bloom using black powder, metals, and paper.
feats.source: Guns & Gears (Remastered) pg. 134, Guns & Gears (Remastered) pg. 134
notes: The gelid shard within your heart may sap your ability to feel and experience emotion, but it also lets you create and manipulate cold.

feats.name: First Revelation
feats.description: You gain your mystery’s initial revelation spell.

feats.name: First to Strike, First to Fall
feats.description: Whenever you successfully Strike a creature that has not acted in the first round of combat, that creature is off-guard until the end of your next turn.

feats.name: First World Adept
feats.description: Over time your fey magic has grown stronger.
feats.prerequisites: at least one primal innate spell

feats.name: First World Magic
feats.description: Your connection to the First World grants you a primal innate spell, much like those of the fey.

feats.name: Fish from the Falls' Edge
feats.description: Flailtongue
feats.prerequisites: Seeing your ally fall, you let out a cry, sending your divine spark to them temporarily to keep them from tumbling down the River of Souls.
notes: Your tongue has mutated into a lashing weapon reminiscent of Kabriri's bone-laden flail.

feats.name: Fishblooded
feats.description: There's nothing beneath the waves that can slow you down.

feats.name: Fisheye
feats.description: You can gain the magic of the seas by eating your favorite seafood.

feats.name: Fit for the Role
feats.description: Not only are you a flamboyant performer, but you’ve mastered an occult secret that allows you to outfit yourself and your companions with magical visages.

feats.name: Five Breaths, One Death
feats.description: You cycle through the elements in a devastating combination attack.

feats.name: Five-breath Vanguard Dedication
feats.description: You flow like the elemental cycle, adapting your stance and techniques constantly in response to whatever circumstances you face.
feats.prerequisites: Two of the five elemental stances (Ironblood Stance, Mountain Stance, Reflective Ripple Stance, Stoked Flame Stance, and Tangled Forest Stance)

feats.name: Five-gods Ram
feats.description: You attack in an unceasing flurry of charging headbutts.

feats.name: Flair Rider Stance
feats.description: You spend little time in your saddle as you flip unpredictably around your dragon mount, dodging attacks.
feats.prerequisites: Drake Rider Dedication; Trained in Acrobatics

feats.name: Flamboyant Athlete
feats.description: Your panache allows you to perform incredible feats: climbing, swimming, and leaping far beyond your normal capacity.

feats.name: Flamboyant Cruelty
feats.description: You love to kick your enemies when they're down, and you look fabulous when you do.

feats.name: Flamboyant Leap
feats.description: You stylishly leap and deliver a powerful finisher.

feats.name: Flame Jump
feats.description: Your peri lineage has opened your mind to fire's raw, purging essence.

feats.name: Flames of Vision
feats.description: Dokkaebi were among the first goblins to pioneer gazing through flames, spectral or physical, to cast their senses far and wide.

feats.name: Flash Forge
feats.description: An artificial metal object forms in the hands of you or a willing ally within 30 feet.

feats.name: Flash your Badge
feats.description: You make a fearsome show of your authority.
feats.source: Pathfinder #178: Punks in a Powderkeg pg. 78
feats.prerequisites: Alkenstar Agent Dedication; Master in Intimidation

feats.name: Flashing Shield
feats.description: Your shield flares with holy light as you block the attack, searing the undead with the power of your faith.
feats.prerequisites: Lastwall Sentry Dedication; you worship a good-aligned deity

feats.name: Flashy Dodge
feats.description: You deftly dodge out of the way, gaining a +2 circumstance bonus to AC against the triggering attack.

feats.name: Flashy Roll
feats.description: You can use Flashy Dodge before attempting a Reflex save, in addition to its original trigger.

feats.name: Fledgling Flight
feats.description: You can fly through the air in short bursts at half your land Speed.

feats.name: Fleeing Diversion
feats.description: You are quick to capitalize on your distractions.

feats.name: Fleeing Shriek
feats.description: You let out an ear-piercing screech.

feats.name: Fleet
feats.description: Increase your Speed by 5 feet

feats.name: Fleet Tempo
feats.description: To rush after a criminal or reach someone in need, you ring a sprightly tone.
feats.source: Pathfinder #170: Spoken on the Song Wind pg. 79
feats.source_book: Pathfinder #170: Spoken on the Song Wind

feats.name: Flesh Wound
feats.description: You fire to ensure that even if your shot doesn't land cleanly, it still lands close enough to deal some damage.

feats.name: Flexible Form
feats.description: Your body is as supple as a sapling, capable of bending without breaking.

feats.name: Flexible Halcyon Spellcasting
feats.description: You broaden your ability to channel your power into halcyon magic.

feats.name: Flexible Spellcaster Dedication
feats.description: You now have four cantrips per day instead of three.

feats.name: Flexible Studies
feats.description: You've collected a cross-section of information on various disciplines you can refer to when preparing for various tasks.

feats.name: Flexible Tail
feats.description: You can perform simple Interact actions with your tail, such as opening an unlocked door.

feats.name: Flexible Transmogrification
feats.description: You've learned how to transmogrify your eidolon to suit the circumstances of the day.

feats.name: Flickering Stories
feats.description: Stories, like fires, can create shadows as much as they illuminate.

feats.name: Flickering Twirl
feats.description: You use your movements and disguises to make yourself a flickering blur.

feats.name: Fling Head
feats.description: You Interact to remove your head, if it isn’t already detached, and fling it at an enemy within 30 feet, where it emits a bone-chilling wail before dematerializing and returning to your body.

feats.name: Flinging Blow
feats.description: You take a moment to center yourself, then unleash a powerful blow that sends your target tumbling away.

feats.name: Flinging Charge
feats.description: You throw a weapon to distract your opponent as you close the gap to begin your assault.

feats.name: Flinging Shove
feats.description: Whether you’re shoving opponents with a shield or a large weapon, you’ve learned to push them even further.
notes: Your martial prowess demoralizes all who can see you.

feats.name: Flinging Updraft
feats.description: A speeding wind heeds your call, picking someone up and depositing them nearby.

feats.name: Float Free
feats.description: You move 5 feet or up to half your swim Speed vertically through the water.

feats.name: Flood Stance
feats.description: The lessons of the flood teach a stance that distributes and circulates a single breath through the body and allows your punches to contain the focused power of a torrent of water.

feats.name: Floral Restoration
feats.description: You request that nearby plants share their vitality with you to replenish your body and magic.

feats.name: Flourish and Ruin
feats.description: You can call upon the vital essence of your spirit to restore life to your allies and call forth vines to ensnare and bludgeon your foes.

feats.name: Flow of War
feats.description: Divine battle instincts take over your body, letting you move and lash out with instinctive speed.

feats.name: Flower Chimera
feats.description: You call on a guardian of the wild to burst forth from the land to aid you.

feats.name: Flower Magic
feats.description: Certain magics in the world flow easily through your sap.

feats.name: Flower Street Infamy
feats.description: Your history of coquetries, flirtations, dalliances, and liaisons is so lengthy that, even in a city as large as Absalom, you're bound to run into your past at inopportune moments.

feats.name: Flowering Path
feats.description: Vitality and elemental wood flows out from your body and into the earth, infusing it with a stream of new life.

feats.name: Flowing Palm Deflection
feats.description: The simple and precise movements of your hands allow you to deflect blows with the same efficacy as a raised shield.

feats.name: Fluid Contortionist
feats.description: You can ignore difficult terrain caused by moving through tight spaces that aren't tight enough to force you to Squeeze.

feats.name: Flurry of Maneuvers
feats.description: Your flurry is a combination of maneuvers.

feats.name: Fluttering Distraction
feats.description: You’re trained in snapping and fluttering your fans to draw the eyes of observers around you.

feats.name: Fluttering Misdirection
feats.description: You’ve trained in drawing the eyes of your audience to specific aspects of your performance through the careful manipulation of your fans and body.

feats.name: Fly on Shadowed Wings
feats.description: Your apparition embraces you, feeding on your magic to become a pair of protective wings.

feats.name: Fly Swat
feats.description: You've learned the secret of swatting away annoying pests and occasionally getting an easy meal out of it.

feats.name: Flying Blade
feats.description: You apply your flashy techniques to thrown weapons as easily as melee attacks.

feats.name: Flying Flame
feats.description: A Tiny shape of flame appears, taking a form of your choice— such as a bird, an arrow, or a simple sphere.

feats.name: Flying Kick
feats.description: You launch yourself at a foe.

feats.name: Flying Tackle
feats.description: You barrel forward, gathering enough momentum to take down a threatening foe.

feats.name: Focused Cat Nap
feats.description: When you Cat Nap, you can also Refocus as you dream of a relevant activity.

feats.name: Focused Fascination
feats.description: When you use Fascinating Performance in a combat encounter, you need only a success, rather than a critical success, to fascinate your target.

feats.name: Focused Fire
feats.description: You limit the blast of your shot for accuracy.

feats.name: Focused Juggler
feats.description: You continue Juggling until the end of your next turn.
feats.source: Pathfinder #151: The Show Must Go On pg. 74
feats.source_book: Pathfinder #151: The Show Must Go On

feats.name: Focused Shot
feats.description: You achieve a state of perfect calm before unleashing your attack, opening your mind to the minute movements of the world around you to increase your accuracy.

feats.name: Foil Senses
feats.description: Take precautions against special senses
notes: Use New Leadership and other activities more efficiently

feats.name: Folk Dowsing
feats.description: You can find what you're looking for using a dowsing rod or pendulum.

feats.name: Folk Healer
feats.description: Your community recognizes you as a shaman or other animist, a status you obtained through lineage, apprenticeship, or a supernatural event.

feats.name: Folklorist Dedication
feats.description: You are a master archivist and entertainer, capable of pulling wisdom from the tales you tell and weaving your allies and enemies into a powerful narrative.
feats.source: Pathfinder #170: Spoken on the Song Wind pg. 78
feats.source_book: Pathfinder #170: Spoken on the Song Wind

feats.name: Folksy Patter
feats.description: You are adept at disguising coded messages as folksy idioms.

feats.name: Folktales Lore
feats.description: You can pull bits of wisdom from any tale.
feats.source: Pathfinder #170: Spoken on the Song Wind pg. 78
feats.source_book: Pathfinder #170: Spoken on the Song Wind

feats.name: Follow the Threads of Fate
feats.description: A norn’s thread—spun from fate itself—runs through or wraps around your ikon.
feats.source: Pathfinder #217: Death Sails a Wine-Dark Sea pg. 79
feats.source_book: Pathfinder #217: Death Sails a Wine-Dark Sea

feats.name: Follow-up Assault
feats.description: Even in the face of failure you press the attack, determined to succeed.

feats.name: Following Smite
feats.description: You call upon your deity’s power and channel it through your weapon.

feats.name: Font of Knowledge
feats.description: Experience or focused study have granted you mastery of a number of topics.

feats.name: Food Preservation
feats.description: Your techniques extend the storage life for certain ingredients and food through pickling, alcohol, or fermentation.

feats.name: For Love, For Lightning
feats.description: Rumors suggest this technique was pioneered by knights who undertook missions for Clarethe Iomedar at the half-moon, but many Crimson Reclaimers have since mastered it.

feats.name: For the Fallen!
feats.description: So many other hopefuls have attempted the Test of the Starstone before you and failed.

feats.name: Forager
feats.description: Trained in Survival
feats.campaign: Forage for supplies to provide for multiple creatures

feats.name: Force Fang
feats.description: You can turn your attack into an unerring blur of force.

feats.name: Force of Nature
feats.description: You're a nigh-unstoppable killing machine, with only silver able to quell your rampage.

feats.name: Forced Entry
feats.description: You are trained to preserve the archaeological value of your location when entering.
feats.prerequisites: Expert in Athletics; Pathfinder Agent Dedication

feats.name: Forceful Push
feats.description: When you cast mage hand, you can modify it to shove a creature.
feats.prerequisites: Spell Trickster Dedication; ability to cast mage hand

feats.name: Forcible Energy
feats.description: You perform complex manipulations to make the energy from your spells so powerful that your enemies remain vulnerable to it afterward.

feats.name: Forensic Acumen
feats.description: You understand principles of forensic medicine, making you better at examining a body to determine the cause of death or injury.

feats.name: Foresee Danger
feats.description: You perceive every possible way your foe's attack could land and attempt to avoid them all.

feats.name: Foreseen Failure
feats.description: You see your spell fail to take hold to disastrous end, then snap back to reality—it was all a precognition, and you know to try a different spell.

feats.name: Forest Passage
feats.description: You can always find a path, almost as if foliage parted before you.

feats.name: Forest Stealth
feats.description: You are skilled at quickly hiding behind bits of underbrush or foliage.

feats.name: Forest's Heart
feats.description: You adopt a stance that allows your apparitions to channel spiritual energy down through you to inhabit roots, control vines, and command plant-life from the ground you stand on to fight on your behalf.

feats.name: Forestall Curse
feats.description: You've learned to hold back your curse.

feats.name: Foretell Harm
feats.description: Your magic echoes ominously as you glimpse injury in the target's future.

feats.name: Forever Among Humanity
feats.description: Passing unseen within society is second nature to you now.

feats.name: Forewarn
feats.description: Your foresight and planning are more valuable than armor as you direct your ally away from danger, but there's a limit to how often you can guide your allies away from a foe's relentless assaults.

feats.name: Forge-Blessed Shot
feats.description: You intone a prayer to the dwarven deities Torag or Angradd, willing a higher power to guide your aim in the heat of battle.

feats.name: Forge-Day's Rest
feats.description: Your unusual rest cycle allows you to recover faster.

feats.name: Forgotten Presence
feats.description: The world conspires to keep you forgotten and unnoticed— memories cloud, ink stains out your name in ledgers, and portraits of you crack and warp over your face.

feats.name: Forlorn
feats.description: Fortified Fiefs
feats.prerequisites: Watching your friends age and die fills you with moroseness that protects you against harmful emotions.
notes: Gain bonuses to Fortify, and Construct or Rebuild certain buildings easier

feats.name: Form a Flock
feats.description: You call nearby wild dragonets to swarm to your side.

feats.name: Form Control
feats.description: With additional care and effort, you can take on an alternate shape for a longer period of time.

feats.name: Form Lock
feats.description: Your ability to control your own qi empowers you to pressure other creatures into resuming their true forms.
feats.source: Player Core 2 pg. 125, Advanced Player's Guide pg. 130
feats.source_book: Player Core 2 pg. 125, Advanced Player's Guide

feats.name: Form of the Bat
feats.description: You can transform into a harmless bat.

feats.name: Form of the Beloved Mother
feats.description: You channel the blessings of Nalinivati to transform into a manifestation of her will.

feats.name: Form of the Dragon
feats.description: You can briefly transform into a paragon of your draconic ancestry.

feats.name: Form Retention
feats.description: You have trained your mind and body to tolerate polymorph magic for longer periods of time, so long as you prepare for the change appropriately.

feats.name: Form Up!
feats.description: You’ve trained in battle formations for a plethora of situations.

feats.name: Formation Master
feats.description: You can assemble a formation even with members of ancestries that lack the hobgoblins’ military discipline, and you can extend these benefits to your hobgoblin allies.

feats.name: Formation Training
feats.description: You know how to fight in formation with your brethren.

feats.name: Formidable Breath
feats.description: Thanks to rigorous breathing exercises and a diet similar to that of your lineage, your magical breath is more powerful.

feats.name: Fortified Elixirs
feats.description: Your treatments for diseases and poisons can be very efficacious, though they tend not to last as long.

feats.name: Fortified Flesh
feats.description: Your flesh is resistent to physical damage.

feats.name: Fortified Mind
feats.description: Your mind is unusually resilient and resistant to influence.

feats.name: Fortify Shield
feats.description: You reinforce your shield with a rocky outgrowth of metal and stone.

feats.name: Fortissimo Composition
feats.description: Your anthems grow louder and more potent, bolstered by your muse’s power.

feats.name: Fortuitous Shift
feats.description: You have grown more comfortable with your penchant for supernatural disappearance.

feats.name: Fortunate Blow
feats.description: You set an enemy up for a devastating follow-through from your allies.

feats.name: Fortunate Relief
feats.description: Your god favors your attempts to remove afflictions and conditions.

feats.name: Fortune's Favor
feats.description: You understand when an investment in you has the chance to pay off.

feats.name: Forward Gaze into Life
feats.description: Despite the constant cold of death at your back, you keep your gaze forward into the realm of life.
feats.source: Pathfinder #217: Death Sails a Wine-Dark Sea pg. 79
feats.source_book: Pathfinder #217: Death Sails a Wine-Dark Sea

feats.name: Fossil Rider
feats.description: Using your ancestors' bones, you manifest their spirits around you in a fossilized form.

feats.name: Fountain of Secrets
feats.description: You constantly remember details about the world.

feats.name: Four Winds
feats.description: Mimicking the anemoi—monarchs of the four winds—you propel four creatures.

feats.name: Four-armed Aspect
feats.description: You intone vows to shoulder others’ pains; in response, your torso sprouts an additional pair of arms to help you bear those burdens.

feats.name: Fox Arson
feats.description: When you critically hit with a foxfire Strike, the target takes an additional 1d4 persistent damage of the same type as the foxfire.

feats.name: Fox Possession
feats.description: You can project a spiritual form to possess another.

feats.name: Fox Trick
feats.description: You always have time for a joke or prank.

feats.name: Foxfire
feats.description: A crack of your tail sparks wisps of blue energy.

feats.name: Free from Bonds
feats.description: As a mortal herald, you cannot easily be captured, nor can your allies.

feats.name: Free Heart
feats.description: You follow all your passions, unlimited in creativity and zeal.

feats.name: Freeze It!
feats.description: You are no rime hag or Jadwiga, but the magic of the north has still left a mark on you.

feats.name: Fresh Produce
feats.description: You grow a nourishing nut, vegetable, seed, or fruit.

feats.name: Friend of the Family
feats.description: You come from a long line of imperial kobolds—if you meet a stranger who has some political standing in Tian Xia, they might know someone from your family line.

feats.name: Friendform
feats.description: The shared bond between you and your allies allows you to act on their behalf.

feats.name: Friendly Fling
feats.description: You can scoop up your friends with your horns to hurl them across the battlefield.

feats.name: Friendly Nudge
feats.description: You don't always have time to wait for your allies to make room, so it's best to politely move them yourself.

feats.name: Friendly Toss
feats.description: Frozen Breadth
feats.prerequisites: You toss your friends around the battlefield.
notes: Your attunement to arcane cold enhances the depths of your growing power.

feats.name: Frighten Undead
feats.description: Your very presence chills creatures of the night down to their core and you can use the spiritual power and faithful life force of religious verses to frighten even mindless undead.
feats.prerequisites: Undead Slayer Dedication; Trained in Intimidation

feats.name: Frightening Indignation
feats.description: Your anger at the world's many injustices boil out from you in a wave of palpable energy.

feats.name: Frightening Power
feats.description: Draconic essence coruscates around you, sapping the resilience of your foes.

feats.name: Frightful Attrition
feats.description: Your diminishment of your foes' ranks damages their morale.

feats.name: Frightful Aura
feats.description: You're surrounded by a palpable sense of menace and power that's terrifying to behold.

feats.name: Frightful Condemnation
feats.description: Your willingness to follow through on your pitiless judgment is frightful to the person you have condemned.
feats.source: Night of the Gray Death pg. 65
feats.prerequisites: Harsh Judgment; Vigilante Dedication; member of the Gray Gardeners

feats.name: Frightful Moan
feats.description: You lament your fate, realeasing a ghastly moan that frightens the living.

feats.name: Frostbite Runes
feats.description: Thick tattoos, each one a rune fragment from the saumen kar's long-lost language spelling out their pact with their equally lost deity, cover your body and stretch across your limbs, torso, and face.

feats.name: Full Automation
feats.description: You become so entwined with your innovations that you can use them without a second thought.

feats.name: Full Flight
feats.description: Your flight is unbound, as natural as it was before you were awakened.

feats.name: Fully Flighted
feats.description: You gain the effects of Juvenile Flight at all times, rather than just once per day for 10 minutes.

feats.name: Fulminating Shot
feats.description: You channel potent magic into your next shot, empowering it with a blast of crackling energy.

feats.name: Fulminating Synergy
feats.description: When you draw upon your spells’ synergy, you create a physical manifestation of their magical resonance and invoke it to harm a foe.

feats.name: Fulu Familiar
feats.description: You can imprint your familiar’s spiritual essence into a fulu, a small paper charm that can be affixed to objects, creatures, or structures.
feats.prerequisites: Familiar Sage Dedication; Expert in Occultism or Expert in Religion

feats.name: Fumesoul
feats.description: The air inside you asserts itself as a toxic miasma, inuring you to most poisons.

feats.name: Fungal Exhalation
feats.description: You can conjure toxic spores to infect enemies.
feats.source: Pathfinder #202: Severed at the Root pg. 72

feats.name: Furious Bully
feats.description: You bully foes across the battlefield.

feats.name: Furious Finish
feats.description: Desperate to finish the fight, you pour all your rage into one final blow.

feats.name: Furious Focus
feats.description: You’ve learned to maintain your balance even when swinging furiously.

feats.name: Furious Grab
feats.description: You grab your foe while it's distracted by your attack.

feats.name: Furious Sprint
feats.description: You rush forward.

feats.name: Furious Vengeance
feats.description: Your enemy's blow fuels your rage and provokes your immediate retaliation.

feats.name: Furnace Form
feats.description: Opening your kinetic gate, you allow flames to consume your form and leave you a living flame.

feats.name: Fuse Stance
feats.description: You have combined two stances into a single stance all your own.

feats.name: Fused Polearm
feats.description: During your daily preparations, you can magically fuse your arcane bonded weapon and a magical staff together into one item, with the staff making up the haft of the weapon.

feats.name: Fused Staff
feats.description: When you prepare a staff, you can hold it up to a weapon to merge the two items.

feats.name: Future Spell Learning
feats.description: More future memories of time magic percolate back to the present, teaching you spells you've yet to learn.

feats.name: Gadget Specialist
feats.description: Rather than just using your gadgets for various boosts and tweaks, you also craft a few specific temporary consumable gadgets each day.

feats.name: Gallop Across Shadow
feats.description: Though your enemy wields shadow and darkness as weapons, they are no impediment to you when you ride your trusted horse.

feats.name: Game Hunter Dedication
feats.description: You are skilled at tracking big game animals and similar creatures.

feats.name: Gang Up
feats.description: You and your allies harry an opponent in concert.

feats.name: Gaping Flesh
feats.description: Your wound yawns open, appalling your attacker.

feats.name: Garden Path
feats.description: You can guide your crop to move without notice.

feats.name: Gardener's Resolve
feats.description: The Gray Gardeners are known for having nerves of steel and an unbreakable resolve.
feats.source: Night of the Gray Death pg. 65
feats.prerequisites: Vigilante Dedication; member of the Gray Gardeners

feats.name: Garland Spell
feats.description: If your next action is to Cast a Spell with the fungus or plant trait, a garland of plants grows in a 10-foot burst in the spell’s range.

feats.name: Garuda Magic
feats.description: You are descended from the wondrous garudas, and their keen senses manifest in your magical prowess.

feats.name: Garuda's Squall
feats.description: Garudas' marksmanship and magic are second nature to you.

feats.name: Gather Disciples
feats.description: Gods need followers, and you know that its best to gather a flock in the present to support you in your endeavor.
feats.prerequisites: Starstone Aspirant Dedication; Master in Religion

feats.name: Gathering Moss
feats.description: By rooting yourself in place, you are able to focus your body's natural healing to work faster.

feats.name: Gaze of Veracity (Lvl 10) #1
feats.description: You can channel your mask’s power to pierce through lies and see the truth in any situation.
feats.prerequisites: Hellknight Signifer Dedication; ability to cast focus spells

feats.name: Gaze of Veracity (Lvl 10) #2
feats.description: You can channel your mask's power to pierce through lies and see the truth in any situation.

feats.name: Gear Gnash
feats.description: Snares you create have complicated inner workings that are quite difficult to disable.

feats.name: Gear Up
feats.description: Whether it's wooden stakes, holy water, or more unusual tools, you always have just the right thing to handle an undead's unusual weaknesses and vulnerabilities.

feats.name: Gecko's Grip
feats.description: You cling to walls with a preternatural grip.

feats.name: Gemsoul
feats.description: The earth inside you asserts itself as crystallized gemstones or metals, like a cluster of quartz or veins of iron and gold.

feats.name: General Training
feats.description: Your adaptability manifests in your mastery of a range of useful abilities.

feats.name: General's Gambit
feats.description: You move strategically forward to draw the enemy’s attention away from your allies.

feats.name: Generation Digger
feats.description: You're so adept at burrowing through the earth that you don't even need tools; in fact, you just might be trusted to lead the latest generation dig.

feats.name: Genie Weapon Expertise
feats.description: Whenever you gain a class feature that grants you expert or greater proficiency in certain weapons, you also gain that proficiency in falchions, ranseurs, scimitars, tridents, and all geniekin weapons in which you are trained.

feats.name: Genie Weapon Familiarity
feats.description: You've trained with weapons used by your genie ancestors.

feats.name: Genie Weapon Flourish
feats.description: Whenever you critically hit using a falchion, ranseur, scimitar, trident, or a geniekin weapon, you apply the weapon's critical specialization effect.

feats.name: Gentle Death and Rebirth
feats.description: You were once born from the energies of the land and nature, and by their power, you can return to life again.

feats.name: Geobukseon Retaliation
feats.description: Your armor has a retractable spike-covered shell reminiscent of Hwanggot’s heavily armored geobukseon, or “turtle ships.” The shell unfolds across your body, giving you a +4 circumstance bonus to AC and resistance 2 to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage until the end of your next turn.

feats.name: Geologic Attunement
feats.description: GGGHhhjjjJJK
feats.prerequisites: You tune to the earth and stone around you, extending your senses through it in rippling waves.
notes: You have JBNNNMBMM<<<M thatEHERBEBNMDF<……///.? And can FHERWHFEWRGNMN<Ggmfmngr,m as an Interact action.

feats.name: Geomancer Dedication
feats.description: You feel a deep connection to the world no matter where you are, a phenomenon known as “terrain attunement.” When you expend a spell slot to cast a spell with a trait that corresponds to the type of terrain you are currently in (as listed below), you gain the terrain attunement effect for that type of terrain.
feats.prerequisites: Trained in Nature; ability to cast spells from spell slots; at least one spell with the air, cold, earth, fire, plant, or water trait

feats.name: Germination of Resolve
feats.description: Vitality floods your trammeled soul, offering you rejuvenation, if not quite rest.

feats.name: Get Behind Me!
feats.description: When saving your allies from harm, you push them behind you to better protect them.

feats.name: Get Used to Disappointment
feats.description: You capitalize on an opponent's failure with smug attitude and swagger, reminding them of the gap in skill between you and your opponent.

feats.name: Ghoran Lore
feats.description: The very first memories ghorans have are those of their creation, and even after thousands of years, those memories have never faded for you.

feats.name: Ghoran Weapon Expertise
feats.description: It's as if you've been training for a thousand years.

feats.name: Ghoran Weapon Familiarity
feats.description: Over the course of your long, long existence, you've had a chance to practice with traditional ghoran weapons.

feats.name: Ghoran Weapon Practice
feats.description: With plenty of practice, the memories of previous fights from previous lives come flooding back.

feats.name: Ghoran's Wrath
feats.description: You have such a strong connection to the natural world that you can inspire it to attack at those who threaten you.

feats.name: Ghost Blade
feats.description: You alter your weapon's phase so it can more easily strike incorporeal creatures.

feats.name: Ghost Dedication
feats.description: You have risen as a shell of your former self, a spirit of mist and anguish.
feats.prerequisites: You died and returned as a ghost.

feats.name: Ghost Eater Dedication
feats.description: You have trained as a ghost eater, a hunter specialized in the destruction of spirits.
feats.source: Pathfinder #166: Despair on Danger Island pg. 79
feats.prerequisites: Trained in Occultism or Trained in Religion

feats.name: Ghost Flight
feats.description: You can suppress your tether to the ground, overcoming your resistance to fly free.

feats.name: Ghost Hunter
feats.description: Your connection to the Boneyard ensures that your blows strike true against spectral beings.

feats.name: Ghost Hunter Dedication
feats.description: You have focused your training on hunting and defeating ghosts, spirits, and all manner of haunts.
feats.prerequisites: Trained in Occultism or Trained in Religion
notes: Gatewalkers Player's Guide (Remastered) pg. 13, Dark Archives (Remastered) pg. 102
An invisible arm extends from you to grab and manipulate objects.

feats.name: Ghost Strike
feats.description: You can infuse a weapon you are carrying with magical energies that allow it to strike true against incorporeal undead.

feats.name: Ghost Wrangler
feats.description: Spirits around you coalesce upon your fists, enabling you to seize and harm other ghosts and spirits.

feats.name: Ghost-path Epiphany
feats.description: Deviating from the orthodox path, you tread an inauspicious descent littered with flowers of death; this heretical choice will, in time, earn you the enmity and fear of more traditional cultivators.

feats.name: Ghostly Condemnation
feats.description: You shriek a death sentence upon a single target within 120 feet, forcing it to experience the final moments of your mortal life as you were dragged through a howling mob and forced to kneel before the final blade that took your life and head.

feats.name: Ghostly Grasp (Ghost)
feats.description: Your control over your ghostly form grows.

feats.name: Ghostly Resistance
feats.description: Your ghostly form becomes innately weaker but also gains resistance to many forms of damage.

feats.name: Ghosts in the Storm
feats.description: Clouds, like eager pets, are drawn to you and to those in your good graces.

feats.name: Ghostsong
feats.description: You have come to understand the pain and fury of spirits and can raise them to do your ghastly work.

feats.name: Ghoul Dedication
feats.description: You have succumbed to ghoul fever, dying and returning as a ghoul, an undead cursed with a never-ending hunger for dead flesh that slowly overrides your reason and willpower until you would do anything for the meal you crave.
feats.prerequisites: You were killed by ghoul fever.

feats.name: Giant Hunter
feats.description: You have studied giants and hunt them with efficiency.

feats.name: Giant Slayer
feats.description: Your well-placed blows can fell mighty giants.

feats.name: Giant's Lunge
feats.description: You extend your body and prepare to attack foes outside your normal reach.

feats.name: Giant's Stature
feats.description: You grow to incredible size.

feats.name: Gift of the Hoard
feats.description: In pleasing the cravings of a mighty dragon, they have deigned to impart some of their magical essence into your body.
feats.prerequisites: You have succeeded at an important task given by a dragon, such as procuring a special treasure for their hoard.

feats.name: Gift of the Immortal Herb
feats.description: Your blood turns a divine gold, shining in moments its spilled and begetting new life.

feats.name: Gift of the Moon
feats.description: You can share your power with others, but they can't escape the werecreature's curse as easily as you can.

feats.name: Gifted Power
feats.description: Your mystery grants you additional magic.

feats.name: Gigantic Megafauna Companion
feats.description: The mammoths and other megafauna ridden by your people are larger than any ordinary beast.

feats.name: Gigaton Strike
feats.description: When you use a full-power Megaton Strike, you can knock your foe back.

feats.name: Gigavolt
feats.description: When you unleash electricity from your innovation, you can bounce it off obstacles, creating a field of electric death.

feats.name: Gildedsoul
feats.description: Your elemental lineage manifests in the polished gleam of precious metals.

feats.name: Glacial Prison
feats.description: Intense cold swirls around your foe, covering it in frost that slows it down and turns its body to ice.

feats.name: Glad-Hand
feats.description: Expert in Diplomacy
feats.campaign: Make an Impression on a target you’ve just met

feats.name: Gladiator's Roar
feats.description: You can project your voice into a high-pitched screech that damages your foes.

feats.name: Glamour
feats.description: You unlock a new level of fey power and can manipulate the perceptions of others using a font of First World magic.

feats.name: Glass Skin
feats.description: Even if vitrumancy is a mystery to you, your blood and flesh know the secrets of the art of arcane glass.
feats.prerequisites: You were present at the death of the medusa Alethsia, whose vitrumantic powers were passed on to you in the wake of her destruction.

feats.name: Glean Contents
feats.description: You are adept at quickly scanning loose papers and carefully discerning the contents of sealed letters without damaging the seal.

feats.name: Glean Lore
feats.description: You tap into the collected lore of the divine, accessing a variety of potentially useful information.

feats.name: Glider Form
feats.description: Your eidolon evolves wings, a buoyant body, or some other means to control descent.

feats.name: Glitter Crystals
feats.description: You can mix a blend of crushed flowers and alchemical salt into an alchemical elixir with the healing trait or alchemical food.

feats.name: Gloomseer
feats.description: Gloom holds few terrors for you, and the pall of darkness over Nidal has made you comfortable in dim light.

feats.name: Glorious Banner
feats.description: Your banner is an awesome sight to behold.

feats.name: Glorious Gamtu
feats.description: You can access the mystical power that dokkaebi refer to as a hat.

feats.name: Glory and Valor!
feats.description: You call upon your ascendant blood with a mighty cry that fills you with a revitalizing energy for 1 minute or until you critically fail a Strike, whichever comes first.

feats.name: Glory on High
feats.description: You take to the skies to unveil the full magnificence of your deity’s power.
feats.prerequisites: Mortal Herald Dedication; fly Speed of at least 20 feet

feats.name: Glutton for Flesh
feats.description: You have developed a capacity to store more flesh within your gaunt body to leave yourself satiated longer.

feats.name: Gnaw
feats.description: With enough time and determination, you can chew through nearly anything.

feats.name: Gnome Obsession
feats.description: You might have a flighty nature, but when a topic captures your attention, you dive into it headfirst.

feats.name: Gnome Polyglot
feats.description: Your extensive travels, curiosity, and love of learning help you to learn languages quickly.

feats.name: Gnome Weapon Familiarity
feats.description: You favor unusual weapons tied to your people, such as blades with curved and peculiar shapes.

feats.name: Go With the Flow
feats.description: You have an occult connection to the world that helps you blend in with the cacophony of life around you.

feats.name: Goading Feint
feats.description: Your tricks make foes overextend their attacks.

feats.name: Goblin Club
feats.description: You can summon a mass of magic energy in your hand that, naturally, you use to smack those who offend you.

feats.name: Goblin Jubilee Display
feats.description: Flames and explosions sear the air in a riot of color and devastation that rivals that wrought by even the wildest goblin party.
feats.source: Guns & Gears (Remastered) pg. 135, Guns & Gears (Remastered) pg. 134

feats.name: Goblin Lore
feats.description: You've picked up skills and tales from your goblin community.

feats.name: Goblin Scuttle
feats.description: You take advantage of your ally's movement to adjust your position.

feats.name: Goblin Song
feats.description: You sing annoying goblin songs, distracting your foes with silly and repetitive lyrics.

feats.name: Goblin Weapon Familiarity
feats.description: Others might look upon them with disdain, but you know that the weapons of your people are as effective as they are sharp.

feats.name: Godbreaker
feats.description: You have mastered an ultimate grappling technique capable of breaking even the mightiest of foes.

feats.name: Godless Healing
feats.description: You recover an additional 5 Hit Points from a successful attempt to Treat your Wounds or use Battle Medicine on you.
feats.prerequisites: Battle Medicine; can’t have a patron deity

feats.name: Gods' Palm
feats.description: You control your spirit energy when you attack, using it to reinforce yourself or to thrust past your enemy’s physical defenses.

feats.name: Golden Body
feats.description: Age of Ashes
feats.prerequisites: Strike harder and heal more rapidly.
notes: Pathfinder #174: Shadows of the Ancients pg. 78
Your mask is infused with restorative magic associated with Ibex, the Flourishing Field, so it constantly repairs itself.

feats.name: Golden Dragon's Bounty
feats.description: Your familiar alters the material of a spell into that of a precious metal.

feats.name: Golden Erinys Stance
feats.description: Whether you're a keen student of vengeance or you picked up techniques after being a common target for the sisters' punishment, you've learned to dig painfully into your opponent's flesh.
feats.prerequisites: Sister of the Golden Erinys Dedication

feats.name: Golden League Xun Dedication
feats.description: You are a xun for the Golden League, aiding the organization.

feats.name: Golden Legionnaire Dedication
feats.description: You're a wall of metal standing against the tide of Andoran's enemies.

feats.name: Golem Dynamo
feats.description: You've learned the secrets of Jistkan golem prostheses, allowing you to incorporate golem components into your dynamo and gain a portion of their magic.

feats.name: Golem Grafter Dedication
feats.description: Your flesh has been specially treated with the same arcane and alchemical processes used to toughen the skin of flesh golems.
feats.prerequisites: expert in Arcana and Crafting, or an ally with expert proficiency in those skills willing to augment you

feats.name: Goloma Courage
feats.description: The most important thing you've learned living with fear is how to overcome it.

feats.name: Goloma Lore
feats.description: You lived an insulated life focused on avoiding danger.

feats.name: Gorilla Pound
feats.description: You pound your chest before slamming into your foes.

feats.name: Gorilla Stance
feats.description: You lower yourself to the ground and take an imposing, knuckle-walking stance.

feats.name: Goring Charge
feats.description: Driven by the momentum of your thundering steps and powerful mass, your horns can pierce your foes.

feats.name: Graceful Guidance
feats.description: You can demonstrate how to quickly twist out of the way of dangerous effects.

feats.name: Graceful Leaper
feats.description: Mass and muscle are meaningless when you propel yourself through the air; only grace and balance matter.

feats.name: Graceful Poise
feats.description: With the right positioning, your off-hand weapon can strike like a scorpion’s stinger.

feats.name: Graft Technician
feats.description: You can create and implant grafts.

feats.name: Grand Dance
feats.description: You can summon the full magic of Bhopan's grand dance.

feats.name: Grand Metamorphosis
feats.description: One of your nodes has adapted into a new magic-emitting organ.

feats.name: Grand Scroll Esoterica
feats.description: You've completed the third and final step in your assimilation of scroll esoterica, granting you daily scrolls of incredible power.

feats.name: Grand Talisman Esoterica
feats.description: You've gained the ability to place multiple talismans on an item.
notes: The maggots inhabiting your body impart you with the knowledge to travel from grave to grave, drawing upon the mystical power of the labyrinthine network of magical warrens and tunnels that connect Everglut to the Material Plane.

feats.name: Grandmaster Qi Spells
feats.description: You have unlocked a qi technique achievable only by those who attain complete mastery of both their body and their spirit.

feats.name: Grandmother's Wisdom
feats.description: You carry the bones of your ancestors with you, and you can ask them for counsel.

feats.name: Grasping Corpses
feats.description: Your foes are left reeling from the attacks made by the zombies or skeletons of your horde.

feats.name: Grasping Limbs
feats.description: Great Bear
notes: When you transform, you can take on a bear's bulk and size.

feats.name: Grasping Reach
feats.description: You can extend a tangle of vines or tendrils to support your arms and extend your reach.

feats.name: Grasping Spirits Spell
feats.description: Gaining substance from your magic, your apparitions increase the range of your spells, which then pull your enemy closer.

feats.name: Grave Mummification
feats.description: Exposure to the elements, magic, alchemy, and other phenomena intensified the changes from your mummification.

feats.name: Grave Sense
feats.description: Learn how to sense undead in the area.

feats.name: Grave Sight
feats.description: Your ability to sense undead has improved.

feats.name: Grave Strength
feats.description: The flesh you've consumed over the course of your existence as a ghoul has made you stronger, gifting you with strange insights from the minds of the sapient creatures you've devoured and bringing you closer to a state of undead perfection.

feats.name: Grave Threat
feats.description: You use your imposing demeanor to set up the undead for defeat.

feats.name: Grave's Voice
feats.description: Ghost Hunter Dedication
feats.campaign: You can influence spirits and haunts

feats.name: Gravel Guts
feats.description: Stone never becomes queasy, so why should you? You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to saving throws against the sickened condition.

feats.name: Gravelands Herbalist
feats.description: Your time with the Knights of Lastwall has taught you the secrets of creating and improving upon Lastwall soup.

feats.name: Gravesight
feats.description: You can see in the darkness as easily as a psychopomp.

feats.name: Gray Corsair Training
feats.description: You strike for Andoran on the waters of the Inner Sea and beyond.

feats.name: Great Boaster
feats.description: Your bragging is particularly effective.

feats.name: Great Cleave
feats.description: Your fury carries your weapon through multiple foes.
notes: Gatewalkers Player's Guide (Remastered) pg. 9, Dark Archives (Remastered) pg. 100
Your power undergoes yet another awakening

feats.name: Great Shield Mastery
feats.description: You've learned how to maximize the defensive abilities of the largest shields.

feats.name: Great Tengu Form
feats.description: You take on the imposing form of a large, winged spirit.

feats.name: Greater Animal Senses
feats.description: Your senses advance to match those of your animal aspect.

feats.name: Greater Armament
feats.description: Your weapons have greater power available to them.

feats.name: Greater Augmentation
feats.description: You've greatly improved your abilities and your core can support further augmentations.

feats.name: Greater Bloodline
feats.description: You uncover the greater secrets of your bloodline.

feats.name: Greater Crossblooded Evolution
feats.description: Your bloodline is extraordinarily complex.

feats.name: Greater Cruelty
feats.description: The extent of your corruption devastates your foes' minds and reflexes.

feats.name: Greater Deathly Secrets
feats.description: Your undead secrets grow stronger still.

feats.name: Greater Debilitating Bomb
