feats.description: You have learned enhanced techniques and alchemical secrets that allow you to expand the range of effects you can impose with your bombs.

feats.name: Greater Deific Power
feats.description: Divine power continues to fill you.

feats.name: Greater Despair
feats.description: You increase the frequency of Mummy's Despair to once per 10 minutes instead of once per hour.

feats.name: Greater Distracting Shot
feats.description: Even a single missile can throw off your enemy’s balance, and more powerful attacks leave it flustered for longer.

feats.name: Greater Enhance Venom
feats.description: You upgrade the vishkanyan venom you can apply with Envenom to greater vishkanyan venom.

feats.name: Greater Esoteric Spellcasting
feats.description: Your understanding of magic has evolved, and so has your spellcasting.

feats.name: Greater Interpose
feats.description: Your divine grace empowers you to avoid hits when you otherwise could not.

feats.name: Greater Lesson
feats.description: Your patron grants you greater knowledge.

feats.name: Greater Magical Scholastics
feats.description: You broaden the scope of your magical understanding, allowing you to find the right path, detect hidden objects, and conceal those objects from unscrupulous rivals.

feats.name: Greater Mental Evolution
feats.description: Your bloodline's deep connection to mental essence greatly enhances your spell repertoire.
notes: You can't be impeded by environmental effects that rely on cold or its byproducts.

feats.name: Greater Mercy
feats.description: Your faith enhances your ability to remove conditions.

feats.name: Greater Physical Evolution
feats.description: You change form readily.

feats.name: Greater Revelation
feats.description: You unlock deeper revelations hidden within your mystery.

feats.name: Greater Security
feats.description: Shield in hand, you offer your ally its full protection you do yourself.

feats.name: Greater Spell Runes
feats.description: You gain more powerful spell runes.

feats.name: Greater Spiritual Evolution
feats.description: Your magical blood allows your spells to be fully effective against incorporeal creatures.

feats.name: Greater Sun Blessing
feats.description: Your connection to the Old Sun Gods grows stronger.
feats.source: Pathfinder #172: Secrets of the Temple City pg. 79
feats.source_book: Pathfinder #172: Secrets of the Temple City

feats.name: Greater than the Sum
feats.description: You call upon the familial bonds you share with your allies and other ratfolk to become an overwhelming force in battle.

feats.name: Greater Transformation
feats.description: You can assume your oni form more easily, and with greater benefits.

feats.name: Greater Vital Evolution
feats.description: Vital power surges through you like a font of energy.

feats.name: Green Dash
feats.description: The spirits of vegetation send you on your way, letting you move in a burst of speed.

feats.name: Greenwatch Initiate
feats.description: You've received the basic training developed for all Greenwatch recruits.

feats.name: Greenwatch Veteran
feats.description: Your time spent tracking your target allows you to quickly identify its weaknesses and relay them to your allies.

feats.name: Greenwatcher
feats.description: Your experience fighting against and alongside fey creatures is nearly unrivaled.
notes: A lost love. A broken spear. Rage burning through a hero-god.

feats.name: Grim Insight
feats.description: Others’ attempts to scare you often grant you insights about your would-be bullies that you can then exploit.

feats.name: Grimspawn
feats.description: Your lineage traces back to a daemon, one of the manifestations of horrific forms of death that devour souls within their foul home of Abaddon.

feats.name: Gripping Limbs
feats.description: Nodules, hooks, or claws on your limbs allow you to cling to surfaces with ease.

feats.name: Grippli Glide
feats.description: You can use your webbed feet to guide your fall.

feats.name: Grippli Lore
feats.description: You are well versed in grippli culture and tactics.

feats.name: Grit and Tenacity
feats.description: You call upon deep reserves of toughness and mental fortitude to power through an otherwise debilitating effect.

feats.name: Group Aid
feats.description: Your upbringing emphasized teamwork, and helping your allies comes naturally to you.

feats.name: Group Coercion
feats.description: Trained in Intimidation

feats.name: Group Impression
feats.description: Trained in Diplomacy
feats.campaign: Make an Impression on multiple targets more easily

feats.name: Group Taunt
feats.description: Your taunts draw the attention of multiple enemies at once.

feats.name: Grove-Harbored
feats.description: You are accustomed to exploring thick woodlands and defending yourself against the attacks of magical plants.

feats.name: Grovel
feats.description: You convince your foe you're less of a threat.

feats.name: Grow Tool
feats.description: You grow a simple tool from your own body, coaxing flowers, vines, roots, and wood to grow and sprout from your flesh into the desired shape.
feats.source: Pathfinder #202: Severed at the Root pg. 70

feats.name: Growing Eel Friend
feats.description: Your eel pet grows larger and stronger.

feats.name: Grown of Oak
feats.description: You can make your skin take on the woody endurance of an ancient tree and have your familiar follow suit.

feats.name: Growth Spell
feats.description: You enhance your spell with elemental wood, causing your magic to expand and grow beyond its original limitations.
feats.prerequisites: Elementalist Dedication; wood is in your elemental philosophy

feats.name: Grudge Strike
feats.description: You channel the spiritual power of spiteful grudges.

feats.name: Grudging Compliment
feats.description: Every Firebrand can recognize the skill of others, but you've turned it into an art you can wield in combat.

feats.name: Gruesome Strike
feats.description: Make a Strike against the creature that triggered your champion's reaction.
feats.prerequisites: champion’s reaction that grants extra damage with your Strikes (including the desecration, iniquity, and obedience causes)

feats.name: Guard's Fury
feats.description: Some Ulfen Guards tap into a well of fury to protect their charges.
feats.prerequisites: Ulfen Guard Dedication; you can’t already use the Rage action

feats.name: Guarded Advance (Guardian)
feats.description: You slowly advance on the battlefield, taking utmost caution.

feats.name: Guarded Advance (Knight Vigilant)
feats.description: You slowly advance on the battlefield, taking utmost caution.

feats.name: Guarded Mind
feats.description: When your enemies try to turn your mind against you, thoughts of your anathema bolster you.

feats.name: Guarded Movement
feats.description: Your guard is up, even while moving.

feats.name: Guarded Thoughts
feats.description: Your mind, like a dark naga's, foils attempts to read your thoughts.

feats.name: Guardian Dedication
feats.description: You become trained in Athletics; if you were already trained in Athletics, you instead become trained in a skill of your choice.

feats.name: Guardian Ghosts
feats.description: You magically divert some of the harm from an incoming attack away from yourself, forcing your undead companion to take it in your stead.

feats.name: Guardian Lion Roar
feats.description: Your innovation is augmented with plates shaped to resemble the gaping maws of guardian lions, which you can energize to expel a stream of sonic energy reminiscent of a lion’s powerful roar.
feats.prerequisites: armor innovation, construct innovation, or weapon innovation

feats.name: Guardian Resiliency
feats.description: You gain 3 additional Hit Points for each guardian archetype class feat you have.
feats.prerequisites: Guardian Dedication; class granting no more Hit Points than 10 + your Constitution modifier

feats.name: Guardian's Deflection
feats.description: You use your weapon to deflect the attack against your ally, granting a +2 circumstance bonus to their AC against the triggering attack.

feats.name: Guardian's Deflection (Fighter)
feats.description: You use your weapon to deflect the attack against your ally, granting a +2 circumstance bonus to their Armor Class against the triggering attack.

feats.name: Guardian's Embrace
feats.description: Your spirit guide discorporates to surround you in an invisible protective shroud.

feats.name: Guardian's Intercept
feats.description: You can use the Intercept Attack reaction once per 10 minutes.

feats.name: Guerrilla Dedication
feats.description: You're skilled in subtle tactics and using the environment against your enemies.
feats.prerequisites: Trained in Stealth; Trained in Survival

feats.name: Guerrilla Weaponry
feats.description: You are especially skilled in transforming simple weapons that can be easily assembled from readily available materials into deadly weapons.

feats.name: Guide the Timeline
feats.description: You know the result you want and subtly nudge the timeline to your intended destination.

feats.name: Guided by the Stars
feats.description: The stars grant you insights that guide your actions.

feats.name: Guided Hover
feats.description: You guide your draconic companion, whose outstretched wings fill with unseen thermals.

feats.name: Guided Skill
feats.description: You ask your spirit guide for aid.

feats.name: Guiding Finish
feats.description: Using your weapon as a lever, you force your opponent to end up right where you want them.

feats.name: Guiding Luck
feats.description: Your luck guides you to look the right way and aim your blows unerringly.

feats.name: Guiding Riposte
feats.description: By shifting your weight and angling your weapon, you guide your opponent to a more favorable position.

feats.name: Guiding Shot
feats.description: Your ranged attack helps guide your allies into striking your enemy's weak point.

feats.name: Guiding Words
feats.description: Your words speak divine truth, guiding blades and arrows to their mark.
feats.prerequisites: Mortal Herald Dedication; Master in Diplomacy

feats.name: Guillotine Blade
feats.description: The echoes of the splinter of finality's original purpose resonate through the artifact.

feats.name: Gunpowder Gauntlet
feats.description: Your flair keeps foes' attention, as your motions with your gun draw your foes into a deadly game.

feats.name: Gunslinger Dedication
feats.description: You become trained in simple and martial crossbows and simple and martial firearms.

feats.name: Gusting Spell
feats.description: You manipulate the currents of your spell's energy, allowing you to gracefully glide with your wings.

feats.name: Haft Beatdown
feats.description: The momentum of each of your attacks feeds into the next blow in the routine, creating a brutal rhythm that enables you to give your target one continuous beatdown.

feats.name: Haft Striker Stance
feats.description: You enter a stance that allows you to leverage the haft of your weapon to brutal effect as an effective and frighteningly efficient weapon in its own right.

feats.name: Hag Claws
feats.description: When you came of age, your fingernails grew long and sharp.

feats.name: Hag Magic
feats.description: Through your heritage, you can replicate a hag’s magic.

feats.name: Hag's Sight
feats.description: You’ve nurtured the supernatural abilities gifted by your hag mother, particularly your sight.

feats.name: Hail of Splinters
feats.description: A fusillade of jagged splinters flies from you.

feats.name: Hair Trigger
feats.description: No one can react faster than you can pull your trigger.
feats.prerequisites: initial deed that allows you to Interact to draw a weapon

feats.name: Halcyon Speaker Dedication
feats.description: You devote much of your study to halcyon magic.
feats.prerequisites: Magaambyan Attendant Dedication; member of the Magaambya of conversant rank

feats.name: Halcyon Spellcasting Adept
feats.description: You refine your halcyon magic.
feats.prerequisites: Halcyon Spellcasting Initiate; master in either Arcana or Nature, expert in the other

feats.name: Halcyon Spellcasting Initiate
feats.description: Your knowledge of halcyon magic increases.

feats.name: Halcyon Spellcasting Sage
feats.description: Your command over halcyon magic is nearly unmatched.
feats.prerequisites: Halcyon Spellcasting Adept; legendary in either Arcana or Nature, master in the other

feats.name: Half-Truths
feats.description: You are able to weave your words in such a way that you never use actual lies, but still mislead people to certain conclusions.
feats.prerequisites: Expert in Deception; Expert in Diplomacy

feats.name: Halfling Ingenuity
feats.description: While your willingness to dig into a task you know little about might get you into trouble, your incredible luck often saves you from danger.

feats.name: Halfling Lore
feats.description: You've dutifully learned how to keep your balance and how to stick to the shadows where it's safe, important skills passed down through generations of halfling tradition.

feats.name: Halfling Luck
feats.description: Your happy-go-lucky nature makes it seem like misfortune avoids you, and to an extent, that might even be true.

feats.name: Halfling Weapon Familiarity
feats.description: You favor traditional halfling weapons, so you've learned how to use them more effectively.

feats.name: Hallowed Initiate
feats.description: You've expanded your focus spellcasting to techniques used by clerics and wizards.

feats.name: Hallowed Necromancer Dedication
feats.description: You've studied techniques allowing you to blend so-called hallowed necromancy into your own spellcasting to bolster the living and destroy the undead.
feats.prerequisites: Expert in Religion; good alignment, able to cast spells using spell slots, able to cast at least one necromancy spell

feats.name: Halo
feats.description: You have a halo of light and goodness that sheds light with the effects of a divine light cantrip.

feats.name: Hampering Stance
feats.description: You make it difficult for enemies to move past you.

feats.name: Hamstringing Strike
feats.description: You slow your foes with a well-aimed attack.

feats.name: Hand of the Lich
feats.description: Negative energy intensifies your undead form and makes your very touch the antithesis of life.

feats.name: Handy with Your Paws
feats.description: You can easily craft objects.

feats.name: Haphazard Repair
feats.description: You quickly fix your innovation, at the cost of its stability.

feats.name: Harbinger's Armament
feats.description: Your deity grants you extra power that you have learned to channel into your weapons.

feats.name: Harbinger's Claw
feats.description: You caw ominously, cursing the creature with misfortune.

feats.name: Harbinger's Protection
feats.description: You often work on missions alone, making sure to cover up your weaknesses more effectively than other members of your faith.

feats.name: Hard Tail
feats.description: Your tail is much stronger than most, and you can lash out with it with the strength of a whip.

feats.name: Hard to Fool
feats.description: You're accustomed to seeing through shifting darkness and bewildering magic.

feats.name: Harden Flesh
feats.description: You fortify your skin with minerals drawn from earth and stone.

feats.name: Hardwood Armor
feats.description: Wood and bark grow over your body like armor.

feats.name: Hardy Traveler
feats.description: There’s no journey too far or burden too heavy when you have friends at your side or hope within your heart.

feats.name: Harming Hands
feats.description: The mordant power of your void energy grows.

feats.name: Harmless Doll
feats.description: You look like nothing more than an ordinary toy, doll, or statuette, and you can fool others with your innocuous appearance.

feats.name: Harmlessly Cute
feats.description: Your size and demeanor make it easy for you to convince others that you mean no harm.

feats.name: Harmonize
feats.description: You can perform multiple compositions simultaneously,
notes: You immediately learn two of the following rituals: astral projection, call spirit, commune, commune with nature, legend lore, or planar binding.

feats.name: Harmonize Self
feats.description: You can restore your health by tapping into your qi.

feats.name: Harrow Casting
feats.description: You draw a card from your harrow deck just before you cast a spell to infuse your magic with its destined potential.

feats.name: Harrower Dedication
feats.description: Stolen Fate
feats.prerequisites: You become trained in Occultism; if you are already trained in this skill, you become trained in a different skill of your choice instead.
notes: Pathfinder #222: Hellbreakers pg. 216, Hellbreakers Players Guide pg. 8
By joining the League, you’ve taken on the responsibilities of a Hellbreaker.

feats.name: Harrying Strike
feats.description: Your attack prevents a foe from pursuing your allies.

feats.name: Harsh Judgment
feats.description: You loudly declare the creature's life forfeit by your judgment
feats.source: Night of the Gray Death pg. 64
feats.prerequisites: Vigilante Dedication; member of the Gray Gardeners

feats.name: Hasted Assault
feats.description: You can speed yourself up to move and attack more swiftly.

feats.name: Hasty Celebration
feats.description: After even the briefest success, you get caught up in the moment and begin to party, cheering your allies on.

feats.name: Haughty Obstinacy
feats.description: Your powerful ego makes it harder for others to order you around.

feats.name: Haunt Ingenuity
feats.description: Your cunning knowledge grants you the ability to notice the emotional echo of a soul that passed on, leaving a haunt in its wake.

feats.name: Haunting Memories
feats.description: Your soul bears metaphysical impressions of the innumerable other spirits imprisoned with you in the final blade from which you escaped, allowing you to draw upon their memories.

feats.name: Hazard Finder
feats.description: You have an intuitive ability to sense hazards.

feats.name: Head of the Night Parade
feats.description: You remember the revelry of the Night Parade and call them to your aid in a riotous display.
feats.source: Pathfinder #168: King of the Mountain pg. 75

feats.name: Head Stomp
feats.description: Make an unarmed melee Strike against a prone target.

feats.name: Headless Haunt
feats.description: You were condemned to death and executed with one of Galt’s infamous final blades, where your soul was trapped for years or even decades.

feats.name: Headshot
feats.description: You attempt to finish your target with a final, well-placed shot.

feats.name: Heal Mount
feats.description: Your devotion to your mount manifests as a surge of vital energy.

feats.name: Healer's Halo
feats.description: Your halo can enhance positive energy.

feats.name: Healing Bomb
feats.description: You can add a foamy catalyst to an elixir of life to turn it into a topical projectile.

feats.name: Healing Flesh
feats.description: Some legends claim that the flesh of a merfolk, if consumed, can grant health, longevity, and even immortality.

feats.name: Healing Hands
feats.description: Your vitality is even more vibrant and restorative.

feats.name: Healing Sanctuary
feats.description: When you call upon your deity’s power, you also radiate a sense of safety that fortifies your allies.

feats.name: Healing Transformation
feats.description: You can take advantage of shapechanging magic to close wounds and patch injuries.

feats.name: Heart of Earth
feats.description: The earth parts to allow you passage.

feats.name: Heart of the Kaiju
feats.description: Witnessing the might of a kaiju up close awoke a new ferocity within you.
feats.source: Pathfinder #168: King of the Mountain pg. 76

feats.name: Heatwave
feats.description: You harness the oncoming flames and twist them into a screen of heat and smoke, granting you concealment until the beginning of your next turn.

feats.name: Heaven's Step Offense
feats.description: Your lessons from the stage find life in the storied mercy and fearlessness of Grand Prince Gennaris III.

feats.name: Heaven's Thunder
feats.description: With a loud shout, you unleash your ki in a crackling shroud of thunder and lightning that engulfs your body.
notes: With a loud shout, you unleash your ki in a crackling shroud of thunder and lightning that engulfs your body.

feats.name: Heaven-Earth Encompassing Sleeves
feats.description: Your magic extends to your garments.
notes: Pathfinder #222: Hellbreakers pg. 216, Hellbreakers Players Guide pg. 8
You gird yourself in both mind and body for danger, steeling your resolve.

feats.name: Hedge Maze
feats.description: You sculpt a manicured maze of hedges.

feats.name: Hedge Prison
feats.description: You cultivate plants to entrap your foes.
feats.source: Pathfinder #202: Severed at the Root pg. 72

feats.name: Hefting Shadow
feats.description: Your shadow can contain objects.

feats.name: Hefty Hauler
feats.description: Trained in Athletics

feats.name: Heightened Captivation
feats.description: You can infuse your enchantments and illusions with more power.
notes: Pathfinder #222: Hellbreakers pg. 217, Hellbreakers Players Guide pg. 9
Your in-depth knowledge of your foes grants you insight into their weaknesses, granting you an advantage when fighting against them.

feats.name: Heightened Instincts
feats.description: You've worked to sharpen your companions' instincts to supernatural levels.

feats.name: Heir of the Saoc
feats.description: In the past, you would have been a proud initiate of the Saoc Brethren.

feats.name: Hell of 1,000,000 Needles
feats.description: The landscape fills with monumental filaments of metal.

feats.name: Hell's Armaments (Lvl 12) #1
feats.description: You’ve trained with your order’s weapon and your Hellknight plate long enough to apply your expertise from other weapons and armor.

feats.name: Hell's Armaments (Lvl 12) #2
feats.description: You've trained relentlessly with your order's weapon to maximize their deadliness.
feats.prerequisites: Hellknight Preferment; expert in at least one of your order's favored weapons

feats.name: Hell-Lancer Shot
feats.description: Make a ranged Strike with a firearm against a fiend, ignoring the fiend's concealed condition and any lesser cover.
feats.prerequisites: Golden Legionnaire Dedication; trained in martial firearms

feats.name: Hellknight Armiger Dedication
feats.description: You have taken the first step to being a full Hellknight.
feats.prerequisites: member of a Hellknight Order; trained in heavy armor as well as your order's favored weapon

feats.name: Hellknight Dedication (Lvl 2)
feats.description: You've started walking the path toward becoming a true Hellknight, though you're currently considered only an armiger.

feats.name: Hellknight Dedication (Lvl 6)
feats.description: You have forged your body to comply with the commands of your mind—orders steeped in the Measure and the Chain.
feats.prerequisites: Hellknight Armiger Dedication; lawful alignment; member of a Hellknight Order; passed the Hellknight Test

feats.name: Hellknight Mobility
feats.description: You've learned how best to move in your heavy armor.
feats.prerequisites: Hellknight Dedication; expert in Hellknight half plate or Hellknight plate

feats.name: Hellknight Order Cross-Training
feats.description: You gain the lesser order benefit of a Hellknight order other than the one to which you belong.
feats.prerequisites: Hellknight Armiger Dedication; Hellknight Dedication or Hellknight Signifer Dedication

feats.name: Hellknight Preferment
feats.description: You've forged your body to be able to stand toe-to-toe with a devil, and your mind has been shaped by the strictures of the Measure and the Chain.
feats.prerequisites: Hellknight Dedication; passed the Hellknight Test; trained in Hellknight plate

feats.name: Hellknight Signifer Dedication
feats.description: You have bolstered your force of will with the power of the Measure and the Chain.
feats.prerequisites: spellcasting class feature; Hellknight Armiger Dedication; lawful alignment; member of a Hellknight Order; passed the Hellknight Test

feats.name: Hellknight Signifer Preferment
feats.description: You've bolstered your force of will with the power of the Measure and the Chain.
feats.prerequisites: Hellknight Dedication; passed the Hellknight Test; trained in Hellknight plate; you have a spellcasting class feature.

feats.name: Hellknight-Errant
feats.description: Either through unfortunate circumstances or your own choice, you remain a Hellknight armiger instead of entering the true ranks of your order, though you still believe in the tenets of law and order.
feats.prerequisites: Hellknight Dedication; you've refused to take or have failed the Hellknight Test.
notes: At times, the myth of a hero-god includes a favored partner or a bonded ally, such as the hero-gods of promises and shield-bearers, Upion and Warrick.
Hey! Don’t listen to that! That’s bad sounds! Listen to me!
Pathfinder #222: Hellbreakers pg. 216, Hellbreakers Players Guide pg. 8
You're constantly on guard, keeping watch over your allies against fiendish forces—no one can get the jump on your group while you're around.
Gatewalkers Player's Guide (Remastered) pg. 13, Dark Archives (Remastered) pg. 101
Your wounds knit together with barely a thought.

feats.name: Hellspawn
feats.description: Your lineage descends from devils, conniving schemers of Hell.

feats.name: Helpful Halfling
feats.description: When you aid a friend with a task, you find many ways to help and avoid interfering.

feats.name: Helpful Poppet
feats.description: You're particularly skilled at helping others with a task.

feats.name: Helpful Tinkering
feats.description: You don't just tinker with your own innovation, you fiddle with your allies' weapons as well (for their benefit, of course).

feats.name: Helt's Spelldance
feats.description: Ranik Helt knows a special technique to hide his spells as part of a performance, and you've learned this technique.

feats.name: Hematocritical
feats.description: You bathe in the arterial fluids of your enemy, drinking deep of their freed essence to empower your magic and increase your spellcasting efficacy.

feats.name: Herald's Strike
feats.description: The power of your blows can send your victim hurling through your deity’s realm for a fragment of a second.

feats.name: Herald's Weapon
feats.description: Your weapon becomes a wrathful instrument of your deity’s power.

feats.name: Heraldic Proclamation
feats.description: You proclaim your spell with the might of your god behind you.

feats.name: Herbal Forager
feats.description: Your skill with herbs has improved.

feats.name: Hero's Wings
feats.description: You have begun the final steps to reaching your full potential.

feats.name: Heroes' Call
feats.description: The songs of ancient heroes echo through your mind and quicken your pulse, especially in dire straits.

feats.name: Heroic Defiance
feats.description: Even as shadows of your doom haunt the corners of your vision, your implacable spirit surges and cries out that your time has not yet come.

feats.name: Heroic Presence
feats.description: The blood of heroes courses through your veins, and you inspire your allies to dig deep and find a new level of resolve.

feats.name: Heroic Recovery
feats.description: The restorative power of your healing invigorates the recipient.

feats.name: Hex Focus
feats.description: Your patron’s teachings have allowed you to achieve a deeper focus.

feats.name: Hex Master
feats.description: You embody the link to your patron so completely that you can cast your hexes in rapid succession.

feats.name: Hidden Hoard
feats.description: Your draconic gift is the key to a repository of treasure that only you can access.

feats.name: Hidden Intentions
feats.description: You layer meanings in your words, and only those you've taken into your confidence can divine your true plans.
feats.prerequisites: Twilight Talon Dedication; Master in Deception

feats.name: Hidden Paragon
feats.description: When you slip out of sight, you disappear.

feats.name: Hidden Thorn
feats.description: Some flowers can hide their thorns, and yours happen to be hidden along your arms.

feats.name: Hideous Ululation
feats.description: Your throat has multiple separate chambers that can give your voice an eerie echo.
notes: Your clockwork devices can commandeer the bodies of undead, bending them to your will.

feats.name: Hierophant's Power
feats.description: Icy Apotheosis
feats.prerequisites: You have entwined yourself with the natural world, and its full power flows through you.
notes: You are as much a creature of cold as whatever ancestry you were born to.

feats.name: Hilt Hammer
feats.description: You know how to turn any weapon into a bone-crushing implement of skeletal destruction.

feats.name: Hindquarter Kick
feats.description: You hold your prey's defensive limbs in place with your claws while delivering a swift kick to their unprotected sides.

feats.name: Hireling Manager
feats.description: Hirelings gain +2 to skill checks.

feats.name: Histrionic Injury
feats.description: You respond with a startled look, dramatic pratfall, or theatrical arm-flailing that stymies your attacker.

feats.name: Hit and Run
feats.description: Leaping from a hiding place, you quickly attack your foe before retreating.

feats.name: Hit the Dirt!
feats.description: You fling yourself out of harm's way.

feats.name: Hoarder's Craw
feats.description: Your draconic features include a pouch inside your body that you use to store food prior to digestion.

feats.name: Hobgoblin Lore
feats.description: You've studied traditional hobgoblin exercises and fieldcraft, all of which have a militaristic bent.

feats.name: Hobgoblin Weapon Familiarity
feats.description: You gain access to all uncommon weapons with the hobgoblin trait.

feats.name: Hobnobber
feats.description: Trained in Diplomacy

feats.name: Hold Mark
feats.description: You bear scars or tattoos enhanced by the mark of your community’s prowess.

feats.name: Holy Bloom
feats.description: Though you might not be a priest of Milani, her divine spirit flows through you.

feats.name: Holy Flower
feats.description: Milani's grace empowers you further.

feats.name: Holy Light
feats.description: You raise your arms to the sky and pray fervently, surrounding yourself in a beacon of holy light.

feats.name: Home in the Deep
feats.description: You cut through the water, and dwell beneath the surface with ease.

feats.name: Homeward Bound
feats.description: The connection between you and the First World resonates within your body stronger than it does for most gnomes, allowing you to cross the threshold between the Universe and the First World.

feats.name: Homing Beacon
feats.description: As your spell strikes a target, you plant a beacon in the target's mind that announces its presence to those nearby.

feats.name: Hone Claws
feats.description: You grind or gnaw a particularly wicked edge onto your claws.

feats.name: Hook 'Em
feats.description: The Salt Breakers learned to use whatever they could during the Vidric Revolution, and they quickly mastered the art of making a rope into a useful tool in combat.

feats.name: Hop Up
feats.description: Your frog-like agility awakens as soon as you do.

feats.name: Hopping Stride
feats.description: You've internalized the hopping gait of your vampiric forebear.

feats.name: Horn and Bone Incantation
feats.description: You invoke mantras of tellurian rebirth.

feats.name: Horselord's Bond
feats.description: Your bond with your horse becomes supernaturally strong as the two of you continue your crusade against Zon-Kuthon's dominion.

feats.name: Hot Foot
feats.description: Using a carefully aimed shot, you make a creature “dance.”

feats.name: House of Imaginary Walls
feats.description: You erect an imaginary barrier others believe to be real.

feats.name: Howling Aspect
feats.description: Pulling your hair loose into flames and gnashing your teeth into ragged fangs, you howl a vow of ire, and your form surges to meet the demands of your deadly promise.

feats.name: Hulking Size
feats.description: Your eidolon grows substantially.

feats.name: Hungry Blade
feats.description: Once your spectral dagger has tasted an enemy’s soul, your splinter of finality becomes increasingly relentless in its attempts to claim the soul.

feats.name: Hungry Eyes
feats.description: Your eyes can see through darkness with an oni’s visual acuity.

feats.name: Hungry Goblin
feats.description: You’ll eat anything and anyone.

feats.name: Hunted Shot
feats.description: You take two quick shots against the one you hunt.

feats.name: Hunter's Aim
feats.description: When you focus on aiming, your attack becomes particularly accurate.

feats.name: Hunter's Defense
feats.description: Your canny understanding of natural and primal creatures helps you predict and dodge their attacks.

feats.name: Hunter's Fangs
feats.description: Your fangs are exceptionally painful.

feats.name: Hunter's Sanctum
feats.description: You establish a safe house where you can prepare for your hunt.

feats.name: Hunting Snag
feats.description: Learning from nature's predators has taught you how to keep your prey close.

feats.name: Hurl at the Horizon
feats.description: Your weapon flies from your hand as if propelled under its own power.

feats.name: Hurricane Swing
feats.description: Choose either lightning bolt or gust of wind.

feats.name: Hybrid Form
feats.description: When you Change Shape, you retain elements of your kitsune form, allowing you to speak in a fox form, use kitsune unarmed attacks in a tailless form, or gain a tail in your tailless form to use abilities that require one.

feats.name: Hybrid Shape
feats.description: Mastery of your shapeshifting lets you combine the best features of your humanoid and spider forms.

feats.name: Hybrid Study Spell
feats.description: Gain the conflux spell from a hybrid study of your choice.

feats.name: Hydraulic Deflection
feats.description: Drawing moisture from the atmosphere, you create a disc of hovering water that deflects attacks.

feats.name: Hydraulic Maneuvers
feats.description: You batter your foes with a torrent of water siphoned from your surroundings.

feats.name: Hyena Familiar
feats.description: Hyenas serve kholo as pets and trackers.

feats.name: Hymn of Healing
feats.description: You learn the hymn of healing composition spell, which imbues your music with rich melodies that help your allies recover from harm.

feats.name: Hypnotic Gaze
feats.description: You can widen your field of vision, allowing you to affect more creatures with your Hypnotic Lure.

feats.name: Hypnotic Lure
feats.description: Your unblinking gaze is so intense it can befuddle the mind of others, drawing your victims toward you even against their better judgment.

feats.name: I knew the Heroes
feats.description: Your stories aren’t mere tales passed down from elder to youth or teacher to student.
feats.prerequisites: Uzunjati Recollection; legendary in a Recall Knowledge Skill

feats.name: I Meant to Do That
feats.description: Somehow your stray bullet causes an unintended reaction that creates a problem for your enemy: perhaps a ricochet knocks your foe's weapon away or they stumble over stray debris in an attempt to dodge your bullets.
feats.prerequisites: Unexpected Sharpshooter Dedication; Trained in Deception

feats.name: I Sense Malevolence
feats.description: Your time in the River of Souls has given you deep insight into the machinations of those who refuse to move on.

feats.name: I Will Return
feats.description: Your special connection to death and rebirth allows you to sense when it’s your time to enter the Great Beyond, and now isn’t the time.

feats.name: I've Had Many Jobs
feats.description: Finding and excelling at odd jobs is child’s play to one who has worked many occupations during many lives.

feats.name: Ice Crafter
feats.description: The ancient ice-crafting techniques of the saumen kar awaken within you.

feats.name: Idol Threat
feats.description: You brandish the precious object you're holding menacingly, at once mocking it and threatening its safety.

feats.name: Idyllkin
feats.description: Your wild, unique features betray your agathion birthright.

feats.name: Igneogenesis
feats.description: You can create a permanent stone object, either sculpting stone pulled directly from your kinetic gate or manipulating earth and stone around you.

feats.name: Ignite the Sun
feats.description: The fires of creation become yours to control.

feats.name: Iivlar's Boundary Break
feats.description: You can bend the boundary between planes with the natural skill of an iivlar.

feats.name: Iivlar's Deflection
feats.description: You’re able to use the silk woven into your skin to deflect attacks, reducing the deadliness of grievous blows.

feats.name: Ill Tide
feats.description: Some land dwellers say that merfolk are bad luck.

feats.name: Illimitable Finisher
feats.description: Immortal Bear
notes: Your body thrums with the primal vitality of the greatest of the ursine beasts.

feats.name: Illuminating Stories
feats.description: Stories serve as beacons in the night, illuminating valuable knowledge even if the tale itself misses the mark.

feats.name: Illusion Sense
feats.description: Your ancestors spent their days cloaked and cradled in illusions, and as a result, sensing illusion magic is second nature to you.

feats.name: Illusory Identity
feats.description: There are times when skills or looks are not enough to convince someone of your identity, and you instead require adequate documentation.
notes: You grasp the mind of an undead creature and temporarily wipe it as empty as a zombie's brain.

feats.name: Ilverani Purist
feats.description: All twilight speakers are trained to resist the alluring customs of younger peoples, but you have made it your mandate to keep the Ilverani way unchanged.

feats.name: Immediate Rebuke
feats.description: You can use Reactive Strike when a creature within your reach Strikes one of your allies.

feats.name: Immobile Form
feats.description: You take on the shape you had before you awoke to hide in plain sight.
feats.prerequisites: Born of Item heritage, Born of Elements heritage, or Born of Vegetation heritage

feats.name: Immortal Lightness
feats.description: You breathe, allowing your golden core to release qi into the meridians governing your lower body, and break into a burst of speed that could shame arrows in flight.

feats.name: Immortal Techniques
feats.description: You flow from technique to technique, renewing yourself as you embrace each style you have mastered.

feats.name: Impaling Bone
feats.description: Once per day, you can cast impaling spike as a 7th-rank innate occult spell, except the spike is made of bone instead of cold iron.

feats.name: Impaling Briars
feats.description: You can fill an area with devastating briars.

feats.name: Impaling Finisher
feats.description: You stab two foes with a single thrust or bash them together with one punch.

feats.name: Impaling Thrust
feats.description: You impale your enemy and hold it in place with your weapon, and leave it bleeding when it gets free.

feats.name: Impassable Wall Stance
feats.description: You refuse to let foes past your guard.

feats.name: Impeccable Crafting
feats.description: Master in Crafting; Specialty Crafting

feats.name: Impenetrable Fog
feats.description: Fog condenses in a chaotic, swirling pattern, thick enough that it seems to push back against you.

feats.name: Imperial Dragon Potion
feats.description: During your daily preparations, you can spend 10 minutes to create a variant energy breath potion, which has the kobold trait in addition to its normal traits.
feats.prerequisites: Expert in Crafting; Heavenscribe Kobold heritage

feats.name: Imperious Aura
feats.description: Your glowing and majestic kinetic aura marks you as a true child of the elements.
feats.prerequisites: one or more stance impulses that affect your kinetic aura

feats.name: Impervious Vehicle
feats.description: From armor plating and flexible components, to reinforced materials and backup redundant functionality, you have built safeguards to protect your vehicle from the rigors of combat.
notes: When you use Command Undead on a mindless undead, if the undead succeeds at its save but doesn't critically succeed, it becomes your minion for 1 round.

feats.name: Implausible Infiltration
feats.description: You find tiny imperfections and somehow fit yourself through them, possibly moving directly through the wall or floor.

feats.name: Implausible Purchase
feats.description: It seems impossible, but you've analyzed every angle and are able to just keep pulling out exactly the item you need, even in far-flung locations.

feats.name: Implausible Purchase (Rogue)
feats.description: You can use Prescient Planner even if you have already used it after purchasing goods, and you can Interact to draw the item as a single action instead of a 2-action activity.

feats.name: Implement Initiate
feats.description: Mastery of an implement is the sign of a studied thaumaturge.

feats.name: Implement's Assault
feats.description: Your implement supercharges your weapon to shoot an impossible volley or carve through your foes.

feats.name: Implement's Flight
feats.description: By weakening your relation to the ground and strengthening your relation to the sky, you've learned to soar through the air, your implement carrying you as surely as any broomstick or pestle.

feats.name: Impose Order
feats.description: You shift the underlying fabric of reality to impose a baseline of order.

feats.name: Impose Order (Psychic)
feats.description: You bring discipline to your mind and magic, ensuring that you don't under-perform.

feats.name: Imposing Destrier
feats.description: Under your care, your mount has realized its innate potential.

feats.name: Impossible Flurry
feats.description: You forgo precision to attack at an impossible speed.

feats.name: Impossible Gossip
feats.description: You can speak to inanimate objects, finding a magical spark within them similar to the one that animated you.

feats.name: Impossible Polymath
feats.description: Your esoteric formulas are so unusual that they allow you to dabble in magic from diverse traditions that other bards don’t understand.
feats.prerequisites: Trained in Arcana, Trained in Nature, or Trained in Religion; Esoteric Polymath

feats.name: Impossible Riposte
feats.description: Your ripostes can deflect attacks back at their source.
notes: Undead creatures find it all but impossible to resist your commands.

feats.name: Impossible Snares
feats.description: You can create endless shorter-lived snares, protecting your lair or using them against foes.

feats.name: Impossible Striker
feats.description: Nothing can prevent you from making a sneak attack, even if your opponent can see every blow coming.

feats.name: Impossible Technique
feats.description: You execute a maneuver that defies possibility.

feats.name: Impossible Volley
feats.description: You fire a volley at all foes in an area.

feats.name: Impressive Landing
feats.description: You slam into the ground, shattering it around you.

feats.name: Impressive Performance
feats.description: Trained in Performance

feats.name: Improbable Elixirs
feats.description: Your mastery of alchemical secrets enables you to replicate effects most believe can be achieved only via magic.

feats.name: Improved Dueling Riposte
feats.description: Your weapon whirls and darts, striking foes whenever the slightest opening or moment of weakness presents itself.

feats.name: Improved Elemental Blast
feats.description: The power of your elemental blast improves.

feats.name: Improved Elemental Bulwark
feats.description: You gain resistance 10 from Elemental Bulwark instead of 5.

feats.name: Improved Familiar (Witch)
feats.description: You find it easy to attract a powerful and unusual familiar to your side.

feats.name: Improved Invigorating Elixir
feats.description: Choose physical invigoration or mental invigoration, and add the listed conditions to those you can choose for an invigorating elixir.

feats.name: Improved Knockback
feats.description: When you successfully Shove a creature, increase both the distance you can push the creature and the distance you can move to follow along with the target by 5 feet on a success or 10 feet on a critical success.

feats.name: Improved Poison Weapon
feats.description: You deliver poisons in ways that maximize their harmful effects.

feats.name: Improved Reflexive Shield
feats.description: Your shield can help save nearby allies.

feats.name: Improved Signature Weapon
feats.description: Your signature weapon takes on the properties of mystical materials renowned for defeating undead, spirits, and other such creatures.

feats.name: Improved Swift Banishment
feats.description: You easily banish creatures with your weapon.

feats.name: Improved Twin Riposte (Fighter)
feats.description: Your weapons are a blur, blocking and biting at your foes.

feats.name: Improved Twin Riposte (Ranger)
feats.description: At the start of each of your turns, you gain an additional reaction that you can use only to perform a Twin Riposte.

feats.name: Improvisational Defender
feats.description: You are always prepared for fights that frequently disrupt seemingly peaceful times.

feats.name: Improvisational Warrior
feats.description: You have increased skill with improvised weapons.

feats.name: Improvise Admixture
feats.description: You scrounge together enough ingredients from what's left in your alchemist's toolkit to produce a few more versatile vials on the fly.

feats.name: Improvise Tool
feats.description: You can jury-rig solutions when you don't have the proper tools on hand.

feats.name: Improvised Repair
feats.description: Inspiring Entertainment
feats.prerequisites: You can hastily patch damaged equipment together, but the temporary fix lacks the full care required for lasting repairs.
notes: Use Culture on checks to determine Unrest

feats.name: In Lightning, Life
feats.description: “In lightning, there is life.” This lesson is whispered throughout Lepidstadt, and you can put it to practical use.

feats.name: In Plain Sight
feats.description: People often only see what they want to see, a weakness you know how to take full advantage of.

feats.name: In the Horde's Grip
feats.description: When your skeletons and zombies attack, their skeletal claws and rotting hands clutch and tear flesh.

feats.name: In Tune
feats.description: You attune your great skill in performing to another, granting them a small measure of your skill as though anyone could do it.

feats.name: Incredible Aim
feats.description: By spending a moment to focus, you can ensure your attack strikes true.

feats.name: Incredible Companion (Druid)
feats.description: Your animal companion continues to grow and develop.

feats.name: Incredible Companion (Ranger)
feats.description: Your animal companion continues to grow and develop.

feats.name: Incredible Construct Companion
feats.description: Thanks to your continual tinkering, your construct companion has advanced to an astounding new stage of engineering, enhancing all its attributes.

feats.name: Incredible Dragon Companion
feats.description: Your mature dragon companion develops further, becoming more robust and formidable.

feats.name: Incredible Familiar
feats.description: Your familiar is imbued with even more magic than other familiars.

feats.name: Incredible Familiar (Familiar Master)
feats.description: Your familiar is infused with even more magic than other familiars.

feats.name: Incredible Ferocity
feats.description: Given time to collect yourself after a near-death scrape, you can rebuild your ferocity and withstand additional finishing blows.

feats.name: Incredible Improvisation
feats.description: A stroke of brilliance gives you a major advantage with a skill despite your inexperience.

feats.name: Incredible Initiative
feats.description: +2 to initiative rolls

feats.name: Incredible Investiture
feats.description: Charisma +3

feats.name: Incredible Luck
feats.description: You always seem to bounce back from the worst.

feats.name: Incredible Luck (Halfling)
feats.description: Even other halflings consider you to be particularly lucky.

feats.name: Incredible Megafauna Companion
feats.description: Under your care and training, your megafauna companion has realized its innate potential.
notes: You imbue the necrotized flesh of your reanimated construct companion with strange chemicals and fine-tune the clockwork within, enhancing all its capabilities.

feats.name: Incredible Recollection
feats.description: You can sift through knowledge locked within your mind at an incredible pace.
feats.source: Pathfinder #164: Hands of the Devil pg. 76

feats.name: Incredible Ricochet
feats.description: After your first shot singles out your opponent’s position, you direct another that ricochets around obstacles and strikes unerringly.

feats.name: Incredible Scout
feats.description: When you scout, you are particularly alert for danger, granting your allies precious moments to prepare to fight.

feats.name: Incredible Sprint
feats.description: You push yourself, unleashing a burst of sudden speed.

feats.name: Indomitable Spirit
feats.description: Your soul has accumulated countless particles of quintessence over myriad deaths and rebirths, and for one moment, this raw material from the Great Beyond envelops you and your comrades.

feats.name: Induce Imbalance
feats.description: Your blows can disrupt the delicate balance of elemental energies that keep a body in good health.

feats.name: Inertial Barrier
feats.description: Your spell leaves behind barriers that reduce shock and motion.

feats.name: Inescapable Grasp
feats.description: Your grasp has a supernatural quality to it, preventing your foes from easily escaping—with or without magical assistance.

feats.name: Inexhaustible Countermoves
feats.description: At the start of each enemy's turn, you gain an extra reaction

feats.name: Inexorable
feats.description: You imbue yourself with the resilience of the cave worm.
feats.source: Pathfinder #194: Cult of the Cave Worm pg. 80
feats.source_book: Pathfinder #194: Cult of the Cave Worm

feats.name: Infectious Emotions
feats.description: When you use Catharsis, one ally within 30 feet gains the catharsis activation benefits in addition to you.

feats.name: Infernal Interference
feats.description: Your attacks force a foe to glimpse the iron, soul-wrenching landscapes of Hell.

feats.name: Infiltrate Dream
feats.description: Entering a dream is as natural to you as stepping through a doorway.

feats.name: Infiltration Assassination
feats.description: With a high-priority target in reach, you quickly move to eliminate them.

feats.name: Infiltrator's Blitz
feats.description: Though your training is meant to ensure you don't get caught by your enemies, your missions are often high risk, and sometimes the only option you have left when things go wrong is to unleash a blistering torrent of violence while running away as fast as possible.

feats.name: Infiltrator's Reload
feats.description: You specialize in reloading while preparing for the next step in your infiltration.
feats.prerequisites: Crossbow Infiltrator Dedication; Expert in Stealth

feats.name: Infinite Blades Celestial Arrow
feats.description: Each shot you launch multiplies itself with spiritual blades, rings, and other missiles that shower upon your foes.

feats.name: Infinite Expanse of Bluest Heaven
feats.description: An illusion of a limitless expanse with an impossibly blue sky makes all within feel the sensation of falling...

feats.name: Infinite Possibilities
feats.description: You can prepare a spell slot that exists in your mind as many different possibilities at once.

feats.name: Inflame Crowd
feats.description: Your performances are a call to action for the crowds who listen to you.

feats.name: Influence Nature
feats.description: With patience and time, you can make bird calls, leave game trails, and ultimately influence the behavior of a certain type of animals in the region to favor and even aid you in the days to come.

feats.name: Infused with Belkzen's Might
feats.description: Your tattoos immortalize the conquests of orc war leaders, such as Belkzen besieging the dwarven Sky Citadel of Koldukar.

feats.name: Inhale, Exhale!
feats.description: You take an especially deep breath as a prelude to unleashing your dragonet breath on your foes.

feats.name: Inherit the Dreaming Heirloom
feats.description: Whether you always carried it or perhaps only recently inherited, you have a pusaka— an heirloom containing a spirit who you communicate with in your dreams.

feats.name: Initial Eidolon Ability
feats.description: Your link to your eidolon becomes stronger, granting it a new ability.

feats.name: Initiate Warden
feats.description: You’ve trained with one of the ranger sects known as wardens, who practice a specialized type of primal magic.

feats.name: Inked Cache
feats.description: You've learned to use your Twilight Talon's mark to secret away contraband.

feats.name: Inked Panoply
feats.description: Your tattoos can briefly animate and extend from your skin, granting you a spectral shieldbearer who protects you from harm.

feats.name: Innate Understanding
feats.description: Vague connections to the knowledge and prowess of your past help guide you in tasks that this life might not understand.

feats.name: Inner Breath
feats.description: Your body is capable of recycling its own air.

feats.name: Inner Fire
feats.description: You can call the fire inside you into the palm of your hand.

feats.name: Inner Fire (SoM)
feats.description: While you're in Stoked Flame Stance, you have cold and fire resistance, and any creature touches you takes fire damage.

feats.name: Inner Strength
feats.description: Your strength is part of your rage.

feats.name: Innocent Butterfly
feats.description: You know how to alter the perceptions of others.
feats.source: Pathfinder #166: Despair on Danger Island pg. 78

feats.name: Innocuous
feats.description: Halflings have been unobtrusive assistants of larger folk for untold ages, and your people count on this assumption of innocence.

feats.name: Inoculation
feats.description: You have practice combating plague, and your patients are less likely to succumb to the same disease again for a time.
notes: +1 to Work Camp, Establish Trade Agreement, and Trade Commodities activities

feats.name: Inoculation Subroutine
feats.description: Your nanites reject diseases with ease.

feats.name: Inscribed with Elders' Deeds
feats.description: Your tattoos commemorate unique exploits that (according to legends) only an orc could accomplish.

feats.name: Insect Shape
feats.description: Your understanding of life expands, allowing you to mimic a wider range of creatures.

feats.name: Insistent Command
feats.description: When you roll a success to Command an Animal, you get a critical success.
feats.source: Pathfinder #152: Legacy of the Lost God pg. 76
feats.source_book: Pathfinder #152: Legacy of the Lost God
feats.prerequisites: Master in Nature; Animal Trainer Dedication

feats.name: Inspirational Focus
feats.description: Your connection to your muse has granted you unusual focus.

feats.name: Inspire Imitation
feats.description: Your actions inspire your allies to great achievements.

feats.name: Inspired Stratagem
feats.description: During your daily preparations, you can review stratagems for the day’s adventures with up to five allies.

feats.name: Inspiring Recitation
feats.description: You quietly speak or recall coded phrases and metaphors whose meanings inspire you to complete your mission.

feats.name: Inspiring Resilience
feats.description: You show defiance in times of hardship and inspire your companions to persevere.

feats.name: Inspirit Hazard
feats.description: You awaken a spirit of creation within the hazard.

feats.name: Instant Armor
feats.description: A knight is nothing without their armor, and you know how to keep yours ready.

feats.name: Instant Backup
feats.description: Even as your firearm misfires, you quickly draw a backup weapon.

feats.name: Instant Credentials
feats.description: In a pinch, ink from your tattoo arranges itself into a temporary pass, writ of authority, or similar document.

feats.name: Instant Opening
feats.description: You distract your opponent with a few choice words or a rude gesture.

feats.name: Instant Return
feats.description: With a single fluid gesture, you catch a projectile out of the air, load it in your weapon, and shoot it back at the attacker.

feats.name: Instigate Psychic Duel
feats.description: You attempt to enter a psychic duel with a creature.

feats.name: Instinct Ability
feats.description: Your rage stokes the spark of your barbarian instinct into a roaring flame.

feats.name: Instinctive Maneuvers
feats.description: When you allow an apparition control over your body, it might vent its fury against your foes.

feats.name: Instinctive Obfuscation
feats.description: The magic within you manifests as a natural reaction to threats.
feats.prerequisites: at least one arcane or occult innate spell gained from a gnome heritage or gnome ancestry feat

feats.name: Instinctive Strike
feats.description: You trust your instincts and your sense of smell, using all your senses to pinpoint your opponent's location.

feats.name: Instinctive Support
feats.description: When you support your animal companion, your companion supports you in turn.

feats.name: Instinctual Interception
feats.description: You react to movement with hardly a thought, seeming constantly poised to spring.

feats.name: Instructive Strike
feats.description: You attack your foe and analyze how it reacts.

feats.name: Instrument of Death
feats.description: Your splinter of finality has reached the apex of its death-dealing potential.

feats.name: Instrument of Slaughter
feats.description: Your blessed armament thirsts for the blood of your foes.
feats.prerequisites: champion’s reaction that grants extra damage with your Strikes (including the desecration, iniquity, and obedience causes)

feats.name: Instrument of Zeal
feats.description: Divine energy fills your weapon.
feats.prerequisites: Blessed Counterstrike or Retributive Strike; champion’s reaction that grants an ally resistance to an enemy’s damage (including the grandeur, justice, liberation, and redemption causes)

feats.name: Insulated Poppet
feats.description: You’ve used insulating wraps or special glazes to reduce your weakness to current and temperature.
feats.prerequisites: Tsukumogami Poppet heritage; you have a metal or ceramic body

feats.name: Integrated Armament
feats.description: Your mechanical body houses a weapon or shield that you can quickly draw and stow, leaving you prepared for combat at all times.

feats.name: Intense Implement
feats.description: You have an exceptional link to your third implement.

feats.name: Intensified Element Stance
feats.description: You expend the elemental medicine in your body to empower your attacks, though you can’t consume any more elemental medicine until the next day.

feats.name: Intensify Investiture
feats.description: Your bond to your invested items enables you to put more of yourself into them.

feats.name: Intercepting Hand
feats.description: Your particular martial art includes various defensive actions designed to remove your opponent’s ability to cause harm.

feats.name: Interfering Surge
feats.description: You overcharge the triggering spell with magic.

feats.name: Internal Compartment
feats.description: You can hide a small object of up to light Bulk inside a hollow cavity on one of your forearms.

feats.name: Internal Respirator
feats.description: Your body can internally synthesize oxygen for limited periods of time.

feats.name: Interpose
feats.description: You put yourself between an ally and danger.

feats.name: Interposing Crowd
feats.description: Your enemies can’t stop you when there’s a host of people between you.

feats.name: Interrogate
feats.description: You ask questions you know will be answered.

feats.name: Interrupt Charge
feats.description: You attempt to snag the foe before they run away.

feats.name: Interweave Dispel
feats.description: You weave dispelling energy into a spell.
feats.prerequisites: dispel magic in your spell repertoire

feats.name: Intimidating Glare
feats.description: Trained in Intimidation

feats.name: Intimidating Prowess
feats.description: Strength +3; Expert in Intimidation
feats.campaign: Gain a bonus to physically Demoralize a target

feats.name: Intimidating Spell
feats.description: The devastation wrought by your large-scale spells is particularly terrifying.

feats.name: Intimidating Strike
feats.description: Your blow not only wounds creatures but also shatters their confidence.
feats.source: Player Core pg. 141, Player Core 2 pg. 77

feats.name: Into the Future
feats.description: You know your spell will be needed not now but in a few moments, so you cast your magic into the future.

feats.name: Into the Labyrinth
feats.description: Calling on your connection to minotaurs of myth, you shunt an enemy into a complex maze full of puzzles of your own devising.

feats.name: Into the Sky
feats.description: You fly as naturally as any dragonet.

feats.name: Intuitive Cooperation
feats.description: You are accustomed to working alongside others, relying on each other to get by.

feats.name: Intuitive Crafting
feats.description: Your affinity with process and order makes you a natural artisan.

feats.name: Intuitive Illusions
feats.description: Illusion magic comes to you so naturally that you can effortlessly sustain your magical ruses.

feats.name: Inured to Alchemy
feats.description: You've developed control over how your body processes alchemical poisons and drugs.
feats.source: Pathfinder #178: Punks in a Powderkeg pg. 79

feats.name: Inured to the Heat
feats.description: You have a love for extreme heat.

feats.name: Invented Vulnerability
feats.description: You list off the potential fears and weaknesses of an enemy you can see or hear, speaking with such certainty that they become real.

feats.name: Inventive Offensive
feats.description: You can jury-rig your weapons to perform in unexpected ways.

feats.name: Inventor
feats.description: Expert in Crafting
feats.campaign: Use Crafting to create item formulas

feats.name: Inventor Dedication
feats.description: You become trained in Crafting and inventor class DC.

feats.name: Investigate Haunting
feats.description: You are skilled at noticing the telltale signs of ghosts and hauntings.

feats.name: Investigator Dedication
feats.description: You gain the on the case class feature, which grants you both the Pursue a Lead activity and Clue In reaction.

feats.name: Investigator's Stratagem
feats.description: You play out battles in your head, allowing you to strike when the time is right.

feats.name: Invigorating Breath
feats.description: Your spirit guide exhales its sweet-smelling breath on you, granting you the strength to push through your pain.

feats.name: Invigorating Elixir
feats.description: You can mix an aromatic salve into an elixir with the healing trait to soothe physical maladies.

feats.name: Invigorating Mercy
feats.description: Your divine touch rejuvenates the weak and tired.

feats.name: Invincible Army
feats.description: You enumerate the many virtues and victories of your chosen allies, creating a story of their invincibility so convincing that it is as good as the truth.

feats.name: Inviolable
feats.description: Your deity punishes creatures that harm you.

feats.name: Invisible Trickster
feats.description: You have learned how to become invisible and remain so.

feats.name: Invoke Defense
feats.description: You manifest a defensive quality of spirits all around, such as the thick hide of an animal spirit or the sturdy bark of a nature spirit.

feats.name: Invoke Disaster
feats.description: You can invoke nature’s fury upon your foes.

feats.name: Invoke Movement
feats.description: You manifest a form of locomotion of the spirits all around, such as the wings of an animal spirit or the watery flow of a nature spirit.

feats.name: Invoke Offense
feats.description: You manifest a physical attack of the spirits all around you, such as the claw of an animal spirit or the whipping vine of a nature spirit.
notes: Absalom, City of Lost Omens pg. 185
Bard, Champion, Cleric, Druid, Magus, Monk, Oracle, Psychic, Ranger, Sorcerer, Summoner, Uncommon, Witch, Wizard
Expert in Arcana or Expert in Occultism

Your face bears an intricate magical tattoo known as the irezoko, a badge of your understanding of your chosen field of magic and a recognition of your advancement within Absalom's College of Mysteries.

feats.name: Invoke the Crimson Oath
feats.description: You can invoke the Crimson Oath to unleash blasts of ruby energy from your weapon.

feats.name: Invoke the Elements
feats.description: You summon an aura of shimmering heat, flurrying snow, crashing waves, or swirling wind and lightning.
feats.prerequisites: Brine May, Snow May, Veil May, or Virga May

feats.name: Invulnerable Rager
feats.description: Even the heaviest armors serve only to enhance your unbridled fury.

feats.name: Iomedae's Valor
feats.description: Though you might not be walking the virtuous path of honor and justice most often associated with Iomedae, you have studied her mortal bravery and can emulate it when you're on the brink of defeat.

feats.name: Iridian Choirmaster Dedication
feats.description: When you take this dedication, choose one willing, non-minion ally to be your student in the ways of the Iridian Choir.

feats.name: Iron Belly
feats.description: A good laugh comes from the belly, and by laughing every day, yours has grown quite strong.

feats.name: Iron Fists
feats.description: Your fists have been forged by battle, your naturally tough skin and dense bone further hardened by conflict.

feats.name: Iron Lung
feats.description: Your lungs are infused with the resilience of iron.

feats.name: Iron Repercussions
feats.description: Disobeying your Iron Command has lasting consequences.

feats.name: Ironblood Stance
feats.description: Jellyfish Stance
feats.prerequisites: You enter the stance of impenetrable iron, refusing to yield to any blow.
notes: Fists of the Ruby Phoenix Hardcover pg. 212, Pathfinder #167: Ready? Fight! pg. 75
You relax your posture and loosen your joints, allowing yourself to move with incredible fluidity.

feats.name: Ironblood Surge
feats.description: You steel yourself, preparing to resist oncoming attacks and using your muscles to absorb the impact.

feats.name: Ironclad Fortitude
feats.description: Your proficiency rank in Fortitude saves increases to master.
feats.prerequisites: Guardian Dedication; expert in Fortitude saves

feats.name: Irradiate
feats.description: You exude an aura of radiation, making everyone around you ill.
feats.source: Pathfinder #202: Severed at the Root pg. 74

feats.name: Irrepressible
feats.description: You are easily able to ward off attempts to play on your fears and emotions.

feats.name: Irrepressible (Ganzi)
feats.description: Your slight otherworldly nature allows you to easily brush off emotional manipulation.

feats.name: Irresistible Bloom
feats.description: You bloom, sprouting flowers and releasing a pleasant smell, becoming irresistible.
feats.source: Pathfinder #202: Severed at the Root pg. 70

feats.name: Irresistible Magic
feats.description: It's Alive!
feats.prerequisites: You’ve studied ways of overcoming the innate defenses against magic that dragons, otherworldly beings, and certain other powerful creatures have.
notes: You've mastered the use of electrical energy to power your clockwork creations.

feats.name: Irriseni Ice-Witch
feats.description: You can trace your direct descent from one of the Queens of Irrisen and thus from Baba Yaga herself.

feats.name: Iruxi Armaments
feats.description: Your weapons are those you were born with.

feats.name: Iruxi Glide
feats.description: You glide slowly toward the ground, 5 feet down and up to 25 feet forward through the air.

feats.name: Iruxi Spirit Strike
feats.description: Your iruxi unarmed attacks channel the spiritual energy of your ancestors.

feats.name: Iruxi Unarmed Cunning
feats.description: You make the most of your iruxi unarmed attacks.

feats.name: It Takes a Village
feats.description: Your community bond creates better dynamics when working together.

feats.name: It Was Me All Along!
feats.description: You discard a disguise and dramatically reveal your true identity, catching your foes off guard.
feats.prerequisites: Alter Ego Dedication or Vigilante Dedication

feats.name: It's Not Over
feats.description: In the world of drama, the finale of any performance doesn’t have to be the end, and for you, this now extends to life itself.

feats.name: Ivy District Influencer
feats.description: After mingling alongside the tastemakers of the Ivy District, you understand how rumors spread through larger settlements.

feats.name: Ivy Playhouse Strike
feats.description: You've spent so many hours at the Ivy Playhouse or sparring with the Street Performers and Actors' Guild that you've picked up some stage combat techniques.

feats.name: Jagged Berms
feats.description: You conjure up to six cube-shaped mounds of packed earth.

feats.name: Jalmeri Heavenseeker Dedication
feats.description: Your skill and dedication have set you on a path to master the techniques of Jalmeray's greatest martial artists.
feats.prerequisites: Student of Perfection Dedication, or you've trained with a champion of the Challenge of Sky and Heaven
notes: Your skill and dedication have set you on a path to master the techniques of Jalmeray's greatest martial artists: victors of the Challenge of Sky and Heaven.

feats.name: Jalmeri Rakshasa Magic
feats.description: You can cast dispel magic and reaper's lantern once per day each as 2nd-level divine innate spells.

feats.name: Janatimo's Lessons
feats.description: Thanks to Janatimo's secret techniques, you can weave your knowledge and words into powerful tools to assist your allies in life-threatening situations.

feats.name: Janni Hospitality
feats.description: You can use magic to show others desert hospitality.

feats.name: Janni Magic
feats.description: The magic of jann runs through your blood.

feats.name: Jealous Grip
feats.description: You are protective of your hoard, and woe betide anyone who tries to take what’s yours.

feats.name: Jelly Body
feats.description: Some of the ooze that surrounded you made its way permanently into parts of your body, turning you soft to the touch and semitransparent enough to show bones.
feats.prerequisites: You've been reduced to 0 Hit Points while engulfed by an ooze.

feats.name: Jester's Gambol
feats.description: You adopt a stance that makes your movements carefree and sublimely unpredictable, allowing you to move past impediments with ease and resist the attacks and importunateness of natural threats.

feats.name: Jinx Glutton
feats.description: You can Eat Fortune once per hour, rather than once per day.

feats.name: Jotun's Battle Stance
feats.description: You emulate the battle stance of your forebears, allowing you to use mighty weapons to attack distant foes.

feats.name: Jotun's Boost
feats.description: Your giant might allows you to pick up your allies and hurl them across the battlefield.

feats.name: Jotun's Eyes
feats.description: Your vision has adapted to the darkness between planes.

feats.name: Jotun's Grasp
feats.description: You’ve mastered a technique that allows you to close the gap on foes and wrestle them into submission.

feats.name: Jotun's Heart
feats.description: You have unlocked the power of a true giant within you.

feats.name: Jotun's Restoration
feats.description: You’ve mastered how to tap into your restorative powers at a higher frequency.

feats.name: Jotun's Transposition
feats.description: You’ve learned to fully move across planes, beginning with the Ethereal Plane.

feats.name: Jotunborn Grappler
feats.description: Wrestling is a common pastime for jotunborn, and you’ve done your fair share.

feats.name: Jotunborn Lore
feats.description: You were taught the history of your people’s planar travels as well as the skills necessary to thrive in sub-planar environments.

feats.name: Jotunborn Weapon Familiarity
feats.description: You gain access to all uncommon weapons with the jotunborn trait.

feats.name: Journey Of the Sky Chariot
feats.description: Small wings, flaming wheels, or another signifier of flight sprout from your ikon as it gains the power to lift you from the ground.

feats.name: Judgment of the Monolith
feats.description: You can use your ka stone to compel the truth.

feats.name: Juggernaut Charge
feats.description: As you move forward in a rush, you put the weight of your armor behind an attack that can drag a foe with you.

feats.name: Juggernaut's Fortitude
feats.description: Your proficiency rank in Fortitude saves increases to master.
feats.prerequisites: Barbarian Dedication; expert in Fortitude saves

feats.name: Juggle
feats.description: You can Juggle items and still use your hands between tosses.
feats.source: Pathfinder #151: The Show Must Go On pg. 76
feats.source_book: Pathfinder #151: The Show Must Go On

feats.name: Juggler Dedication
feats.description: You become trained in Performance and gain the Juggle skill feat
feats.source: Pathfinder #151: The Show Must Go On pg. 74
feats.source_book: Pathfinder #151: The Show Must Go On

feats.name: Jumping Jenny Display
feats.description: This multi-sequence rocket blasts confetti at a series of altitudes.
feats.source: Guns & Gears (Remastered) pg. 135, Guns & Gears (Remastered) pg. 134

feats.name: Jungle Runner
feats.description: You run through the jungle as easily as you would through an open field.

feats.name: Jungle Strider
feats.description: You are adept at dodging roots, foliage, and other jungle obstacles.

feats.name: Junk Tinker
feats.description: You can make useful tools out of even twisted or rusted scraps.

feats.name: Just As Planned
feats.description: In the blink of an eye, you calculate your enemy's movements and know exactly where to aim your next blow.

feats.name: Just One More Thing
feats.description: After your attempt to influence someone goes poorly, you add another bit of information or ask a pointed question, possibly salvaging your previous attempt.

feats.name: Just the Facts
feats.description: You fundamentally understand everything to the point where your research can't possibly be wrong.

feats.name: Just the Thing!
feats.description: Need to balance on a razor's edge, force open an iron door, or persuade a dragon to negotiate? Never fear! No matter the situation, you always have just the thing.

feats.name: Just the Tool
feats.description: You temporarily change your weapon's shape to assist you in the field.

feats.name: Juvenile Flight
feats.description: You unfold your wings for travel and can keep them unfolded for 10 minutes.

feats.name: Ka Stone Ritual
feats.description: You enchant your ka stone and can use it to wield magic.
feats.prerequisites: Living Monolith Dedication; a sphinx or living monolith with this feat performs a ritual with you

feats.name: Kaiju Defense Oath
feats.description: You’ve sworn an oath to defend the helpless from dangerous titanic beasts, including kaiju that roam the surface of Golarion.

feats.name: Kaiju Stance
feats.description: Your encounter with one of the rare forces of nature known as kaiju has imbued you with knowledge of a martial art that allows you to emulate a fraction of their power.

feats.name: Kaiju's Footfalls
feats.description: You channel the might and mass of a kaiju.

feats.name: Kaleidoscopic Entreaty
feats.description: If your next action is to cast entreat spirit, you can cause that spirit to unleash a brilliant display of color, light, and sound in a 10-foot emanation centered on you.

feats.name: Kashrishi Revivification
feats.description: The well of psychic energy held within your mind can exceed the limitations of your physical body.

feats.name: Keen Follower
feats.description: Your keen observation of your allies has made you better at following their lead.

feats.name: Keen Magical Detection
feats.description: You sense magical dangers.

feats.name: Keen Nose
feats.description: Accustomed to the foul air of underground tunnels, your sense of smell is sharpened, and noxious scents are less offensive.

feats.name: Keen Recollection
feats.description: You can recall all sorts of information.

feats.name: Keep Pace
feats.description: When your hunted prey tries to bolt, you follow.
notes: Everything is connnected—all is part of the whole. Find where to add your ki and you can break the whole.
You feed off energy in your immediate surroundings, allowing you to dampen the force imparted by incoming blows.

feats.name: Keep Up Appearances
feats.description: Taldan pride means you never show weakness.

feats.name: Keep up the Good Fight
feats.description: Your commitment to protecting others keeps you going, even against insurmountable odds.

feats.name: Kholo Lore
feats.description: You paid close attention to the senior hunters in your clan to learn their tricks.

feats.name: Kholo Weapon Familiarity
feats.description: Kingdom Assurance
feats.prerequisites: You gain access to all uncommon weapons with the kholo trait.
notes: Trained in at least three skills
Receive a fixed result on a skill check

feats.name: Ki Form
feats.description: You have mastered a potent technique for using your ki to reinforce your physical form and propel yourself through the air.

feats.name: Kijimuna Whistle
feats.description: Your connection to nature—and trees, in particular—has become so strong that you can summon the plants you befriended in the forests of your youth.
feats.prerequisites: Kijimuna Gnome heritage or at least one primal innate spell from a gnome heritage or feat

feats.name: Killing Stone
feats.description: Your star orb hides a deadly miasma.

feats.name: Kin Hunter
feats.description: You’re adept at combating other supernatural creatures.

feats.name: Kindle Inner Flames
feats.description: As a candle can light another, you awaken the latent potential to channel fire in other creatures.

feats.name: Kinetic Activation
feats.description: Rather than incantations and gestures, you can use your kinetic gate to directly unlock the potential of elementally empowered magic items.

feats.name: Kinetic Pinnacle
feats.description: No one can match the pace at which elements flow from you.

feats.name: Kineticist Dedication
feats.description: You become trained in kineticist class DC and impulse attack rolls.

feats.name: Kip Up
feats.description: Master in Acrobatics
feats.campaign: Stand up for free without triggering reactions

feats.name: Kishin Rage
feats.description: Your eyes glow a deep red and your body courses with adrenaline as you obtain a fraction of the power of the kishin oni.

feats.name: Kitharodian Actor Dedication
feats.description: You’ve studied classic Taldan theater and learned to embody various roles to a sublime degree.

feats.name: Kitsune Lore
feats.description: You excel at navigating social situations and keeping secrets.

feats.name: Kitsune Spell Expertise
feats.description: Your tails show your magical mastery.

feats.name: Kitsune Spell Familiarity
