feats.description: You've picked up a few magical tricks.

feats.name: Kitsune Spell Mysteries
feats.description: You know more kitsune magic.
feats.prerequisites: at least one innate spell from a kitsune heritage or ancestry feat

feats.name: Kizidhar Magic
feats.description: You can wield the arcane magic of a kizidhar

feats.name: Klingegeist
feats.description: Your imprisonment inside a final blade used to perform countless executions has instilled in you an aptitude for entering and possessing similar sharp implements of murder.

feats.name: Kneecap
feats.description: You deliver a punishing blow to an enemy's knee, shin, or other vulnerable anatomy within your reach.

feats.name: Kneel for No God
feats.description: Your ancestors’ defiance of magic and your people’s strictly egalitarian mindset mean that certain forms of magic have little effect on you.

feats.name: Knight in Shining Armor
feats.description: As a knight in shining armor, you train daily in the heaviest armor, expanding your expertise to heavy armor.
feats.prerequisites: Knight Vigilant; expert in light armor, medium armor, or unarmored defense; trained in heavy armor

feats.name: Knight Reclaimant Dedication
feats.description: You have sworn the Crimson Oath and become a full member of the Crimson Reclaimers.
feats.prerequisites: Trained in Stealth; Trained in Survival; any non-evil alignment; member of the Knights of Lastwall of knight rank

feats.name: Knight Vigilant
feats.description: You are dedicated to the cause of the Shining Sentinels.
feats.prerequisites: Trained in Religion; any good alignment; member of the Knights of Lastwall of knight rank

feats.name: Knight's Retaliation
feats.description: You knock the enemy's blow aside and twist, unbalancing your foe.

feats.name: Knock Sense
feats.description: You attack carefully to knock some sense into a creature whose actions aren't their own.

feats.name: Knockback
feats.description: The weight of your swing drives your enemy back.

feats.name: Knockback Strike
feats.description: You focus your strength into a blow powerful enough to push an enemy away from you.

feats.name: Know it All
feats.description: Your knowledge of abstruse topics is unparalleled.
feats.source: Pathfinder #164: Hands of the Devil pg. 76

feats.name: Know Oneself
feats.description: You center yourself and call to mind the Vudrani monastic ideals of mindfulness and self-knowledge.

feats.name: Know the Beat
feats.description: You have been trained to investigate crimes.
feats.source: Pathfinder #149: Against the Scarlet Triad pg. 81
notes: Draw upon reserve funds to avoid Ruin

feats.name: Know thy Doom
feats.description: As your legend grows, details of your demise become clearer.

feats.name: Know Your Enemy
feats.description: You aim to turn knowledge into power against your foes.

feats.name: Know Your Own
feats.description: You've spent countless hours studying the history of elves on your world and beyond and are a studied expert in your people's ways.

feats.name: Know-It-All
feats.description: When you Recall Knowledge, you gain additional information or context.

feats.name: Knowledge is Power
feats.description: Your academic knowledge about a creature allows you to subtly alter your magic to defeat them.

feats.name: Knowledge of Shapes
feats.description: Inspiration lets you surpass your preconceptions of your spells' limits.

feats.name: Known Weaknesses
feats.description: Whenever you Devise a Stratagem, you can also attempt a check to Recall Knowledge as part of that action before rolling the d20.

feats.name: Kobold Breath
feats.description: You channel the power of your draconic benefactor to expel a torrent of energy from your mouth that manifests as a 30-foot line or a 15-foot cone, dealing 1d4 damage.
feats.source: Draconic Codex pg. 215, Advanced Player's Guide pg. 14
feats.source_book: Draconic Codex pg. 215, Advanced Player's Guide

feats.name: Kobold Lore
feats.description: You attentively learned key kobold survival strategies from your elders.

feats.name: Kobold Momentum
feats.description: You possess the confidence of a dragon, and your success emboldens you to draw on power reserves you didn’t know you had.

feats.name: Kobold Weapon Familiarity
feats.description: You gain access to all uncommon weapons with the kobold trait.

feats.name: Kodama Call
feats.description: The small spirits known as kodama pride themselves in taking care of trees and other vegetation, and they’ll happily come to your aid as well.

feats.name: Koi Secrets
feats.description: Due to their beautiful colors, ornamental koi are often found in parks and gardens where townsfolk roam.

feats.name: Kraken's Call
feats.description: You call forth the sleeping krakens of the deep to crush your enemies.

feats.name: Lab Rat
feats.description: You've spent more than your share of time in an alchemy lab.

feats.name: Labyrinthine Echoes
feats.description: You can make your voice reverberate off any surface.

feats.name: Land Legs
feats.description: You are comfortable on land for a short time.

feats.name: Landscape Form
feats.description: While walking down the road on a moonlit night, one might be puzzled to find a shop or hill that wasn’t there before.

feats.name: Larcenous Hand
feats.description: When you cast mage hand, you can modify it to steal an object from the target.

feats.name: Larcenous Tail
feats.description: You can perform minor mischief with your tail.

feats.name: Larger than Life (Guardian)
feats.description: When you're clad in the heaviest of armors, you have an outsized presence.

feats.name: Larger than Life (Kitsune)
feats.description: When you Change Shape, you can assume the form of a creature that’s Large or Huge in size.

feats.name: Lassoing Lash
feats.description: You quickly wrap your lash around an opponent and pull them toward you.
feats.prerequisites: Thlipit Contestant Dedication; Trained in Athletics

feats.name: Lasting Armament
feats.description: When you sanctify a weapon, it remains sanctified for an extended period.

feats.name: Lasting Coercion
feats.description: Expert in Intimidation
feats.campaign: Coerce a target into helping you longer

feats.name: Lasting Protection
feats.description: When you use Commitment to Protection, the effects on your ally apply to all attacks the creature or hazard makes.

feats.name: Lastwall Sentry Dedication
feats.description: Swear yourself as a sentry for the Knights of Lastwall.
feats.prerequisites: member of the Knights of Lastwall; Shield Block

feats.name: Lastwall Warden
feats.description: Use your shield to protect your allies.

feats.name: Late Awakener
feats.description: Whether due to a more gradual process or your animal and sapient sides being especially in conflict, your awakening was a little slower than most, but your eyes are now fully open and your abilities have returned.

feats.name: Laughing Kholo
feats.description: Your sinister giggle is a sound of warning and threat.

feats.name: Lava Leap
feats.description: You wreath yourself in molten stone and hurtle toward your enemy.

feats.name: Lavasoul
feats.description: Your elemental lineage manifests as magma and molten rock, and you can focus the magma into your hand to attack your foes.

feats.name: Lawbringer
feats.description: You trace your lineage to archons, guardians of the seventiered mountain of Heaven and nurturers of law and virtue within mortals.

feats.name: Lead by Example
feats.description: You telegraph your next attack to let your allies in on your strategy.

feats.name: Lead Climber
feats.description: When climbing, you can prepare routes for others to follow, and you can pull your allies up to avoid disaster.

feats.name: Lead Investigator
feats.description: You spend 1 minute briefing up to four allies about one of your open investigations.

feats.name: Lead the Way
feats.description: You move forward, creating an opening for others to follow.

feats.name: Leader of All
feats.description: You accept anyone who would follow you on your adventures.

feats.name: Leading Dance
feats.description: You sweep your foe into your dance.

feats.name: Leaf Transformation
feats.description: You know how to run an enterprise that others would never be able to get off the ground—some say it’s your savvy acumen or jovial manner, but you know it’s because you can cut costs by transforming leaves into money.

feats.name: Leap and Fire
feats.description: You're quick enough to line up a shot even while diving to the ground.

feats.name: Leap the Falls
feats.description: Reinforcing your legs with divine energy, you can leap the battlefield as powerfully as a salmon clearing a waterfall.

feats.name: Learn by Watching
feats.description: Before your awakening, you watched humanoids performing some skill near you frequently.

feats.name: Leave An Opening
feats.description: When you hit hard enough, you leave an opening so your ally can jump in on the action.

feats.name: Leech-Clip
feats.description: You are trained to capture deserters, or “leeches.” Make a melee Strike with weapon from the flail group.

feats.name: Left-hand Blood
feats.description: It's said that the flesh of the right side of a hyena can heal diseases, but that the flesh of the left side is deadly and poisonous.

feats.name: Legendary Codebreaker
feats.description: Legendary in Society

feats.name: Legendary Guide
feats.description: You know the wilderness so well that you can help your party travel through it with ease.

feats.name: Legendary Laugh
feats.description: Your laugher echoes in the minds of your enemies.

feats.name: Legendary Leader
feats.description: Your fame has spread throughout the lands.
feats.prerequisites: Captain Dedication; legendary in Diplomacy or Intimidation

feats.name: Legendary Linguist
feats.description: Legendary in Society; Multilingual
feats.campaign: Create pidgin languages to communicate with anyone

feats.name: Legendary Medic
feats.description: Legendary in Medicine
feats.campaign: Remove disease, blinded, deafened, doomed, or drained

feats.name: Legendary Monster
feats.description: Your yaoguai form has reached its pinnacle, allowing you to assume (or perhaps, return to) the form of a monster of legend.

feats.name: Legendary Monster Hunter
feats.description: Your knowledge of monsters is so incredible that it reveals glaring flaws in your prey.
feats.prerequisites: Legendary in Nature; Master Monster Hunter

feats.name: Legendary Negotiation
feats.description: Legendary in Diplomacy

feats.name: Legendary Performer
feats.description: Legendary in Performance; Virtuosic Performer

feats.name: Legendary Professional
feats.description: Legendary in Lore

feats.name: Legendary Shot
feats.description: You focus on your hunted prey, perceiving angles, air resistance, and every variable that would affect your ranged attack.

feats.name: Legendary Size
feats.description: The vanaras of old were tricksters able to step across wide rivers or slip into impossibly small spaces.

feats.name: Legendary Sneak
feats.description: Legendary in Stealth; Swift Sneak
feats.campaign: Hide and Sneak without cover or being concealed

feats.name: Legendary Summoner
feats.description: Your ability to summon extends past your other spellcasting.

feats.name: Legendary Survivalist
feats.description: Legendary in Survival

feats.name: Legendary Tattoo Artist
feats.description: Your craftsmanship at decorating flesh is unparalleled.

feats.name: Legendary Thief
feats.description: Legendary in Thievery; Pickpocket
feats.campaign: Steal what would normally be impossible to steal

feats.name: Legion's Aim
feats.description: Long hours of experimentation with the Platinum Wing have familiarized you with experimental weaponry.

feats.name: Legs of Stone
feats.description: You gain a +2 status bonus to your Fortitude and Reflex DCs against attempts to Shove or Trip you.

feats.name: Lengthy Diversion
feats.description: Trained in Deception
feats.campaign: Remain hidden after you Create a Diversion

feats.name: Lepidstadt Surgeon Dedication
feats.description: Before everything else, before the blood and the monsters and the Stasian technology and the horror, you are a doctor.
feats.prerequisites: Trained in Medicine; attended the University of Lepidstadt

feats.name: Leshy Familiar
feats.description: You call a minor spirit of nature into a plant body, creating a leshy companion to aid you in your spellcasting.

feats.name: Leshy Familiar Secrets
feats.description: The leaf order’s secrets allow your familiar to take advantage of its leshy form.

feats.name: Leshy Glide
feats.description: Using your own leaves, you can control your descent.
feats.prerequisites: Leaf Leshy heritage or Cat Fall

feats.name: Leshy Lore
feats.description: You deeply understand your people’s cultural traditions and innate strengths.

feats.name: Leshy Superstition
feats.description: You notice spirits that inhabit objects, learning which bring good fortune and which are unlucky.

feats.name: Lesser Augmentation
feats.description: You've focused on enhancing yourself and have received an improvement to one of your existing abilities.

feats.name: Lesser Enhance Venom
feats.description: Your venom grows deadlier and more plentiful.

feats.name: Lesson of Bonded Eyes
feats.description: You and your student share an understanding of your surroundings.

feats.name: Lesson of Mutual Gambits
feats.description: You create an opening for your student, setting them up for their own attack.

feats.name: Lesson of Sympathetic Vulnerability
feats.description: You temporarily borrow the essence of your student's attack to infuse yourself.

feats.name: Lesson of the Broken Wing
feats.description: You make yourself appear to be a tempting target to draw an enemy in, distracting them from your student's attacks.

feats.name: Lesson of the Circling Gale
feats.description: You and your student have trained with footwork drills to mirror each other's movements.

feats.name: Lesson of the Hurricane's Might
feats.description: You and your student enact a graceful dance of battle.

feats.name: Lesson of the Splintered Aegis
feats.description: With your attack, you demonstrate to your student a hole in your enemy's defenses.

feats.name: Lesson of Unified Elusion
feats.description: You and your student react as one to common threats.

feats.name: Lessons of Flux
feats.description: You apply the persistence and permutation taught by faydhaans to your failures.

feats.name: Let my Creature Live!
feats.description: You continue to tinker with your creation’s muscles and rudimentary mind, granting it a limited form of autonomy.

feats.name: Let's Try That Again
feats.description: You feel a sense of deja vu when you’ve made a mistake, almost as if you weren’t so careless in a past life and could certainly do better if given another chance.

feats.name: Lethal Edge
feats.description: When the terrified are struck by your spectral weapon, they feel the anguish of every life taken by Silent Lenore.
notes: You zoom from enemy to enemy, striking each in an instant.

feats.name: Lethal Finisher
feats.description: You stab your foe in a vital organ, possibly killing them outright.

feats.name: Lethargy Poisoner
feats.description: You've learned more than the use of hand crossbows.
feats.prerequisites: Crossbow Infiltrator Dedication; Trained in Crafting

feats.name: Leverage Anguish
feats.description: You leverage your emotional turmoil to mend your physical form.

feats.name: Leverage Connections
feats.description: You know the right people who can get things done for you in certain circles.
feats.prerequisites: Courtly Graces or Streetwise; Expert in Society

feats.name: Levered Swing
feats.description: You can wrap your lash around a tree branch or railing, then pull yourself where you need to go.
feats.prerequisites: Thlipit Contestant Dedication; Master in Athletics

feats.name: Levering Strike
feats.description: Strike your foe and make them unbalanced
feats.source: Pathfinder #151: The Show Must Go On pg. 75
feats.source_book: Pathfinder #151: The Show Must Go On

feats.name: Ley Line Conduit
feats.description: You can draw magic from the ley lines of the world.

feats.name: Liberate Soul
feats.description: The light flows from your sigil of Pharasma to shatter the bonds imprisoning a soul.

feats.name: Liberated Mind
feats.description: Your mind won't be held hostage by those who would seek to control you.

feats.name: Liberty's Devotion
feats.description: You've deepened your connection with the ideals of Andoran.

feats.name: Liberty's Promise
feats.description: Your devotion to Andoran's ideals is as much spiritual as philosophical.

feats.name: Lich Dedication
feats.description: After years of study and careful planning, you finally completed a soul cage to house your soul and successfully performed a ritual to transform yourself into a lich.
feats.prerequisites: Expert in Crafting; living creature, ability to cast 6th-level or higher spells from spell slots, completed ritual to become a lich and crafted a soul cage

feats.name: Lie Detector
feats.description: You're adept at noticing the tells of a liar—sweat, flushing, a quavering voice, a quickening pulse.

feats.name: Lie to Me
feats.description: Trained in Deception

feats.name: Life Leap
feats.description: You phase through a space that a living creature occupies in a flash, spontaneously appearing on the opposite side of it in a vibrant display of colorful light.

feats.name: Life's Blood
feats.description: Your journey to enlightenment has made your blood possess nigh-immortal properties, allowing you to heal others.

feats.name: Life-Giving Magic
feats.description: The upwelling of innate magic refreshes your body.

feats.name: Lifeblood's Call
feats.description: The impulse to survive and continue fighting resonates deep within you.

feats.name: Lifelink Surge
feats.description: You learn the lifelink surge link spell.

feats.name: Lifesense
feats.description: You have a limited ability to sense life force, like your psychopomp forebears.

feats.name: Light of Revelation
feats.description: You’ve learned to call upon light to reveal what is hidden.

feats.name: Light Paws
feats.description: You can balance on your toes to step carefully over obstructions.

feats.name: Light Step
feats.description: You aren’t bothered by tricky footing.

feats.name: Light-bending Jewel
feats.description: Your ability to walk unseen through the world has given you the new moon’s blessing.

feats.name: Lighter than Air
feats.description: Your mysterious steps become even lighter, transcending the mortal world altogether.

feats.name: Lightless Litheness
feats.description: Your body is almost as flexible as your shadow.

feats.name: Lightning Dash
feats.description: For an instant, you transform yourself into a being of pure lightning and fly forward, shocking anyone in your way.

feats.name: Lightning Qi
feats.description: Qi flows freely from within you.

feats.name: Lightning Rings' Intervention
feats.description: Your familiar learns to empower spells with an electrical discharge.

feats.name: Lightning Rings' Overcharge
feats.description: Your familiar can adopt an electrical form to empower weapon strikes.
feats.prerequisites: Familiar Sage Dedication; Lightning Rings' Intervention

feats.name: Lightning Rod
feats.description: You smash a metal rod into your foe and call lightning to it.

feats.name: Lightning Swap
feats.description: You have practiced quickly switching between combat styles and the equipment needed for them.

feats.name: Lightning Tongue
feats.description: Your tongue darts out faster than the eye can see to retrieve loose objects.

feats.name: Like a Roach
feats.description: Living with the bare necessities isn’t terribly hard for someone who has defied death, and like a cockroach, you always know how to survive.

feats.name: Lingering Breath
feats.description: Your draconic breath destroys the surrounding environment and leaves your enemies in pain.

feats.name: Lingering Chill
feats.description: The chill of ice entered your veins and never left, adjusting the internal temperature of your body.
feats.prerequisites: You've been brought to 0 Hit Points by an enemy that has the cold trait or an enemy's ability that has the cold trait.

feats.name: Lingering Composition
feats.description: By adding a flourish, you make your compositions last longer.

feats.name: Lingering Echoes
feats.description: Not everyone is reincarnated, and you feel a strong connection with the spiritual echoes of those who didn’t receive the same opportunity as you.

feats.name: Lingering Flames
feats.description: When you cast fireball, you can modify its effects to set creatures in its area aflame.
feats.prerequisites: Spell Trickster Dedication; ability to cast fireball

feats.name: Linguistic Revival
feats.description: You achieved fluency in different languages with each reincarnation, and your brain remembers much of the grammar, idioms, and obscenities that you spouted in old lives.

feats.name: Link Focus
feats.description: Your focus recovers faster.

feats.name: Link Wellspring
feats.description: Your bond replenishes your focus.

feats.name: Linked Focus
feats.description: You have linked your bonded item to the well of energy that powers your school spells.

feats.name: Lion Blade Dedication
feats.description: Your Lion Blade spy training helps you conceal yourself and your identity.
feats.prerequisites: member of the Lion Blades; Trained in Performance

feats.name: Lion's Fury
feats.description: You gain access to the lion scythe's and sun sling's critical specialization effects.
feats.source: Pathfinder #172: Secrets of the Temple City pg. 79
feats.source_book: Pathfinder #172: Secrets of the Temple City

feats.name: Lion's Magic
feats.description: Many Lion Blades enhance their words with a bit of magic.

feats.name: Lion's Might
feats.description: You've trained with the weapons of the Bright Lions.
feats.source: Pathfinder #172: Secrets of the Temple City pg. 79
feats.source_book: Pathfinder #172: Secrets of the Temple City

feats.name: Listener's Boon
feats.description: Isthralei has given you a gift to assist you on your journey.

feats.name: Litany of Depravity
feats.description: You undercut your enemy's vain moralism, opening their heart to evil.

feats.name: Litany of Self-Interest
feats.description: You compel a creature to act toward its own ends rather than consider others.

feats.name: Live Ammunition
feats.description: There are generally few things as ill-advised as being shot out of a cannon or launched by a trebuchet, but people use the tactic every so often in a desperate situation.

feats.name: Live the Creed
feats.description: You’ve become an unparalleled figure among your faith, able to align your divine abilities with unparalleled swiftness.

feats.name: Living Bonfire
feats.description: Roots and branches of living wood writhe in elemental fire at your command, forming a bonfire fearsome enough to scare off predators in the night.

feats.name: Living for the Applause
feats.description: Nothing can stop you as long as you have an audience cheering you on.

feats.name: Living God
feats.description: You have reached heights of power equaling Razmir’s himself.
feats.prerequisites: Razmiran Priest Dedication; Legendary in Crafting

feats.name: Living Monolith Dedication
feats.description: Begin to process to become a living monolith.
feats.prerequisites: Ancient Osiriani and Sphinx languages; Trained in Crafting

feats.name: Living Rune
feats.description: You’ve bridged a connection between the runes on your body and the magic of runestones, allowing you to place an armor rune on your living flesh.

feats.name: Living Stone
feats.description: Your body becomes living stone.
feats.source: Pathfinder #195: Heavy is the Crown pg. 83

feats.name: Living Vessel Dedication
feats.description: Whether willingly or not, you've become a vessel for a being of unimaginable power.

feats.name: Living Weapon
feats.description: You've learned to use part of your form as a weapon.

feats.name: Lizardfolk Lore
feats.description: You listened carefully to the tales passed down among your community.

feats.name: Loaner Spell
feats.description: During your daily preparations, you can gain the assistance of an allied prepared spellcaster to prepare one spell for the day.
feats.prerequisites: Trained in Arcana, Trained in Nature, Trained in Occultism, or Trained in Religion

feats.name: Lobbed Attack
feats.description: Make an unexpected ranged attack with a Juggled item.
feats.source: Pathfinder #151: The Show Must Go On pg. 74
feats.source_book: Pathfinder #151: The Show Must Go On

feats.name: Lock Down
feats.description: You attack an enemy to ensure they can't move beyond your reach.

feats.name: Lock On
feats.description: Aha! You lock on to your enemy's weak point to assist your construct companion in destroying it.

feats.name: Log Roll
feats.description: You shuffle your feet to dislodge the surface beneath you or otherwise cause your opponent to become unsteady.

feats.name: Lonely Army
feats.description: You move and attack with deadly silence, unbelievable speed, and unlimited ferocity.

feats.name: Long Tongue
feats.description: You've learned to stretch your exceptionally long tongue beyond its original limits.

feats.name: Long-distance Taunt
feats.description: You can draw the wrath of your foes even at a great distance.

feats.name: Long-Nosed Form
feats.description: You transform into a specific, curious-looking human form.

feats.name: Look Again
feats.description: If your illusions or enchantments fail to ensnare the minds of others, you can cast them again.

feats.name: Look but Don't Touch
feats.description: Many flowers are beautiful to look upon but deadly to touch—and you're one of them.

feats.name: Loose Cannon
feats.description: Your unpredictable gunfire often catches enemies off guard or hits unprotected areas.
feats.source: Pathfinder #178: Punks in a Powderkeg pg. 78

feats.name: Lore Seeker
feats.description: You see what others don’t, and you’ve developed magical tricks to find hidden truth.

feats.name: Lorefinder
feats.description: You know that fate sometimes conspires to keep dangerous knowledge or items from the eyes of those most able to understand them.
feats.source: Pathfinder #164: Hands of the Devil pg. 76

feats.name: Loremaster's Etude
feats.description: You magically unlock memories, making them easier to recall.

feats.name: Lost in the Crowd
feats.description: You’ve learned how to move as one with crowds and hide among them, vanishing into a busy street in the flicker of an eye.

feats.name: Lotus Above the Mud
feats.description: Your qi, dancing ever diligently toward cultivation, eludes the grasp of the world’s muck and mire.

feats.name: Loud Singer
feats.description: Staying on pitch, proper breath control, and remembering the words are all less important than the real measure of a good singer: volume!

feats.name: Loyal Empath
feats.description: You have incredible empathy for your friends and family, and you have an innate timing for helping others in distress.

feats.name: Loyal Warhorse
feats.description: The loyalty you and your mount share is unbreakable.

feats.name: Luck of the Clowder
feats.description: When you use Cat's Luck to reroll, any creatures you choose within 10 feet who also just failed against the same effect (such as a single spell) can also reroll their saving throws and use the better result.

feats.name: Lucky Break
feats.description: You are luckier even than most catfolk.

feats.name: Lucky Escape
feats.description: Unexpected Sharpshooter Dedication
feats.campaign: Force your foe to reroll the triggering attack

feats.name: Lucky Keepsake
feats.description: You have a keepsake that grants you luck.

feats.name: Lunge
feats.description: You attack an enemy at the edge of your reach.

feats.name: Lunging Spellstrike
feats.description: Your spell unwinds the structure of your staff to make it exceptionally long, or even separate it into shards held together by magical power.

feats.name: Lunging Stance
feats.description: Your body coiled to strike, you can lash out at distant enemies.

feats.name: Lurching Chomp
feats.description: Through your wiles, charm, or a little bit of magic, you lure in a foe for a closer look—and a quick bite!

feats.name: Macabre Virtuoso
feats.description: Any necromancer can create zombie and skeleton, but you know the secrets behind the creation of far more advanced undead monstrosities.
feats.prerequisites: Reanimator Dedication; Expert in Arcana, Expert in Occultism, or Expert in Religion

feats.name: Made for Combat
feats.description: You can use your body as a deadly weapon.

feats.name: Maelstrom Flow
feats.description: You pour energy into an improvised weapon, speeding its destruction to grant it power.

feats.name: Magaambyan Attendant Dedication
feats.description: You devote much of your study to halcyon magic.
feats.prerequisites: Trained in Arcana or Trained in Nature; member of the Magaambya of attendant rank

feats.name: Mage Hunter
feats.description: You use your hatred of magic to lash out at a known spellcaster.

feats.name: Mage's Field Dressing
feats.description: As your spell takes hold on your ally, you use some of its magic to quickly dress their wounds.

feats.name: Magic Hands
feats.description: The blessing of your deity heightens your healing ability, integrating magical healing with the mundane.

feats.name: Magic Rider
feats.description: Your people used powerful magic to travel between distant worlds in the distant past, and the remnants of that magic make such transportation easier for you.

feats.name: Magic Sense
feats.description: You have a literal sixth sense for ambient magic in your vicinity.
feats.source: Player Core pg. 204, Player Core 2 pg. 142

feats.name: Magic Warrior Aspect
feats.description: You can alter your form to gain an aspect of the animal your mask represents.

feats.name: Magic Warrior Dedication
feats.description: You have taken up a nameless mask and sworn the oath of the magic warriors.

feats.name: Magic Warrior Transformation
feats.description: You can transform fully into the animal your mask represents.

feats.name: Magical Adept
feats.description: Your eidolon gains more magic.

feats.name: Magical Crafting
feats.description: Expert in Crafting

feats.name: Magical Knowledge
feats.description: Increase your proficiency rank in one of Arcana, Nature, Occultism, or Religion.
feats.prerequisites: Thaumaturge Dedication; trained in at least one of Arcana, Nature, Occultism, or Religion and expert in at least one other

feats.name: Magical Master
feats.description: Your eidolon gains a bevy of lower-level spells.

feats.name: Magical Resistance
feats.description: Your animating magic provides some defense.

feats.name: Magical Scholastics
feats.description: While study is key to your success, a bit of magic can be a helpful aid in discovering the secrets of the past.

feats.name: Magical Shorthand
feats.description: Expert in Arcana, Expert in Nature, Expert in Occultism, or Expert in Religion
feats.campaign: Learn spells quickly and at a reduced cost

feats.name: Magical Understudy
feats.description: Your eidolon evolves to cast spells.

feats.name: Magitaxis
feats.description: You move reflexively toward the source of magic you most consumed as a larva.

feats.name: Magnetic Field
feats.description: A magnetic field surrounds you.

feats.name: Magnetic Pinions
feats.description: Small pieces of metal fly from you, propelled with magnetism at great velocity.

feats.name: Magpie Manor Recovery
feats.description: Though you're hardly ready to retire from the social life, you appreciate the luxury the older wealthy elite enjoy within the private social club of Magpie Manor in Absalom's Petal District.

feats.name: Magpie Snatch
feats.description: You move quickly, snatching a shiny item that catches your eye.

feats.name: Magus Dedication
feats.description: You cast spells like a magus, gaining a spellbook with four common arcane cantrips of your choice.

feats.name: Magus's Analysis
feats.description: You make an assessment informed by your knowledge of how a creature fights.

feats.name: Maiden's Mending
feats.description: You can tap into some of the magic that flows through your blood to give you new life.

feats.name: Majestic Presence
feats.description: By taking an impressive stance, the full force of your personality cows lesser beings.

feats.name: Majestic Proclamation
feats.description: You announce your name to your enemies, bringing your constellation to bear in a blinding display.

feats.name: Major Deific Power
feats.description: As your apotheosis into living godhood approaches, you accrue the strongest of divine power.

feats.name: Major Lesson
feats.description: Your patron grants you even greater secrets.

feats.name: Make 'em Sweat
feats.description: Your line of questioning lets a suspect know you can see right through them, shaking them to the core.
notes: Fists of the Ruby Phoenix Hardcover pg. 223, Pathfinder #167: Ready? Fight! pg. 77
You instantly tap into the magical power of a spell you're casting to quickly pounce around the battlefield.

feats.name: Make Do
feats.description: You sometimes need to act in a pinch, even if you haven't had the time to repair your gear.

feats.name: Maker of Miracles
feats.description: You are a conduit for truly deific power.

feats.name: Malleable Form
feats.description: You adroitly shift your form, taking on another appearance.
feats.prerequisites: ability to cast at least one polymorph spell

feats.name: Malleable Mental Forge
feats.description: You open your mind to further weapon customization.

feats.name: Malleable Movement
feats.description: You shift the shape of your weapon to help you Leap farther and faster.
feats.prerequisites: Mind Smith Dedication; Expert in Athletics

feats.name: Mammoth Charge
feats.description: You Command an Animal to order your megafauna companion to Stride twice.

feats.name: Mammoth Lord Dedication
feats.description: You've undertaken the ultimate challenge of the Mammoth Lords and tamed a megafauna.

feats.name: Manifold Conduit
feats.description: You can manifest multiple spirits at once in a cyclone around you.

feats.name: Manifold Edge
feats.description: You’ve learned to leverage every possible edge.

feats.name: Manifold Modifications
feats.description: You've modified your innovation using clever workarounds, so you can include another initial modification without compromising its structure.

feats.name: Manipulative Charm
feats.description: Against humanoids, you gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Deception checks to Lie, and to Diplomacy checks to Gather Information and Make an Impression.
feats.prerequisites: Vampire Dedication; Trained in Deception or Trained in Diplomacy
feats.campaign: Once per day, you can cast charm as a divine innate spell using your class DC or spell DC, whichever is higher.

feats.name: Mantis Form
feats.description: Basic Red Mantis Magic
feats.campaign: You gain the mantis form focus spell

feats.name: Many Faces
feats.description: Putting on a new face offers a great way to get a fresh perspective on life.

feats.name: Many Guises
feats.description: You can use Shifting Faces three times per day instead of once per day.

feats.name: March of Law
feats.description: When faced with lawbreakers, you become almost unstoppable, and your purposeful steps instill terror.

feats.name: March the Mines
feats.description: You march through the earth and lead an ally along.

feats.name: Marid Magic
feats.description: You channel the magic of marids.

feats.name: Marine Ally
feats.description: You've befriended a sea creature, which becomes magically bonded to you.

feats.name: Mariner's Fire
feats.description: You conjure uncanny orbs of spiritual flame that float above or below the water's surface.

feats.name: Mark of The Sage
feats.description: Your ikon gains a pin, stripe, or similar marking showing you as a master of your craft.

feats.name: Marked For Rebuke
feats.description: You declare that an enemy is fit for further punishment in the sight of your deity.

feats.name: Marsh Runner
feats.description: When you use the Step action, you can ignore difficult terrain caused by flooding, swamps, or quicksand.

feats.name: Martial Experience
feats.description: You've crossed blades with a wide variety of foes wielding a wide variety of weapons, and you've learned the basics of fighting with nearly any of them.

feats.name: Martial Performance
feats.description: Your muse has taught you how to handle a wider variety of weapons than most bards, empowering you to effortlessly blend your performance into combat tools.

feats.name: Martyr
feats.description: Martyr's Parry
feats.prerequisites: You go to extreme lengths to support your allies, even when it means bringing harm to yourself.
notes: You intercede to absorb the triggering attack.

feats.name: Mask Familiar
feats.description: Your mask takes on a personality of its own, allowing it to serve as your familiar.

feats.name: Mask of Fear
feats.description: Your warmask burns off of your face, releasing your apprehension.

feats.name: Mask of Pain
feats.description: Your mask has grown into a manifestation of your pain, which you can release.

feats.name: Mask of Power
feats.description: Your warmask sharpens your connection to the source of your mask's power.

feats.name: Mask of Rejection
feats.description: Your warmask projects a white-hot fury that attempts to vaporize the offending magic.

feats.name: Mask of The 12th Step
feats.description: You have reached the 12th Step and been instructed in greater secrets of Razmir’s doctrine.
feats.prerequisites: Razmiran Priest Dedication; Expert in Crafting

feats.name: Mask of The 15th Step
feats.description: You have ascended to the 15th Step and stand among the greatest of Razmir’s priests.
feats.prerequisites: Razmiran Priest Dedication; Master in Crafting

feats.name: Masked Casting (Lvl 8) #1
feats.description: You harness the magical energy flowing through your eyeless mask to effortlessly protect you from visual effects.

feats.name: Masked Casting (Lvl 8) #2
feats.description: You harness the magical energy flowing through your eyeless mask to effortlessly protect you from visual effects.

feats.name: Masquerade of Seasons Stance
feats.description: You have mastered the opening steps to the Masquerade of Seasons, a dance that channels the power of spring, summer, winter, and autumn.

feats.name: Mass Delusion
feats.description: You wave around fabricated evidence that contradicts what your enemies know to be true.

feats.name: Master Animist Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the master spellcasting benefits as a prepared divine caster.
feats.prerequisites: Expert Animist Spellcasting; Legendary in Religion

feats.name: Master Bard Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the master spellcasting benefits.
feats.prerequisites: Expert Bard Spellcasting; Legendary in Occultism

feats.name: Master Beast Gunner Spellcasting
feats.description: You've learned the final truth of beast guns, making you a master in the magic they grant you.
feats.prerequisites: Expert Beast Gunner Spellcasting or Expert Wizard Spellcasting

feats.name: Master Captivator Spellcasting
feats.description: You master the most powerful spells that enchant and deceive.

feats.name: Master Cathartic Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the master spellcasting benefits.

feats.name: Master Cleric Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the master spellcasting benefits.
feats.prerequisites: Expert Cleric Spellcasting; Legendary in Religion

feats.name: Master Druid Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the master spellcasting benefits.
feats.prerequisites: Expert Druid Spellcasting; Legendary in Nature

feats.name: Master Magus Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the master bounded spellcasting benefits.
feats.prerequisites: Expert Magus Spellcasting; Legendary in Arcana;

feats.name: Master Merchant
feats.description: Kalistrade teaches that setbacks are only temporary and that perseverance is a treasured virtue.

feats.name: Master Monster Hunter
feats.description: You have a nearly encyclopedic knowledge of all creatures of the world.

feats.name: Master of Apprentice
feats.description: Teaching is a difficult art form, but you've gotten a pretty good handle on it.
feats.prerequisites: Master in Crafting, Master in Performance, or Master in a Lore skill

feats.name: Master of Many Styles
feats.description: You move fluidly between stances, using your mastery of combat to always adopt the best tactics.
feats.source: Player Core pg. 150, Core Rulebook pg. 165, Player Core 2 pg. 126
feats.source_book: Player Core pg. 150, Core Rulebook pg. 165, Player Core 2

feats.name: Master of the Dead
feats.description: You have reached the pinnacle of the reanimator's craft: the ability to raise nearly any corpse or skeleton as a gruesome mockery of the creature it once was.

feats.name: Master Oracle Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the master spellcasting benefits.
feats.prerequisites: Expert Oracle Spellcasting; Legendary in Religion

feats.name: Master Prophet Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the master spellcasting benefits.
feats.prerequisites: Expert Prophet Spellcasting; Legendary in Society

feats.name: Master Psychic Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the master spellcasting benefits.
feats.prerequisites: Expert Psychic Spellcasting; Legendary in Occultism

feats.name: Master Qi Spells
feats.description: You have achieved near-total mastery of your qi.

feats.name: Master Red Mantis Magic
feats.description: You gain the master spellcasting benefits.
feats.prerequisites: Legendary in Religion; Basic Red Mantis Magic

feats.name: Master Rivethun Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the master spellcasting benefits.
feats.prerequisites: Expert Rivethun Spellcasting; Legendary in Religion
notes: You have unlocked the deeper magic of your gelid shard, gaining access to new levels of spells.

feats.name: Master Siege Engineer
feats.description: What you don't know about artillery isn't worth knowing and your mastery allows you to perform an impossible number of actions as part of a siege weapon's crew.

feats.name: Master Skysage Divination
feats.description: You unlock the most powerful secrets hidden in the stars above.

feats.name: Master Sorcerer Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the master spellcasting benefits.
feats.prerequisites: Expert Sorcerer Spellcasting; legendary in Arcana, Nature, Occultism, or Religion, depending on bloodline

feats.name: Master Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the master spellcasting archetype benefits.

feats.name: Master Spotter (Lvl 12) #1
feats.description: Your incredible perception and trusty enhanced visual gear allow you to see things others miss.

feats.name: Master Spotter (Lvl 12) #2
feats.description: Your proficiency rank in Perception increases to master.

feats.name: Master Spotter (Ranger)
feats.description: Your proficiency rank in Perception increases to master.

feats.name: Master Summoner
feats.description: During daily preparations, you can designate one of your spell slots to become two summoning slots of the same spell level, from which you can cast only summoning or incarnate spells.

feats.name: Master Summoner Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the master bounded spellcasting benefits.
feats.prerequisites: Expert Summoner Spellcasting; legendary in the skill associated with your eidolon's tradition

feats.name: Master Witch Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the master spellcasting benefits.
feats.prerequisites: Expert Witch Spellcasting; legendary in the skill associated with your patron's tradition

feats.name: Master Wizard Spellcasting
feats.description: You gain the master spellcasting benefits.
feats.prerequisites: Expert Wizard Spellcasting; Legendary in Arcana

feats.name: Masterful Companion
feats.description: Your animal companion shares your incredible hunting skills, allowing it to take down your shared prey with ease.

feats.name: Masterful Warden
feats.description: Your mastery of warden magic increases.

feats.name: Mastermind's Eye
feats.description: When you identify a creature with Recall Knowledge, that creature is flat-footed to you.
feats.source: Pathfinder #166: Despair on Danger Island pg. 78

feats.name: Mated Birds in Paired Flight
feats.description: Your ikons bond like a pair of one-winged birds.

feats.name: Mature Animal Companion (Druid)
feats.description: Your animal companion has grown up over the course of your adventures, becoming a mature animal companion and gaining additional capabilities (page 211).

feats.name: Mature Animal Companion (Ranger)
feats.description: Your animal companion becomes a mature animal companion and gains additional capabilities (page 211).

feats.name: Mature Dragon Companion
feats.description: Your dragon companion matures and the bond you share is strengthened.

feats.name: Mature Megafauna Companion
feats.description: You've raised your megafauna companion to be a more powerful force on the battlefield than most of its kind.

feats.name: Mature Trained Companion
feats.description: Your animal companion grows up, becoming a mature animal companion.
feats.source: Pathfinder #152: Legacy of the Lost God pg. 76
feats.source_book: Pathfinder #152: Legacy of the Lost God

feats.name: May Death Itself Reconsider
feats.description: Your will is so steadfast that even death can’t stop you.

feats.name: Meddling Futures
feats.description: You open yourself to the guidance of whatever spirits or powers deign to help you.

feats.name: Medical Researcher
feats.description: Kassi has taught you not only how to apply medicines with your medical skills but how to craft them as well.

feats.name: Meditate on This!
feats.description: You meditate to alter your qi, coloring it with your resentment and anger.
feats.prerequisites: Trained in Medicine or Tian Xia Lore

feats.name: Meditative Focus
feats.description: Your meditation is so effective that you can achieve a deep focus with the world around you.

feats.name: Medium's Awareness
feats.description: Your apparitions watch over you.

feats.name: Mega Bomb
feats.description: You can add a highly explosive additive to an alchemical bomb to turn it into a mega bomb.

feats.name: Megafauna Veterinarian
feats.description: By heeding the wise advice of elders in your following— and aided by your own experience—you've learned how to provide medical care to the megafauna of the Mammoth Lord followings.
feats.prerequisites: Mammoth Lord Dedication; Expert in Nature

feats.name: Megaton Strike
feats.description: You activate gears, explosives, and other hidden mechanisms in your innovation to make a powerful attack.

feats.name: Megavolt
feats.description: You bleed off some electric power from your innovation in the shape of a damaging bolt.

feats.name: Meld into Eidolon
feats.description: Your physical form can combine with that of your eidolon, granting benefits but limiting your capabilities.

feats.name: Melodious Spell
feats.description: You subtly weave your spellcasting into a performance.

feats.name: Memory of Mastery
feats.description: Flashes of past selves surface in an instant, especially when you’re under duress.

feats.name: Memory of Skill
feats.description: Your years of training in a previous life didn’t go to waste with your death, and you can call upon this training when you most need it.

feats.name: Menacing Prowess
feats.description: Scaring off multiple people at once is your specialty.
feats.prerequisites: Golden League Xun Dedication; Expert in Intimidation

feats.name: Mental Balm
feats.description: Your spells release soothing mental waves.

feats.name: Mental Buffer
feats.description: Your mind deflects some amount of harm from attacks that induce pain or manipulate your mind directly.

feats.name: Mental Forge
feats.description: Your experiences in combat shape your mind's capability to strengthen and shape your weapon to match the way you move in combat.

feats.name: Mental Static
feats.description: Your thoughts sting back when a lesser mind tries to invade your own.

feats.name: Mental Sustenance
feats.description: You can sustain yourself with the power of your mind.

feats.name: Mentor of Legends
feats.description: You're an extraordinary teacher, capable of inspiring your students to amazing feats of athletics and ingenuity.

feats.name: Mercenary Motivation
feats.description: A large part of being in the Mercenary League entails doing mercenary work.

feats.name: Mercenary Reversal
feats.description: Mighty Bear
feats.prerequisites: Even though the fight seems to be surging against you and your compatriots, you know that a key ally can always turn the tide.
notes: The power of the bear within you can expand your physical presence even further.

feats.name: Merciless Rend
feats.description: Your eidolon rends its foes.

feats.name: Mercy
feats.description: Your touch soothes the body or mind.

feats.name: Merfolk Lore
feats.description: You paid close attention to your lessons in school.

feats.name: Merfolk Weapon Familiarity
feats.description: You were taught the most effective weapons of the sea.

feats.name: Merge with the Source
feats.description: You're among the most powerful of Speakers and can adopt the form of the spirits you entreat with.
feats.prerequisites: Speaker in Training or Budding Speaker Centaur heritage

feats.name: Metabolic Control
feats.description: You're able to better control your body's metabolism to preserve energy.

feats.name: Metabolize Element
feats.description: Your rapidly metabolize the elemental particles in your opponent's spell to gain a boost of energy.

feats.name: Metal Carapace
feats.description: Sheets of bent and rusted metal cover you in an armored shell.

feats.name: Metal-Veined Strikes
feats.description: Metallic veins grow throughout your body, giving your unarmed attacks a metallic sheen.

feats.name: Metallic Envisionment
feats.description: You always account for every weakness, allowing your mind to imagine just the right physical form to take advantage of your opponents.

feats.name: Metallic Skin
feats.description: You fortify your natural resistances with elemental metal, covering your skin with thick metal.

feats.name: Meteoric Spellstrike
feats.description: A trail of energy flows from your target back to you.

feats.name: Methodical Debilitations
feats.description: You strategically craft your debilitations to lessen or negate an enemy’s tactical advantages.

feats.name: Methodical Magic
feats.description: You can reorder the world with your magic.

feats.name: Meticulous Restorer
feats.description: Waste not, want not; your steady eye allows you to restore craftwork quickly while conserving valuable material.

feats.name: Mighty Dragonet
feats.description: You’ve grown especially large and now tower over your fellow dragonets.

feats.name: Mighty Wings
feats.description: Your dragon wings are now a permanent part of your body, giving you a fly Speed equal to your Speed.
feats.prerequisites: Dragon Disciple Dedication; dragon wings sorcerer bloodline spell

feats.name: Mimic Protections
feats.description: By adopting resonant reflections, you have learned to copy the abilities of other creatures as well.

feats.name: Mind over Matter
feats.description: Your mind’s limits are only what you imagine them to be.

feats.name: Mind Projectiles
feats.description: You've learned to stretch your mind's influence further, releasing projectiles with a swing of your mind weapon.

feats.name: Mind Shards
feats.description: With a swing and a thought, you detonate your mind weapon into a burst of psychic shards that shred the mind.

feats.name: Mind Smith Dedication
feats.description: You've learned to imagine a shape in your mind, to envision it so strongly it takes form in the material world.

feats.name: Mineral Deposits
feats.description: Precious metals from your bloodstream line your claws, jaws, or the tip of your tail, and you’re able call upon your blood to surge and empower your attacks.

feats.name: Miniaturize
feats.description: Your eidolon can shrink even further.

feats.name: Minor Deific Power
feats.description: Your mental, physical, and spiritual training have granted you access to divine magic that doesn't rely on any other deity or patron.

feats.name: Minor Omen
feats.description: The stars warn you of danger in the nick of time.

feats.name: Minotaur Lore
feats.description: You were raised in a minotaur enclave or have spent a great deal of time studying your culture and ancestry.

feats.name: Minotaur Weapon Familiarity
feats.description: Your elders taught you to wield weapons that can split skulls and smash through shields.

feats.name: Minuscule Mentee
feats.description: You’ve found a fellow poppet on the cusp of awakening and decided to help.

feats.name: Miracle Worker
feats.description: Your alchemical mastery can resuscitate the recently slain.

feats.name: Miraculous Flight
feats.description: With superior engineering and magical application, you have freed your signature vehicle from the bonds of gravity, allowing it to soar through the sky like a dragon.

feats.name: Miraculous Intervention
feats.description: Through divine intervention or whispered prayers, you foil an enemy's response.

feats.name: Miraculous Medic
feats.description: Your ability to heal others is miraculous enough to bring people back from near-death.

feats.name: Miraculous Possibility
feats.description: Your deity empowers you to perform minor miracles, allowing you to readily adapt to the fluctuating needs of your duties.

feats.name: Miraculous Repair
feats.description: Geniekin can't grant magical wishes, but some echo of power lingers within you.

feats.name: Miresoul
feats.description: You have a connection to the muddier denizens of the Plane of Earth from its border with the Plane of Water, and your elemental lineage manifests as clay or mud, reflecting that bond.

feats.name: Mirror Refuge
feats.description: Your origin in the space behind mirrors enables you to use a mirror as a hideaway, like the spell one with stone.

feats.name: Mirror Shield
feats.description: You reflect the spell back against its caster.

feats.name: Mirror-Risen
feats.description: You were created from magic involving mirrors and still retain some ability to seek refuge in reflected illusions.

feats.name: Mischievous Tail
feats.description: Your tail can bedevil your foes.

feats.name: Mist Child
feats.description: You blend in with unnatural subtlety.

feats.name: Mist Escape
feats.description: As you fall, your body reacts to defend itself.

feats.name: Mist Strider
feats.description: You condense the moisture in the air, solidifying it so it can hold your weight.

feats.name: Mistaken Identity
feats.description: You feel a strong connection with your progenitor and can convince yourself an effect targeting your mind was meant for theirs instead.

feats.name: Mistsoul
feats.description: You have a connection to vaporous forms of water, such as fog and mist.

feats.name: Misty Transformation
feats.description: Wild mists cover your form.

feats.name: Mixed Maneuver
feats.description: You leverage your knowledge of martial arts to mix different maneuvers together into a single flowing combination.

feats.name: Mobile Finisher
feats.description: You attack in motion.

feats.name: Mobile Shot Stance
feats.description: Your shots become nimble and deadly.

feats.name: Mobile Swarm
feats.description: The clicking of fast-moving legs accompanies your swarm in all kinds of environments.

feats.name: Mobility
feats.description: You move without leaving an opening.

feats.name: Mockingbird's Disarm
feats.description: The Mockingbird is a master at running into foes and coming away with their weapons.

feats.name: Moderate Enhance Venom
feats.description: You upgrade the vishkanyan venom you can apply with Envenom to moderate vishkanyan venom.

feats.name: Modular Dynamo
feats.description: Your dynamo has modular configurations, allowing you to swap between various different possibilities with ease in order to adapt to various situations in combat.

feats.name: Moisture Bath
feats.description: Your moist skin is especially resistant to damage from temperature-altering effects.

feats.name: Moldersoul
feats.description: Your connection to elemental wood asserts itself in the form of decay, like forgotten logs left to rot and the char that remains after a forest fire, cycles of devastation clearing away what was to make room for the next generation of life.

feats.name: Molten Wire
feats.description: Spinning molten iron through a vortex of fire, you trap your foe in searing wires.

feats.name: Molten Wit
feats.description: Your elemental soul has sparked not just your body but also your mind.

feats.name: Moment of Apotheosis
feats.description: For a small moment, you can assume the form of your god.

feats.name: Moment of Clarity
feats.description: You push back your rage for a moment in order to think clearly.

feats.name: Momentous Charge
feats.description: You rush into your enemies with great and reckless force.

feats.name: Momentum Strike
feats.description: Putting your weight behind your weapon's swing, you can push one enemy into another.

feats.name: Monastic Archer Stance
feats.description: You enter a specialized stance for a unique martial art centered around the use of a bow.

feats.name: Monastic Weaponry
feats.description: You have trained with the weaponry of your monastery or school.

feats.name: Monk Dedication
feats.description: You become trained in unarmed attacks and gain the powerful fist class feature.

feats.name: Monk Moves
feats.description: You gain a +10-foot status bonus to your Speed when you’re not wearing armor.

feats.name: Monk Resiliency
feats.description: You gain 3 additional Hit Points for each monk archetype class feat you have.
feats.prerequisites: Monk Dedication; class granting no more Hit Points per level than 8 + your Constitution modifier

feats.name: Monk's Flurry
feats.description: You gain the Flurry of Blows action.

feats.name: Monkey Spirits
feats.description: Vanaras generally consider the spirits of departed monkeys to be less informative or interesting than their own ancestors traveling the cycles of existence, yet these monkey spirits can prove useful when the situation is dire.

feats.name: Monster Crafting
feats.description: Master in Survival

feats.name: Monster Hunter
feats.description: You quickly assess your prey and apply what you know.

feats.name: Monster Warden
feats.description: You understand how to defend yourself and others against your prey.

feats.name: Monstrosity Shape
feats.description: You can transform into a powerful magical creature.

feats.name: Monstrous Inclinations
feats.description: Muckraking
feats.prerequisites: Your apparitions share with you the monstrous nature of those creatures who dwell in deep seas or ancient woods.
notes: It seems like your knowledge has come in handy after all and you have your enemy at your feet.

feats.name: Monstrous Peacemaker
feats.description: Your dual human and orc nature has given you a unique perspective, allowing you to bridge the gap between humans and the many intelligent creatures in the world that humans consider monsters.

feats.name: Monumental Maestro
feats.description: You’ve studied the moving compositions of Andreas Romung, a legendary maestro whose Shining Crusade anthems live on in the music for the play Echoes of Glory.

feats.name: Moon May
feats.description: Your mother was a moon hag, a handmaiden of Groetus, and you have a single scarlet eye and a sliver of her supernal foresight.

feats.name: Mooneater
feats.description: You call on the spirit of the dragon that devoured the moon to temporarily swallow a celestial body and blind onlookers with its visage.

feats.name: Moray Ambush
feats.description: Like the moray eels athamaru communities raise and train, you know how to quickly strike from hiding.

feats.name: Moray Eel Mount
feats.description: You have either trained a giant moray eel since its hatching or have tamed one in the wild.

feats.name: More Real than Real
feats.description: Your performances aren’t just well-known, they’re famous across the land and beyond.

feats.name: Morning Side Dishes
feats.description: You know a proper breakfast should have a variety of sides.

feats.name: Morph-Risen
feats.description: You were once a shapeshifter or spellcaster using polymorph magic, but something went wrong, and you became trapped in the form of the creature you were imitating.

feats.name: Morphic Manipulation
feats.description: You've attuned your natural aura to that of plant life, coaxing it to grow faster than normal.

feats.name: Morphic Strike
feats.description: You can lash out with a portion of your previous self.

feats.name: Morrigna's Spider Affinity
feats.description: Much like morrignas, you feel an affinity for spiders.

feats.name: Mortal Ascension
feats.description: Your power uplifts you, breaking the bonds between you and the ground.

feats.name: Mortal Healing
feats.description: You grant greater healing when the gods don't interfere.
feats.prerequisites: Expert in Medicine; you follow the Laws of Mortality

feats.name: Mortal Herald Dedication
feats.description: You become a mortal herald of your deity, gaining power in return for your service.
feats.prerequisites: Worshiper of a specific deity; Master in master in Religion or your deity’s divine skill

feats.name: Mortal Possibility
feats.description: You made yourself into a paragon of mortality and prove that deities aren't needed to achieve greatness.

feats.name: Mortification (Lvl 4) #1
feats.description: Your reckonings have prepared your body for physical punishment.

feats.name: Mortification (Lvl 4) #2
feats.description: Your reckonings have prepared your body for physical punishment.

feats.name: Mother's Mindfulness
feats.description: You have the protective instinct your own mother lacks and will gladly suffer in another's place.

feats.name: Motionless Cutter
feats.description: Your weapon is so sharp even an insect alighting upon its still blade would be severed.

feats.name: Mountain Quake
feats.description: You stomp, shaking the earth beneath you.
notes: Circle your foe while you beat on them.

feats.name: Mountain Skin
feats.description: You become trained in medium and heavy armor.

feats.name: Mountain Stance
feats.description: You enter the stance of an implacable mountain—a technique created by dwarven monks—allowing you to strike with the weight of an avalanche and block blows with your garments.

feats.name: Mountain Strategy
feats.description: Muddle Through
feats.prerequisites: Dwarves have a long history fighting common foes, and you've mastered the ancient tactics to better face these enemies.

feats.name: Mountain Stronghold
feats.description: You focus on your connection to the earth and call upon the mountain to block attacks against you.

feats.name: Mountain's Stoutness
feats.description: Your hardiness lets you withstand more punishment than most.

feats.name: Mounting Leap
feats.description: You jump atop your mount from afar, landing comfortably astride it.

feats.name: Mud Boat's Passage
feats.description: You instinctively create magical boats that keep your feet dry (mostly).

feats.name: Mug
feats.description: You make a quick attack and rob your foe in the process.

feats.name: Multifaceted Will
feats.description: Without the firm hand of a patron, your power begins to reflect deeper complexities, sometimes latching onto entirely unexpected sources of magical potency.

feats.name: Multifarious Muse
feats.description: Your muse doesn’t fall into a single label.

feats.name: Multilingual
feats.description: Trained in Society

feats.name: Multishot Stance
feats.description: You lock yourself in a stable position so you can fire swiftly and accurately.

feats.name: Multitalented
feats.description: You’ve learned to split your focus between multiple classes with ease.

feats.name: Mummy Dedication
feats.description: Whether through natural processes or foul rituals, your body was mummified, and you've risen as an undead mummy.
feats.prerequisites: you are dead and were mummified (by natural or ritualistic means)

feats.name: Mummy's Despair
feats.description: You force your mental anguish outward, projecting it upon those around you.

feats.name: Munitions Crafter
feats.description: Bullets and bombs can be scarce in some parts, so you've learned to make your own.

feats.name: Munitions Machinist
feats.description: You're particularly adept at crafting ammunition and bombs.

feats.name: Munitions Master Dedication
feats.description: You have drilled enough with your light mortar to operate it with unrivaled efficiency.

feats.name: Murderous Thorns
feats.description: Your thorns are many, vicious, and sharp.
feats.prerequisites: Hidden Thorn or Thorned Rose heritage

feats.name: Murksight
feats.description: Your vision pierces through non-magical fog, mist, rain, and snow.

feats.name: Muscle Mimicry
feats.description: Your study of another allows you to mirror their movements subtly, even in the heat of combat.
feats.prerequisites: Alter Ego Dedication; Trained in Athletics; Master in Deception

feats.name: Musetouched
feats.description: Your blood sings with the liberating power of the azatas.

feats.name: Musical Summons
feats.description: Your studies have given you a deeper understanding of animals and beasts, allowing you to call them to your side as you cast your spell.

feats.name: Mutant Innervation
feats.description: Basic mutagens that affect your mind and thoughts can make you communicate telepathically, protect you from being detected, or let you communicate with anyone.

feats.name: Mutant Physique
feats.description: Basic mutagens that affect your physical form can bring out the beast within you, turn you nigh invincible, or make your body more elastic.

feats.name: Mutate Weapon
feats.description: deal more damage with your Living Weapon.

feats.name: My Claws are Daggers
feats.description: Myth Hunter
feats.prerequisites: Your claws are as sharp as your teeth.
notes: Trained in Hero-God Lore or Trained in Legendary Beast Lore
Your ancestors confronted and bested mythic beasts of Iblydan antiquity.

feats.name: Myriad Forms
feats.description: With a bit of self-discovery, you find a new form.

feats.name: Mysterious Breadth
feats.description: Increase the spell slots you gain from oracle archetype feats

feats.name: Mysterious Repertoire
feats.description: Your mystery holds unknowable depths of magic not always associated with the divine.

feats.name: Mystery Conduit
feats.description: The power of your mystery enables you access to myriad magic.

feats.name: Nagaji Lore
feats.description: You're the vassal or apprentice of a learned naga, and you've studied the secrets of naga magic and concocting intricate poisons.

feats.name: Nagaji Spell Expertise
feats.description: Your magical skill rivals that of accomplished naga spellcasters.

feats.name: Nagaji Spell Familiarity
feats.description: Either through study, exposure, or familial devotion, you have the magic of nagas bubbling in your blood.

feats.name: Nagaji Spell Mysteries
feats.description: You've learned more naga magic.
feats.prerequisites: at least one innate spell from a nagaji heritage or ancestry feat

feats.name: Nalinivati's Light
feats.description: Your slit eyes expand to absorb light and can see in the darkest of places.

feats.name: Named Artillery
feats.description: It is a tradition among artillerists to name the siege weapon most important to them and closest to their heart—much as a sailor on a ship, the weapon is their livelihood.

feats.name: Nameless Anonymity
feats.description: Your mask protects you further from divination.

feats.name: Nanite Shroud
feats.description: Your nanites fly out of your body, swarming around you in a cloud.

feats.name: Nanite Surge
feats.description: You stimulate your nanites, forcing your body to temporarily increase its efficiency.

feats.name: Nantambu Chime-Ringer Dedication
feats.description: You've studied the basics of harmony and resonance in magic, exemplified by the ringing of chimes.
feats.source: Pathfinder #170: Spoken on the Song Wind pg. 79
feats.source_book: Pathfinder #170: Spoken on the Song Wind
feats.prerequisites: Trained in Performance; Trained in Society

feats.name: Narrative Conduit
feats.description: You act as a conduit for your companions just as your stories are a conduit between teller and listener.
feats.source: Pathfinder #170: Spoken on the Song Wind pg. 78
feats.source_book: Pathfinder #170: Spoken on the Song Wind

feats.name: Native Waters
feats.description: You were born with or obtained a special connection to either fresh water or salt water.

feats.name: Natural Ambassador
feats.description: You remember what it was like to speak easily with other animals, using old, familiar ways of communication to learn what they want and ask for favors in return.

feats.name: Natural Ambition
feats.description: You were raised to be ambitious and always reach for the stars, leading you to progress quickly in your chosen field.

feats.name: Natural Conduit
feats.description: You can use an animal as a conduit for your magic.

feats.name: Natural Illusionist
feats.description: By drawing upon the First World’s magic, you can siphon a portion of that malleable world to create a convincing illusion.

feats.name: Natural Magnetism
feats.description: Your connection with elemental iron grants you a natural field of weak magnetic attraction.

feats.name: Natural Medicine
feats.description: Trained in Nature

feats.name: Natural Mutagen
feats.description: You can distill your natural shapeshifting ability into an elixir that grants a lesser ability to morph.

feats.name: Natural Orienteering
feats.description: There are few twisting paths that can disorient you.

feats.name: Natural Performer
feats.description: Entertainment comes naturally to you.

feats.name: Natural Senses
feats.description: You have retained your sharp animal senses even after awakening.

feats.name: Natural Skill
feats.description: Your ingenuity allows you to learn a wide variety of skills.

feats.name: Natural Swimmer
feats.description: Water flows around you, letting you cut through the waves as if born to it.

feats.name: Nature Prowler
feats.description: When you begin your turn hidden or unnoticed by your hunted prey, that creature is off-guard to you until the end of your turn.

feats.name: Nature's Precision
feats.description: Your companions pick at an enemy's weak points.
feats.prerequisites: Beastmaster Dedication; animal companion with an agile or finesse unarmed attack

feats.name: Necrologist Dedication
feats.description: Your studies of the lists of the dead allow you to call forth a horde of undead with a brief incantation.
feats.prerequisites: ability to cast spells from spell slots, ability to cast summon undead

feats.name: Necromancer's Visage
feats.description: Necromantic energy demonstrates your power over undead, creating a demeanor that commands their fear and respect.
feats.prerequisites: ability to create or control undead; cleric with a negative font, oracle of bones, or necromancer wizard

feats.name: Necromantic Bulwark
feats.description: Regular exposure to necromantic effects left you better able to defend against them.

feats.name: Necromantic Deflection
feats.description: You imbue your shield with life-giving energy to deflect harmful necromantic magic.

feats.name: Necromantic Heir
feats.description: Your affinity for negative energy spills outward and grants you a refilling well of necromantic essence.

feats.name: Necromantic Physiology
feats.description: Your unusual physiology has developed in a way that makes it difficult for parasites and other infestations to prey upon you.

feats.name: Necromantic Resistance (Lvl 4) #1
feats.description: Gain resistance to necromancy effects and damage.

feats.name: Necromantic Resistance (Lvl 4) #2
feats.description: As part of your training, you've inured yourself against necromancy through grueling, repeated exposure.

feats.name: Necromantic Tenacity
feats.description: Reduce the power that necromantic effects hold over you.

feats.name: Needle In The God's Eyes
feats.description: With sinews of bronze and thews of iron, you leap to the heavens, piercing the arrogant eyes of the gods.

feats.name: Negate Damage
feats.description: Your armor innovation activates various devices you prepared ahead of time, and you use one of them to reduce the damage you would take by 15.

feats.name: Nephilim Eyes
feats.description: Your eyes can see through darkness with visual acuity akin to that possessed by most extraplanar beings.

feats.name: Nephilim Lore
feats.description: You know the secrets of the Multiverse.

feats.name: Nephilim Resistance
feats.description: You resist energy like your extraplanar predecessors.

feats.name: Never!
feats.description: The idea that you would hurt your companions, even when you've lost your reason, is unthinkable.

feats.name: Nidalese Horselord Dedication
feats.description: Thanks to the deep bond you share with your Nidalese horse, the two of you gain remarkable abilities.
feats.prerequisites: Trained in Nature; horse animal companion

feats.name: Night Magic
feats.description: You can tap into the magic that runs through your blood.

feats.name: Night's Glow
feats.description: The stars and moon lend you their light.

feats.name: Night's Shine
feats.description: Your power from the moon and stars becomes strong enough to illuminate the night sky.

feats.name: Night's Warning
feats.description: Portents written in the night sky show you how to avoid an attack.

feats.name: Nightvision Adaptation
feats.description: The nanites in your ocular processors have adapted to darkness, enhancing your ability to see in the dark.

feats.name: Nightwave Springing Reload
feats.description: Training with the crew of the Nightwave has taught you their technique for reloading while leaping to board another ship.

feats.name: Nimble Crawl
feats.description: Expert in Acrobatics

feats.name: Nimble Dodge
feats.description: You deftly dodge out of the way, gaining a +2 circumstance bonus to AC against the triggering attack.

feats.name: Nimble Elf
feats.description: Your muscles are tightly honed.

feats.name: Nimble Hooves
feats.description: You possess hooves, ankle wings, or some other feature that hastens your movement.

feats.name: Nimble Reprisal
feats.description: You can use Retributive Strike at greater distance.

feats.name: Nimble Roll
feats.description: You throw yourself into a roll to escape imminent danger.

feats.name: Nimble Strike
feats.description: You’re cunning enough to find an opening in an opponent’s attack.

feats.name: No Cause for Alarm
feats.description: Trained in Diplomacy

feats.name: No Escape
feats.description: You keep pace with a retreating foe.

feats.name: No Evidence
feats.description: You leave little sign when attempting to remain unseen.

feats.name: No Gods, Only Mortals!
feats.description: You order the caster to stop their spellcasting.

feats.name: No Hands, No Problems
feats.description: After a lifetime of using temporary, ghostly limbs to manipulate objects, you hardly need real hands.

feats.name: No Hard Feelings
feats.description: Despite the devastation your weapons tend to inflict upon their targets or the destruction you might unleash upon an area, your foes still manage to walk away at the end of a fight—at least sometimes.

feats.name: No Need to Fear
feats.description: With a simple reminder of perseverance, you bolster the bravery of yourself and your allies.

feats.name: No Stranger to Death
feats.description: Your regular exposure to the insidious putrescence of undeath inured you to its effects.

feats.name: No! No! I Created You!
feats.description: You appeal to your construct companion's bond with its creator to have it break free of a controlling effect.

feats.name: No!!!
feats.description: The shock of seeing your ally near death breaks whatever limits exist in your mind, sending your power spilling forth.

feats.name: Noble Bloom
feats.description: Certain plants and flowers hold a reputation throughout Tian Xia for being strong and upstanding, able to weather adversity.

feats.name: Noble Resolve
feats.description: Once, genies ruled vast kingdoms, and a remnant of that confidence and power is reflected in your strong will.

feats.name: Nocturnal Charm
feats.description: The supernatural charm of your vampiric progenitor hangs about you, and you've learned to use it on mortals.

feats.name: Nocturnal Grippli
feats.description: You tend to do most of your hunting and work at night and have adapted to the requirements of nocturnal life.

feats.name: Nocturnal Kindred
feats.description: You have an innate connection with other creatures of the night and understand some of them.

feats.name: Nocturnal Senses
feats.description: Your senses gain even greater clarity.

feats.name: Nocturnal Tripkee
feats.description: You tend to do most of your hunting and work at night and have adapted to the requirements of nocturnal life.

feats.name: Nodal Healing
feats.description: You can induce wound repair by circulating magic throughout your body.

feats.name: Nodal Regeneration
feats.description: Your body processes magic so effectively that you can induce true regeneration, replacing limbs and restoring organs.

feats.name: None Shall Know
feats.description: Even magical means have a hard time prying information from you.

feats.name: Nonlethal Spell
feats.description: You can alter offensive spells to be less deadly.

feats.name: Nonlethal Takedown
feats.description: You prefer to use nonlethal means against living opponents, but the weapons you carry are lethal enough to destroy undead.

feats.name: Norgorber's Secret
feats.description: Being the god of secrets, Norgorber has erased all traces of his life before his ascension so that his every mortal act and even his identity remain unknown and unknowable.

feats.name: Nosoi's Mask
feats.description: Many psychopomps wear masks when dealing with the living, and many cultures believe that seeing an unmasked psychopomp's face invites death.

feats.name: Not so Fast!
feats.description: You lash out when foes try to get past you, possibly stopping them in their tracks.

feats.name: Nothing but Fluff
feats.description: Your fluffy interior lacks specific organs and struts, with few weak spots to injure.

feats.name: Nothing Personal
feats.description: When you’re on a job, you can’t allow anyone to stop you.

feats.name: Nourishing Gate
feats.description: You can sustain yourself on a single drop of elemental dew or the slightest spark from the Plane of Fire.

feats.name: Nourishing Symbiosis
feats.description: As you recuperate from your wounds, life energy flows from you to the land and back to you again.

feats.name: Noxious Odor
feats.description: You have developed your skill with your defensive pheromones and have concentrated them into a noxious form.

feats.name: Nudge the Scales
feats.description: You lay a finger on the scales of life and death to heal a creature, regardless of whether it's living or undead.

feats.name: Numb
