feats.description: You lash out viciously even as you fend off death.

feats.name: Rampaging Form
feats.description: Once per day, when you Change Shape into a fox, you can instead gain the effects of both the canine form of 5th-level animal form and 7th-level fiery body for 1 minute or until you shift back, whichever comes first.
feats.prerequisites: Change Shape with a fox alternate form

feats.name: Ranged Combatant
feats.description: Spines, flame jets, and holy blasts are just some of the ways your eidolon might strike from a distance.

feats.name: Ranged Disarm
feats.description: When using a simple firearm, you can shoot objects right out of your enemy's hands.

feats.name: Ranger Dedication
feats.description: You become trained in Survival; if you were already trained in Survival, you instead become trained in another skill of your choice.

feats.name: Ranger Resiliency
feats.description: You gain 3 additional Hit Points for each ranger archetype class feat you have.
feats.prerequisites: Ranger Dedication; class granting no more Hit Points per level than 8 + your Constitution modifier

feats.name: Rapid Affixture
feats.description: You take only 1 minute to Affix a Talisman.

feats.name: Rapid Assessment
feats.description: You quickly evaluate your enemies.

feats.name: Rapid Hybridization
feats.description: When danger threatens, your instincts kick in, and you can assume a different shape at a moment's notice.

feats.name: Rapid Manifestation
feats.description: Your unwavering soul brings up your defenses as soon as you're in danger.

feats.name: Rapid Mantel
feats.description: Expert in Athletics

feats.name: Rapid Pheromone Recovery
feats.description: Your supply of pheromones replenish very quickly.

feats.name: Rapid Reattunement
feats.description: You spend 10 minutes realigning your elemental connections in an elemental trance.

feats.name: Rapid Recharge
feats.description: You tap into an arcane trick to recover your ability to meld spells and attacks.

feats.name: Rapid Response
feats.description: You work quickly in emergencies.

feats.name: Rapid Retraining
feats.description: Some feel trapped by their choices and have a tough time reinventing themselves.

feats.name: Rapid Spark
feats.description: Your spark shifts to where it needs to be.

feats.name: Rat Familiar
feats.description: You have a pet rat that has become magically bonded to you.

feats.name: Rat Form
feats.description: You can transform into an innocuous-looking rat.

feats.name: Rat Magic
feats.description: There always seems to be a little rat around to carry messages for you.

feats.name: Ratfolk Lore
feats.description: Years of experience among ratfolk communities have made you nimble, and you've learned to run and hide when enemies threaten.

feats.name: Ratfolk Roll
feats.description: You roll up into a ball and move up to four times your Speed in a straight line down an incline.

feats.name: Ratspeak
feats.description: You can ask questions of, receive answers from, and use the Diplomacy skill with rodents, including beavers, mice, porcupines, rats, and squirrels, but not with other mammals, such as dogs or bats.

feats.name: Rattle The Earth
feats.description: Striking the ground with the gravity of the deepest rocks, you cause an earthquake.

feats.name: Ravel of Thorns
feats.description: Thorny vines grow in geometric patterns on surfaces in your kinetic aura.

feats.name: Ravening's Desperation
feats.description: Your study of the Beast of Gluttondark has taught you how to make do in the most trying of circumstances rather than succumb to weakness.

feats.name: Ravenous Charge
feats.description: Hungry for the flesh of the living, you hurl yourself into the fray, teeth gnashing.

feats.name: Razmiran Priest Dedication
feats.description: You have earned entry to the priesthood of Razmir, either at the Exalted Lodge or another temple where Razmir’s holy masks are forged.
feats.prerequisites: Trained in Crafting; Trained in Deception

feats.name: Razor's Edge
feats.description: Your curse and your power are one and the same, and you accept both equally.

feats.name: Razzle-Dazzle
feats.description: You've spent considerable time practicing the manipulation of light, weaponizing your blade's reflection or bolstering the luminosity of magical displays to unconventional heights.

feats.name: Reach Beyond
feats.description: You've learned to move your spiritual energy past yourself to attack spirits where others can't.
feats.source: Pathfinder #166: Despair on Danger Island pg. 79

feats.name: Reach for Immortality
feats.description: Your divine spark is now a bonfire in your soul, bringing you to the very cusp of undying immortality.

feats.name: Reach for the Sky
feats.description: You command the room, firing a gun into the air and ordering everyone to surrender and put their hands in the air.

feats.name: Reach for the Stars
feats.description: The sky's the limit, as long as you've got enough black powder.

feats.name: Reach Spell
feats.description: You can extend your spells’ range.
feats.source: Player Core pg. 101, Player Core 2 pg. 138

feats.name: Reactive Charm
feats.description: You're so charming and distracting that when pressed, you can cast a simple enchantment in time to foil an attacker.

feats.name: Reactive Dismissal
feats.description: You abruptly dismiss your eidolon to reduce the damage it takes, though this makes summoning it again more difficult.

feats.name: Reactive Distraction
feats.description: You reactively switch with your decoy to foil your foe.

feats.name: Reactive Interference
feats.description: Grabbing a sleeve, swiping with your weapon, or creating another obstruction, you reflexively foil an enemy’s response.

feats.name: Reactive Pursuit
feats.description: You keep pace with a retreating foe.

feats.name: Reactive Resilience
feats.description: Your power blunts blades and weakens spells like the hardiest of dragon scales.

feats.name: Reactive Shield
feats.description: You can snap your shield into place just as you would take a blow, avoiding the hit at the last second.

feats.name: Reactive Strike
feats.description: You lash out at a foe that leaves an opening.

feats.name: Reactive Striker
feats.description: You gain the Reactive Strike reaction.

feats.name: Reactive Transformation
feats.description: You transform reflexively when in danger.
feats.prerequisites: Untamed Form; Dragon Shape, Elemental Shape, Plant Shape, or Soaring Shape

feats.name: Read Disaster
feats.description: You spend 10 minutes and open yourself to the divine mysteries of the world, peering into the most sinister portents of the future.

feats.name: Read Lips
feats.description: Trained in Society
feats.campaign: Read the lips of people you can see

feats.name: Read Psychometric Resonance
feats.description: With a touch, you can read the psychic impressions left on objects by their previous owners.

feats.name: Read the Dust
feats.description: You watch the creature or hazard as it collapses, careful for any sign it may return.

feats.name: Read the Land
feats.description: You've learned how to commune with the land to learn information.

feats.name: Read the Roots
feats.description: The root systems of trees are a far-reaching network of information, and you know how to access them and extract their secrets.

feats.name: Read the Stars
feats.description: You're incredibly skilled in iruxi astrology, and you can gain useful (if cryptic) hints from the stars' alignment.
feats.prerequisites: Trained in Astrology Lore or Trained in Occultism

feats.name: Reading the Signs
feats.description: You have a knack for drawing the right card, be it from a harrow deck, in a game of cards, or even when drawing from a Deck of Many Things.

feats.name: Reanimating Spark
feats.description: The magic that animates you strains to keep you alive.

feats.name: Reanimator Dedication
feats.description: You have dedicated your studies to the art of raising and commanding undead.
feats.prerequisites: able to cast animate dead with a spell slot

feats.name: Reaper of Repose
feats.description: Your skill and fervor allow you to pierce undead defenses and exploit their weaknesses.
feats.prerequisites: Knight Reclaimant Dedication; master proficiency in a weapon

feats.name: Rearing Display
feats.description: You've trained your mount to make an impressive attack and can leverage its presence to terrify your enemies.

feats.name: Reason Rapidly
feats.description: Your mind works through clues at an unbelievable speed.

feats.name: Reassuring Presence
feats.description: You serve as an anchor to your close companions, calming them in times of stress.

feats.name: Rebel's Map
feats.description: Rebellions require an intricate knowledge of one's surroundings—because you might need to escape at any moment.
feats.prerequisites: Horizon Walker Dedication or Scout Dedication

feats.name: Rebirth in Living Stone
feats.description: Rock overflows from within you to consume your form before cracking open to reveal your body transformed into living stone.

feats.name: Rebounding Assault
feats.description: You hurl your melee weapon at an opponent, then fire a bullet into the weapon's hilt, making it deal additional damage and bounce back to your grasp.

feats.name: Rebounding Smite
feats.description: The energy from your smite persists for a moment, allowing you to pass it to a new target.

feats.name: Rebounding Toss
feats.description: You bounce your weapon off one foe to strike another.

feats.name: Reckless Abandon (Goblin)
feats.description: Despite a lifetime filled with questionable decisions, you've managed to survive, as though you have uncanny luck that lets you avoid the consequences of your own actions.

feats.name: Reclaim Spell
feats.description: You have learned to manipulate reflections of magic, similar to the resonant reflections.

feats.name: Reclaimant Plea
feats.description: You call on the power of the Crimson Oath to gain magical aid.
feats.prerequisites: Knight Reclaimant Dedication; ability to cast divine spells

feats.name: Recognize Ambush
feats.description: Your combat training has honed you to be ready for an attack at all times.

feats.name: Recognize Spell
feats.description: Trained in Arcana, Trained in Nature, Trained in Occultism, or Trained in Religion
feats.campaign: Identify a spell as a reaction as it’s being cast

feats.name: Recognize Threat
feats.description: You quickly assess the threat so you can relay the information to your team.
feats.prerequisites: master in a Recall Knowledge skill; Pathfinder Agent Dedication

feats.name: Recoiling Relocation
feats.description: Your innovation contains a chamber to store a small amount of compressed exhaust gas from your Launches.

feats.name: Reconstruct The Scene
feats.description: You spend 1 minute surveying a small location (such as a single room) to get an impression of events that occurred there in the last day.
feats.source: Player Core pg. 177, Player Core 2 pg. 113

feats.name: Recycled Cogwheel
feats.description: You're able to scavenge the cogwheels from your daily quick-deploy snares that use gears.

feats.name: Red Mantis Assassin Dedication
feats.description: You have learned how to stalk your foes and slay them with a sawtooth saber.
feats.prerequisites: trained in sawtooth sabers; worshipper of Achaekek; member of the Red Mantis assassins

feats.name: Red Mantis School Spell
feats.description: You gain the Red Mantis magic school’s initial school spell.

feats.name: Red-Gold Mortality
feats.description: By channeling your divinity into a creature along with a strike, you can disrupt their ability to recover.

feats.name: Redirect Attention
feats.description: Through your strong connection with your progenitor, you're able to redirect those attempting to spy on you.

feats.name: Redirect Elements
feats.description: You seize the elemental essence of an incoming spell and redirect the spell to a creature of your choice within the spell's area.

feats.name: Redirecting Draft
feats.description: You flap your wings to blow arrows off course.

feats.name: Redirecting Shot
feats.description: Seeing your ally's attack about to go astray, you fire your weapon to right its course.

feats.name: Refined Motion in Darkness
feats.description: The ability to move elegantly and undetected through darkness aided your people as they fled the Netherworld.

feats.name: Reflect Foe
feats.description: You create a copy of a foe by calling them forth from a nearby reflection.

feats.name: Reflect Harm
feats.description: You can wrap your magic around you like a cloak that causes those who dare to target you with spells to suffer a similar fate.

feats.name: Reflect Spell
feats.description: When you successfully use Counterspell to counteract a spell that affects targeted creatures or an area, you can turn that spell’s effect back on its caster.

feats.name: Reflecting Riposte
feats.description: You attempt to counteract the triggering spell using powerful magical techniques observed in the Kortos Mounts.
feats.prerequisites: Dueling Riposte, Mirror Shield, or Twin Riposte

feats.name: Reflective Defense
feats.description: Your body's natural luster has been polished to a gleaming shine.

feats.name: Reflective Pocket
feats.description: You've formed a connection with a small hand mirror, allowing you to use it as an extradimensional storage space.

feats.name: Reflective Ripple Stance
feats.description: You enter a stance of fluid grace as small amounts of water flow with your movements and attacks.

feats.name: Reflexive Catch
feats.description: Grab an item thrown at you.
feats.source: Pathfinder #151: The Show Must Go On pg. 74
feats.source_book: Pathfinder #151: The Show Must Go On

feats.name: Reflexive Courage
feats.description: You bellow a ferocious call to arms, inspiring yourself to lash out at a foe.

feats.name: Reflexive Devotion
feats.description: The power of dragons flows through you at the merest thought.

feats.name: Reflexive Grapple
feats.description: You've honed your reflexes so well that your lash can begin closing around a target as soon as it makes contact.

feats.name: Reflexive Riposte
feats.description: You can riposte almost without a thought.

feats.name: Reflexive Shield
feats.description: You can use your shield to fend off explosions and the like.

feats.name: Reflexive Stance
feats.description: You enter a stance without a thought.

feats.name: Regional Specialty
feats.description: You can create dishes that reflect the food sources endemic to your environment and medicinal food techniques utilizing the cycle of the five elements.

feats.name: Regrowth
feats.description: Your command over your vital essence allows you or an ally to recover from grievous wounds.

feats.name: Regurgitate Mutagen
feats.description: You redirect a mutagen within your body to spit a stream of stomach acid at a foe.

feats.name: Rehydration
feats.description: You surround your body with a thin layer of water drawn from the moisture in the air.

feats.name: Reimagine
feats.description: You can cast dreaming potential as an innate occult spell.

feats.name: Reincarnated Ridiculer
feats.description: You’ve practiced the art of taunting an enemy, ensuring they know death will only make you stronger.

feats.name: Reinforce Eidolon
feats.description: You buffer your eidolon.

feats.name: Reinforced Chassis
feats.description: Your body is designed to be particularly resilient.

feats.name: Rejoice in Solstice Storm
feats.description: You hold your arms out, and the fury of the seasons comes to your jubilant embrace.
feats.prerequisites: whose cry is thunder or dancer in the seasons

feats.name: Rejuvenating Embrace
feats.description: You rejuvenate your spirit by taking your rest where Mother Earth embraces Father Moon.

feats.name: Rejuvenating Touch
feats.description: Your healing energies linger after you cast, providing continual benefits.

feats.name: Rejuvenation
feats.description: The call of your unfinished business recreates you after destruction.

feats.name: Rejuvenation Token
feats.description: You tie yourself to the Material Plane by implanting a piece of your consciousness into a weapon, piece of armor, or other item that's precious to you.

feats.name: Rekindled Light
feats.description: You temporarily drain your star orb familiar’s energy to save an ally.

feats.name: Release Spores
feats.description: You create a miasma of spores.
feats.source: Pathfinder #202: Severed at the Root pg. 74

feats.name: Release the Light
feats.description: Many people report seeing a bright light before their death.

feats.name: Relentless Disarm
feats.description: You have been trained to disarm foes.
feats.source: Pathfinder #149: Against the Scarlet Triad pg. 81
feats.prerequisites: Zephyr Guard Dedication; Trained in Athletics

feats.name: Relentless Stalker
feats.description: Stay adjacent to your prey when they attempt to move away.

feats.name: Reliable Luck
feats.description: You survive danger with surprising regularity.

feats.name: Reliable Squire
feats.description: You know the path to victory isn't traveled alone, and you lend aid to your companions whenever you can.

feats.name: Relinquish Control
feats.description: Your apparition takes over and shields you from outside influence.

feats.name: Reloading Trick
feats.description: You can fire off a single shot even when it seems like you are unprepared.

feats.name: Remake the World
feats.description: For the briefest of moments, you can reach into the realm of true gods, gaining the power to shape reality to your will.

feats.name: Remediate
feats.description: If your next action is to use your divine font to cast a 3-action heal or harm spell, you can harness the residual energy to counterbalance opposing forces.

feats.name: Reminder of the Greater Fear
feats.description: You give a target a stern glower to remind them that it is you, and no one else, they should truly fear.
feats.source: Night of the Gray Death pg. 65

feats.name: Remnants of the Past
feats.description: Memories of your first life are strong and continually return to you, even after several incarnations.

feats.name: Remorseless Lash
feats.description: You're skilled at beating an enemy when their morale is already breaking.

feats.name: Remote Detonation
feats.description: Brastlewark snarecrafters know that sometimes it's more advantageous to magically destroy a snare before it's triggered.

feats.name: Remove Presence
feats.description: Rend Armor
feats.prerequisites: Your spell reaches into the mind of a creature and removes you from it.
notes: Pathfinder #222: Hellbreakers pg. 217, Hellbreakers Players Guide pg. 9
Your enemies' defenses are no match for you as you wrench your weapon to compromise their armor.

feats.name: Rend Mimicry
feats.description: Taking advantage of the brutal efficiency of hacking away at a target with two slashing attacks, you've mastered the art of punishing a foe caught between your slices.
feats.prerequisites: Wild Mimic Dedication; you have seen a creature use Rend or have identified a creature that has Rend in combat

feats.name: Renewed Vigor
feats.description: Through the haze of battle, you quickly recover your raging vigor.

feats.name: Renewing Cycle
feats.description: The first time each round that you Cycle Elemental Stance, you gain temporary Hit Points equal to half your level that last until the start of your next turn.

feats.name: Renewing Quills
feats.description: Your spines grow back much faster than other shisks.

feats.name: Repair Module
feats.description: You trigger your body's repair programming, causing your body's nanites to heal your wounds.

feats.name: Repeat Lesson
feats.description: Upon seeing your student falter, you demonstrate the proper technique.

feats.name: Repeating Hand Crossbow Training
feats.description: The specific needs of your organization or mission warrant your use of the latest in ingenious crossbow technology.

feats.name: Repel Darkness
feats.description: Your stoicism and courage seem to drive off darkness and shadow.

feats.name: Repelling Enforcer
feats.description: Your conviction reflects damage from the divine.

feats.name: Replenishing Consumption
feats.description: When you devour corpses and satiate your hunger, you also recover from some of your wounds, your necrotized blue flesh knitting back together almost immediately as soon as you begin shoveling the chunks of dead flesh down your throat.

feats.name: Replenishing Hydration
feats.description: You draw life from the water around you.
feats.source: Absalom, City of Lost Omens pg. 395, Azarketi Ancestry Web Supplement pg. 5
feats.source_book: Absalom, City of Lost Omens pg. 395, Azarketi Ancestry Web Supplement

feats.name: Replenishment of War
feats.description: Striking out against your enemies draws praise and protection from your deity.
feats.prerequisites: expert in your deity’s favored weapon

feats.name: Replicate
feats.description: You've learned to reshape your malleable form.

feats.name: Repositioning Block
feats.description: As you absorb a blow from an enemy, you can use their attack's momentum against them.

feats.name: Reprepare Spell
feats.description: You’ve discovered how to reuse some of your spell slots over and over.

feats.name: Reptile Rider
feats.description: To you, crocodilians, giant lizards, and dinosaurs are loyal steeds, not monsters.

feats.name: Reptile Speaker
feats.description: You hear the sounds of reptiles as language.

feats.name: Repulse the Wicken
feats.description: You use your foe's failure as an opening to push them away.

feats.name: Repurposed Parts
feats.description: You are familiar with the fittings and cogwheels of your snares and can repurpose parts from prepared quick-deploy snares to assemble a new creation on the fly.

feats.name: Rescuer's Press
feats.description: Any shield you wield gains the shove trait.

feats.name: Reset the Past
feats.description: You manipulate time to recharge one of your temporal techniques—by revising your past so you never used it in the first place.

feats.name: Resilient Mind
feats.description: You're firm in your convictions and have girded your mind against outside influence.

feats.name: Resilient Physiology
feats.description: Your ordered physiology rejects unwelcome elements, allowing you to reject the negative effects of poisons and diseases or shrug off other lasting negative effects.

feats.name: Resilient Shell
feats.description: Your eidolon is resilient against attacks.

feats.name: Resilient Touch
feats.description: Your healing energies create an aura of protection that defends your allies against more than just blades and arrows.

feats.name: Resist Ruin
feats.description: Your duskwalker heritage allows you to extend protection against void energy.

feats.name: Resolute
feats.description: You've tempered your mind and become resolute against effects that strain your willpower.
notes: Pathfinder #222: Hellbreakers pg. 217, Hellbreakers Players Guide pg. 9
You can send the fiends who have vexed you back to their home plane where they belong.

feats.name: Resolute Defender
feats.description: You hold your shield together with the power of your faith and conviction, refusing to let wood splinter and steel shatter until the day's battles are won.

feats.name: Resounding Blow
feats.description: You strike your enemy in the head with such force that its ears ring.

feats.name: Resounding Bravery
feats.description: Even your fears serve as fuel for your fighting spirit.

feats.name: Resounding Cascade
feats.description: When you enter your Arcane Cascade, you disperse the magical reinforcement to nearby allies.

feats.name: Resounding Finale
feats.description: You bring your performance to a sudden, dramatic finish, drowning out other sounds.

feats.name: Resplendent Spellhorn
feats.description: Your magic continues to flourish.

feats.name: Restitch
feats.description: You've learned how to sew even the most terrible tears and wounds together.

feats.name: Restorative Channel
feats.description: You can remove conditions with divine grace.

feats.name: Restorative Strike
feats.description: You balance both sides of the scales, restoring yourself while striking a foe.

feats.name: Restore Omen
feats.description: You spend 10 minutes meditating with your harrow deck, then draw a card.

feats.name: Restoring Blood
feats.description: Your body can process an alternative to your venom that heals wounds.

feats.name: Resurrectionist
feats.description: You can cause a creature you bring back from the brink of death to thrive and continue healing.

feats.name: Retaliating Rescue
feats.description: When an ally is in danger, you can hustle to reach them and punish the foe threatening them.

feats.name: Retaliatory Cleansing
feats.description: You twist your hand in front of the blow, ensuring the enemy's attack shatters the required holy water or bomb.

feats.name: Retch Rust
feats.description: You exhale tendrils formed from flakes of rusted metal.

feats.name: Retractable Claws
feats.description: You gain a claw unarmed attack that deals 1d4 slashing damage.

feats.name: Retreating Finisher
feats.description: You make a calculated attack without letting down your guard.

feats.name: Retributive Focus
feats.description: Your enemy’s offenses fuel your righteous power.

feats.name: Return Fire
feats.description: Snatching an arrow out of the air, you instantly put it to your bow and return fire.

feats.name: Return to the Sea
feats.description: You adapt a creature to living and moving in water.

feats.name: Return to the Seed
feats.description: Once per month, when you die, you can instead choose to fade away.

feats.name: Returning Throw
feats.description: You have mastered the technique of arcing a projectile so that it returns to your hand after being thrown, though this requires a moment to precisely calculate the trajectory and possible ricochets.

feats.name: Reveal Hidden Self
feats.description: While hidden, you manifest a version of your animalistic nature.

feats.name: Reveal Machinations
feats.description: You convince a creature that you played a minor but recurring role in its life.

feats.name: Reveal True Name
feats.description: You attempt to get a creature to do as you wish by threatening them with your knowledge of their true name.
feats.prerequisites: trained in Intimidation and at least one of Arcana, Nature, Occult, and Religion

feats.name: Revealing Stab
feats.description: You drive your piercing weapon into an imperceptible foe, revealing its location to your allies.

feats.name: Revelation's Focus
feats.description: The further extents of your mystery provide an endless wellspring of magic.

feats.name: Reverberate
feats.description: You can manipulate the acoustics around you to deflect sonic damage back at its source.

feats.name: Reverberating Spell
feats.description: Your spell disorients your targets with a metallic clangor.
feats.prerequisites: Elementalist Dedication; metal is in your elemental philosophy

feats.name: Reverse Curse
feats.description: When you counter a curse or misfortune effect, you send it back to destroy its originator.

feats.name: Reverse Engineer
feats.description: You are incredibly skilled at reverse engineering items to learn their formulas, or disassembling them just to disable them.

feats.name: Reversing Charge
feats.description: You dive into the fray before rewinding yourself to safety. Stride up to your Speed.

feats.name: Revitalizing Finisher
feats.description: Your swagger instills confidence in you and your allies.

feats.name: Revivification Protocol
feats.description: Your nanites are programmed to automatically revive you.

feats.name: Revivifying Mutagen
feats.description: You metabolize a mutagen to heal yourself.

feats.name: Ricochet Feint
feats.description: While in Ricochet Stance, you can bounce a thrown weapon off a foe to distract them.

feats.name: Ricochet Legend
feats.description: The more obstacles between you and your target, the deadlier your shots become, as you ricochet off multiple surfaces to hit them.

feats.name: Ricochet Master
feats.description: You have an eye for angles and can find shots that others believe are impossible.

feats.name: Ricochet Shot
feats.description: You bounce your shot off a nearby surface to strike your opponent from an unexpected angle.

feats.name: Ricochet Stance (Fighter)
feats.description: You adopt a stance to rebound your thrown weapons toward you.

feats.name: Ricochet Stance (Rogue)
feats.description: You adopt a stance to rebound your thrown weapons toward you.

feats.name: Ricocheting Leap
feats.description: You quickly use your momentum to topple and spring off of foes.

feats.name: Riddle the Sphinx
feats.description: You’ve learned the secrets of the sphinx’s riddles and empowered your ikon with them.
feats.source: Pathfinder #217: Death Sails a Wine-Dark Sea pg. 79
feats.source_book: Pathfinder #217: Death Sails a Wine-Dark Sea

feats.name: Ride
feats.description: Automatically succeed at commanding your mount to move

feats.name: Ride On
feats.description: Even when tired, you refuse to give up, pushing yourself to extreme feats of endurance.

feats.name: Ride the Tsunami
feats.description: Booming, crashing walls of water, enough to fill a harbor, smash out ahead of you, overwhelming all in their path.

feats.name: Riftmarked
feats.description: Long ago, qlippoth marked someone in your lineage, most likely through their ancient runestones that dot Golarion's surface.

feats.name: Right Where you Want Them
feats.description: Whether with a weapon or your bare hands, you keep your opponents in their place.

feats.name: Right-hand Blood
feats.description: It's said that the flesh of the right side of a hyena can heal diseases, but that the flesh of the left side is deadly and poisonous.

feats.name: Rimesoul
feats.description: The water inside you is cold and frozen, like sheets of ice and frigid glaciers.

feats.name: Ring their Bell
feats.description: Using your armor, you pummel a foe that isn't focused on you in the head or face to stagger them.

feats.name: Ringmaster's Introduction
feats.description: You announce the triggering ally with a litany of their legendary achievements, spurring them to action.

feats.name: Rip and Tear
feats.description: You've learned to debilitate your enemies in the same way a hunter tears at their prey.

feats.name: Rippling Spin
feats.description: Reflective Ripple Stance
feats.campaign: After the triggering attack is done, Step

feats.name: Riptide (Archetype)
feats.description: You swirl water around you to make a current that pulls creatures closer.

feats.name: Riptide (Azarketi)
feats.description: Drag Down; Expert in Athletics
feats.source: Absalom, City of Lost Omens pg. 395, Azarketi Ancestry Web Supplement pg. 5
feats.source_book: Absalom, City of Lost Omens pg. 395, Azarketi Ancestry Web Supplement
feats.campaign: Drag a grabbed creature into nearby water

feats.name: Riptide Mount
feats.description: After working with aquatic beasts of burden for years, you have learned how to easily mount and dismount them.

feats.name: Rise Up!
feats.description: Sometimes, you must even slip the chains of gravity to rebel.

feats.name: Rise, My Creature!
feats.description: You have created life! You have usurped the power of the gods themselves!

feats.name: Rising Blood Magic
feats.description: The power within your blood grows.

feats.name: Rising Hurricane
feats.description: A hurricane lifts your enemies into the air before bringing them crashing down in a bloody rain.

feats.name: Risky Reload
feats.description: You've practiced a technique for rapidly reloading your firearm, but attempting to use this technique is a dangerous gamble with your firearm's functionality.

feats.name: Risky Surgery
feats.description: Your surgery can bring a patient back from the brink of death, but might push them over the edge.

feats.name: Rites of Convocation
feats.description: Your patron grants you the power to summon other creatures to aid you.

feats.name: Rites of Transfiguration
feats.description: You can adapt your patron’s power to transform other creatures into forms more befitting their behavior or your whims.

feats.name: Ritual Researcher
feats.description: Careful research into the art of rituals has made you better at performing them.

feats.name: Ritual Reversion
feats.description: You can temporarily revert to a less conspicuous form without diminishing your senses.

feats.name: River Adaptation
feats.description: Webbing sprouts on your legs and tail as you shift to a more aquatic form.

feats.name: Rivethun Adept
feats.description: Your ability to wield spirit magic has increased.

feats.name: Rivethun Devotion
feats.description: Through study, dedication, and introspection, you’ve learned to wield magic that affects the spirit.

feats.name: Rivethun Disciple
feats.description: By studying with the dwarven shamans of Highhelm, you have become aware of the friction between your body and spirit.

feats.name: Rivethun Emissary Dedication
feats.description: You’re a practicing Rivethun emissary, skilled at interacting and bonding with the spirits of living creatures.
feats.prerequisites: Trained in Diplomacy; Trained in Religion

feats.name: Rivethun Invoker Dedication
feats.description: You’re a practicing Rivethun invoker, able to enter a trance that connects you physically and mentally to surrounding spirits.
feats.prerequisites: Trained in Athletics; Trained in Religion

feats.name: Rivethun Involutionist Dedication
feats.description: You’re a practicing Rivethun involutionist, with a deep well of inner power.
feats.prerequisites: Trained in Nature; Trained in Religion

feats.name: Rivethun Spiritual Attunement
feats.description: Your time spent among the Rivethun has heightened your awareness of animate spirits around you, giving you the ability to sense them briefly.

feats.name: Roadkill
feats.description: In your hands, any vehicle is a weapon.

feats.name: Roar Mimicry
feats.description: You unleash a roar so loud that it's felt as deeply as it's heard.
feats.prerequisites: Wild Mimic Dedication; you have been targeted by a creature’s auditory ability that effects an area or have identified a creature with an auditory ability that effects an area

feats.name: Roaring Heart
feats.description: You surge forward inexorably.

feats.name: Robust Health
feats.description: Your physiology responds well to first aid.

feats.name: Robust Recovery
feats.description: Expert in Medicine
feats.campaign: Greater benefits from Treat Disease and Treat Poison

feats.name: Rock Rampart
feats.description: Drawing on your connection to the Plane of Earth, you form a wall of rock and earth.

feats.name: Rock Runner
feats.description: Your innate connection to stone makes you adept at moving across uneven surfaces.

feats.name: Rockslide Spell
feats.description: You enhance your spell with elemental earth, causing chunks of stone to litter the ground.
feats.prerequisites: Elementalist Dedication; earth is in your elemental philosophy

feats.name: Rocky Flesh
feats.description: Your flesh takes on the hardness of stone.
feats.source: Pathfinder #195: Heavy is the Crown pg. 83

feats.name: Rod of Rule
feats.description: Your personal rune is connected more closely to your arcane bond.

feats.name: Rogue Dedication
feats.description: You gain a skill feat and the rogue’s surprise attack class feature.

feats.name: Roiling Mudslide
feats.description: You form water and earth into a mudslide that smashes your opponents and coats them in mud.

feats.name: Rokoan Arts
feats.description: Ancestral spirits have begun to bond themselves to you, granting you powers characteristic of a rokoa.

feats.name: Roll the Bones of Fate
feats.description: You roll a handful of bones to learn (or perhaps influence) the future course of events.

feats.name: Roll with It (Goblin)
feats.description: When you take a big hit, your foe bounces you around like a rubber ball, but you escape the worst of the blow.

feats.name: Roll with It (Ranger)
feats.description: You can dodge attacks from giants.

feats.name: Rolling Landing
feats.description: You land with quick rolls that help you keep your momentum.

feats.name: Rolling White Bottle Form
feats.description: As you fall to the ground, you transform into a white bottle, gourd, or sake jar, then roll away before anyone can pick you up.

feats.name: Root Magic
feats.description: Your talismans ward against foul magic.

feats.name: Root to Life
feats.description: Marigold, spider lily, pennyroyal—many primal traditions connect flowers and plants with the boundary between life and death, and you can leverage this association to keep an ally on this side of the line.

feats.name: Rope Mastery
feats.description: Ropes are your tool of choice, and you deploy them in versatile ways.
feats.prerequisites: Golden League Xun Dedication; Expert in Athletics

feats.name: Rose Warden Dedication
feats.description: As a follower of the Everbloom, you stand up against tyranny and oppression, understanding that revolution against an unjust ruler must sometimes be enacted in secret.
feats.prerequisites: Trained in Stealth; you worship Milani

feats.name: Rotten Slurry
feats.description: You expel a glob of rotten, foul-smelling slurry from your torso, hand, or mouth at a foe.
feats.source: Pathfinder #202: Severed at the Root pg. 74

feats.name: Rough Rider
feats.description: You are especially good at riding traditional goblin mounts.

feats.name: Rough Terrain Stance
feats.description: You enter a stance that makes it difficult to move around you.

feats.name: Round Ears
feats.description: Your elven lineage is subtle enough that you look barely different from other humans, and you’ve learned to use that to your advantage.

feats.name: Rouse the Dreaming Relic
feats.description: The spirit within your pusaka resonates with other magical items in your possession.

feats.name: Rouse the Forest's Fury
feats.description: Terrifying trees attack your enemies.

feats.name: Ru-Shi
feats.description: You were born to a jiang-shi, one of the so-called hopping vampires found most often in Tian-Xia.

feats.name: Rubbery Skin
feats.description: Your skin develops a malleable, rubbery quality.

feats.name: Ruby Resurrection
feats.description: In a burst of flame, you return to health like a phoenix rising from the ashes.
feats.source: Pathfinder #168: King of the Mountain pg. 76

feats.name: Rule of Three
feats.description: Heroes learn from their previous failures, often succeeding on the third attempt.
feats.source: Pathfinder #170: Spoken on the Song Wind pg. 78
feats.source_book: Pathfinder #170: Spoken on the Song Wind

feats.name: Runelord Dedication
feats.description: Your connection to your sin suffuses all magic you use.

feats.name: Runescarred Dedication
feats.description: Overwhelming magic has branded your body with powerful runes.

feats.name: Runic Impression
feats.description: You can temporarily replicate the effects of a property rune for your weapon or unarmed attacks.

feats.name: Runic Mind Smithing
feats.description: You focus your mind on thoughtforms of fundamental magical forces, shaping them into a property rune that you mentally etch onto your mind weapon.

feats.name: Running Kick
feats.description: Your companion weaves in and out of combat, swiftly attacking before getting to a better position.
feats.prerequisites: Beastmaster Dedication; animal companion with a foot, hoof, or talon unarmed attack

feats.name: Running Reload
feats.description: You can reload your weapon on the move.
feats.source: Player Core pg. 159, Guns & Gears (Remastered) pg. 112

feats.name: Runtsage
feats.description: Unlike most of your kind, who dismiss goblins as embarrassments or expendable annoyances, you have studied the methodology behind their irresponsible and incomprehensible actions.

feats.name: Rupture Stomp
feats.description: Every dwarf knows that the rock they walk upon can be either a best friend or a treacherous path.

feats.name: Rushing Boar
feats.description: You embrace the pain of the triggering attack, allowing it to drive you into a violent rush.

feats.name: Rushing Goat Stance
feats.description: You enter the stance of an unruly goat, lowering your body and preparing to butt heads with your foes.

feats.name: Ruthless Orator
feats.description: You were once cast in the role of Daronlyr XII, one of Taldor’s most ambitious rulers who slew his cousin to seize the crown, yet somehow still managed to convince the entire Ulfen Guard to swear loyalty to him simply through his powers of oration.

feats.name: Saber Teeth
feats.description: You have long fangs, natural or augmented.

feats.name: Sabotage
feats.description: You subtly damage others’ equipment.

feats.name: Sacral Lord
feats.description: By right of ritual or sheer stubbornness, you have claimed rulership of the land.
feats.prerequisites: Trained in Occultism or Trained in Religion

feats.name: Sacral Monarch
feats.description: You have come into your full powers and are truly a monarch of your realm, by your own definition at least.
feats.prerequisites: Sacral Lord; Master in Occultism or Master in Religion

feats.name: Sacred Armaments
feats.description: Through the power of your faith or the blessing of a priest, your weapons are fully effective against incorporeal creatures.

feats.name: Sacred Defender
feats.description: You are a great warrior that can stand strong against the fiercest opponents to your cause.

feats.name: Sacred Defense
feats.description: You call upon your deity to grant you their protective blessing
feats.prerequisites: Master in Religion; you follow a deity

feats.name: Sacred Ground
feats.description: You pray continuously for 1 minute to call a subtle shadow of your deity’s realm over a 30-foot burst centered on you.

feats.name: Sacred Ki
feats.description: Ki Strike; you follow a deity
feats.campaign: The power of your faith suffuses your ki

feats.name: Sacred Spells
feats.description: Add chill touch, death ward, disrupt undead, disrupting weapons, holy cascade, magic stone, and sunburst to your spell list.

feats.name: Sacred Weapon
feats.description: You’re a living weapon honed to destroy fiends.

feats.name: Sacred Wilds Oath
feats.description: You’ve sworn an oath to protect the holy places within nature and the spirits that dwell within, from ancient trees to primordial wild guardians.

feats.name: Sacrifice Armor
feats.description: With divine awareness, you twist your body to lessen the impact of an attack.

feats.name: Safe Elements
feats.description: Elements are wild and dangerous, but you've found ways to reduce their risk.

feats.name: Safeguard Soul
feats.description: You've girded your soul against outside interference.

feats.name: Safeguard Spell
feats.description: You are inured to the effects of your own spells.

feats.name: Safety Measures
feats.description: You're often careful to be sure you're not hoisted on your own petard, or anyone else's, for that matter.

feats.name: Sage of Scattered Leaves
feats.description: The epics of your people’s tragic yet proud history blaze like burning leaves in the forests of ancestral memory.

feats.name: Sailfish Strike
feats.description: You've learned how to convert your upward momentum into a powerful attack.

feats.name: Salt Kissed
feats.description: You have a supernatural ability to survive at sea and keep your companions from drowning.

feats.name: Samsaran Lore
feats.description: You have untold ages of knowledge beneath your belt, focused on the pursuit of enlightenment.

feats.name: Samsaran Weapon Memory
feats.description: The training of your past lives and even of those of samsarans who came before is deep-seated and guides your movements in combat.

feats.name: Sanctified Soul
feats.description: You’ve drawn a line in the sand in the cosmic struggle between good and evil and chosen a side.

feats.name: Sanctify Armament
feats.description: You touch a weapon and bring it into concordance with your deity.

feats.name: Sanctify Water
feats.description: You imbue water with your deity's blessing.
feats.prerequisites: Expert in Religion; you follow a deity with “holy” or “unholy” sanctification

feats.name: Sand Snatcher
feats.description: A figure of sand with grasping arms arises in an unoccupied square within 30 feet.

feats.name: Sanguimancer Dedication
feats.description: You can draw and manipulate energy from blood. You store life energy in the form of special temporary Hit Points and spend it to manifest powerful effects.

feats.name: Sanguine Tenacity
feats.description: Your blood carries permanent regenerative properties.

feats.name: Sanguivolent Roots
feats.description: Blood-drinking vines grow from the ground in a 15-foot burst within 120 feet.

feats.name: Saoc Astrology
feats.description: The ancient Saoc Brethren were the masters of astrology, and while your knowledge may be but a pale shadow of their wisdom, it still comes in handy.

feats.name: Sap Life
feats.description: You draw the life force out of your enemies.

feats.name: Sapping Symbol
feats.description: Your religious symbol glows with sacred energy, turning the attacker’s strength to weakness.

feats.name: Sarangay Lore
feats.description: You listened carefully to the tales passed down among your community.

feats.name: Sash of the Wind
feats.description: At your request, the nature spirits of the air and wind spin themselves into an iridescent sash loosely draped around your shoulders that buoys you through the sky.

feats.name: Savage Critical
feats.description: The wounds you inflict are grievous.

feats.name: Saving Slash
feats.description: You quickly whirl your blade, trying to deflect enough momentum to avoid the worst of the attack.

feats.name: Say that Again!
feats.description: The world is full of obnoxious weasels who think they can pull one over on you—put them in their place! When an adjacent creature attempts to Lie to you or to Demoralize you and gets a critical failure on the roll, you can use your reaction to make a Shove attempt against that opponent.

feats.name: Scalding Spit
feats.description: Your bodily fluids burn with surprising volatility, as if you ran on oil instead of blood.

feats.name: Scales of Steel
feats.description: Your scales are hard as armor, ensuring you always have some protection in the dangerous world.

feats.name: Scaling Poppet
feats.description: Your construction integrates ropes, hooks, or other tools to help you move across steep surfaces.

feats.name: Scalpel's Point
feats.description: Your stratagems benefit from your precise knowledge of anatomy.

feats.name: Scaly Hide
feats.description: You were born with a layer of scales across your entire body that resemble those of your draconic progenitor.

feats.name: Scamper
feats.description: You Stride up to your Speed, with a +5-foot status bonus to your Speed, and you gain a +2 circumstance bonus to AC against reactions triggered by this movement.

feats.name: Scamper Underfoot
feats.description: You are used to ducking under foes and can scurry around the battlefield with ease.

feats.name: Scapegoat Parallel Self
feats.description: You've realized a way to manipulate the effects of your oracular curse.
feats.source: Pathfinder #168: King of the Mountain pg. 76

feats.name: Scar-Thick Skin
feats.description: Glorious, storied scars cover and protect much of your body, girding you in fleshly armor that resists any wound weaker than those you have already survived.

feats.name: Scare to Death
feats.description: Legendary in Intimidation
feats.campaign: Scare a target so much, they might die

feats.name: Scarecrow
feats.description: You fight fiercely to protect your crop.

feats.name: Scarlet Strands
feats.description: The innate magic in your blood turns your signature crimson tresses into more than just a stylish coiffure.

feats.name: Scarred Hide
feats.description: Your hide is an impenetrable mass of scars, accrued over countless bloody conflicts.

feats.name: Scars of Steel
feats.description: When you are struck with the mightiest of blows, you can flex your muscles to turn aside some of the damage.

feats.name: Scatter Blast
feats.description: You pack your weapon with additional shot and powder, creating a risky but devastating wave of destruction.

feats.name: Scatter Swarm
feats.description: Your patron reaches through your familiar to magically disperse a group of smaller threats.

feats.name: Scattered Fire
feats.description: When you cast fireball, you can modify its area to be two non-overlapping 10-foot bursts.
feats.prerequisites: Spell Trickster Dedication; ability to cast fireball

feats.name: Scattering Charge
feats.description: You charge into a group of enemies to send them flying.

feats.name: Scattering in Spring
feats.description: You evade an incoming attack by twisting your enemy’s tactics in your favor.

feats.name: Scavenger's Search
feats.description: You're always on the lookout for supplies and valuables.

feats.name: Scholar's Hunch
feats.description: Scholarly debates have taught you to think on your feet.

feats.name: Scholar's Inheritance
feats.description: Your parents devoted themselves to alchemical experiments involving elemental energy.

feats.name: Scholarly Defense
feats.description: Your knowledge of strange creatures and their bizarre anatomy allows you to anticipate their physical attacks and reduce the damage you take from them.
feats.source: Pathfinder #164: Hands of the Devil pg. 76

feats.name: Scholastic Identification
feats.description: You have the knowledge needed to understand ancient texts and cultural artifacts.

feats.name: School Counterspell
feats.description: Your intricate knowledge of your school lets you easily negate spells from that school.

feats.name: School Spell Redirection
feats.description: When you Counterspell a spell with a school matching your specialization, if you critically succeed at your counteract check, or if you succeed while using a spell of a higher level than the spell you countered, you can redirect the spell you countered.

feats.name: Schooled in Secrets
feats.description: Gather Information about and Impersonate members of secret societies

feats.name: Scintillating Spell
feats.description: Your spells become a radiant display of light and color.
feats.source: Player Core pg. 204, Player Core 2 pg. 157

feats.name: Scion of Domora Dedication
feats.description: You gain a spirit guide ally.
feats.prerequisites: Familiar Master Dedication; you have befriended a spirit guide and it bonded with you using its Bond to Mortal ability.

feats.name: Scion of Many Planes
feats.description: The long and complicated history of your bloodline manifests in your ability to draw power from more planar sources than most other nephilim.

feats.name: Scion Transformation
feats.description: You go into hibernation for twenty-four hours and perform a ritual dedicated to your ancestors, undergoing a one-time metamorphosis.

feats.name: Scorched on the Crackling Mountain
feats.description: By ritualistically marking your fur with fire, like an infamous tanuki of legend, you protect yourself against future flames.

feats.name: Scorching Column
feats.description: With an upward gesture, you shape a vertical column of extreme heat.

feats.name: Scorching Disarm
feats.description: You make a weapon unbearable to hold.

feats.name: Scoundrel's Surprise
feats.description: You drop your disguise at the right moment and surprise your target.

feats.name: Scour the Library
feats.description: Seeing an enemy's attack, you quickly consult multiple scraps of lore in your mind, synthesizing them into the perfect plan.

feats.name: Scouring Rage
feats.description: You emit a powerful surge of instinctual energy when you unleash your anger.
feats.prerequisites: an instinct that allows you to change your additional damage from Rage to a different damage type

feats.name: Scout's Warning
feats.description: You visually or audibly warn your allies of danger, granting them each a +1 circumstance bonus to their initiative rolls.

feats.name: Scrap Barricade
feats.description: Ragged pieces of metal weld together into a ramshackle structure.

feats.name: Scroll Adept
feats.description: During your daily preparations, you can create two temporary scrolls containing arcane spells from your spellbook.

feats.name: Scroll Esoterica
feats.description: Your esoterica includes scraps of scriptures, magic tomes, druidic markings, and the like, which you can use to create temporary scrolls.

feats.name: Scroll Thaumaturgy
feats.description: Your multidisciplinary study of magic means you know how to activate the magic in scrolls with ease.

feats.name: Scrollmaster Dedication
feats.description: Your experience chronicling adventures and discoveries grants you heightened discernment and memory.
feats.prerequisites: expert in any Lore skill; member of the Pathfinder Society affiliated with the School of Scrolls

feats.name: Scrutinizing Gaze
feats.description: Your family's traditions of defending against Geb's undead have granted you a sixth sense for detecting spirits, haunts, and other restless dead, no matter their form or the strength of their presence.

feats.name: Sculpt Shadows
feats.description: You coax nearby shadows into the shape of a simple weapon or a simple tool or item, using a tiny piece of your shadow to make it solid; in doing so, you lose 1 Hit Point.

feats.name: Scurry!
feats.description: Your instincts to move to safety are strong.

feats.name: Scuttle Up
feats.description: Your environment requires you to climb cave walls or tree trunks with great regularity.

feats.name: Sea Glass Guardians
feats.description: Eerily beautiful elemental water beings race around you, eager to protect and heal you and your allies.

feats.name: Sea Legs
feats.description: You are comfortable on the water for short bursts.
feats.prerequisites: You don't have a swim Speed.

feats.name: Sea Witch
feats.description: You've studied the waves, and they obey your will as extensions of your own fin.

feats.name: Seal of the Golden Dragon
feats.description: Your familiar coils around you, protecting you with its magical resistance.
feats.prerequisites: Familiar Sage Dedication; Golden Dragon's Bounty

feats.name: Sealed Poppet
feats.description: You've reinforced your interior parts with sealant or other flame-retardant materials, protecting you from fire.

feats.name: Searing Restoration
feats.description: They told you there was no way that explosions could heal people, but they were fools… Fools who didn't understand your brilliance! You create a minor explosion from your innovation, altering the combustion to cauterize wounds using vaporized medicinal herbs.

feats.name: Seasoned
feats.description: +1 to Craft food and drink, including elixirs and potions
feats.prerequisites: Trained in Alcohol Lore, Trained in Cooking Lore, or Trained in Crafting

feats.name: Seasong
feats.description: Secret Speech
feats.prerequisites: Sound carries far beneath the waves, and your people have strong, enchanting voices.
notes: Learn the secret language of a society.

feats.name: Second Blessing
feats.description: Your continued service grants you another boon.

feats.name: Second Ikon
feats.description: You gain an additional ikon, selected from those listed here.

feats.name: Second Sting
feats.description: Secret Eater
feats.prerequisites: You read your prey’s movements and transform them into openings, so failures with one weapon set up glancing blows with the other.
notes: You have discovered and found favor with the cult within the church of Kabriri known as the Secret Eaters.

feats.name: Second Thoughts
feats.description: When your target proves resilient to your magical deceptions, you can try them again on someone else.

feats.name: Second Wind
feats.description: You can enter a second rage, but afterward you need to catch your breath.

feats.name: Secondary Adaptation
feats.description: You've continued to adapt to the rigors of your environment by continuing your metamorphosis, even as an adult.

feats.name: Secondary Detonation Array
feats.description: You divert some of your spell’s energy into an unstable runic array.

feats.name: Secret Eyes
feats.description: You can call forth an invisible eye to let you peek on secrets.

feats.name: Secrets of Shadow
feats.description: Your shadow's voice grows ever clearer; it whispers secrets of true power to you and shields your flesh from harm.
notes: You've installed a self-destruct device within your construct companion, which you can trigger with a special device from up to 60 feet away.

feats.name: Secrets of Steel
feats.description: As your prowess with weapons increases, so does the ferocity of magic you channel through those weapons.

feats.name: Secrets of the Past
feats.description: You’ve established a stronger connection with your past selves and can play out the memories of your lifetimes in an instant, helping you draw on knowledge that lives deep within your mind.

feats.name: Security
feats.description: Those you shield can benefit from your lasting protection.

feats.name: See the Unseen
feats.description: You notice things that others can't see at all.

feats.name: See You in Hell
feats.description: You aren’t sure if you’ll be reincarnated again, so you might as well take this foe with you.

feats.name: Seedpod
feats.description: Your body produces a nearly endless supply of hard seedpods.

feats.name: Seeker of Truths
feats.description: Your devotion to discovering and hoarding abstruse truths borders on the fanatical, and you can bring this devotion to bear.
feats.source: Pathfinder #164: Hands of the Devil pg. 76

feats.name: Seize
feats.description: You seize your foe and pull it close.

feats.name: Seize Advantage
feats.description: You take the openings granted by your student's success to reposition yourself.

feats.name: Selective Energy
feats.description: As you call down divine power, you can prevent some enemies from benefiting or some allies from being hurt.

feats.name: Semblance of Life
feats.description: You draw the moisture you've drained from others into your own flesh, temporarily taking on the appearance of life.

feats.name: Seneschal Spell
feats.description: You can channel even complex spells through your connection to your charge.
notes: Pathfinder #157: Devil at the Dreaming Palace pg. 79
You read the body language of an intelligent creature within 30 feet and pick up on subtle cues to detect its general propensity for good or evil and law or chaos.
While in ursine form, you gain low-light vision and scent (imprecise) 30 feet.

feats.name: Seneschal Witch Dedication
feats.description: As you work to understand the connection with your missing patron, it’s increasingly easy to form bonds with those around you.

feats.name: Sense Allies
feats.description: Like many humans raised in a close-knit community, you have always been strongly attuned to the presence of others.

feats.name: Sense for Trouble
feats.description: You can tell when something's off.

feats.name: Sense Holiness
feats.description: The presence of goodness sickens you with its saccharine self-righteousness.

feats.name: Sense Iniquity
feats.description: Your Hellknight training gives you the ability to focus your senses and root out those who would attempt to deceive or hide from you.

feats.name: Sense Ki
feats.description: You can read the presence of ki in your area.

feats.name: Sense the Strike
feats.description: You sense how an incoming attack moves through ambient primal energy, predicting how best to dodge.
feats.prerequisites: Verduran Shadow Dedication; Master in Survival

feats.name: Sense the Unseen
feats.description: When you look for foes, you can catch even the slightest cues, such as their minute movements or the shifting of air currents on your skin.
feats.source: Player Core pg. 162, Player Core 2 pg. 112

feats.name: Sense Thoughts
feats.description: You have an even stranger knack for knowing what other people are thinking.

feats.name: Sense Unholiness
feats.description: You sense the truly wicked as a queasy or foreboding feeling.

feats.name: Sensitive Nose
feats.description: Your large black nose isn't just for show.

feats.name: Sentinel's Orbit
feats.description: Just as your constellation traverses the sky, so too can you.

feats.name: Sepulchral Sublimation
feats.description: You repurpose the negative energy that flows through your minions at a moment's notice.
feats.prerequisites: ability to create or control undead; cleric with a negative font, oracle of bones, or necromancer wizard

feats.name: Sequestered Spell
feats.description: You consumed so much of a type of magic as a larva that you can now cast it purely on instinct.

feats.name: Serpent's Tongue
feats.description: You subconsciously flick your tongue through the air to taste the world around you.

feats.name: Serpentcoil Slam
feats.description: Your people's ancient and storied rivalry with garudas led you to develop special techniques against flying foes.

feats.name: Serpentine Swimmer
feats.description: You undulate your body in a series of sinuous serpentine motions as you swim, drastically improving the speed at which you move through the water.

feats.name: Set-up Strike
feats.description: Your attack makes it difficult for your enemy to defend themselves against your allies' attacks.

feats.name: Settlement Scholastics
feats.description: Your studies open up new horizons.

feats.name: Seven Changes Performance
feats.description: While kitsune are known for their magical illusion powers, you’re skilled at stage magic, especially costuming and quick changes.

feats.name: Seven-Colored Cosmic Bridge
feats.description: Your divine spark shines in a riot of shimmering colors, capable of carrying you through the world as fast as light itself.

feats.name: Seven-Part Link
feats.description: By exchanging pieces of a seven-part set of esoterica, you create a magical web by which your allies can affect each other at a distance.

feats.name: Sever Magic
feats.description: You apply a frayed thread, a pinch of fulu ash, or a similar undone charm to your weapon, and swing to break a spell.

feats.name: Sever Space
feats.description: You destroy the space between you and your targets, allowing you to strike with your melee weapons at great range.
feats.source: Pathfinder #168: King of the Mountain pg. 77

feats.name: Sever the Dreaming Shadow
feats.description: As you whisper to your pusaka, it attempts to cut away an enemy’s shadow, leaving them in an eternal sleep.

feats.name: Shackleborn
feats.description: Your lineage shows the signs of velstrac tampering, including some curious quirk bequeathed by those shadowy surgeons of flesh and souls.

feats.name: Shadow Blending
feats.description: You draw shadows close to create a shroud.

feats.name: Shadow Hunter
feats.description: You blend in to your surroundings so well that others have trouble telling you apart from the terrain.

feats.name: Shadow Mark
feats.description: You have learned special tricks that help you follow individuals without them noticing you.

feats.name: Shadow of Death
feats.description: Strikes you make with your deity’s favored weapon against a creature with the doomed condition have the death trait, causing the target to be instantly killed when reduced to 0 Hit Points.

feats.name: Shadow of the Wilds
feats.description: It’s difficult to notice your passage through wild areas.

feats.name: Shadow Pact
feats.description: Thousands of years ago, your ancestors made a pact with Zon-Kuthon.

feats.name: Shadow Reservoir
feats.description: Your own shadow speaks to you, providing knowledge of spells and a reservoir of magical power.
feats.prerequisites: ability to cast spells from spell slots; Shadowcaster Dedication

feats.name: Shadow Self
feats.description: You slip from your adversaries' notice and appear to be somewhere else.

feats.name: Shadow Sight
feats.description: You draw on your connection with the Shadow Plane to see through all but the deepest darkness.

feats.name: Shadow Spell
feats.description: You attach a piece of your shadow to a spell to cloud the senses and cause mischief.

feats.name: Shadow Spells
feats.description: Hidden darkness whispers to you, teaching you secrets of shadow beyond other spellcasters of your tradition.

feats.name: Shadow Tempo
feats.description: As your ally moves past you, you match your movements to their rhythm, following them across the battlefield.

feats.name: Shadow's Assault
feats.description: Your shadow assaults your foes.

feats.name: Shadow's Web
feats.description: You can launch a wave of shadowy qi outward from your body, damaging your opponents and potentially binding them in place.

feats.name: Shadowcaster Dedication
feats.description: You've sacrificed a piece of your spirit, allowing the powers of shadow into your being and changing the nature of your magic.

feats.name: Shadowpiercing Charge
feats.description: You charge into the fray on horseback, and those that lurk in the shadows will feel your wrath.

feats.name: Shadowplay
feats.description: As your blow lands, you detach from your shadow to get the drop on your enemy.

feats.name: Shadows Within Shadows
feats.description: Your apparition possesses a furtive and elusive nature that can influence and blend with your spiritual energy to form a protective and nearly impenetrable shroud of nondetection around you.

feats.name: Shadowy Disguise
feats.description: You wrap yourself in shadow to change your appearance.

feats.name: Shaitan Magic
feats.description: The magic of shaitans runs through your blood.

feats.name: Shaitan Skin
feats.description: When in danger, you can harden the stone in your skin into armor, much like a shaitan.

feats.name: Shake It Off
feats.description: You concentrate on your rage, overcoming fear and fighting back sickness.

feats.name: Shake Off the Gods
feats.description: Your trust in the Pure Legion rushes forth as you fight off the influence of a god.

feats.name: Shall Not Falter, Shall Not Rout
feats.description: You gain the shall not falter, shall not rout focus spell.

feats.name: Shamble
feats.description: You may be slower than you were in life, but your pace is unfaltering.

feats.name: Shambling March
feats.description: Your horde is swifter, marching in time to your command.

feats.name: Shame the Sin
feats.description: Your conviction against the sins that all demons grow from is so strong that you can force a demon to suffer from its sins when you strike a sound blow against them.
feats.source: Pathfinder #210: Whispers in the Dirt pg. 80

feats.name: Shameless Request
feats.description: Master in Diplomacy
feats.campaign: Make Requests of others with lesser consequences

feats.name: Shape of the Cloud Dragon
feats.description: You've discovered how to transform yourself into a cloud dragon.

feats.name: Shapechanger's Intuition
feats.description: A lifetime of experience helps you see through disguises.

feats.name: Shaped Contaminant
feats.description: Through a combination of careful manipulation and precise breath control, you can deploy inhaled toxins precisely.
feats.source: Pathfinder #149: Against the Scarlet Triad pg. 78

feats.name: Shard Strike
feats.description: Jagged metal shards form in the air and lash out from you.

feats.name: Share Burden
feats.description: You draw the misfortune or curse into yourself, potentially enabling you to enter your curse maelstrom state.

feats.name: Share Eidolon Magic
feats.description: Your eidolon shares innate spells with you.

feats.name: Share Rage
feats.description: You stoke an ally's fury.

feats.name: Share Thoughts
feats.description: You have an uncanny knack of communicating with other elves without speaking, though this habit that is often uncomfortable to observers.
feats.prerequisites: Mualijae ethnicity, Ilverani ethnicity, or Vourinoi ethnicity

feats.name: Share Tincture
feats.description: You use Quick Tincture, and the item you create remains potent until the start of your next turn.

feats.name: Share Weakness
feats.description: You select an object from your esoterica that has great personal value to you, such as a locket or treasured ring, and you grant it to an adjacent ally, establishing a personal link that allows your ally to affect an enemy as if they were you.

feats.name: Shared Assault
feats.description: In the triumph of battle, you can share the glory with another ally.

feats.name: Shared Attunement
feats.description: When you would gain a benefit from your terrain attunement, you can grant it to one ally within 30 feet instead of yourself.

feats.name: Shared Avoidance
feats.description: You can project your premonitions of danger to your allies.

feats.name: Shared Clarity
feats.description: You can project your premonitions of clarity to your allies.

feats.name: Shared Dream
feats.description: You've learned to create a shared dreamscape to communicate with others.

feats.name: Shared Luck (Halfling)
feats.description: You are evidence that it’s lucky to travel with a halfling.

feats.name: Shared Mind, Shared Heart
feats.description: Your thoughts and dreams are your student's thoughts and dreams, and vice versa.

feats.name: Shared Overdrive
feats.description: You've experimented enough on your teammates to transfer a substantial number of powered-up gizmos to them, enabling one of your allies to benefit from the full effects and duration of your Overdrive.

feats.name: Shared Prey
feats.description: Hunting as a duo, you and your ally both single out your prey.

feats.name: Shared Replenishment
feats.description: When your deity blesses your warlike acts, you can extend that favor to your allies.

feats.name: Shared Sight
feats.description: You bestow the mystical vision granted to you by your muse upon your allies.

feats.name: Shared Stratagem
feats.description: The plans you make include your allies as well as yourself.

feats.name: Shared Synergy
feats.description: You can grant the benefit from Dualistic Synergy to an ally within 30 feet instead of yourself, either allowing that ally to Recall Knowledge, granting that ally temporary Hit Points, or both, depending on the spell’s tradition.

feats.name: Shared Tide
feats.description: You Swim up to twice the normal distance.
feats.prerequisites: Werecreature Dedication; your animal shape has a swim Speed

feats.name: Shared Warding
feats.description: You ward your allies from the attacks of your foes whenever you apply those protections to yourself.

feats.name: Sharpened Senses
feats.description: Your senses have become so sharp that you notice changes subconsciously.

feats.name: Shatter Defenses
feats.description: Your offense exploits your enemy’s fear.

feats.name: Shatter Space
feats.description: The sheer power of your magic fractures reality.

feats.name: Shattered Sacrament
feats.description: When Vigil fell to Tar-Baphon’s Radiant Fire, that lost innocence brought you a deeper understanding of what faith means in the context of your own magic.
feats.prerequisites: Halcyon Speaker Dedication; Cascade Bearer's Spellcasting

feats.name: Shattering Blows
feats.description: Your forceful blows shatter objects with ease.

feats.name: Shattering Shot
feats.description: You fling a bomb into the air and then shoot it with your gun before it falls, raining destruction down over a wide area.

feats.name: Shattering Spellstrike
feats.description: You intentionally channel a rampaging cascade of magic through your weapon, breaking it to deal more damage.

feats.name: Shattering Strike (Monk)
feats.description: The force of your considered blow shatters objects and defenses alike.

feats.name: Shattershields
feats.description: Four plates of pitted metal float around you to intercept attacks.

feats.name: Shed Tail
feats.description: You can shed a portion of your tail to escape.

feats.name: Sheltering Cave
feats.description: You spend 10 minutes communing with spirits of earth and stone, requesting shelter.

feats.name: Sheltering Jewel
feats.description: Your head gem has accessed the power of the full moon through your determination to heal and protect your loved ones.

feats.name: Sheltering Pulse
feats.description: You thrust your hand or weapon into the ground and release a pulse that creates a sheltering nexus of energy for you and your allies.

feats.name: Sheltering Slab
feats.description: The stone around you is your ally, and you have learned to use it to shore up your weaknesses.

feats.name: Sheltering Wing
feats.description: You raise your fledgling wings to protect you from attack, gaining a +1 circumstance bonus to AC and to saving throws against spells that target you until the start of your next turn.

feats.name: Shepherd of Desolation
feats.description: You know how to keep others alive in the Gravelands' murkiest shadows.
feats.prerequisites: Knight Reclaimant Dedication; Survivor of Desolation

feats.name: Shield Block
feats.description: Ward off a blow with your shield

feats.name: Shield from Arrows
feats.description: You place your shield in the path of an oncoming projectile.

feats.name: Shield from Spells
feats.description: Your prowess with a shield allows you to block magic and more.

feats.name: Shield of Faith
feats.description: Residual energy from your domain spells bolsters your defenses.

feats.name: Shield of Grace
feats.description: You protect an ally with both your shield and your body.

feats.name: Shield of Reckoning
feats.description: When you shield your ally against an attack, you call upon your power to protect your ally further.
feats.prerequisites: Shield Warden; blessed shield, champion's reaction

feats.name: Shield of Stone
feats.description: You stole a gorgon’s gaze and trapped it in your ikon.
feats.source: Pathfinder #217: Death Sails a Wine-Dark Sea pg. 79
feats.source_book: Pathfinder #217: Death Sails a Wine-Dark Sea

feats.name: Shield Paragon
feats.description: Your shield is a vessel of divine protection.
notes: Pathfinder #174: Shadows of the Ancients pg. 78
Your mask holds the legacy of Black Heron, the Wings of Knowledge, who united the aeromancers of the Shory Empire.

feats.name: Shield Spell Reinforcement
feats.description: You can empower your defensive magic by channeling it through a physical shield.
feats.prerequisites: War Mage Dedication; you can cast the shield cantrip

feats.name: Shield the Faithful
feats.description: You and those closest to you are protected by your deity’s power.

feats.name: Shield Wall
feats.description: You use your shield in tandem with an ally's, forming a barricade.

feats.name: Shield Wallop
feats.description: Attacks with your shield knock the sense out of your foes.

feats.name: Shield Warden
feats.description: When you have a shield raised, you can use your Shield Block reaction when an attack is made against an ally adjacent to you.
feats.source: Player Core pg. 145, Player Core 2 pg. 96

feats.name: Shield Warfare
feats.description: You know how to use shields offensively far better than most.

feats.name: Shield your Eyes
feats.description: You reflexively place your shield between your eyes and visual dangers.

feats.name: Shielded Attrition
feats.description: You provoke attacks from foes that might otherwise stop your allies from moving.

feats.name: Shielded Recovery
feats.description: You can bandage wounds with the same hand you use to hold your shield.

feats.name: Shielded Stride
feats.description: When your shield is up, your enemies’ blows can’t touch you.

feats.name: Shielded Tome
feats.description: During your daily preparations, you can magically fuse a shield into your favorite book, where it appears as an elaborate bookmark.

feats.name: Shielding Formation
feats.description: You have mastered unique magical techniques designed to protect your allies from harm.

feats.name: Shielding Taunt
feats.description: By banging loudly on your shield, you get the attention of even the most stubborn of foes.

feats.name: Shieldmarshal Dedication
feats.description: Your elite shieldmarshal training makes you equally at home in the squalor of Smokeside and the splendor of Skyside.

feats.name: Shift Horde
feats.description: With a wave of your hand, your risen undead horde collapses and another one rises to take its place.

feats.name: Shift Spell
feats.description: You move an active spell's area to a new location.

feats.name: Shift the Little Ones
feats.description: With your large size, you need to be careful around your smaller friends.

feats.name: Shifting Faces
feats.description: You wear many faces, even those that don't belong to you.

feats.name: Shifting Terrain
feats.description: You slam your fist into the ground or twirl your arms about to cause the terrain around you to shift and ripple, potentially throwing others off balance.
feats.prerequisites: Rough Terrain Stance; Master in Nature

feats.name: Shining Arms
feats.description: When you cast light, you can modify its target to be 1 melee weapon.
feats.prerequisites: Spell Trickster Dedication; ability to cast light

feats.name: Shinstabber
feats.description: As long as you're Small or smaller, you can end your movement in the same square as an ally of any size.

feats.name: Shiny Button Eyes
feats.description: You've polished your eyes to reflect the smallest details in dimmest light.

feats.name: Ship's Shadow
feats.description: After extensive training around and on board ships, you've learned how to use their size and contours to conceal yourself.
feats.prerequisites: Undersea Privateer Dedication; Expert in Stealth

feats.name: Shisk Lore
feats.description: You hoard knowledge like a dragon hoards gold.

feats.name: Shoki's Argument
feats.description: You feel a connection to shokis, the rambling collectors of wayward souls, and might have found old texts written by one.

feats.name: Shoony Lore
feats.description: Growing up in shoony society, you learned the value of honesty, friendship, and hard work, even during trying times.

feats.name: Shooter's Camouflage
feats.description: You specialize in blending into a particular type of environment, able to disappear after taking your shot.

feats.name: Shooting Stars Stance
feats.description: You enter a stance that lets you throw shuriken with lightning speed.

feats.name: Shore Gift
feats.description: Using old magic, you slip off your tail like an item of clothing and walk on two feet, resembling a humanoid ancestry, usually human but possibly elf, half-elf, or something stranger.

feats.name: Shore Step
feats.description: The shallows and tide pools have always called to you and let you pass unhindered.

feats.name: Shorthanded
feats.description: You can operate a siege weapon with fewer than the minimum number of crew, at an increasing penalty.

feats.name: Shory Aerialist
feats.description: Unique in Golarion’s history, the Shory people developed fighting styles dedicated to combat in the air.
feats.prerequisites: Garundi ethnicity, Mauxi ethnicity, or Tian-Yae ethnicity; Shory Aeromancer or ability to cast fly

feats.name: Shory Aeromancer
feats.description: Your ancestors hailed from the flying cities of the Shory, and a few simple tricks have come down through the ages to you.
feats.prerequisites: Garundi ethnicity, Mauxi ethnicity, or Tian-Yae ethnicity

feats.name: Shoulder Catastrophe
feats.description: You’ve trained to protect your allies by diverting the worst attacks to yourself.

feats.name: Shoulder Check
