feats.description: You hit a foe with your armor to throw them off balance.

feats.name: Shove Down
feats.description: You leverage your weight to topple foes that you move.

feats.name: Show-Off
feats.description: As is the tradition with many Firebrands, you call your shot and look to impress with an extra bit of panache or a greater stunt.

feats.name: Showstopper
feats.description: Your twirling weapons create a grand distraction that's difficult to look away from.

feats.name: Shrink Down
feats.description: Your eidolon can shrink to fit into small spaces.

feats.name: Shroud of Ghosts
feats.description: Your ikon is connected to the world of the spirits, allowing you to partially fade into their realm.

feats.name: Shroud of the Seas
feats.description: You've learned to camouflage yourself among the shadows and currents of the ocean so you're hard to see from above.

feats.name: Shrouded Magic
feats.description: Choose one cantrip from the occult spell list.

feats.name: Shrouded Mien
feats.description: You're used to dealing with dangerous situations and sinister creatures.

feats.name: Sickening Bite
feats.description: Your saliva causes severe nausea and mild fever in the living, weakening them so that you can more easily finish them off.

feats.name: Side by Side (Druid)
feats.description: You and your animal companion fight in tandem, distracting your foes and keeping them off balance.

feats.name: Side by Side (Ranger)
feats.description: You and your animal companion fight in tandem.

feats.name: Sidestep
feats.description: You deftly step out of the way of an attack, letting the blow continue.

feats.name: Siege Celerity
feats.description: You push yourself and your light mortar beyond your limits.

feats.name: Siege Ritualist
feats.description: Sometimes, magical warfare requires the application of more complex arcana.

feats.name: Sign Language
feats.description: Trained in Society

feats.name: Signature Crafting
feats.description: Magic items you create bear a stamp specific to your handiwork.

feats.name: Signature Spell Expansion
feats.description: Your innate connection to magic lets you cast more spells with greater freedom.

feats.name: Signature Synergy
feats.description: Your eidolon gains an evolution integral to its form, and it comes more easily than your other synergies.

feats.name: Signature Weapon
feats.description: Your energy saturates one of your weapons; it might be one inherited or one tied to your history.

feats.name: Signifer Armor Expertise
feats.description: You’ve spent enough time helping your comrades equip medium and heavy armor that you spread your own expertise to those armors as well.

feats.name: Signifer's Sight (Lvl 10) #1
feats.description: The magic flowing through your signifer’s mask allows you to see in the dark, and the mask dampens the distraction caused by sudden flashes of bright light.

feats.name: Signifer's Sight (Lvl 10) #2
feats.description: The magic flowing through your signifer's mask allows you to see in the dark, and the mask dampens the distraction caused by sudden flashes of bright light.

feats.name: Silence the Profane (Avenger)
feats.description: Your training included instruction on how to prevent enemy priests from using their magic against you, a technique you have now mastered and adapted.

feats.name: Silence the Profane (Vindicator)
feats.description: Your training included instruction on how to prevent enemy spellcasters from using their prayers against you.

feats.name: Silencing Strike
feats.description: A quick strike to the face or mouth silences your opponent.

feats.name: Silent Step
feats.description: You Step, then Hide or Sneak.

feats.name: Silent Sting
feats.description: You quickly hide your weapon to make it difficult to pin the attack on you.
feats.prerequisites: Golden League Xun Dedication; Expert in Stealth

feats.name: Silent Stone
feats.description: You've lived in the shadow of the Shattered Range, and the patience of those ancient mountains expresses itself in your stillness.

feats.name: Silk Bracelet
feats.description: Taking inspiration from Desna’s image as a giant silk moth in Tian Xia, you’ve attached a bracelet to your innovation that generates ultra-strong silk strands mixed with venom.
feats.prerequisites: armor innovation, construct innovation, or weapon innovation

feats.name: Silver's Refrain
feats.description: Learn the silver's refrain composition cantrip.

feats.name: Simple Crystal Magic
feats.description: You are capable of seeing magic as flowing runes and can scribe a personal rune that represents you.
feats.source: Pathfinder #148: Fires of the Haunted City pg. 74
feats.source_book: Pathfinder #148: Fires of the Haunted City

feats.name: Simultaneous Strike
feats.description: Moving in unison, you and your student unleash an attack against a foe.

feats.name: Sin Counterspell
feats.description: Your deep connection to a specific sin allows you to easily negate spells that sin opposes.

feats.name: Sin Reservoir
feats.description: During your daily preparations, you can indulge in your associated sin or meditate on its values (and risks).

feats.name: Sinbladed Spell
feats.description: You punctuate your spellcasting with a flourish of your weapon, imparting physical force to your magic.

feats.name: Sing to the Steel
feats.description: You strike magical tones that can turn the tide of combat.
feats.source: Pathfinder #170: Spoken on the Song Wind pg. 79
feats.source_book: Pathfinder #170: Spoken on the Song Wind
notes: Fists of the Ruby Phoenix Hardcover pg. 223, Pathfinder #167: Ready? Fight! pg. 77
You stand firm, steeling your mind and body, allowing you to use your magic unperturbed.

feats.name: Sinister Appearance
feats.description: You possess horns, a tail, or red eyes, or could otherwise be mistaken for a tiefling.

feats.name: Sink and Swim
feats.description: Your body looks like it's made of flowing water, clear and pristine, providing a natural grace to all your movements
feats.prerequisites: You've been brought to 0 Hit Points by an enemy that has the water trait or an enemy's ability that has the water trait.
notes: Fists of the Ruby Phoenix Hardcover pg. 223, Pathfinder #167: Ready? Fight! pg. 77
You align your magical and physical potential.

feats.name: Sinking Jaws
feats.description: Like how a constrictor wraps itself around its next meal, your companion tightens its teeth around its constrained prey to squeeze the life out of it.
feats.prerequisites: Beastmaster Dedication; animal companion with a jaws or fangs unarmed attack

feats.name: Siphon Life
feats.description: Experiences with necromantic energy have left a permanent mark on you.
feats.prerequisites: You've been reduced to 0 Hit Points by an enemy with the void trait.
notes: Fists of the Ruby Phoenix Hardcover pg. 223, Pathfinder #167: Ready? Fight! pg. 77
Dexterity 14; Expert in Acrobatics; ability to cast spells
You use your physical discipline to channel your magic.

feats.name: Siphon Magic
feats.description: You gorge upon the magical energies of your foe’s blood.

feats.name: Siphon Power
feats.description: You draw upon the reservoir of your patron’s magic that resides within your familiar.

feats.name: Siphon Torment
feats.description: Your progenitors suffered greatly at the hands of a curse, a fate you willingly take upon yourself rather than let fall upon others.

feats.name: Siphoning Touch
feats.description: When you cast vampiric touch, you can modify its standard effects as follows: Instead of gaining the temporary Hit Points yourself, you can grant the temporary Hit Points to an ally within 30 feet.
feats.prerequisites: Spell Trickster Dedication; ability to cast vampiric touch

feats.name: Siren Song
feats.description: You can beguile and bewitch with your song.

feats.name: Sister of the Golden Erinys Dedication
feats.description: The fighting style of the Sisterhood of the Golden Erinys is rooted in their understanding of devils.
feats.prerequisites: You're from Isger or a member of the Sisterhood of the Golden Erinys.

feats.name: Sixth Sense
feats.description: Your psychic abilities also allow you to detect the lingering thoughts of spirits and similar entities.

feats.name: Skeletal Resistance
feats.description: Your body becomes resistant, your hardened bones deflecting weapons and other forms of damage.

feats.name: Skeletal Transformation
feats.description: You rearrange your bones into a bestial shape.

feats.name: Skeleton Commander
feats.description: You gain the ability to summon your own skeletal minions.

feats.name: Skeptic's Defense
feats.description: You don't believe in any mental twaddle, and you're certainly not afraid of it.

feats.name: Skill Mastery
feats.description: Increase your proficiency rank in one of your skills from expert to master and in another of your skills from trained to expert.
feats.prerequisites: Investigator Dedication; trained in at least one skill and expert in at least one skill

feats.name: Skill Mastery (Rogue)
feats.description: Increase your proficiency rank in one of your skills from expert to master and in another of your skills from trained to expert.
feats.prerequisites: Rogue Dedication; trained in at least one skill and expert in at least one skill

feats.name: Skill Training
feats.description: Become trained in a skill
notes: Become trained in a Kingdom skill

feats.name: Skilled Climber
feats.description: You can navigate vertical surfaces with ease.

feats.name: Skilled Herbalist
feats.description: You've been taught how to craft healing remedies with a variety of herbs and plants.

feats.name: Skilled Partner
feats.description: Your eidolon gains a 1st-level skill feat and a 2nd-level or lower skill feat.

feats.name: Skilled Swimmer
feats.description: You move through the water with ease, mastering your movements with years of practice.

feats.name: Skillful Climber
feats.description: You can scamper up or down surfaces as nimbly as a monkey.

feats.name: Skillful Tail
feats.description: You’ve always had a tail, but with practice, you’ve learned to use it for more than signaling your mood.

feats.name: Skin Split
feats.description: You claw open the top layer of your scales and peel off the premature shed in order to remove harmful substances from your skin.

feats.name: Skirmish Strike
feats.description: Your feet and weapon move in tandem.

feats.name: Skirt the Light
feats.description: You can travel the border between the Material and Shadow Planes and even bring others along.

feats.name: Skitter
feats.description: Crawl up to half your Speed.
notes: Regain Stamina Points equal to half your maximum.

feats.name: Skittering Scuttle
feats.description: You can scuttle farther and faster when maneuvering alongside allies.

feats.name: Skittering Sneak
feats.description: You squish, slink, and skitter from cover to cover with great speed and stealth.

feats.name: Skittertalk
feats.description: You can ask questions of, receive answers from, and use the Diplomacy skill with spiders and other arachnids.

feats.name: Skull Creeper
feats.description: You wear skulls to demoralize foes.

feats.name: Sky and Heaven Stance
feats.description: You enter a stance allowing you to make jagged strikes like flashes of lightning through the sky.
notes: You enter a stance perfected by past champions of the Challenge of Sky and Heaven, allowing you to make jagged strikes like flashes of lightning through the sky.
Steal from your target when you successfully strike them.

feats.name: Skyseeker
feats.description: You Leap toward an opponent.

feats.name: Slag May
feats.description: Your mother was an iron hag known for physical prowess, and you have one violet or steel-gray eye.

feats.name: Slam Down
feats.description: You make an attack to knock a foe off balance, then follow up immediately with a sweep to topple them.

feats.name: Slay
feats.description: You finish your target with a vicious attack.

feats.name: Slay Giants Unseen
feats.description: In the darkness, your attacks can bring any red-faced giant to their knees.

feats.name: Slayer's Blessing
feats.description: You carry scraps of materials dangerous to undead and can apply them to your weapon.

feats.name: Slayer's Presence
feats.description: Your very presence strikes fear into the undead.

feats.name: Slayer's Strike
feats.description: You've dedicated yourself to studying ancient techniques and memorized minor prayers against undead to swiftly dispatch them.

feats.name: Sleek Reposition
feats.description: While your opponent is still recovering from your prior attack, you snag its armor, clothing, or flesh to move it as you please.

feats.name: Sleep of the Reborn
feats.description: Philosophers compare the cycle of life, death, and rebirth to sleeping, dreaming, and waking.

feats.name: Sleeper Hold
feats.description: You pinch crucial points of your target's nervous system, impeding its ability to function.

feats.name: Sleepwalker Dedication
feats.description: You've learned to manipulate states of consciousness, beginning with your own.

feats.name: Slinger's Readiness
feats.description: You've learned a gunslinger's tricks for staking out your territory in a fight.

feats.name: Slinger's Reflexes
feats.description: Your ability to react to unexpected circumstances is preternaturally sharp.

feats.name: Slingshot Maneuver
feats.description: You spin your lash out for your ally to grab on to, giving them a boost to their movement.

feats.name: Slink
feats.description: You can move through gloom with the speed of darkness.

feats.name: Slip into Shadow
feats.description: Your shadow magic bleeds into the space around you.
feats.prerequisites: ability to cast at least one spell with the darkness trait

feats.name: Slip Sideways
feats.description: Like many fiends, you have the supernatural ability to teleport yourself to safety.
feats.prerequisites: Grimspawn, Pitborn, or Hellspawn, or another lineage feat associated with fiends or the Maelstrom

feats.name: Slip the Grasp
feats.description: You have some feature that allows you to quickly evade effects that restrain you.

feats.name: Slip with the Breeze
feats.description: You create gusts of wind when you jump, allowing you to carry yourself across greater distances.

feats.name: Slippery as an Eel
feats.description: You mimic the serpentine movements of an eel.
feats.prerequisites: Undersea Privateer Dedication; Trained in Acrobatics

feats.name: Slippery Prey
feats.description: You're able to escape bonds more easily than others.
feats.prerequisites: Trained in Athletics or Trained in Acrobatics

feats.name: Slippery Secrets
feats.description: Master in Deception
feats.campaign: Evade attempts to uncover your true nature

feats.name: Slither
feats.description: You are an expert at moving through extremely tight spaces.

feats.name: Slowing Strike
feats.description: You wound your enemy so they can’t move nimbly.

feats.name: Slurp Up
feats.description: Your tongue darts out in search of refreshment.
feats.prerequisites: Thlipit Contestant Dedication; unarmed attack with your tongue

feats.name: Sly Disarm
feats.description: You can Disarm a creature through sleight of hand rather than brute force.

feats.name: Sly Striker
feats.description: Your attacks deal more damage, even against creatures that aren’t off-guard.

feats.name: Small Speak
feats.description: You understand the languages of most small insects and can speak to them.

feats.name: Smash from the Air
feats.description: Your expertise enables you to knock away spells.

feats.name: Smashing Tail
feats.description: You have a tail that serves as a potent weapon.

feats.name: Smile at Failure
feats.description: You know staying cool is key to prevailing in social situations, as anger leads to mistakes.

feats.name: Smite
feats.description: You single out one enemy to destroy in your deity's name.

feats.name: Smoke Bomb
feats.description: You can add a tarry additive to an alchemical bomb to make it emit smoke.

feats.name: Smoke Curtain
feats.description: You load an extra dose of powder into your shot, causing it to belch a cloud of smoke.

feats.name: Smoke Sight
feats.description: You're used to fighting and hiding in a haze of smoke and flame.

feats.name: Smoke Through Bamboo
feats.description: You’ve spent significant time slipping silently between bamboo thickets, and your light-footedness allows you to navigate even the thickest forests and brush with ease.

feats.name: Smokesoul
feats.description: You have a connection to smoke and haze.

feats.name: Smoldering Explosion
feats.description: When you cast fireball, you can modify the spell to leave behind a brief cloud of smoke in its area.
feats.prerequisites: Spell Trickster Dedication; ability to cast fireball

feats.name: Smooth Hover
feats.description: You remain airborne through sheer effort.

feats.name: Smoothing Stomp
feats.description: You stomp and unleash a wave of the magic of creation in a 30-foot emanation that transforms non-magical difficult terrain and greater difficult terrain into normal terrain.

feats.name: Snagging Strike
feats.description: You combine an attack with quick grappling moves to throw an enemy off balance as long as it stays in your reach.

feats.name: Snakebird's Shadow
feats.description: Ganhil developed this technique through observing the sharp-beaked darters fishing Prada Hanam’s waters, seeking to match their speed and suppleness with the elemental flash of his blade.

feats.name: Snap Falling Fruit
feats.description: Your lash whips around to intercept projectiles.

feats.name: Snap Shot
feats.description: You can react with ranged weapons when a creature is in close quarters.

feats.name: Snare Commando
feats.description: Your snares are so befuddling that your victims rarely notice you slipping out of sight.
feats.prerequisites: Snare Crafting; Expert in Deception or Expert in Intimidation

feats.name: Snare Crafting
feats.description: You can use the Craft activity to create snares.

feats.name: Snare Expert
feats.description: Your knowledge of traps aids you in defending your hideout.

feats.name: Snare Genius
feats.description: If the snare normally takes 1 minute to Craft, you can Craft it with 3 Interact actions instead.

feats.name: Snare Hopping
feats.description: You can magically move your snares around.

feats.name: Snare Setter
feats.description: You are adept at the time-honored kobold art of making traps.

feats.name: Sneak Adept
feats.description: It’s almost impossible to spot you.

feats.name: Sneak Attacker
feats.description: You gain the sneak attack class feature, except it deals 1d4 damage, increasing to 1d6 at 6th level.
notes: Your magical power grows as the shard's icy influence spreads ever deeper into your being.

feats.name: Sneaky
feats.description: Stealth is an important tool in your arsenal.

feats.name: Sniper's Aim
feats.description: You take an extra moment to carefully sync your aim and breathing, then fire a shot with great accuracy.
notes: Snow and ice are no hindrance to you.

feats.name: Sniping Duo Dedication
feats.description: You can choose one willing, non-minion ally to act as your spotter.
feats.prerequisites: trained in at least one type of weapon in the crossbow or firearm groups; Trained in Stealth

feats.name: Snow May
feats.description: You're the child of a winter hag, with one blue-white eye and an affinity for rime and snow.

feats.name: Snowdrift Spell
feats.description: The howling wind and precipitation of your magic turn to thick snow.

feats.name: Soaring Armor
feats.description: You've managed to free your innovation from the bonds of gravity!

feats.name: Soaring Dynamo
feats.description: You've built clockwork wings or jets into your dynamo, allowing you to use your prosthesis to fly.

feats.name: Soaring Flight
feats.description: You Fly.

feats.name: Soaring Form
feats.description: You have a fly Speed of 20 feet at all times.

feats.name: Soaring Poppet
feats.description: Your construction has flaps of cloth or wicker that can keep you aloft.

feats.name: Soaring Shape
feats.description: Wings free you from the shackles of the ground below.

feats.name: Sociable
feats.description: You’re extremely extroverted, and you often spend your time carousing or otherwise socializing.

feats.name: Sociable Vow
feats.description: You can leverage your vow in more social interactions.

feats.name: Social Camouflage
feats.description: You have the uncanny ability to quickly blend into the lifestyle of whatever settlement in which you find yourself.

feats.name: Sodbuster
feats.description: Years toiling in soil have made you an expert digger.

feats.name: Solar Detonation
feats.description: Blinding flames explode in a swirling sphere! The detonation fills a 20-foot burst within 60 feet of you.

feats.name: Solar Rejuvenation
feats.description: If you rest outdoors for 10 minutes during the day, you regain Hit Points equal to your Constitution modifier × half your level.

feats.name: Solar Rejuvenation (Ghoran)
feats.description: The warmth and light of the sun gives you life.

feats.name: Solid Lead
feats.description: Sometimes your case splinters into smaller mysteries, but you never lose sight of the big picture.

feats.name: Solidarity
feats.description: You bestow some of your own life energies to mend damage.

feats.name: Solo Dancer
feats.description: You often dance alone with a grace exceeding that of most other performers, carrying yourself with a poise and confidence that draws the attention of those around you.
feats.prerequisites: Fan Dancer Dedication; Expert in Performance

feats.name: Song of Grace and Speed
feats.description: You instill great swiftness into your allies.
feats.source: Pathfinder #170: Spoken on the Song Wind pg. 79
feats.source_book: Pathfinder #170: Spoken on the Song Wind

feats.name: Song of Marching
feats.description: You learn the song of marching composition cantrip, which enables you and your allies to cross vast distances without strain.

feats.name: Song of Strength
feats.description: Your performances inspire strength in your allies to aid them at physical tasks.
notes: You bounce up and down once, then sprint forward.

feats.name: Song of the Fallen
feats.description: Gain the song of the fallen focus spell.

feats.name: Songbird's Call
feats.description: You call to the wilds with the voice of a songbird, thereby summoning a cloud of its kin.

feats.name: Sonic Strafe
feats.description: You can now achieve such flight speeds that your passage splits the very air.

feats.name: Soothing Ballad
feats.description: You soothe your allies’ wounds with the power of performance.

feats.name: Soothing Pulse
feats.description: Your ostilli can use its stored magic to help staunch your wounds, granting you the Administer Ambient Magic action.
feats.campaign: Administer Ambient Magic [two-actions] (healing) Frequency once per hour; Effect Your ostilli pulses a calm lavender color as it converts stored magic into a curative balm.

feats.name: Soothing Vials
feats.description: The healing chemicals in your versatile vials also help calm a patient's mind.

feats.name: Sorcerer Dedication
feats.description: Choose a bloodline.

feats.name: Soul Arsenal
feats.description: Choose an additional soulforged armament of a different type than the type you already chose, and choose one essence power for it.

feats.name: Soul Bleed
feats.description: Your blade can rupture an enemy’s very soul, draining away its essence to empower you.

feats.name: Soul Flare
feats.description: You strive to change the outcome with sheer zeal.

feats.name: Soul Oubliette
feats.description: Your mortal strike wrenches the soul from your victim’s body and imprisons it in your splinter of finality, with the effects of seize soul.

feats.name: Soul Warden Dedication
feats.description: You can take 10 minutes to emblazon Pharasma's holy sigil—a spiraling comet that represents the winding path a soul takes through its existence—upon a shield, tabard, banner, or other prominent object that your wear or wield.
feats.prerequisites: Trained in Occultism or Trained in Religion; worships Pharasma or a psychopomp usher

feats.name: Soul Well
feats.description: Your brush your fingers across your splinter of finality, momentarily creating a metaphysical vortex from which mortal spirits struggle to escape.

feats.name: Soulforger Dedication
feats.description: You can manifest the power of your spirit in combat to realize your motivations.
feats.prerequisites: Wisdom 14 or ability to cast divine spells

feats.name: Soulsight
feats.description: Your muse has opened your senses to the world beyond.

feats.name: Sound Mirror
feats.description: You twist not just the visual, but the auditory as well, allowing you to pass without a sound and create minor noises as distractions—perfect for misdirection and infiltration.

feats.name: Sour Bomb
feats.description: You can mix ingredients with a powerful sour smell into an alchemical bomb to make its explosion an overpowering stench.

feats.name: Sow Rumor
feats.description: You spread rumors, which may or may not be true, about a specific subject.

feats.name: Sow Spell
feats.description: You fold your spell into a seed.

feats.name: Space-Time Shift
feats.description: You travel just a few moments into the future to immediately arrive at your destination.

feats.name: Spark Fist
feats.description: You dust explosive black powder on your fist or glove before attacking, which combusts as you hit an opponent.

feats.name: Spark of Independence
feats.description: You touch a creature with the minion trait and share the heightened sense of autonomy you've discovered.

feats.name: Speak for the Gravelands
feats.description: You have learned much of what the Gravelands need and are confident in your ability to speak for them.
feats.prerequisites: Halcyon Speaker Dedication; Trained in Nature; can cast at least one spell with the vitality trait

feats.name: Speak with Bats
feats.description: You can ask questions of, receive answers from, and use the Diplomacy skill with bats.

feats.name: Speak with Flowers
feats.description: At your very heartwood, you're a flower animated by elder magic, and with a little effort, you can speak to your kindred.

feats.name: Speak with Kindred
feats.description: You have a connection with creatures that share your physiology.

feats.name: Speak with the Sleeping
feats.description: You can speak to all inanimate objects and the slumbering spirits within them.

feats.name: Speaker in Training
feats.description: You've begun your training as a Speaker.
feats.prerequisites: Budding Speaker Centaur heritage or the ability to cast a divine or primal spell

feats.name: Speaker's Defense
feats.description: As a Speaker, you've forged a deep bond with powerful spirits who you can urge to rise up to defend you and your people.
feats.prerequisites: Budding Speaker Centaur heritage or Speaker in Training

feats.name: Speaking Sky
feats.description: You can hear air movement like soft whispers.
notes: You can hear air movement like soft whispers.

feats.name: Spear Dancer
feats.description: You favor weapons that allow you to lash out viciously while keeping enemies at bay, giving you an opportunity to strike without fear of reprisal.

feats.name: Spear of Doom
feats.description: The conditions for your doom have been met, and you brace yourself for a battle that will see you either live to fight another day or die a legend.

feats.name: Special Sentinel Technique
feats.description: You can channel the power of your constellation into a unique technique.

feats.name: Specialized Companion
feats.description: Your animal companion gains a specialization.
feats.source: Pathfinder #152: Legacy of the Lost God pg. 76
feats.source_book: Pathfinder #152: Legacy of the Lost God

feats.name: Specialized Companion (Druid)
feats.description: Your animal companion continues to grow in power and ability.

feats.name: Specialized Companion (Ranger)
feats.description: Your animal companion continues to grow in power and ability, and it is now cunning enough to become specialized.

feats.name: Specialized Megafauna Companion
feats.description: You've trained your mammoth or other megafauna companion to perform in unusual or extreme situations, granting it abilities far beyond others of its kind.

feats.name: Specialized Spirit Companion
feats.description: Your animal companion gains a unique specialization, spirit-blessed.

feats.name: Specialty Crafting
feats.description: Gain bonuses to Craft certain items
notes: Whenever you take a move action to Stride, you can attempt an Acrobatics check to roll forward.

feats.name: Spectral Advance
feats.description: blessed swiftness
feats.campaign: You gain the spectral advance devotion spell

feats.name: Spectral Dagger
feats.description: By touching the splinter of finality in your neck, you conjure a spectral dagger into your hand that resembles the splinter wrapped in a crude hilt.

feats.name: Speech of the Mammoth Lords
feats.description: You've learned the ancient tongue spoken by the creatures of the far north.
feats.prerequisites: Mammoth Lord Dedication; Master in Diplomacy or Master in Intimidation

feats.name: Spell Acceleration
feats.description: Special time-weaving techniques let you compress your spellcasting gestures and incantations into a short burst so you can cast with incredible speed—though it causes temporal strain.

feats.name: Spell Combination
feats.description: You can merge spells, producing multiple effects with a single casting.

feats.name: Spell Devourer
feats.description: You don’t just resist magic; you devour it.

feats.name: Spell Gem
feats.description: Inspired by the degenerate demiliches your kind sometimes devolves into, you've embedded a gem into your brow, fusing it to your necrotic flesh.

feats.name: Spell Mastery
feats.description: You have mastered a handful of spells to such a degree that you can cast them even if you haven’t prepared them in advance.
feats.source: Player Core pg. 205, Pathfinder #150: Broken Promises pg. 76
feats.source_book: Player Core pg. 205, Pathfinder #150: Broken Promises

feats.name: Spell Parry
feats.description: You infuse magical power into your body or armaments to parry both physical and magical assaults.

feats.name: Spell Protection Array
feats.description: You inscribe a circle of arcane runes that dampen enemies’ magic.

feats.name: Spell Relay
feats.description: You open the power in your blood to your ally's spellcasting, using your magic to boost their range.

feats.name: Spell Runes
feats.description: The magical runes on your body grant you several magical abilities.

feats.name: Spell Shroud
feats.description: Your spell shrouds you in a billowing cloud.

feats.name: Spell Survivor
feats.description: Once you’ve resisted an opponent’s magic, anything else they throw your way becomes less effective.

feats.name: Spell Swallow
feats.description: Your ostilli has grown strong enough to completely consume a spell cast at you, granting you the Devour Ambient Magic action.
feats.campaign: Devour Ambient Magic [reaction] (concentrate) Frequency once per day; Trigger A creature Casts a Spell with you as the only target; Effect Your ostilli radiates cyan light as its tentacle-like filters attempt to consume the magical effect.

feats.name: Spell Swipe
feats.description: You attack in an arc and enact your spell against everyone you hit.

feats.name: Spell Tinker
feats.description: You’ve learned to alter choices you make when casting spells on yourself.

feats.name: Spell Trickster Dedication
feats.description: Your experience with magic and its traditions lets you specialize in the casting of certain spells, customizing familiar spells to create novel effects.
feats.prerequisites: Able to cast spells; Trained in Arcana, Trained in Nature, Trained in Occultism, or Trained in Religion

feats.name: Spell-Repelling Form
feats.description: Your eidolon evolves to protect itself from the danger posed by spells.

feats.name: Spell-Woven Shot
feats.description: You combine your own magic with that of your magical crossbow or firearm.

feats.name: Spellbook Prodigy
feats.description: You are particularly adept at learning spells to add to your spellbook.

feats.name: Spelldrinker
feats.description: You temporarily add a 3rd-rank spell to your spell repertoire, as determined by the type of creature whose blood you just drank.

feats.name: Spellmaster Dedication
feats.description: As a Spellmaster, you are adept at identifying magic.
feats.prerequisites: Intelligence 14, Wisdom 14, or Charisma 14; ability to cast focus spells; member of the Pathfinder Society affiliated with the School of Spells

feats.name: Spellmaster's Resilience
feats.description: Your experience with a specific type of harmful magic makes you more resistant to it.

feats.name: Spellshape Channel
feats.description: Deep understanding of divine revelations into the nature of vital essence allows you to freely manipulate the energy of life and death.

feats.name: Spellshape Mastery
feats.description: Stalking Feline Mask
feats.source: Player Core pg. 205, Player Core 2 pg. 163
feats.prerequisites: Your mastery of magic ensures that you can alter your spells just as easily as you can cast them normally.
notes: Pathfinder #174: Shadows of the Ancients pg. 78
Like Azure Leopard, the Patient Warden, your mask makes you most at home in the night and teaches you how to use the darkness to hunt.

feats.name: Spellshield
feats.description: Your shield becomes a bonded item capable of storing your spells.

feats.name: Spellshot Dedication
feats.description: You've steeped yourself in magic and gunplay to the extent that you can conjure bullets from thin air.

feats.name: Spellstriker
feats.description: You gain the magus's Spellstrike activity.

feats.name: Spelunker
feats.description: Living underground, you have learned to find your way without landmarks or even solid ground.

feats.name: Spew Tentacles
feats.description: You can open your mouth to an immense size and spew forth an impossibly large field of tentacles.

feats.name: Spike Skin
feats.description: You touch a willing creature, causing its skin to harden and form spiky protrusions.

feats.name: Spine Stabber
feats.description: The quills on your arms are particularly sharp and sturdy.

feats.name: Spinebreaker
feats.description: You squeeze your opponent in a vicious bear hug, putting intense pressure on their nerves, joints, or other pain points.

feats.name: Spinning Release
feats.description: You wind your lash around your opponent, then spin them rapidly to discombobulate them.

feats.name: Spinning Stand
feats.description: You flare your legs around, using the momentum to both lash out and return to a standing position.

feats.name: Spiral Sworn
feats.description: You trace a spiral in the air while intoning prayers to Pharasma, gaining her blessing for a time.

feats.name: Spirit Coffin
feats.description: A hump forms on your back that allows you to attack and trap spirits.

feats.name: Spirit Companion
feats.description: You gain the service of a young animal companion, which has been blessed by the spirits of this world.

feats.name: Spirit Familiar (Animist)
feats.description: When you attune to your apparitions during your daily preparations, you can choose to dedicate a small amount of your life force to allow one of them to physically manifest as a familiar, which gains the spirit trait.

feats.name: Spirit Familiar (Witch)
feats.description: Your familiar can subsume its body to become pure spirit.

feats.name: Spirit Guide Form
feats.description: You fuse with your spirit guide, becoming a hybrid being with enhanced physical and spiritual power.

feats.name: Spirit of the Beast
feats.description: You imbue your companion with the aspect of another animal.

feats.name: Spirit of the Blade
feats.description: You charge your blade with spiritual energy, allowing it to cut through spirits and fiends with fearsome efficiency.

feats.name: Spirit of Vigil
feats.description: Though the city of Vigil itself has been destroyed, you will carry on its warrior spirit to the end of your days.

feats.name: Spirit Sheath
feats.description: You've magically constructed an extradimensional sheath for your weapon that you access through your clothing, typically through a pocket, sleeve, or seam.

feats.name: Spirit Soother
feats.description: You are attuned to the minute sounds and sensations of restless spirits.

feats.name: Spirit Speaker
feats.description: You know that when an animal dies, its spirit lingers briefly before moving on.

feats.name: Spirit Spells
feats.description: Your ability to confront incorporeal menaces develops into full-fledged spellcasting.

feats.name: Spirit Walk
feats.description: Your allied apparitions ward you against the predations of their restless peers.

feats.name: Spirit Warrior Dedication
feats.description: You’re a warrior who trains your spirit and body to work in perfect harmony, enhancing your attacks with your spiritual energy while fighting with a ferocious martial technique that combines blade and fist.

feats.name: Spirit's Absolution
feats.description: You purify a spirit by absolving it of its sins and regrets.

feats.name: Spirit's Anguish
feats.description: You purify a spirit by coaxing it to release its anguish in a final cathartic howl.

feats.name: Spirit's Sacrifice
feats.description: Your attuned apparition gathers all of the energy it can through your shared bond and uses that power to disperse itself while channeling the energy back into you, saving your life.

feats.name: Spirit's Wrath
feats.description: You call forth an ephemeral spirit, typically the apparition of an ancestor or a nature spirit, which takes the form of a wisp.

feats.name: Spirits' Interference
feats.description: You call forth protective spirits to ward off ranged attacks.

feats.name: Spiritual Aid
feats.description: When you call your spirit guide for aid, its presence bolsters your will and agility.

feats.name: Spiritual Awakening
feats.description: You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level animist feat.

feats.name: Spiritual Echo
feats.description: You possess the head gem of a deceased ancestor or loved one, which has begun to resonate with your own.

feats.name: Spiritual Expansion Spell
feats.description: Your apparitions manifest to scatter the energy of your spell.

feats.name: Spiritual Flurry
feats.description: When you use Spiritual Strike, hit targets become off-guard until the end of your current turn.
feats.prerequisites: Scion of Domora Dedication; Spiritual Strike

feats.name: Spiritual Guides
feats.description: Though no one sees them and only you can hear them, the spirits around you constantly chatter, save when you are raging.

feats.name: Spiritual Headhunter
feats.description: Your spirit coffin can temporarily detain the spirits of those you kill, allowing you to ask them one last question before they pass on.

feats.name: Spiritual Secret
feats.description: You gain deeper insights into your patron’s abandoned power, allowing you to draw on that power more directly.

feats.name: Spiritual Sense
feats.description: You have a vague connection to the Ethereal Plane that enables you to notice spirits.

feats.name: Spiritual Spellshape Stance
feats.description: You feed excess magical power into your apparition, allowing it to grow ethereal limbs it can use to help shape and focus your spells.

feats.name: Spiritual Strike
feats.description: Your spirit guide enhances your attacks with occult power.

feats.name: Spiteful Rake
feats.description: Your instincts sing of spite and malice, and you've learned a devastating trick: go for the eyes.

feats.name: Splendid Companion
feats.description: Your animal companion continues to develop.
feats.source: Pathfinder #152: Legacy of the Lost God pg. 76
feats.source_book: Pathfinder #152: Legacy of the Lost God

feats.name: Splendid Illusion
feats.description: You cover your surroundings in outlandish fantasy.

feats.name: Splinter Faith
feats.description: Your faith in your deity is represented in an extremely unusual way that some might call heretical.

feats.name: Split Hex
feats.description: You siphon some of the power from an offensive hex you cast to direct it at a second target as well.

feats.name: Split Shot
feats.description: You fragment a ranged spell.

feats.name: Split Slot
feats.description: You can prepare two spells in one slot, giving you the freedom to choose the spell when you cast it.

feats.name: Spore Cloud
feats.description: You unleash a cloud of pollen or similar spores.

feats.name: Sportlebore Choke
feats.description: Like nefarious sportlebores, a species of insect that plague adventurers by hiding in their rations as counterfeit food, your swarm can crawl down throats.

feats.name: Spraying Mutation
feats.description: Your ostilli can launch a multitude of darts at once over a short distance.

feats.name: Spring from the Shadows
feats.description: You leap from hiding and assail your target.

feats.name: Springboard
feats.description: You use the power of your leg lashing out to spring off your foe and leap toward another, your talon descending in a crescent.

feats.name: Springing Leaper
feats.description: Your powerful legs allow you to make sudden and dramatic leaps.

feats.name: Springsoul
feats.description: Your connection to elemental wood manifests as fresh blossoms, spring fruits, and the seeds of new life, and you harness this power to spread vitality and abundance.

feats.name: Sprite's Spark
feats.description: You can fling a portion of your magic at foes.

feats.name: Sprout Fruit
feats.description: The plants covering your body sprout a single, ripe fruit.
feats.source: Pathfinder #202: Severed at the Root pg. 75

feats.name: Spy's Countermeasures
feats.description: You’ve learned how to analyze and fake your responses to the most common magic used against spies.

feats.name: Spyglass Modification
feats.description: Your enhanced visual gear includes a regulating scope and reflectors, combined in an ingenuous setup that allows you to see around corners within the area of your overwatch field.

feats.name: Squad Tactics
feats.description: You are adept at working with your allies to surround an enemy.

feats.name: Squawk!
feats.description: You let out an awkward squawk, ruffle your feathers, or fake some other birdlike tic to cover up a social misstep or faux pas.

feats.name: Squirm Free
feats.description: You're used to slipping out of a bigger creature's grasp or escaping a child's overly enthusiastic hug.

feats.name: Stab and Blast
feats.description: You slice or smash your opponent with the melee portion of your weapon before pulling the trigger at point-blank range.

feats.name: Staff Acrobat Dedication
feats.description: Gain bonuses when using your staff as an implement to aid Acrobatics and Athletics actions.
feats.source: Pathfinder #151: The Show Must Go On pg. 75
feats.source_book: Pathfinder #151: The Show Must Go On
feats.prerequisites: Dexterity 16; Trained in Acrobatics; Trained in Athletics; trained with at least one of the following weapons: staff, bo staff, halfling sling staff, or any weapon in the spear or polearm group (referred to in this archetype as “your staff”)

feats.name: Staff Sweep
feats.description: You sweep your foes away with your staff.
feats.source: Pathfinder #151: The Show Must Go On pg. 75
feats.source_book: Pathfinder #151: The Show Must Go On

feats.name: Staggering Blow
feats.description: You've trained your megafauna companion to stagger its enemies, impeding their ability to fight back.

feats.name: Staggering Fire
feats.description: You've learned how to fire at enemies to slow them down, allowing innocents and fellow knights alike time to escape.

feats.name: Stalwart Chant
feats.description: You know story after story of unyielding, valiant dwarven heroes whose minds were bulwarks against fear and confusion.

feats.name: Stalwart Defender Dedication
feats.description: You have completed your initial training in the ways of a stalwart defender.

feats.name: Stalwart Mind
feats.description: When necessary to avoid a magical compulsion or curse, you can be as stubborn as your megafauna companion.

feats.name: Stalwart Song
feats.description: As a stalwart defender, you rely on your martial training and your tried-and-true armor to face any danger without flinching.

feats.name: Stalwart Standard
feats.description: Your banner makes it harder for your foes to push your allies around and encourages your allies to protect the innocent.

feats.name: Stand Back, I'm a Doctor!
feats.description: You have mastered techniques to aid those at the brink of death, even if they use dangerous Stasian technology.
feats.prerequisites: Master in Medicine; Lepidstadt Surgeon Dedication

feats.name: Stand for the Fallen
feats.description: You protect your allies at the cost of your own blood, but your deity shields you from the worst of the harm.

feats.name: Stand Still
feats.description: You strike out when your foe tries to flee.

feats.name: Standard-Bearer's Sacrifice
feats.description: Seeing an enemy take aim at your ally, you bravely flourish your banner to redirect their attention to you.

feats.name: Standby Spell
feats.description: You've honed one spell as your favored combat technique, and you've practiced it enough that you no longer need to prepare it to cast it.

feats.name: Star Orb
feats.description: Your magic has crystallized into a spherical stone.

feats.name: Stargazer's Eyes
feats.description: Long hours in darkened observatories have sharpened your senses.

feats.name: Starlight Armor
feats.description: You armor yourself in the light of distant suns, shielding yourself from harm.

feats.name: Starlit Eyes
feats.description: Starlight shines in your sight, enhancing your perception and range.
feats.prerequisites: Arcane Cascade, starlit span hybrid study

feats.name: Starlit Sentinel Dedication
feats.description: You’ve been chosen by one of the constellations of the Tian Xia zodiac.

feats.name: Starlit Spells
feats.description: The stars reveal and punish your enemies.

feats.name: Starshot Arrow
feats.description: The greatest centaurs need not wait until their stories are over to touch the stars in the sky.

feats.name: Starstone Aspirant Dedication
feats.description: Divine glory awaits! You embrace your longing to make a true and lasting difference in the Universe by embarking on the path to apotheosis.

feats.name: Start the Festival!
feats.description: No distance can stop tanuki from making their way to a good party.

feats.name: Startling Appearance (Fleshwarp)
feats.description: Your appearance is enough to frighten without words.

feats.name: Stasian Charge
feats.description: Charging a living body with electricity may seem like a bad idea, but you know better.

feats.name: Stasian Smash
feats.description: You've modified your dynamo with Stasian coils, allowing you to make a powerful attack that crackles with electricity.

feats.name: Statement Strut
feats.description: You have an eye for fashion and know how to sell attitude and confidence with your walk.

feats.name: Statue
feats.description: Your body and equipment appear to be made of stone as you hold perfectly still.
feats.source: Pathfinder #195: Heavy is the Crown pg. 83

feats.name: Statue Form
feats.description: An inconspicuous statue in front of a shop is the perfect form to wait for things to blow over.

feats.name: Stay Down!
feats.description: You have ways of keeping your foes down.

feats.name: Steadfast Ally
feats.description: Your presence alone is enough to provide your allies with emotional support.

feats.name: Steady Balance
feats.description: Trained in Acrobatics
feats.campaign: Maintain your balance in adverse conditions

feats.name: Steady on Stone
feats.description: Your connection to the earth makes natural uneven surfaces less of a hindrance for you.

feats.name: Steady Spellcasting
feats.description: You don’t lose spells easily. If a reaction would disrupt your spellcasting action, attempt a DC 15 flat check. If you succeed, your action isn’t disrupted.
feats.source: Player Core pg. 103, Player Core 2 pg. 140

feats.name: Steady Spellcasting (Magus)
feats.description: Confident in your technique, you don't easily lose your concentration when you Cast a Spell.

feats.name: Steadying Stone
feats.description: The earth has taught you how to remain unyielding and firm.

feats.name: Steal Essence
feats.description: Being in the presence of the aeon orbs as they deteriorated has taught you how to siphon energy, and you do so with the required magic item.
feats.prerequisites: legendary in Thievery or master in Arcana, Nature, Occultism, or Religion
notes: Pathfinder #174: Shadows of the Ancients pg. 79
Your mask remembers the stories of Shifting Frog, Storyteller of the Past and Future.

feats.name: Steal Spell
feats.description: When you use Legendary Thief to steal the impossible, you can steal a prepared spell or spontaneous spell from a foe.

feats.name: Steal the Sky
feats.description: You can take away the air that keeps a flying foe aloft.
notes: You can take away the air that keeps a flying foe aloft.

feats.name: Steal Time
feats.description: You reach into another creature's timeline and attempt to alter their flow of time.

feats.name: Steal Vitality
feats.description: When you cast vampiric touch, you can modify it to remove your enfeebled or clumsy condition.
feats.prerequisites: Spell Trickster Dedication; ability to cast vampiric touch

feats.name: Stealthy as an Octopus
feats.description: You're an expert at using the dark of the ocean to conceal yourself.
feats.prerequisites: Undersea Privateer Dedication; Expert in Stealth

feats.name: Stealthy Companion
feats.description: You’ve trained your animal companion to blend in to its surroundings.

feats.name: Steam Knight
feats.description: You shape your kinetic aura into swirling armor of steam that scalds your enemies and propels you on super-heated jet streams.

feats.name: Steam Spell
feats.description: You transform your fire spells into steam, making them more effective underwater.

feats.name: Steed Form
feats.description: Your eidolon changes to make it particularly effective as your mount.

feats.name: Steed's Toppling Strike
feats.description: Those who defy your cause feel the powerful attacks of your mount.

feats.name: Steel Falcon Dedication
feats.description: You serve as an envoy of the ideals of Andoran, whether it's in a foreign court or on the field of battle.

feats.name: Steel on Steel
feats.description: The ring of divinely empowered steel assails your enemies.

feats.name: Steelhoof
feats.description: You've girded your hooves in steel or other reinforcements aimed to inflict maximum damage.

feats.name: Stem the Tide
feats.description: You can cast protector tree as a 1st-rank primal innate spell once per day.

feats.name: Step Lively
feats.description: You are an expert at avoiding the lumbering footsteps of larger creatures.

feats.name: Stepping Stones
feats.description: Disks of rock fly to points that you designate to make a new path.

feats.name: Sterling Dynamo Dedication
feats.description: You obtain a sterling dynamo prosthetic, which allows you to replace or augment a limb, or even add a simple new non-prehensile limb, such as a tail.

feats.name: Sticky Bomb
feats.description: You can mix in a sticky additive to an alchemical bomb to make its contents adhere and continue to deal damage.

feats.name: Sticky Poison
feats.description: A combination of additional viscosity and careful application keeps your weapons poisoned even when suffering significant wear and tear.

feats.name: Stifle Flames
feats.description: Your forestry experience helped you develop techniques for fighting wildfires.
feats.prerequisites: Trained in Nature or Trained in Survival

feats.name: Stir Allies
feats.description: You shout a command for your allies to scramble.

feats.name: Stitch Flesh
feats.description: You can use Treat Wounds to restore Hit Points to undead creatures, not just living ones.

feats.name: Stitched Familiar
feats.description: Your familiar can shed its material form, becoming a mass of animated magic.

feats.name: Stoked Flame Stance
feats.description: You enter a stance of fast, fiery movements.

feats.name: Stomp Ground
feats.description: You bring your booted foot down on the ground with enough force to rattle your foes.

feats.name: Stone Blood (Lvl 6) #1
feats.description: Your blood clots quickly.

feats.name: Stone Blood (Lvl 6) #2
feats.description: Your blood becomes thick and sluggish, but no less effective at oxygenating your cells.
feats.source: Pathfinder #195: Heavy is the Crown pg. 83

feats.name: Stone Body
feats.description: Emulating the great defenders throughout dwarven history, you close your mind to the sensation of pain, becoming as resolute as stone itself.

feats.name: Stone Bones
feats.description: Your intractable nature can help you shrug off even the most grievous injuries.

feats.name: Stone Brawler Dedication
feats.description: You've learned to call the primal power of elemental stone to your aid.
feats.source: Pathfinder #195: Heavy is the Crown pg. 82

feats.name: Stone Communion
feats.description: You can speak Terran and speak with stones.

feats.name: Stone Face
feats.description: You've mastered the art of composure, even in the face of fear.

feats.name: Stone Form
feats.description: You can transform your body into a pure primal manifestation of earth, an elemental.

feats.name: Stone Guardian
feats.description: You learn to call a powerful guardian of earth and stone to your side.
feats.source: Pathfinder #195: Heavy is the Crown pg. 83

feats.name: Stone Passage
feats.description: Calling upon your knowledge of stonework and inherent magic, you momentarily make a section of stone insubstantial, allowing you to pass through.

feats.name: Stone Soul Siblings
feats.description: Your connection with nature’s spirits has progressed to the point where you can even have casual conversation with pebbles and boulders.

feats.name: Stonebane
feats.description: Your stonestrike attacks deal 1d6 additional damage against constructs, creatures with the earth trait, and earthen objects, such as a stone door.
feats.source: Pathfinder #195: Heavy is the Crown pg. 82

feats.name: Stonebound Dedication
feats.description: You bind yourself to the very essence of stone.
feats.source: Pathfinder #195: Heavy is the Crown pg. 83

feats.name: Stonebound Magic
feats.description: You've learned to manifest your connection to stone by conjuring it to your side.
feats.source: Pathfinder #195: Heavy is the Crown pg. 83

feats.name: Stonegate
feats.description: Earthen barriers no longer impede your progress.

feats.name: Stonemason's Eye
feats.description: You understand the intricacies of stonework.

feats.name: Stonewalker
feats.description: You have a deep reverence for and connection to stone.

feats.name: Stonewall
feats.description: The strength of stone overcomes you so strongly that it replaces your stout body.

feats.name: Stoney Deflection
feats.description: You gather the resiliency of stone to block attacks against you.
feats.source: Pathfinder #195: Heavy is the Crown pg. 82

feats.name: Stoney Skin
feats.description: Your skin takes on the hardness of stone.
feats.source: Pathfinder #195: Heavy is the Crown pg. 82

feats.name: Stories of Home
feats.description: You share the joy of every story of long-awaited homecoming you’ve offered to Isthralei.

feats.name: Storm Born
feats.description: You are at home out in the elements, reveling in the power of nature unleashed.

feats.name: Storm Form
feats.description: You can transform into an elemental.

feats.name: Storm of Claws
feats.description: You lash out with your clawed limbs like a beast that has fallen upon its first meal in days, then back off to see your handiwork.

feats.name: Storm Retribution
feats.description: You lash out, directing a burst of storming fury toward a creature that has harmed you.
feats.prerequisites: storm order; tempest surge order spell
notes: Gatewalkers Player's Guide (Remastered) pg. 9, Dark Archives (Remastered) pg. 100
You spit out a freezing breath or sonic scream. You deal 4d6 damage, plus 1d6 damage for every level you have beyond 6th, to all creatures in a 30-foot cone, with a basic Reflex save.

feats.name: Storm Shroud
feats.description: You become surrounded by a swirling storm of rain, sand, snow, or clouds, whichever of those suits your bound terrain.

feats.name: Storm Spiral
feats.description: Dark thunderclouds swirl in a miniature storm, crisscrossed with lightning bolts; a tremendous thunderclap fills the air.

feats.name: Storm's Lash
feats.description: Wind and lightning have always been friends to you.

feats.name: Storming Gaze
feats.description: You can open or energize a notable third eye on your forehead to strike with storming power.

feats.name: Stormsoul
feats.description: Your elemental ancestor's influence manifests in you as tumultuous, thundering storms, with dark clouds and bolts of lightning.

feats.name: Stormy Heart
feats.description: The elemental power in your blood is a raging storm.

feats.name: Story Crooner
feats.description: You're a talented story weaver and use your voice effectively.

feats.name: Strafing Breath
feats.description: You urge your dragon mount forward, wreathed in magical power.

feats.name: Strain Mind
feats.description: You strain your body beyond its limits to use an amp even when your mental power is depleted.

feats.name: Strand Strider
feats.description: Your eight legs serve you well when climbing walls and webs alike.

feats.name: Strange Script
feats.description: You have such familiarity with obscure texts that you can compel them to reveal their secrets.
feats.source: Pathfinder #164: Hands of the Devil pg. 76

feats.name: Strategic Assessment
feats.description: You learn your foes' strengths and weaknesses by watching them move.

feats.name: Strategic Bypass
feats.description: Your plans account for your foes' resistances, enabling you to strike a telling blow.

feats.name: Strategic Repose
feats.description: You've trained extensively in fighting the undead.

feats.name: Strategist Stance
feats.description: You find the most strategic options for you and your allies.
feats.prerequisites: Marshal Dedication; Trained in Society or Trained in Lore; Warfare Lore

feats.name: Straveika
feats.description: You descend from one of the truly ancient vampires, a nosferatu cursed to eternal life but not eternal youth.

feats.name: Streetwise
feats.description: Trained in Society
feats.campaign: Use Society to Gather Information and Recall Knowledge

feats.name: Strength of Eight Legions
feats.description: You meditate for 24 hours in a one-time ceremony within a forest or cave; after your seclusion, your frame and limbs swell with warlike might to enact your vows.

feats.name: Stretching Reach
feats.description: You can leverage your size and muscle to extend your reach and attack more distant foes.

feats.name: Strident Command
feats.description: The common folk heed your demands, and though your true foes rarely bend to your commands, when they do the hesitation can cost them the battle.
feats.source: Night of the Gray Death pg. 65
feats.prerequisites: Master in Intimidation; Vigilante Dedication; Voice of Authority; member of the Gray Gardeners

feats.name: Strike Rivers, Seize Winds
feats.description: Through sheer physical force, you can wrestle a river, lasso the winds, punch a hole to the molten center of the planet, or create other environmental disturbances via nothing but your own strength.

feats.name: Striker's Scroll
feats.description: You can attach a scroll to your weapon or handwraps of mighty blows to blend its spell into an attack, carefully folding it around a part of the weapon or sealing it to the weapon's surface.

feats.name: Striking Retribution
feats.description: You have an appropriately intense hatred for alghollthus.

feats.name: Strix Defender
feats.description: Your ancestral feud with humans gives you experience dealing with vicious foes, and your vengeance knows no bounds.

feats.name: Strix Lore
feats.description: You're well connected to your tribe and perhaps even strix communities beyond your own, where you've learned about the land and techniques of graceful movement.

feats.name: Strix Vengeance
feats.description: You dedicate yourself to destroying those who harm your kin.

feats.name: Strong Arm
feats.description: When you Strike with a thrown weapon, the weapon’s range increment increases by 10 feet.

feats.name: Strong of Wing
feats.description: You can fly with a greater distance.

feats.name: Strong Swimmer
feats.description: Your swim Speed increases to match your land Speed.

feats.name: Strong Tail
feats.description: From sheer necessity, you've gotten surprisingly good at moving around on land.

feats.name: Stronger Debilitating Venom
feats.description: Add one of the following to the debilitations from which you can choose when you Envenom.

feats.name: Stubborn Defiance
feats.description: You're brave and stubborn and refuse to back down or bow to the wishes of another.

feats.name: Stubborn Persistence
feats.description: Humans are renowned for their ability to persist through the most grueling of trials that would leave others ready to drop.

feats.name: Student of Perfection Dedication
feats.description: You have joined one of the Houses of Perfection.
feats.prerequisites: powerful fist or expert in unarmed attacks; member of a House of Perfection

feats.name: Student of the Canon
feats.description: More accurately recognize the tenets of your faith or philosophy

feats.name: Student of the Staff
feats.description: You've studied the staff extensively to learn the hidden capabilities of your chosen weapon.
feats.prerequisites: Arcane Cascade, twisting tree hybrid study

feats.name: Student of Water
feats.description: Following your studies of water, your qi stirs the water of the natural world.

feats.name: Studious Adept
feats.description: You achieve a breakthrough in your exploration of magic.

feats.name: Studious Capacity
feats.description: Your continued study of occult magic has increased your magical capacity, allowing you to cast spells even when it seems impossible.

feats.name: Studious Magic
feats.description: You've taken an interest in anadi arcane traditions.

feats.name: Stumbling Feint
feats.description: You lash out confusingly, with what seems to be a weak move, but instead allows you to unleash a dangerous flurry of blows upon your unsuspecting foe.

feats.name: Stumbling Finisher
feats.description: Your excellent display of fighting prowess leaves your opponent stumbling back.

feats.name: Stumbling Stance
feats.description: You enter a seemingly unfocused stance that mimics the movements of the inebriated—bobbing, weaving, leaving false openings, and distracting your enemies from your true movements.

feats.name: Stunning Blows
feats.description: The focused power of your flurry threatens to overwhelm your opponent.

feats.name: Stunning Finisher
feats.description: Subtle Shank
notes: You draw a concealed weapon, attack with it, and then hide it away again in one smooth motion.

feats.name: Stunning Surprise
feats.description: You quickly move in to bring your foe down with a single blow.

feats.name: Stunt Performer Stance
feats.description: You clear your mind, regulate your breathing, and prepare your muscles in a stance inspired by Kemen Kayton, a graduate of Zimar’s Monastery of the Seven Forms.

feats.name: Sublime Mobility
feats.description: Your heritage has granted you either impressive athletic skill or a physical feature that aids in traversal.

feats.name: Subtle Theft
feats.description: Trained in Thievery
feats.campaign: Your thefts are harder to notice

feats.name: Such a Disgrace!
feats.description: You expect the same level of urbane sophistication from your allies as you possess, so whenever one of them succumbs to egregious behavior from a mental effect, you're immediately mortified.

feats.name: Sudden Charge
feats.description: With a quick sprint, you dash up to your foe and swing.
feats.source: Player Core pg. 141, Player Core 2 pg. 77

feats.name: Sudden Leap
feats.description: You make an impressive leap and swing while you soar.
feats.source: Player Core pg. 147, Player Core 2 pg. 81

feats.name: Sudden Mindfulness
feats.description: Your mind retains full awareness despite the best attempts of others, and your focus throws others off-balance.

feats.name: Sudden Terror
feats.description: You leverage your body’s amorphous nature to spook others.

feats.name: Suli Amir
feats.description: You have power connected to the powerful jann amirs.

feats.name: Suli-Jann
feats.description: Your elemental ancestor was a janni, genies that walk the mortal world and embody all four elements together.

feats.name: Summiting Dragonblood
feats.description: Thanks to your draconic blood, there are no mountains or hills you can’t surmount.

feats.name: Summon Air Elemental
feats.description: You have a connection to the Inner Spheres, allowing you to summon an elemental ally.

feats.name: Summon Earth Elemental
feats.description: You have a connection to the Inner Sphere, allowing you to summon an elemental ally.

feats.name: Summon Ensemble
feats.description: When you cast summon instrument, you can modify it to summon multiple instruments.
feats.prerequisites: Spell Trickster Dedication; ability to cast summon instrument

feats.name: Summon Fire Elemental
feats.description: You can summon an elemental ally.

feats.name: Summon Metal Elemental
feats.description: You can summon an elemental ally.

feats.name: Summon Nephilim Kin
feats.description: You have a connection to the Outer Planes, allowing you to summon a divine ally.

feats.name: Summon Water Elemental
feats.description: You can summon an elemental ally.

feats.name: Summon Wood Elemental
feats.description: Your connection to the Plane of Wood allows you to summon elemental allies.

feats.name: Summoner Dedication
feats.description: You've formed a bond with an eidolon, an entity that manifests in a physical body only through its link to your life force.

feats.name: Summoner's Call
feats.description: In a moment of danger, you call your eidolon to your side.

feats.name: Sun Blade
feats.description: You can unleash burning sunlight from your sword or spear.

feats.name: Sun's Fury
feats.description: The Old Sun Gods have granted you a gift in your fight against Walkena.

feats.name: Sunbird Glare
feats.description: By keeping your feathers clean and sleek, you can catch the light across your wings to create a startling glare in the eyes of a creature within 20 feet.

feats.name: Sunder Enchantment
feats.description: You can focus your superstition to break the magic of an item, in addition to destroying freestanding spells and those active on creatures.

feats.name: Sunder Spell
feats.description: You draw upon your superstitious fury to destroy a spell.

feats.name: Sundown Street Posturing
feats.description: Whether in the salon or on the street, you've captured the attention of everyone around you.

feats.name: Sunlit Vitality
feats.description: You gain nourishment through photosynthesis, like trees and other green plants.

feats.name: Sunwrecker
feats.description: Your weapon has the might of legends, capable of shooting or striking any light out of the sky.

feats.name: Superimpose Time Duplicates
feats.description: You call alternate versions of yourself, either from a different timeline or perhaps yourself from a different point in your current timeline, to aid you in combat.

feats.name: Superior Bond
feats.description: When you draw upon your bonded item, you can leave a bit of energy within it for later use.

feats.name: Superior Propulsion
feats.description: By experimenting with the effects of momentum gained from your signature vehicle's movement, you have learned to get more from propulsion than just speed when the pilot pushes the vehicle to its limit.

feats.name: Superior Sight
feats.description: Increase your visual acuity.

feats.name: Supernatural Charm
feats.description: The elven magic in your blood manifests as a force you can use to become more appealing or alluring.

feats.name: Supernatural Senses
feats.description: Your scent is preternaturally sharp, and you can always rely on your sense of smell to help guide you when your vision is compromised.

feats.name: Supertaster
feats.description: You have refined your palate and have a discerning sense of taste that can detect abnormalities in the flavor and texture of food and beverages.

feats.name: Supreme Invigorating Elixir
feats.description: For the purposes of counteracting effects with invigorating elixirs, treat your level as though it were 2 higher.

feats.name: Supreme Psychic Center
feats.description: With the merest thought, you realign your mental defenses to your duel's circumstances.

feats.name: Supreme Spellstrike
feats.description: You've made it almost effortless to combine spells and attacks.

feats.name: Sure Feet
feats.description: Whether keeping your balance or climbing, your feet easily find purchase.

feats.name: Sure-Footed
feats.description: Even if you're knocked off balance, your armor continues to protect you.

feats.name: Surface Culture
feats.description: Your interactions with other cultures on the surface have not only taught you about many other ancestries, but have also helped you realize the value of your own.

feats.name: Surface Skimmer
feats.description: By sinking gently beneath the waves, you obscure your presence and utilize the water as a barrier between you and land combatants.
feats.source: Absalom, City of Lost Omens pg. 394, Azarketi Ancestry Web Supplement pg. 4
feats.source_book: Absalom, City of Lost Omens pg. 394, Azarketi Ancestry Web Supplement

feats.name: Surface Tension
feats.description: You encase the pieces of your broken weapon together with water you pull from the surrounding environment.

feats.name: Surgical Shock
feats.description: With a few well-placed jabs with your fist or weapon, you render your opponent disoriented or ungainly.

feats.name: Surging Blood Magic
feats.description: Your blood courses with magic.
feats.prerequisites: Rising Blood Magic; master in Arcana or Religion, depending on your chosen tradition

feats.name: Surging Focus
feats.description: When an ally you can see falls in battle, your surge of righteous indignation allows you to draw upon untapped reserves of divine power.

feats.name: Surging Might
feats.description: You focus the power of your spell to overcome enemies' resistances.

feats.name: Surki Lore
feats.description: Either through the tales of elders in your settlement or through the messages thumped by those who oversaw your generation dig, you hold the knowledge of many surkis before you.

feats.name: Surki Weapon Familiarity
feats.description: Surki weapons favor utility and practicality over grace and brutality.

feats.name: Surreptitious Spellcaster
feats.description: You’ve learned that it pays for a Pathfinder to be able to cast spells without being noticed.

feats.name: Surrounding Flames
feats.description: When you cast wall of fire, you can modify it to create a 10-foot-radius hemisphere of fire.
feats.prerequisites: Spell Trickster Dedication; ability to cast wall of fire

feats.name: Survey Wildlife
feats.description: Trained in Survival
feats.campaign: Identify nearby creatures through signs and clues

feats.name: Survivor of Desolation
feats.description: You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to saving throws against unnatural weather events or environmental hazards occurring in blighted or otherwise unnaturally marred regions.

feats.name: Suspect of Opportunity
feats.description: Sometimes something intrudes upon your case unexpectedly, such as an ambush sent to bring your investigation to a close.

feats.name: Sustaining Steel
feats.description: You pull magic into your weapon, using its substance to transform the magic into restorative energy.
feats.prerequisites: Arcane Cascade, inexorable iron hybrid study

feats.name: Svetocher
feats.description: You were born to a moroi, the most common vampires, and you share their supernatural fortitude and power of persuasion.

feats.name: Swaggering Initiative
feats.description: You swagger readily into any fight.

feats.name: Swallow Pain
feats.description: You're capable of absorbing pain with less difficulty than others, and your bond with your horse helps it similarly ignore such suffering.

feats.name: Swamp Stealth
feats.description: In swamplands, you are particularly skilled at quickly hiding behind bits of underbrush or foliage, or moving quietly through murky water.
feats.source: Pathfinder #210: Whispers in the Dirt pg. 80

feats.name: Swap Reflections
feats.description: You've learned how to use even your reflection to your advantage.

feats.name: Swarmkeeper Dedication
feats.description: Your body has become a symbiotic hive for a swarm of crawling insects.

feats.name: Swashbuckler Dedication
feats.description: Choose a swashbuckler’s style.

feats.name: Swashbuckler's Riposte
feats.description: You’ve learned to riposte against ill-conceived attacks.

feats.name: Swashbuckler's Speed
feats.description: You move with a swashbuckler’s speed and grace.

feats.name: Sweeping Fan Block
feats.description: You leap up on one leg, snapping your fans open alongside your head before sweeping them across your body.

feats.name: Sweeping Fan Redirection
feats.description: You can redirect ammunition back at the creature that fired it with sweeping gusts of wind.
feats.prerequisites: Fan Dancer Dedication; Sweeping Fan Block

feats.name: Sweeping Tail
feats.description: Your companion swings its tail powerfully.
feats.prerequisites: Beastmaster Dedication; animal companion with a tail unarmed attack

feats.name: Swift
feats.description: You move with the wind always at your back.

feats.name: Swift Application
feats.description: You expertly combine the motions of attacking and coating your weapon with venom.

feats.name: Swift Banishment
feats.description: The force of your blow sends your victim back to its home plane.

feats.name: Swift Eel Mount
feats.description: Your rapport with your eel lets you guide it to avoid dangers as it swims.

feats.name: Swift Elusion
feats.description: Attempt an Acrobatics check against the foe’s Reflex DC.

feats.name: Swift Intervention
feats.description: You're burdened with noticing potential threats at all times.

feats.name: Swift Leap
feats.description: Your undead physiology allows you to leap quickly toward or away from your opponent.

feats.name: Swift Paragon
feats.description: The movement of you and your allies is swift and decisive as the judgment of your deity.

feats.name: Swift Retribution
feats.description: The transgressions of your enemies fuel you to retaliate with divine speed.

feats.name: Swift River
feats.description: You flow like water, avoiding all restraints.

feats.name: Swift Sneak
feats.description: Master in Stealth
feats.campaign: Move your full Speed while you Sneak

feats.name: Swift Support
feats.description: Nidalese horses are known as some of the fastest across all Golarion, and your mount has trained to ride quickly into battle.

feats.name: Swift Swimmer
feats.description: You gain a swim Speed of 15 feet.

feats.name: Swift Tracker
feats.description: Your keen eyes catch signs of passage even when you’re moving.

feats.name: Swim Through Earth
feats.description: The earth parts before you, letting you swim through it.

feats.name: Swimmer's Guidance
feats.description: You're always ready to help those floundering in the water.

feats.name: Swimming Poppet
feats.description: Your fins, flippers, or other accessories assist with steering you through water.

feats.name: Swipe
feats.description: You make a wide, arcing swing.
feats.source: Player Core pg. 144, Player Core 2 pg. 78

feats.name: Swipe Souvenir
feats.description: When you wriggle free from an enemy’s grasp, you take something of theirs with you.

feats.name: Switcheroo
feats.description: You attempt to deftly swap places with an adjacent enemy to avoid the attack.

feats.name: Sword and Pistol
feats.description: You're comfortable wielding a firearm or crossbow in one hand and a melee weapon in the other, combining melee attacks with shots from the firearm.

feats.name: Sword of Sealing
feats.description: Your spiritual power pierces both body and soul, pinning your foe in place.

feats.name: Sword-light Wave
feats.description: You channel spiritual energy through your weapon, unleashing it as a torrent of devastating power.

feats.name: Swordlord Exile
feats.description: You are a swordlord exile.
feats.prerequisites: Aldori Duelist Dedication; you have broken or forsaken the Aldori swordpact.

feats.name: Swordmaster Dedication
feats.description: Your Swords training taught you to never lose hold of your weapon.
feats.prerequisites: Strength 14, Dexterity 14, or Constitution 14; member of the Pathfinder Society affiliated with the School of Swords

feats.name: Sympathetic Portrayal
feats.description: You portrayed Grand Prince Stavian III in Fall of the Troubled King, a production dedicated to the life and times of the paranoid Taldan ruler whose violent resistance to new policies on succession kicked off the War for the Crown.

feats.name: Sympathetic Strike
feats.description: You collect your patron’s magic into one of your witch armaments, causing them to shine with runes, light, or another signifier of your patron.

feats.name: Sympathetic Vulnerabilities
feats.description: When you apply your will to invoke a vulnerability, the result is more powerful, and the vulnerability ripples out in a web from your main target to affect a broader range of creatures.
feats.prerequisites: Exploit Vulnerability mortal weakness or personal antithesis

feats.name: Symphony of Blood
feats.description: You call forth the blood of your foes to grant you vigor.

feats.name: Symphony of the Muse
feats.description: You have learned how to weave countless performances together into a solo symphony with multitudinous effects.

feats.name: Symphony of the Unfettered Heart
feats.description: You learn the symphony of the unfettered heart composition spell (page 371), which enables you to protect an ally against incapacitating conditions.

feats.name: Synchronous Slither
feats.description: You’ve learned to travel at your ally’s rhythm and use their movement to adjust your own position.

feats.name: Syncretism
feats.description: You have come to see the overlap between two deities’ teachings

feats.name: Synergistic Spell
feats.description: You combine your synergy and spells into a fantastic web of magic, allowing you to cast two spells at once.
feats.prerequisites: Halcyon Spellcasting Initiate; Fulminating Synergy; Legendary in Arcana; Legendary in Nature

feats.name: Syu Tak-Nwa's Deadly Hair
feats.description: Your hair deals increased damage and can grapple.
feats.source: Pathfinder #166: Despair on Danger Island pg. 74

feats.name: Syu Tak-Nwa's Hexed Locks
feats.description: Your hair attacks gain the reach trait and you can deliver hexes through it.
feats.source: Pathfinder #166: Despair on Danger Island pg. 74

feats.name: Syu Tak-Nwa's Skillful Tresses
feats.description: You can expertly control your living hair and use it to perform various tasks.
