feats.source: Pathfinder #166: Despair on Danger Island pg. 74

feats.name: Tactical Debilitations
feats.description: You learn new debilitations that grant you tactical advantages against your foes.

feats.name: Tactical Entry
feats.description: You Stride.

feats.name: Tactical Excellence
feats.description: You add two new tactics to your folio and increase your maximum number of tactics prepared by 1.

feats.name: Tactical Expansion
feats.description: Your folio is filled with tactics and techniques you’ve devised based on study and experience.

feats.name: Tactical Guidance
feats.description: You can provide tactical guidance to help your follower act more efficiently.

feats.name: Tactical Reflexes
feats.description: You are particularly swift at punishing foes who leave you openings.

feats.name: Tactile Magic Feedback
feats.description: Your ostilli can sense nearby spellcasters.

feats.name: Tag Team
feats.description: Your skilled teamwork with your spotter enables you both to assist one another when you falter, using either other's failures as opportunities to strike.

feats.name: Tail Guard
feats.description: Enemies who attempt to stab you in the back will be unhappy to find your lashing tail on guard.
feats.prerequisites: Thlipit Contestant Dedication; unarmed attack with your tail

feats.name: Tail Snatch
feats.description: You can whip your tail around to lash items from the unwary's grip.

feats.name: Tail Spin
feats.description: You excel at using your tail as a weapon to upend your foes.

feats.name: Take Flight
feats.description: Though it's not fully effective, much of your ability to fly has stayed with you.

feats.name: Take the Wheel
feats.description: Diving into a moving vehicle and seizing the controls is nothing new for you.
feats.prerequisites: Trick Driver Dedication; Expert in Driving Lore; Trained in Driving Lore

feats.name: Take Wing
feats.description: You have strengthened your wings and can now fly for short distances.

feats.name: Takedown Expert
feats.description: Tame Animal
feats.prerequisites: You've mastered combat practices that let you get up close and bring down perpetrators alive.
notes: Animals born and raised far from humanoid settlements rarely get along with two-legged beings, whom they assume to be dangerous predators.

feats.name: Talent Envy
feats.description: You give off a bedazzling glow with every performance, sparking feelings of severe envy and inadequacy in those who compare their talent to yours.

feats.name: Tales of the Road
feats.description: The blessings of Isthralei connect you to the thrum of the stories that underlie all settlements.

feats.name: Talisman Esoterica
feats.description: You know how to assemble the supernatural objects in your esoterica into a number of temporary talismans.

feats.name: Talmandor's Shout
feats.description: After seeing an enemy harm one of your allies, you deliver a righteous shout in the name of the celestial Talmandor.
feats.prerequisites: Eagle Knight Dedication; Master in Intimidation

feats.name: Talon Sweep
feats.description: Your long clawed legs let you catch enemies to either side.

feats.name: Talon's Mark
feats.description: On the rare occasions that Twilight Talons need to identify themselves as members of the organization, many rely on an easily concealed tattoo to reveal their allegiance.

feats.name: Tamper
feats.description: You tamper with a foe's weapon or armor, using a free hand.

feats.name: Tandem Auras
feats.description: You’ve learned how to maintain multiple auras at once, reinforcing them simultaneously.

feats.name: Tandem Movement
feats.description: You and your eidolon move together.

feats.name: Tandem Onslaught
feats.description: You have trained your body and mind to work in tandem, and you can combine your combat and spellcasting prowess to better support yourself in battle.

feats.name: Tandem Strike
feats.description: You and your eidolon each attack, seamlessly targeting the same foe without interfering with each other's movements.

feats.name: Tangle of Battle
feats.description: Your vicious strike pulls your foe closer, giving you the opportunity to grab them.

feats.name: Tangle of Limbs
feats.description: Dokkaebi have a strong tradition of wrestling.

feats.name: Tangle-tongue's Wit
feats.description: Your talent for language is a blessing from the yaksha makers of old.

feats.name: Tangled Forest Rake
feats.description: You reposition foes with raking attacks.

feats.name: Tangled Forest Stance
feats.description: You extend your arms like gnarled branches to interfere with your foes' movements.

feats.name: Tanuki Lore
feats.description: Tanuki love to play two things: tricks and music.

feats.name: Tap Into Blood
feats.description: The power in your blood allows you to perform minor feats of magic.

feats.name: Tap Vitality
feats.description: You tap into the entity's life force to heal your wounds, though at the cost of the entity's personality bleeding into your own.

feats.name: Target of Psychic Ire
feats.description: Your magic saturates your surroundings with hateful psychic energy.

feats.name: Targeted Redirection
feats.description: You aim a shot at your spotter, intending for your spotter to redirect that shot off their own weapon or shield to hit your foe from a better angle, and avoid your foe's cover.

feats.name: Targeting Finisher
feats.description: Your attack harms and hinders your foe.

feats.name: Targeting Strike
feats.description: Your attack creates an opening in your target's defenses for your allies to capitalize on.
notes: Gatewalkers Player's Guide (Remastered) pg. 13, Dark Archives (Remastered) pg. 101
You cause minor tremors that topple your enemies.

feats.name: Taste Blood
feats.description: You retain not only your vampiric parent's taste for blood but their ability to gain vitality from it.
feats.prerequisites: Cel Rau, Straveika, Svetocher, or another lineage from a vampire with the Drink Blood ability

feats.name: Tattoo Artist
feats.description: You can craft tattoos, including magical tattoos.
feats.source: Treasure Vault (Remastered) pg. 118, Secrets of Magic pg. 164
feats.source_book: Treasure Vault (Remastered) pg. 118, Secrets of Magic

feats.name: Tattooed Historian Dedication
feats.description: You become trained in Diplomacy or Performance; if you are already trained in both skills, you instead become trained in a skill of your choice.
feats.prerequisites: Constitution +1; Trained in Belkzen Lore, Trained in Orc Lore, Trained in Orc Pantheon Lore, or (at the GM's discretion) a related Lore skill

feats.name: Taunting Strike
feats.description: The force of your blow causes your enemy to focus their attention on you.

feats.name: Teakettle Form
feats.description: Your shapeshifting is advanced enough to take the form of not just creatures, but objects as well.

feats.name: Tear Tendons
feats.description: You rake into your opponent with two claws, cutting into their muscle and depriving them of needed strength.

feats.name: Tears of Pearl
feats.description: You weep, and your tears become gleaming pearls as they fall to the ground, so beautiful others can't help but grab at them.

feats.name: Telekinetic Slip
feats.description: A thin shell of telekinetic energy pushes from your skin, widening your enemy's grasp enough for you to slip free.

feats.name: Telluric Power
feats.description: You channel strength from the earth beneath your feet to pummel your enemies.

feats.name: Temperature Adjustment
feats.description: You learn Hwan temperature classifications for the elements—wood and water are cold elements, while fire, earth, and metal are hot elements.
feats.prerequisites: Master in Crafting, Master in Medicine, or Herbalism Lore

feats.name: Tempest Cloud's Speed
feats.description: You and your familiar coordinate to channel elemental air.

feats.name: Tempest Gaze
feats.description: Your third eye grows stronger and more powerful.

feats.name: Tempest-Sun Redirection
feats.description: If the next action you use is to Cast a Spell from your spell slots that damages other creatures, you can bend some of that spell’s offensive energy, protecting allies in the area and boosting your own defenses against certain foes.
feats.prerequisites: Magaambyan Attendant Dedication; Tempest-Sun Mages affiliation

feats.name: Tempest-Sun Shielding
feats.description: You transform unrealized spell energy into a protective shield.

feats.name: Tempo Duelist
feats.description: You move with an unpredictable tempo, shifting between unnervingly slow and rapid movements.

feats.name: Tempo Shift
feats.description: You are always ready to embrace to a change in tempo and adapt your actions to take advantage of unforeseen developments.
feats.prerequisites: Celebrity Dedication or Gladiator Dedication; Legendary in Acrobatics

feats.name: Ten Lives
feats.description: When your character would die, you can attempt a DC 17 flat check.

feats.name: Tenacious Blood Magic
feats.description: You have learned how to invest magic more deeply by witnessing Aroden's works.

feats.name: Tenacious Endurance
feats.description: You encourage your companion to refuse to yield, against even the mightiest of foes.

feats.name: Tenacious Jaws
feats.description: Your teeth are curved or hooked to hold on to your enemies.

feats.name: Tenacious Net
feats.description: Escaping your nets is no simple task.

feats.name: Tenacious Toxins
feats.description: Your victims tend to expire long before your poisons, since the latter have been specifically formulated to last longer.

feats.name: Tengu Feather Fan
feats.description: You've learned to bind some of your feathers together into a fan to focus your ancestral magic.

feats.name: Tengu Lore
feats.description: You learned skills for surviving in the place where your people were dispersed.

feats.name: Tengu Weapon Familiarity
feats.description: You gain access to all uncommon weapons with the tengu trait plus the katana, khakkara, temple sword, and wakizashi.

feats.name: Terra Dragonblood
feats.description: Each step upon the earth makes your blood resonate.

feats.name: Terraforming Spell
feats.description: You capture transformative fragments of magic and slam them into the ground, creating a shock wave that alters your surroundings.

feats.name: Terraforming Trickery
feats.description: You know how to channel the transformative aspects of your blood magic to alter your surroundings.

feats.name: Terrain Advantage
feats.description: Non-lizardfolk creatures in difficult terrain are off-guard to you.

feats.name: Terrain Expertise
feats.description: Trained in Survival
feats.campaign: +1 to Survival checks in certain terrain

feats.name: Terrain Form
feats.description: You crumble to pieces, becoming composed of the very terrain to which you're bound, with the effects of the gaseous form spell, or you reconstitute into your normal form.

feats.name: Terrain Ghost
feats.description: You move through your territory like a living shadow.
feats.prerequisites: Guerrilla Dedication; Master in Stealth; Master in Survival

feats.name: Terrain Master
feats.description: You are able to adapt to your surroundings in any natural terrain.

feats.name: Terrain Shield
feats.description: You're so attuned to the land that it rises up to protect you from a potentially fatal blow in a seeming coincidence.
notes: You let out a mighty roar as part of your transformation.

feats.name: Terrain Stalker
feats.description: Trained in Stealth
feats.campaign: Sneak in certain terrain without attempting a check

feats.name: Terrified Retreat
feats.description: Master in Intimidation
feats.campaign: Cause foes you Demoralize to flee

feats.name: Terrifying Countenance
feats.description: You can erect a magical cowl that terrorizes your enemies.
feats.source: Night of the Gray Death pg. 65
feats.prerequisites: Vigilante Dedication; member of the Gray Gardeners

feats.name: Terrifying Croak
feats.description: You release a haunting croak that reminds those around you of their fears.

feats.name: Terrifying Howl
feats.description: You unleash a terrifying howl.

feats.name: Terrifying Resistance
feats.description: The spells of those you have Demoralized are less effective on you.

feats.name: Terrifying Transformation
feats.description: Your flesh tears and warps as you transform.
feats.prerequisites: Werecreature Dedication; you were afflicted with the curse of the werecreature

feats.name: Tetraelemental Assault
feats.description: Your Elemental Assault cycles through all four elements.

feats.name: Text Decoder
feats.description: Thanks to your constant involvement with cryptic texts, you have attained an almost-supernatural ability to decipher complex codes and understand ancient writings.

feats.name: That was a Close One, Huh?
feats.description: You laugh innocently about the inexplicable luck of your last shot hitting its mark or how close the attack that just missed you came to taking your head off, causing your foes to second guess whether it's a good idea to oppose you in battle.
feats.prerequisites: Unexpected Sharpshooter Dedication; Master in Deception

feats.name: That's Not Natural!
feats.description: Your mastery at surviving in the wild has given you a sort of sixth-sense when it comes to noticing creatures that aren't part of the natural order.

feats.name: That's Odd
feats.description: When you enter a new location, such as a room or corridor, you immediately notice one thing out of the ordinary.

feats.name: Thaumaturge Dedication
feats.description: You've uncovered basic thaumaturgy.

feats.name: Thaumaturge's Demesne
feats.description: You have claimed an area or location as your demesne, granting you the ability to ward and protect it.

feats.name: Thaumaturge's Investiture
feats.description: Magical equipment and gear are the tools of your trade, and you know you need as many as possible to help you against the supernatural.

feats.name: Thaumaturgic Ritualist
feats.description: Your studies into the supernatural have resulted in an especially strong knowledge of rituals

feats.name: The Bigger They Are
feats.description: With reckless speed, you dash, jump and swing around a creature to find a more vulnerable spot.

feats.name: The Bitter Scholar's Promotion
feats.description: Tian Xia’s shining cities belie its empires’ long shadow of death, darkened by thousands of years of suffering and injustice.

feats.name: The Cycle Continues
feats.description: Death is as natural as breathing to you, and you can move past it as easily as the other troubles in your life.

feats.name: The Dead Tell Tales
feats.description: New campfire chroniclers are inundated with the stories of the ghosts below Pulura’s Fall and the lessons learned there.

feats.name: The Dead Walk
feats.description: You beseech warrior spirits to come forth and aid you.

feats.name: The Harder They Fall (Ranger)
feats.description: You know how to make a larger creature hurt when it falls to the ground.

feats.name: The Harder They Fall (Rogue)
feats.description: You make your foes fall painfully when you trip them.

feats.name: The Immortal Attains the Summit
feats.description: Your cultivation bearing glorious fruit, you behold Heaven’s will.

feats.name: The Moon Weaver's Art
feats.description: You’ve learned to create minor illusions by collecting strands of moonlight and weaving them together to create small images or cloaking veils.

feats.name: The Shattered Mountain Weeps
feats.description: A massive sphere of rock explodes, unleashing a cataclysm of falling debris and deadly shrapnel.

feats.name: The Thousand Lashes of the Weeping Willow
feats.description: You conjure a massive willow tree, which lashes your foes with a thousand branches.
feats.source: Pathfinder #202: Severed at the Root pg. 73

feats.name: The Truth as I See it
feats.description: Your knack for spinning a believable reality from threads of story is so practiced that sometimes even you begin to believe what you're saying.

feats.name: The Tyrant Falls!
feats.description: You've reached the apex of the Crimson Oath's power.
feats.prerequisites: Knight Reclaimant Dedication; Invoke the Crimson Oath
notes: Pathfinder #174: Shadows of the Ancients pg. 79
Your mask grants you the toughness of Elephant, the Conjured Chronicle.

feats.name: Their Master's Call
feats.description: In a pinch, you pull one of your inactive companions from their rest to provide a companion's support benefit.
feats.prerequisites: Undead Master Dedication; Call Companion, at least one inactive undead companion whose remains or anchor are currently in your possession.
notes: Pathfinder #222: Hellbreakers pg. 217, Hellbreakers Players Guide pg. 9
Your devotion to the ideals of justice, freedom, and revolution allow you to truly punish those who stand in your way.

feats.name: Theoretical Acumen
feats.description: You study a creature’s form and behavior to hypothesize likely means of overcoming its strengths.

feats.name: Thermal Nimbus
feats.description: You direct waves of warmth into or out of your kinetic gate to drastically shift the temperature around you.

feats.name: This is What It's Like to Die
feats.description: Season of Ghosts
feats.prerequisites: It’s one thing to remember your previous lives.
notes: Pathfinder #199: To Bloom Below the Web pg. 81
Since your soul has experienced not only death but also rebirth, you can shift your physical body into the Ethereal Plane for brief intervals.

feats.name: This Too Shall Pass
feats.description: Mortal worries are such simple matters to you that you leave them behind almost as quickly as you experience them.
feats.prerequisites: And Will Do So Once More

feats.name: Thlipit Contestant Dedication
feats.description: Grueling practice has strengthened your tongue or tail to the point where it's become a formidable weapon.
feats.prerequisites: You have a long prehensile tongue or a tail. At the GM’s discretion, similar flexible appendages, such as tentacles, can be used to qualify instead.
notes: Gatewalkers Player's Guide (Remastered) pg. 13, Dark Archives (Remastered) pg. 101
Your limbs tense as you deliver a mighty swing.

feats.name: Thorned Seedpod
feats.description: When your seedpods strike a felling blow, they burst into viciously thorny vines.

feats.name: Thorough Reports
feats.description: Recalling Knowledge adds creatures to your list, granting you bonuses to Recall in future encounters.

feats.name: Thorough Research
feats.description: You have comprehensive knowledge in your fields of interest.

feats.name: Thorough Search
feats.description: You take your time searching to ensure you find everything.

feats.name: Thoughtform Summoning
feats.description: You can create a prototypical creature from the depths of your imagination instead of calling one from elsewhere.

feats.name: Thoughtsense
feats.description: You can detect the flickers of mental activity let off by all thinking creatures.

feats.name: Thousand Visions
feats.description: You open your senses to numerous visions of the immediate future.

feats.name: Thousand-Year Grudge
feats.description: You can call upon your former lives and project all of your accumulated frustration, failure, and despair through your eyes at a target, overwhelming their senses.

feats.name: Thrash
feats.description: You thrash your foe around.

feats.name: Threatening Pursuit
feats.description: You emit a terrifying growl and snort, stamping your hooves for all to hear so that they know that you hunt them.
feats.prerequisites: Expert in Intimidation; Expert in Stealth

feats.name: Three Clear Breaths
feats.description: Through your disciplined condensations and circulations of qi, you’ve caught a fleeting glimpse of cultivation’s promise, and your health has handsomely profited along the way.

feats.name: Three Pecks of Dew
feats.description: At this stage of cultivation, your body is as much spirit as flesh.

feats.name: Throat Pocket
feats.description: You’ve trained to use unique nagaji eating habits to your advantage.

feats.name: Throttle the Divine
feats.description: You grasp the godly by their throats and damage their connection to their deities.

feats.name: Through Spell
feats.description: Spells you cast can transform briefly into vital essence, traveling harmlessly through living and undead creatures between you and your target, blocked only by solid objects.

feats.name: Through the Gate
feats.description: You gain a 1st- or 2nd-level kineticist feat of your choice.

feats.name: Through the Needle's Eye
feats.description: Your weapon strikes with the perfection your will demands.

feats.name: Thrown Voice
feats.description: You've learned how to throw your voice through the winds, tricking others as to your location.

feats.name: Thunder Clap
feats.description: You slam your hands together to unleash a deafening blast.
feats.source: Pathfinder #178: Punks in a Powderkeg pg. 79

feats.name: Thunder God's Fan
feats.description: Your fan unleashes the fury of the storm.

feats.name: Thunderclap Spell
feats.description: Your lightning splits the air, generating a booming shock wave.

feats.name: Thunderous Landing
feats.description: You hurl away enemies with the force of your landing.

feats.name: Thwart Evil
feats.description: You react instinctively when you sense evil forming, thrusting your spiritual energy toward the source to snuff out evil before it fully manifests.
feats.prerequisites: Lastwall Sentry Dedication; Expert in Religion

feats.name: Tidal Hands
feats.description: With an emphatic gesture, you create waves that rush out from you in the shape of your hands.

feats.name: Tidal Shield
feats.description: You conjure the force of the tides to gain a +4 circumstance bonus to AC until the end of your next turn.

feats.name: Tidal Wave
feats.description: Like the ocean in a storm, you overwhelm your opponents with speed and force.

feats.name: Tide-Hardened
feats.description: You're at home in the unpredictable tides.

feats.name: Tiger Slash
feats.description: You make a fierce swipe with both hands.

feats.name: Tiger Stance
feats.description: You enter the stance of a tiger and can make tiger claw attacks.

feats.name: Tight Follower
feats.description: You keep up as a protector.

feats.name: Tikling Bird Twirl
feats.description: You trained your footwork by dancing to music between snapping bamboo poles, and your increased mobility helps you succeed when hunting dangerous beasts or fighting multiple opponents.

feats.name: Tiller's Aid
feats.description: You can quickly Aid your crop.

feats.name: Tiller's Drive
feats.description: Increase your Speed and that of your crop.

feats.name: Timber Sentinel
feats.description: A slim, symmetrical tree travels from the Plane of Wood.

feats.name: Time Dilation Cascade
feats.description: Fists of the Ruby Phoenix
feats.source: Pathfinder #168: King of the Mountain pg. 77
feats.prerequisites: You borrow a bit of time from the future to act now.
notes: Pathfinder #174: Shadows of the Ancients pg. 79
Your mask hosts the legacy of Golden Snake, the Tireless Guide, allowing you to guide others with ease.

feats.name: Time Mage Dedication
feats.description: You might be a novice in the temporal arts now, but in the future, you'll hold time in the palm of your hand.
feats.prerequisites: You have a spellcasting class feature.

feats.name: Timeless Nature
feats.description: With primal magic sustaining you, you cease aging.

feats.name: Timeline-Splitting Spell
feats.description: You invest in two futures, then choose the one to make a reality.

feats.name: Tinkering Fingers
feats.description: You're trained in Crafting.

feats.name: Tip the Scales
feats.description: You’re a cunning adversary in close quarters and are well-versed in hit-and-run tactics that exploit the advantages of your small stature.

feats.name: Titan Slinger
feats.description: You have learned how to use your sling to fell enormous creatures.

feats.name: Titan Wrestler
feats.description: Trained in Athletics
feats.campaign: Disarm, Grapple, Shove, or Trip larger creatures

feats.name: Titan's Stature
feats.description: You grow to even greater size.

feats.name: To the Ends of the Earth
feats.description: Your ability to track your prey has surpassed explanation, allowing you to trace your prey’s movements and predict its location with ease.

feats.name: Tomb-Watcher's Glare
feats.description: When you critically hit an undead creature, or an undead creature critically fails a saving throw against one of your abilities, you drive your divine wrath home in your enemy’s heart.

feats.name: Tongue Disarm
feats.description: You lash out with your tongue to disarm your foe.

feats.name: Tongue Tether
feats.description: Your tongue can momentarily latch on as readily as your hands.

feats.name: Too Angry to Die
feats.description: You refuse to yield the battle, even after you've been knocked off your feet and nearly killed.

feats.name: Too Much to Swallow
feats.description: While you might be small enough to grab normally, you can change that at a moment's notice.
notes: Fists of the Ruby Phoenix Hardcover pg. 223, Pathfinder #167: Ready? Fight! pg. 77
You can redirect a spell's power through you to deliver it within striking distance.

feats.name: Tooth and Claw
feats.description: You've become adept with your born weapons.

feats.name: Topple Giants
feats.description: When you observe an ally try and fail to execute a strategic maneuver against your enemies, you coordinate with your other allies to finish the job.

feats.name: Topple the Titans
feats.description: Even the greatest titans of the world are easier to kill when they’re lying on the ground.
feats.source: Pathfinder #217: Death Sails a Wine-Dark Sea pg. 79
feats.source_book: Pathfinder #217: Death Sails a Wine-Dark Sea

feats.name: Toppling Dance
feats.description: While sharing a creature's space using Dance Underfoot, your melee weapons and unarmed attacks gain the trip trait, but only against the creature whose space you share.

feats.name: Toppling Tentacles
feats.description: When you cast black tentacles, you can modify it to trip the targets.
feats.prerequisites: Spell Trickster Dedication; ability to cast black tentacles

feats.name: Toppling Transformation
feats.description: You use your body's expansion as leverage to displace a nearby creature.

feats.name: Torch Goblin
feats.description: You’ve spent enough time on fire that you know how to use it to your advantage.

feats.name: Torrent in the Blood
feats.description: A healing wave splashes across creatures in a 30-foot cone, its cleansing water driving afflictions from the body.

feats.name: Torrential Backlash
feats.description: Calling upon forbidden practices, you release the curse from within yourself, allowing it free rein to destroy everything around you.

feats.name: Touch of Lunacy
feats.description: In moments of viciousness, your curse can partially infect your prey.

feats.name: Tough Cookie
feats.description: Though you've taken a lot of punishment, you aren't easily brought down.

feats.name: Tough Skin
feats.description: Your skin is medium armor in the plate armor group that grants a +4 item bonus to AC, and has a Dex cap of +1, a check penalty of –2, a Speed penalty of –5 feet, a Strength value of 16, and the comfort trait.

feats.name: Tough Tumbler
feats.description: You’ve taken your share of licks while scurrying around the battlefield and know how to defend yourself against opportunistic attackers.

feats.name: Toughness
feats.description: Increase your maximum HP and reduce the DCs of recovery checks

feats.name: Tower Shield Mastery
feats.description: You've learned how to maximize the defensive abilities of your tower shield.

feats.name: Towering Growth
feats.description: You're capable of growing as tall as a pine tree for a short time.

feats.name: Towering Presence
feats.description: You tap into your planar heritage and momentarily grow larger through force of will.

feats.name: Towering Size
feats.description: Your eidolon becomes even bigger.
notes: You have elongated claws and enhanced senses, making you uncanny at digging the underground passageways needed to construct ghoul warrens and rob graves without arousing suspicion.

feats.name: Towering Transformation
feats.description: The physical growth of your transformation is a spectacle that shakes foes to their core.

feats.name: Traces of the Divine
feats.description: You can detect those who use divine magic like an additional sense.

feats.name: Tracing Sigil
feats.description: When you cast sigil, you can modify the spell to allow you to track the target.
feats.prerequisites: Spell Trickster Dedication; ability to cast sigil

feats.name: Traditional Resistances
feats.description: Due to your blood, you have some resistance to certain types of magic.
feats.prerequisites: Arcane Dragonblood, Divine Dragonblood, Occult Dragonblood, or Primal Dragonblood

feats.name: Traditional Ways
feats.description: You are a fervent follower of the long-standing elven traditions established when your people returned to Kyonin.
feats.source: Pathfinder #210: Whispers in the Dirt pg. 80

feats.name: Tragic Lament
feats.description: You dramatically cry out in poetic verse about the tragedies that led to your doom at this very moment, instilling guilt in your attacker.
feats.prerequisites: Celebrity Dedication or Dandy Dedication; Legendary in Performance

feats.name: Train Animal
feats.description: Trained in Nature

feats.name: Trained Swimmer
feats.description: Thanks to tireless practice, water has become a natural environment for you.

feats.name: Trample
feats.description: You know how to leverage your size and momentum when using your horns attack, and can use your movement speed to overrun your foes.

feats.name: Trample (Centaur)
feats.description: You've trained to stampede right over smaller foes without causing yourself any harm.

feats.name: Trample (Summoner)
feats.description: Your eidolon Strides up to double its Speed and can move through the spaces of creatures at least one size smaller, Trampling each creature whose space it enters.

feats.name: Trample Mimicry
feats.description: You Stride up to double your speed and can move through the spaces of creatures at least one size smaller, trampling each creature whose space you enter.
feats.prerequisites: Wild Mimic Dedication; you have seen a creature use Trample or have identified a creature with Trample in combat

feats.name: Trance of Celerity
feats.description: Your feet move faster, almost out of your conscious control.

feats.name: Tranquil Sanctuary
feats.description: Whenever possible, you follow the serene path and encourage others to do the same.

feats.name: Transcend the Azimuth
feats.description: As the earth drinks the light of sun and moon, so does your steady vow imbibe superlunary forces, ready to be unleashed with a moment’s mantra.

feats.name: Transcendent Deflection
feats.description: You charge your weapon with spiritual energy and intercept the attack.

feats.name: Transcendent Realization
feats.description: You've unleashed even more of your mind's limitless potential.

feats.name: Transfusion
feats.description: You bring forth the regenerative properties of blood on behalf of an ally or yourself.

feats.name: Translucent Skin
feats.description: Your body is translucent while underwater.

feats.name: Transposable Compliance
feats.description: Your protean vitality is fecund and many-succoring: your veins run with life-giving ichor that adapts to the blood and physiology of any body, and your skin molts on command, creating wound-stanching sheaths of tissue for yourself and others.

feats.name: Transpose
feats.description: You switch places with your eidolon.

feats.name: Trap Finder
feats.description: You have an intuitive sense that alerts you to the presence of traps.
feats.source: Player Core pg. 169, Player Core 2 pg. 107

feats.name: Trapsmith Dedication
feats.description: You use glimmering gears and gnashing mechanisms to manufacture snares using specialized parts.

feats.name: Traveler's Counsel
feats.description: On your travels, you’ve resolved countless disputes and counseled those in need.

feats.name: Treacherous Earth
feats.description: You have the power to shatter the earth into a shape of your devising.

feats.name: Tree Climber
feats.description: You've spent much of your life among the treetops and have become an expert at quickly and safely climbing them.

feats.name: Tree Climber (Goblin)
feats.description: Your time in forest or jungle canopies has taught you how to scramble across branches with sure feet.
feats.prerequisites: Tailed Goblin heritage or Treedweller Goblin heritage

feats.name: Tree of Duality
feats.description: An ephemeral tree bursts forth, floating on air in an unoccupied square of your choice within 60 feet.

feats.name: Tree's Ward
feats.description: You've lived among trees for so long they recognize your presence and seek to protect you from harm.

feats.name: Treehealer
feats.description: You can undo the effect of demonic corruption in plants.
feats.source: Pathfinder #210: Whispers in the Dirt pg. 81

feats.name: Treespeech
feats.description: Your connection to elemental wood allows you to communicate with trees in the Universe in Muan, the language of wood elementals.

feats.name: Tremor
feats.description: You unleash a small, localized tremor in a 10-foot burst within 30 feet.

feats.name: Trespass Teleportation
feats.description: You can hunt your foe to the ends of creation.

feats.name: Trial by Skyfire
feats.description: Your lips murmur as you portend a great disaster, one you hope you survive.

feats.name: Triangle Shot
feats.description: You string three arrows to your bow and fire them all at once.

feats.name: Triangulate
feats.description: Your spotter's quick signals help you make even difficult shots seem simple.

feats.name: Tributary Circulation
feats.description: Never distant from water’s succoring presence, your refined breathing techniques focus your awareness and control of water inward.

feats.name: Trick Driver Dedication
feats.description: You are equally at home piloting any vehicle, adapting yourself instantly to varied controls, movements, and handling.

feats.name: Trick Magic Item
feats.description: Trained in Arcana, Trained in Nature, Trained in Occultism, or Trained in Religion
feats.campaign: Activate a magic item you normally can’t activate

feats.name: Trick Shot
feats.description: You shoot not at your foe but at an object nearby.

feats.name: Trickster Tengu
feats.description: You can transform yourself or the bodies of others to express your displeasure.

feats.name: Trickster's Ace
feats.description: Whether from jury-rigged magic items, deduction from the study of magical interactions, or other means, you have a contingency in your back pocket for desperate situations.

feats.name: Tricksterbane Oath
feats.description: You’ve sworn an oath to ferret out and destroy malevolent shapechangers who pose as mortals with evil intent.

feats.name: Triggerbrand Blitz
feats.description: You dance through your foes, stabbing and shooting.

feats.name: Triggerbrand Salvo
feats.description: You slice, stab, or batter your opponent with the melee portion of your combination weapon before pulling the trigger at point-blank range.

feats.name: Tripartite Omen
feats.description: You invoke religious portents to ward yourself against danger without losing sight of the history that led to this point.
feats.prerequisites: Dualistic Synergy; Shattered Sacrament; Master in Religion

feats.name: Tripkee Glide
feats.description: You can use your webbed feet to guide your fall.

feats.name: Tripkee Lore
feats.description: You are well versed in tripkee culture and tactics.

feats.name: Tripkee Weapon Familiarity
feats.description: You gain access to all uncommon weapons with the tripkee trait.

feats.name: Triple Shot
feats.description: You can quickly fire multiple shots with greater control.

feats.name: Triple Threat
feats.description: You can divide your attention three ways when hunting.

feats.name: Triple Time
feats.description: You learn the triple time composition cantrip, which speeds up you and your allies for a round.

feats.name: Triumphant Boast
feats.description: You relate a loud and impressive tale of your triumph over a formidable foe.

feats.name: Triumphant Inspiration
feats.description: With a triumphant shout, you inspire your allies.

feats.name: True Channel Spell
feats.description: You are a true conduit for spiritual power, able to unleash the greatest spells.

feats.name: True Debilitating Bomb
feats.description: You have discovered increasingly devastating ways for your bombs to impede your foes.

feats.name: True Dragon's Flight
feats.description: Your wings have grown more powerful, capable of keeping you aloft longer.

feats.name: True Gaze
feats.description: When you focus your eyes carefully, your gaze can pierce through all obfuscations, even magical ones.

feats.name: True Hypercognition
feats.description: Your mind works at an incredible pace.

feats.name: True Perception
feats.description: Your perceptive abilities and ability to process sensory information are so far beyond the pale that you notice minute discrepancies in all sorts of illusions and physical transformations.

feats.name: True Senses
feats.description: Your senses are so sharp they pierce through all illusions.

feats.name: True Shapeshifter
feats.description: You transcend the limitations of form.

feats.name: True Transmogrification
feats.description: You transmogrify your eidolon each day.

feats.name: Truespeech
feats.description: It is paramount that you are understood and you understand others; language need not impede your message.

feats.name: Tumble Behind (Rogue)
feats.description: You tumble under and behind your foe, your rapid movement letting you catch them off guard.

feats.name: Tumble Behind (Swashbuckler)
feats.description: Your tumbling puts your foes on the back foot.

feats.name: Tumbling Diversion
feats.description: Attempt to Tumble Through an opponent's space.
feats.prerequisites: Expert in Acrobatics; Expert in Deception

feats.name: Tumbling Lumber
feats.description: A slew of logs eject from the Plane of Wood and slam into your enemies.

feats.name: Tumbling Opportunist
feats.description: You use a burst of stamina to perform a breathtaking feat of Acrobatics as you speed through a foe's space, leaving your foe lying flat on their back.

feats.name: Tumbling Strike
feats.description: You deftly dive through a gap left by a foe to deliver an advantageous blow.

feats.name: Tumbling Teamwork
feats.description: Your tumbling distracts a foe enough to create an advantage for one of your allies.

feats.name: Tumbling Theft
feats.description: You reach for an opponent's item as you move past a foe.
feats.prerequisites: Expert in Acrobatics; Expert in Thievery

feats.name: Tunnel
feats.description: You gain a burrow speed of 10 feet.
feats.source: Pathfinder #194: Cult of the Cave Worm pg. 81
feats.source_book: Pathfinder #194: Cult of the Cave Worm

feats.name: Tunnel Roll
feats.description: You can more easily navigate underground tunnels by rolling up into a ball.

feats.name: Tunnel Wall
feats.description: Using your shield, you guard against the movement of foes as surely as if you were a wall of stone.

feats.name: Tupilaq Carver
feats.description: You know the truth behind old stories that tell of sending a fetish of bone and sinew to seek vengeance.
feats.prerequisites: You have a spellcasting class feature with the divine or primal tradition

feats.name: Turn Away Misfortune
feats.description: You perform a superstition, such as casting salt over your shoulder to ward off bad luck.

feats.name: Turn Back the Clock
feats.description: After failing a test of skill, you hop back in your personal timeline so you can try again.

feats.name: Turn the Wheel of Seasons
feats.description: The seasons shift rapidly.

feats.name: Turn to Mist
feats.description: You turn into vapor, gaining the effects of gaseous form.

feats.name: Turpin Rowe Lumberjack Dedication
feats.description: Your logging training has made you intimately familiar with all aspects of forestry.

feats.name: Tusks
feats.description: You have particularly long, jagged tusks perfect for tearing meat from bone.
feats.source: Player Core pg. 72, Character Guide pg. 15

feats.name: Tut-Tut
feats.description: The Sapphire Butterfly is not one for violence when simply intimidating a foe will do.

feats.name: Tweak Appearances
feats.description: You can alter a creature's clothing to improve their social impact.

feats.name: Twilight Dweller
feats.description: You’re accustomed to shaded forests and caves.

feats.name: Twilight Speaker Dedication
feats.description: You have carefully studied the histories, customs, and etiquette of many of the younger peoples of Golarion.
feats.prerequisites: Trained in Society; you are an Ilverani elf

feats.name: Twilight Talon Dedication
feats.description: Few would even suspect that you're a member of the Eagle Knights, and you use the tricks of the spymaster's trade to keep it that way.

feats.name: Twin Distraction
feats.description: Your movements with two weapons are so swift and disorienting that they befuddle your opponent.

feats.name: Twin Eidolon
feats.description: You can transform to match your eidolon.

feats.name: Twin Feint
feats.description: You use an attack with one weapon to distract your foe from a second attack coming at a different angle.

feats.name: Twin Parry
feats.description: You use your two weapons to parry attacks.

feats.name: Twin Psyche
feats.description: You’ve segmented your psyche so it can operate in tandem.

feats.name: Twin Riposte
feats.description: A clever parry with one weapon leaves your opponent open to an attack with the other weapon.

feats.name: Twin Shot Knockdown
feats.description: You fire at an enemy while targeting a part of its anatomy that will disrupt its balance.

feats.name: Twin Stars
feats.description: Your divine spark embodies a primordial duality, and your ikon splits itself accordingly into two corresponding halves.

feats.name: Twin Takedown
feats.description: You swiftly attack your hunted prey with each of your weapons, potentially combining their damage into a single devastating attack.

feats.name: Twin Weakness
feats.description: As you make an attack augmented by your esoterica, you also press your implement against the creature, applying its weakness as your implement's energies sear the creature's flesh.

feats.name: Twinned Defense (Fighter)
feats.description: You’re always ready to use your off-hand weapon to interfere with attacks against you.
notes: Combining necromancy with the mysterious temporal powers of clockwork, you wind a creature backward from the moment of its death.

feats.name: Twirl Through
feats.description: You sweep across the battlefield in a fluttering of movement honed from years of coordinating perfectly spaced movements alongside fellow dancers.

feats.name: Twirling Strike
feats.description: Your fans, one raised up alongside your head and the other alongside your hip, become a blur as you twirl across the battlefield.

feats.name: Twirling Throw
feats.description: Your thrown weapons seem to defy physics as they soar through the air and spin back to you after a strike.

feats.name: Twist Healing
feats.description: Your connection to both life and undeath lets you twist the healing power of magic items to suit your own needs and aims.
feats.prerequisites: ability to cast heal and harm

feats.name: Twist The Knife
feats.description: After stabbing your opponent in a weak spot, you tear the wound open.

feats.name: Twisting Petal Stance
feats.description: Your body moves like a petal twisting on the wind, confounding your opponents while using their energy against them.

feats.name: Twitchy
feats.description: You are naturally suspicious and wary of danger, especially when you suspect someone might be leading you into an ambush.

feats.name: Two-Element Infusion
feats.description: Slamming one element into another, you combine their strengths.

feats.name: Two-Truths
feats.description: Your ability to imitate your progenitor is so strong, you can even convince yourself.

feats.name: Two-Weapon Flurry
feats.description: Using the momentum of your prior attack, you lash out with both your weapons in a sudden frenzy.

feats.name: Two-Weapon Fusillade
feats.description: You attack with both your weapons in a furious barrage.

feats.name: Ubiquitous Gadgets
feats.description: They thought you had used up all your devices, but they thought wrong! You have a few more gadgets up your sleeve than others expect.

feats.name: Ubiquitous Overdrive
feats.description: You prepare a variety of incredible gizmos on each of your allies, linking them together through careful modification to enable you to power them up all at once.

feats.name: Ubiquitous Weakness
feats.description: You've nurtured your bonds with your comrades, allowing you to share the benefits of your esoterica.

feats.name: Ulfen Guard Dedication
feats.description: Central to your Ulfen Guard training is the ability to protect an ally.
feats.prerequisites: member of the Ulfen Guard; Trained in Athletics; Trained in Intimidation

feats.name: Ultimate Flexibility
feats.description: Your experience keeps you on your toes, helping you adopt complex strategies on the fly and face the most dangerous challenges.
feats.source: Player Core pg. 151, Pathfinder #150: Broken Promises pg. 77
feats.source_book: Player Core pg. 151, Pathfinder #150: Broken Promises

feats.name: Ultimate Mercy
feats.description: Your mercy transcends the bounds of life and death.

feats.name: Ultimate Polymath
feats.description: You can flexibly cast all of your spells, granting a dizzying array of possible options.

feats.name: Ultimate Skirmisher
feats.description: You are so skilled at navigating the wild, your movement is completely unaffected by terrain.

feats.name: Unassailable Enforcer
feats.description: Your faith in the Pure Legion protects you from spiritual harm.

feats.name: Unassuming Dedication
feats.description: Your family instilled the values of care and patience into you from a young age.

feats.name: Unassuming Heroes
feats.description: You have a talent for making friends through simple kindness, often among stray animals or other creatures that people tend to overlook, and your inherent magic can make these acts take on additional power.

feats.name: Unbalancing Appearance
feats.description: When you attack from the shadows, your foes are thrown off balance.

feats.name: Unbalancing Blow
feats.description: Interweaving attacks, you unbalance your foes.

feats.name: Unbalancing Finisher
feats.description: You attack with a flashy assault that leaves your target off balance.

feats.name: Unbalancing Sweep
feats.description: You make a great sweep with your weapon or fists about yourself, knocking creatures off their feet and away from you.

feats.name: Unbelievable Escape
feats.description: Your ability to narrowly evade danger defies all logic.

feats.name: Unbelievable Luck
feats.description: While no one, not even you, might appear to understand why, you demonstrate a greater ability to hit your targets regardless of the obstacles in your way.

feats.name: Unbound Freedom
feats.description: Your future is no other person's to control, and the cycles of your fate sometimes step in to protect you when that control would be taken from you.

feats.name: Unbound Leaper
feats.description: Your jumping prowess is unmatched.

feats.name: Unbowed, Unbroken
feats.description: Your connection to elemental wood manifests as resilience—towering trees, rough bark, deep roots, and patient determination.
feats.source: Pathfinder #202: Severed at the Root pg. 69

feats.name: Unbreakable Bond
feats.description: You and your megafauna companion are bound together; as long as you live, it's much harder for your companion to die.

feats.name: Unbreakable Resolve
feats.description: The experience of coming back after death has granted you a strong sense of resolve; devilish words, slick spells, and conniving trickery can’t easily catch you unprepared.

feats.name: Unbreakable-er Goblin
feats.description: As hard as most unbreakable goblins are to break, you are that much harder to break.

feats.name: Unburdened Iron
feats.description: You've learned techniques first devised by your ancestors during their ancient wars, allowing you to comfortably wear massive suits of armor.

feats.name: Uncanny Agility
feats.description: You have near-supernatural poise that lets you move swiftly across the most unsteady surfaces.

feats.name: Uncanny Awareness
feats.description: You have a keen sense of movement around you.

feats.name: Uncanny Bombs
feats.description: You lob bombs unerringly, despite obstructions or distance.

feats.name: Uncanny Cheeks
feats.description: You gain the Prescient Consumable and Prescient Planner feats, except that you always withdraw the objects from your cheek pouches.

feats.name: Uncanny Dodge
feats.description: You gain the deny advantage class feature.

feats.name: Uncanny Prediction
feats.description: You have an eerie ability to guess the next move of creatures you've Sized Up.

feats.name: Uncanny Suction
feats.description: Your limbs produce strange, sucker-like growths that allow you to adhere to walls, objects, and most other surfaces.

feats.name: Uncanny Vitae
feats.description: Your warrior spirit is infused with a potent vital essence that imbues your gear.

feats.name: Unconventional Weaponry
feats.description: You’ve familiarized yourself with a particular weapon, potentially from another ancestry or culture.

feats.name: Undaunted
feats.description: Your spirit has endured many challenges over its long existence.

feats.name: Undead Companion
feats.description: Your companion is also touched by undeath, a mix of a traditional companion and a skeleton, zombie, or stranger form of unlife.
feats.prerequisites: an animal companion or a familiar

feats.name: Undead Empathy
feats.description: Undead Spotter
feats.prerequisites: Your relationship with undeath gives you a stronger bond with other undead.
notes: Your studies of the undead have taught you tellale signs of a disguised undead creature.

feats.name: Undead Master Dedication
feats.description: You gain the services of an undead companion that travels with you and obeys your commands.

feats.name: Undead Slayer
feats.description: Your knowledge of your own not-quite-living anatomy, combined with your experience in combat, helps you take down undead foes with ease.

feats.name: Undead Slayer Dedication
feats.description: Your training has prepared you to recognize most undead on sight.

feats.name: Underbrush Trailblazer
feats.description: You gain the Terrain Stalker feat, selecting the underbrush terrain; if you already have Terrain Stalker for underbrush, you can select a different type of difficult terrain.

feats.name: Underground Network
feats.description: You're connected to groups that know what's going on in the streets, and you can get information out of them quickly.

feats.name: Underhanded Assault
feats.description: You capitalize on the distraction provided by an ally.

feats.name: Undersea Privateer Dedication
feats.description: Your training has taught you the basics of underwater combat.

feats.name: Underwater Marauder
feats.description: Trained in Athletics

feats.name: Underwater Volcano
feats.description: You can cast volcanic eruption as a 7th-level primal innate spell once per day.

feats.name: Underworld Investigator
feats.description: Your work as an investigator makes you familiar with the criminal element.

feats.name: Undying Beast
feats.description: You can be injured by non-silver sources but recover with staggering speed.

feats.name: Undying Conviction
feats.description: Your presence has a bolstering effect on your undead minions.
feats.prerequisites: able to create or control undead; cleric with a negative font, oracle of bones, or necromancer wizard

feats.name: Undying Ferocity
feats.description: You resist death’s clutches with supernatural vigor, daring death to claim you while promising that any such attempt will surely fail.

feats.name: Uneasy Rest
feats.description: When you cast sleep, you can modify the spell to make subjects of your spell experience troubled dreams.
feats.prerequisites: Spell Trickster Dedication; ability to cast sleep

feats.name: Unending Emptiness
feats.description: You pool the power of shadow within your eyes, gaining the ability to gather darkness into a turbulent orb of crushing emptiness within your line of sight.

feats.name: Unerring Shot
feats.description: Your senses are finely tuned to the slightest variations in the air, so much that you can place your shot exactly where you intend to aim it from any range possible with your weapon.

feats.name: Unexpected Sharpshooter Dedication
feats.description: Who needs skill when you've got dumb luck?

feats.name: Unexpected Shift
feats.description: Your supernatural connection sometimes causes you to phase from reality when under threat, disappearing for split seconds before reappearing—often surprising you as much as your enemies.

feats.name: Unfazed Assessment
feats.description: You have witnessed hundreds of fighting styles and quickly adapt to defend against complicated maneuvers.
feats.source: Pathfinder #149: Against the Scarlet Triad pg. 81
feats.prerequisites: Zephyr Guard Dedication; expert in Perception

feats.name: Unfetter Eidolon
feats.description: You can allow your eidolon to travel far from your side.

feats.name: Unfetter Sight
feats.description: You release the magic within your mask in an invisible burst, allowing it to temporarily flow into your allies' minds.

feats.name: Unfettered Growth
feats.description: By tapping into the limitless power of the Plane of Wood, you can experience sudden, dramatic growth for a short time.
feats.source: Pathfinder #202: Severed at the Root pg. 70

feats.name: Unfettered Halfling
feats.description: You were either pressed into indentured servitude or shackled in a prison, but you've since escaped and have trained to ensure you'll never be caught again.

feats.name: Unfettering Prankster
feats.description: You can uplift all around you with your pranks, causing you and your allies to receive divine guidance in all your movements to effortlessly avoid environmental hindrances.

feats.name: Unfettering Strike
feats.description: With a damaging blow, you cause a foe to loosen their grip on an ally they're holding down.

feats.name: Unhampered Passage
feats.description: You won't allow others to restrain you.

feats.name: Unified Theory
feats.description: Legendary in Arcana
feats.campaign: Use Arcana for checks for all magical traditions

feats.name: Unimpeded Step
feats.description: With a burst of divine liberation, your ally's movement from your Liberating Step is unaffected by difficult terrain, greater difficult terrain, narrow surfaces, and uneven ground.

feats.name: United Assault
feats.description: Through countless battles, you've learned you're stronger when working alongside your allies.

feats.name: Universal Longevity
feats.description: You’ve perfected your ability to keep up with all the skills you’ve learned over your long life, so you’re almost never truly untrained at a skill.

feats.name: Unkillable
feats.description: You're relentless and nigh unkillable, shrugging off blows that should destroy you, though they might make your body start to fall apart.

feats.name: Unleash the Blight
feats.description: You unleash the rot infecting you, spreading the blight to those nearby.
feats.source: Pathfinder #202: Severed at the Root pg. 74

feats.name: Unleash Yaoguai Might
feats.description: As you enter your yaoguai form, you draw upon your internal magic to assume an even greater form.

feats.name: Unlimited Demesne
feats.description: You can move your demesne here and there, bringing it wherever your journey takes you.

feats.name: Unlimited Ghost Flight
feats.description: You put your connection to the material world farther behind you.

feats.name: Unlimited Pluripotency
feats.description: Within all surkis is the capacity to be whatever they need to be, and you can tap into that capacity even now.

feats.name: Unlimited Potential
feats.description: The laws of magic can limit your mind only if you think you need them, and you've grown past the need for such limits.

feats.name: Unlock Secret
feats.description: You delve deeper into your psychic potential.

feats.name: Unmistakable Lore
feats.description: Expert in Lore
feats.campaign: Recall Knowledge about your Lore more effectively

feats.name: Unnerving Expansion
feats.description: You gather your curse around you and impel it to pour outward, expanding your maelstrom.

feats.name: Unnerving Prowess
feats.description: Your incredible skill with your blade unnerves your foes.
notes: You shift your body into a higher gear, your speed compounding further and further.

feats.name: Unnerving Terror
feats.description: You let out a mighty howl, chant of death, or speak with eerie repetition that plants fear in others.

feats.name: Unravel Mysteries
feats.description: You can understand the true meaning of texts quickly, and even when you get lost or hit a dead end, you aren’t discouraged from making further attempts to get to the bottom of things.
feats.prerequisites: master in a Decipher Writing skill; Scrollmaster Dedication

feats.name: Unrivaled Analysis
feats.description: Your experience allows you to derive even more information about your opponents from a mere glance.

feats.name: Unrivaled Builder
feats.description: Building things is like solving a puzzle, and you know how to use anything at your disposal to get the job done.

feats.name: Unseen Passage
feats.description: You have mastered a magical technique for moving through dangerous woodlands unseen.

feats.name: Unseen Shot
feats.description: Your attacks are deadly, silent, and nearly untraceable.

feats.name: Unshakable Grit
feats.description: You've become hardened by conflict after everything you've faced, and you possess a certain intractable stubbornness.

feats.name: Unshakable Idealism
feats.description: Your faith and hope can’t be shaken, and you won’t flee when lives are at stake.
feats.prerequisites: Knight Vigilant; expert in Will saves

feats.name: Unshaken in Iron
feats.description: You know the precise limits of your armor, and trust it to save you from harm.

feats.name: Unsheathing the Sword-Light
feats.description: Honed through 10,000 battles, your sword’s mere light can shatter ambitions and break armies.

feats.name: Unstable Concoction
feats.description: You can mix a wondrous yet volatile liquid into an alchemical consumable if it has an initial effect that uses dice.

feats.name: Unstable Patronage
feats.description: You can act as a magical patron for your charges.

feats.name: Unstable Redundancies
feats.description: You've built triple redundancies into your innovation and added all sorts of buffers to protect it from the harm of your unstable experiments.

feats.name: Unsteadying Strike
feats.description: Venture-Gossip Dedication
feats.prerequisites: Your attack makes your opponent more susceptible to follow-up maneuvers from your allies.
notes: Pathfinder Agent Dedication; member of the Pathfinder Society
Look, the motto of the Pathfinder Society is “explore, report, cooperate” and you’re just reporting what you hear!

feats.name: Unstoppable Juggernaut
feats.description: You have become a brutal, unstoppable force of nature, able to shrug off mortal wounds with ease.
feats.source: Player Core 2 pg. 85, Pathfinder #150: Broken Promises pg. 76
feats.source_book: Player Core 2 pg. 85, Pathfinder #150: Broken Promises

feats.name: Untamed Form
feats.description: You are one with the wild, always changing and adapting to meet any challenge.

feats.name: Untrained Improvisation
feats.description: Become more adept at using untrained skills

feats.name: Unusual Composition
feats.description: You can translate the emotion and power of a composition to other mediums.

feats.name: Unusual Treatment
feats.description: Expert in Medicine
feats.campaign: Treat Wounds tends to additional conditions

feats.name: Unwavering Guide
feats.description: Sharp-eyed and sure-footed, your presence is a boon to those you guide.

feats.name: Unwavering Mien
feats.description: Your mystic control and meditations allow you to resist external influences upon your consciousness.

feats.name: Unyielding Disguise
feats.description: When you cast humanoid form or illusory disguise to alter your appearance, the spell's duration is 2 hours
feats.prerequisites: ability to cast humanoid form or illusory disguise

feats.name: Unyielding Force
feats.description: Thanks to your armor, almost nothing can stop you.

feats.name: Uplifting Overture
feats.description: You learn the uplifting overture composition cantrip, which aids your allies’ skills with the inspiring nature of your performance.
notes: You draw the Ursine Avenger Hood over your head and its fur over your arms, assuming an ursine form that has traits of your original form as well as that of a bear.

feats.name: Uplifting Winds
feats.description: The winds are eager to keep you aloft.

feats.name: Upset Balance
feats.description: You lean into your foe's attack, using the weight of your body and armor to send them reeling.
feats.prerequisites: Stalwart Defender Dedication; Expert in Athletics

feats.name: Urban Jungle
feats.description: Cities are just a new form of wilderness.
feats.prerequisites: Fascinated by Society; Expert in Society or Expert in Survival

feats.name: Urgent Upwelling
feats.description: Defeat lets you to tap into your wellspring.

feats.name: Usurp the Lunar Reins
feats.description: The moon has always been connected to the tides, and now you can grasp that connection.

feats.name: Uzunjati Recollection
feats.description: You tell a story spontaneously from nearly forgotten facts, delving into your memory and entertaining your audience in the process.
feats.prerequisites: Uzunjati Storytelling; master in a Recall Knowledge skill

feats.name: Uzunjati Storytelling
feats.description: You tell a quick story or begin telling a longer tale.
feats.prerequisites: Magaambyan Attendant Dedication; Uzunjati affiliation; master in a Recall Knowledge skill

feats.name: Vacate Vision
feats.description: You cause your eyes to liquefy and run out of your eye sockets, leaving them empty.

feats.name: Vampire Dedication
feats.description: You're a newly risen vampire.
feats.prerequisites: You were a killed by a vampire drinking your blood.

feats.name: Vampire Lore
feats.description: You were raised by your vampiric parent, or you've invested substantial time and energy researching the secrets of your undead progenitors.

feats.name: Vanara Battle Clarity
feats.description: Your focus in combat is practically unshakable.

feats.name: Vanara Lore
feats.description: You attained the cultural training of a ba-sadhak, a seeker of treasures and rare delights.

feats.name: Vanara Weapon Expertise
feats.description: Thanks to numerous joyous practice exercises, you've become an expert in vanara weapons.

feats.name: Vanara Weapon Familiarity
feats.description: You favor weapons steeped in vanaran tradition.

feats.name: Vanara Weapon Trickery
feats.description: You've learned how to trick your foes using vanara weapons.

feats.name: Vandal
feats.description: You have a knack for breaking and dismantling things.

feats.name: Vanish into The Land
feats.description: You’re adept at using the land’s natural features to find places to hide.
feats.prerequisites: Master in Stealth; Trained in Survival; Terrain Stalker

feats.name: Vantage Shot
feats.description: You and your spotter take advantage of each other's attacks to momentarily hide and throw your foes off-balance against your follow-up attack.

feats.name: Variable Core
feats.description: You adjust your innovation's core, changing the way it explodes.

feats.name: Vasodilation
feats.description: Using the power of your own blood, you encourage increased blood flow to nourish damaged tissue.

feats.name: Vaulting Gallop
feats.description: You've trained your mount to vault over obstacles at high speeds.

feats.name: Vehicle Mechanic Dedication
feats.description: You are adept at designing and maintaining mechanical vehicles, and you lavish your attention and ingenuity on one vehicle in particular.

feats.name: Veil May
feats.description: Born of a blood hag, a fiery blood drinker hidden behind a false skin, you have one blood-red eye and the ability to slough off your appearance in an instant.

feats.name: Veil of Bugs
feats.description: Your swarm is dense, blotting out vision.

feats.name: Vellumis Excision
feats.description: You seek to excise the rot from the Gravelands and have made progress to do so.

feats.name: Velstrac Magic
feats.description: You know there's so much more to sensation than whips and chains—but whips and chains also have their place.

feats.name: Vengeance Strike
feats.description: You lash out at the foe who dared to attack you.
feats.prerequisites: Sister of the Golden Erinys Dedication

feats.name: Vengeful Spirit Deck
feats.description: Stolen Fate
feats.prerequisites: You manifest a ghostly deck of harrow cards.
notes: You talk so much it can be distracting to your enemies and you’re often quick to remind your enemies that you’re just a little guy!

feats.name: Vengeful Strike
feats.description: When struck by an enemy, you respond in turn.

feats.name: Vengful Remnant
feats.description: You wreathe yourself in the tatters of all the souls claimed by your blade.

feats.name: Venipuncture
feats.description: A shell made up of hundreds of razor-thin needles of blood forms around you before exploding outward.

feats.name: Venom Gulp
feats.description: You can store prepared venom in your throat and spit it at your foes in addition to your own toxic spray.

feats.name: Venom Purge
feats.description: You produce a specialized venom that burns out other toxins and impurities in your body.

feats.name: Venom Spit
feats.description: You've learned the art of lobbing toxic spittle at vulnerable spots on your foes, especially the eyes.

feats.name: Venomous Touch
feats.description: You've learned to channel the sting of the worm.
feats.source: Pathfinder #194: Cult of the Cave Worm pg. 81
feats.source_book: Pathfinder #194: Cult of the Cave Worm

feats.name: Venomous Weapons
feats.description: Your skill with poisons is such that your preferred weapons also contain trace amounts of it, even when you don't actively apply a dose.

feats.name: Verdant Metamorphosis
feats.description: You have turned into a plant version of yourself, gaining the plant trait and losing traits inappropriate for your new form (typically humanoid).

feats.name: Verdant Presence
feats.description: The life-giving properties of the aeon orbs flourish within you.

feats.name: Verdant Weapon
feats.description: You cultivate a seed that can sprout into a wooden staff, vine whip, or another weapon.

feats.name: Verduran Ambush
feats.description: You prepare to ambush a foe.
feats.prerequisites: Verduran Shadow Dedication; Expert in Stealth

feats.name: Verduran Shadow Dedication
feats.description: Your awareness of primal energies allows you to explore forests with preternatural ease.
feats.prerequisites: Trained in Stealth; Trained in Survival

feats.name: Vermilion Threads
feats.description: Your Arcane Cascade sends threads to the four directions, creating a web of strings dyed by your skill and your enemies’ blood.
feats.prerequisites: Arcane Cascade; unfurling brocade hybrid study

feats.name: Vernai Training
feats.description: To resurrect a creature you’ve slain, a spellcaster must counteract your influence on its death.
feats.prerequisites: Achaekek's Grip; Basic Red Mantis Magic

feats.name: Versatile Blasts
feats.description: Accessing a wider realm of elemental manifestations, you can make blasts with rare forms of your elements.

feats.name: Versatile Font
feats.description: As you explore your deity’s aspects, you move beyond restrictions on healing or harming.
feats.prerequisites: harmful font or healing font; deity that allows clerics to have both fonts

feats.name: Versatile Mutation
feats.description: Your ostilli's darts can deal different types of damage.

feats.name: Versatile Performance
feats.description: You can rely on the grandeur of your performances rather than ordinary social skills.

feats.name: Versatile Signature
feats.description: You’re always tweaking your available repertoire.

feats.name: Versatile Spellstrike
feats.description: You can channel the entire realm of possibilities of your spellbook into an attack.

feats.name: Very Sneaky
feats.description: Taller folk rarely pay attention to the shadows at their feet, and you take full advantage of this.

feats.name: Very, Very Sneaky
feats.description: You can move up to your Speed when you use the Sneak action, and you no longer need to have cover or greater cover or be concealed to Hide or Sneak.

feats.name: Vessel's Form
feats.description: You symbiotically combine your form with that of the entity within you, taking a powerful hybrid form to temporarily boost your abilities in combat while maintaining control.

feats.name: Vestigial Magicsense
feats.description: While most surkis' ability to taste magic fades once they metamorphose into their adult form—replaced by keener darkvision—you've retained some of this sense.

feats.name: Vestigial Wings
feats.description: You possess small, weak wings that aid in balance.

feats.name: Veteran Follower
feats.description: Your followers' training has made them veterans of battle.

feats.name: Vexing Tempest
feats.description: Your familiar channels elemental air around it to unleash a disruptive gust that sends creatures flying.
feats.prerequisites: Familiar Sage Dedication; Tempest Cloud's Speed

feats.name: Vexing Tumble
feats.description: You tumble around your foes, expertly avoiding their reactions.

feats.name: Vibrant Display
feats.description: Whereas most gnomes’ coloration is static or changes slowly, you can cause your hair, eye, and skin color to scintillate in brief and disorienting bursts.

feats.name: Vibration Sense
feats.description: Your eidolon gains tremorsense as an imprecise sense with a range of 30 feet.

feats.name: Vicious Critique
feats.description: You have an eye for detail and a mouth for pointing out flaws, which makes it all the easier to convince the merchants and crafters of King's Heart to help you.
feats.prerequisites: Trained in Crafting; Trained in Intimidation

feats.name: Vicious Debilitations
feats.description: The debilitations you dish out seriously impair your foes.

feats.name: Vicious Evisceration
feats.description: You make a vicious attack that maims your enemy.

feats.name: Vicious Fangs
feats.description: You aim for your victim's prominent arteries.

feats.name: Vicious Incisors
feats.description: Your jaws unarmed attack deals 1d6 piercing damage instead of 1d4, and gains the backstabber trait.

feats.name: Vicious Rend
feats.description: Your companion sinks its claws and rips.
feats.prerequisites: Beastmaster Dedication; animal companion with a claw, fist, pincer, or talon unarmed attack

feats.name: Vicious Snares
feats.description: You deal an additional 1d6 precision damage with damage snares you craft.

feats.name: Vicious Swing
feats.description: You unleash a particularly powerful attack that clobbers your foe but leaves you a bit unsteady.

feats.name: Vicious Vengeance
feats.description: While your vengeance is painful for both you and your foe, none can doubt that your enemies suffer more.

feats.name: Vicious Venom
feats.description: The venom you produce is exceptionally potent and difficult to overcome.

feats.name: Vigil's Palisades
feats.description: When you use Persistent Creation, you can create up to three special wooden shields that provide a +2 circumstance bonus to AC and have Hardness 15, 120 HP, and BT 60.
notes: Pathfinder #174: Shadows of the Ancients pg. 79
Your mask grants the extraordinary magical senses of Carmine Jaws, the Hyena who Looks Between.

feats.name: Vigil's Walls Rise Anew!
feats.description: You can train your allies to Raise a Shield on your order

feats.name: Vigilant Benediction
feats.description: Unwilling to be outdone by the Crimson Reclaimers and their oath, you've petitioned the gods of good for a sliver of divine magic.
feats.prerequisites: Knight Vigilant; alignment permitted by the chosen deity

feats.name: Vigorous Anthem
feats.description: You instill magical vigor in your allies when you inspire them to attack.

feats.name: Vigorous Health
feats.description: You can withstand blood loss startlingly well.

feats.name: Viking Shieldbearer
feats.description: You trained with shields and weapons as soon as you were old enough to hold them, eager to win honor and glory for yourself.

feats.name: Viking Vindicator
feats.description: You are one of the raiders eagerly planning to launch an assault by sea on the Whispering Tyrant's Isle of Terror.

feats.name: Vindicator Dedication
feats.description: Your church ensures that you are cared for.

feats.name: Vindicator's Judgement
feats.description: You can pronounce judgment on your foes, making them magically susceptible to your attacks.

feats.name: Vine Lash
feats.description: A long vine sprouts from your arm, which you can temporarily wield like a whip.
feats.source: Pathfinder #202: Severed at the Root pg. 75

feats.name: Violent Unleash
feats.description: The force of your mind unleashing itself releases a violent shock wave that batters your enemies.

feats.name: Violent Vines
feats.description: When angered, you can imbue nearby vines with your wrath, provoking them into a murderous rampage.

feats.name: Viper Strike
feats.description: You move and attack with a swiftness that most can't follow.

feats.name: Virga May
feats.description: Born of a storm hag, you have one crystal-blue or rain-gray eye.

feats.name: Virtue-Forged Tattoos
feats.description: Your tattoos are a work of eldritch genius, a masterpiece of art, magic, and skin.

feats.name: Virtuosic Dancer
feats.description: You’re so fond of using your Acrobatic feats on the stage that you’ve begun adding your own flair to these dances on the big stage.

feats.name: Virtuosic Performer
feats.description: Trained in Performance
feats.campaign: +1 with a certain type of performance

feats.name: Vishkanya Lore
feats.description: You deeply understand vishkanyan strengths and cultural traditions.

feats.name: Vishkanya Weapon Arts
feats.description: You are graceful and efficient in the use of vishkanyan weapons.

feats.name: Vishkanya Weapon Expertise
feats.description: Extensive training has granted you an elegant control in the use of vishkanyan weapons.

feats.name: Vishkanya Weapon Familiarity
feats.description: You favor weapons historically used in subtle work and in ceremony.

feats.name: Vision of Foresight
feats.description: You use your daydreams to predict the success of actions, rapidly envisioning the possibilities.

feats.name: Visual Fidelity
feats.description: You've found a way to use a hodgepodge combination of devices to enhance your visual abilities in every situation.

feats.name: Vitality-Manipulating Stance
feats.description: You have learned to attack meridians and pressure points.
feats.source: Pathfinder #168: King of the Mountain pg. 77

feats.name: Vivacious Afterimage
feats.description: You move so quickly that you create a short-lived afterimage, looks exactly like you, in front of you or behind you.
feats.source: Pathfinder #168: King of the Mountain pg. 77

feats.name: Vivacious Bravado
feats.description: Your ego swells, granting you a temporary reprieve from your pain.

feats.name: Vivacious Conduit
feats.description: Your connection to the First World has grown, and its vital energy flows into you rapidly.

feats.name: Voice Cold as Death
feats.description: Channeling the energy of the Crimson Oath into your voice, you pronounce a threat in a tone so icy it freezes the blood.
feats.prerequisites: Knight Reclaimant Dedication; Master in Intimidation

feats.name: Voice of Authority
feats.description: You easily command the attention of others, and when the time comes to turn threats into action, your authoritative voice causes foes to falter.
feats.source: Night of the Gray Death pg. 64
feats.prerequisites: Expert in Intimidation; Vigilante Dedication; member of the Gray Gardeners

feats.name: Voice of the Elements (Dragonblood)
feats.description: You inherit a primal dragon’s bond to base elements.

feats.name: Voice of the Elements (Kineticist)
feats.description: You can speak with the secret tones of elements you channel, finding words in the crackle of flame, the grinding of stone.

feats.name: Voice of the Night
feats.description: You hear and understand the words of creatures you share the darkness with.

feats.name: Void Siphon
feats.description: The raw energy of the Void saps the essence of the living.

feats.name: Volatile Grease
feats.description: When you cast grease, you can modify it to cover a creature in flammable grease.
feats.prerequisites: Spell Trickster Dedication; ability to cast grease

feats.name: Volcanic Escape
feats.description: Lava reflexively explodes underneath you and the creature that hurt you.

feats.name: Voluminous Vials
feats.description: Your number of versatile vials per day increases to 5.

feats.name: Vomit Stomach
feats.description: In dire circumstances you can vomit out your stomach to expel toxins.

feats.name: Vow of Mortal Defiance
feats.description: Having seen the wreckage left by the gods and their servitors as they play in their great war of good and evil, you’ve come to the only reasonable conclusion: they all must be cut from their silken thrones.
feats.prerequisites: You are not sanctified with the holy or unholy trait.

feats.name: Vulpine Scamper
feats.description: You’re especially nimble while in your full fox shape.

feats.name: Wailing Dead
feats.description: The voices of the spirits you command spark fear in the hearts of your enemies.

feats.name: Wake of Devastation
feats.description: Like a kaiju, you leave a trail of destruction in your wake.

feats.name: Wake to Strife
feats.description: You summon the explosive power of a geyser beneath a foe.

feats.name: Waking Dream
feats.description: While in your trance, you can blur the line between dreams and reality for others.

feats.name: Walk on the Wind
feats.description: A flighty breeze follows you wherever you go, granting a dramatic flair to everything you do.
feats.prerequisites: You've been brought to 0 Hit Points by an enemy that has the air trait or an enemy's ability that has the air trait.

feats.name: Walk the Wilds
feats.description: You know the ways of birds and beasts and have gained the right to wear their forms.

feats.name: Walk Through the Conflagration
feats.description: You fall through your own kinetic gate, leaving behind an effigy of flame and reappearing majestically near another fire.

feats.name: Wall Jump
feats.description: Master in Athletics

feats.name: Wall of Roses
feats.description: Roses are the symbol of Milani, and you can call forth a wall of them to stymie those who don't follow her teachings.

feats.name: Wall Run
