feats.description: You defy gravity, traversing vertical planes as easily as the ground.

feats.name: Wandering Chef Dedication
feats.description: Whether trained in a noble kitchen or a humble home, you know how to cook delicious dishes and source ingredients from the wilderness or urban settings.

feats.name: Wandering Heart
feats.description: While all elves adapt to their environments over time, you have traveled so widely and become attuned to so many environs that your body now changes more rapidly than other elves.
feats.prerequisites: Arctic Elf, Cavern Elf, Desert Elf, Woodland Elf, or any other elf heritage based on adapting to an environment

feats.name: Wandering Oasis
feats.description: You’re surrounded by soothing energy.

feats.name: Wandering Thoughts
feats.description: When your Psyche is Unleashed, each burst of magic you cast also folds space around you, and you travel through one of those folds.

feats.name: War Conditioning
feats.description: You have extensive training in remote environments, allowing you to move through these areas easily.

feats.name: War Mage Dedication
feats.description: Your studies into the battlefield applications of magic have made your spells particularly effective at disrupting enemy formations or manipulating enemy troops into positions where they are more vulnerable to wide-scale magical attacks.
feats.prerequisites: You have a spellcasting class feature.

feats.name: War Rider Stance
feats.description: Your dragon’s constant breath threatens your foes.
feats.prerequisites: Drake Rider Dedication; expert in martial weapons; dragon companion with a support benefit that includes damage

feats.name: Ward Against Corruption
feats.description: Your soul is warded against the power of undeath and plague, as well as that of the evil former psychopomps known as sahkils.

feats.name: Ward Casting
feats.description: You carefully ward your spell by drawing from a mantle of magical energy you prepared to protect your casting, increasing your chance of retaining the spell.

feats.name: Ward Medic
feats.description: Expert in Medicine

feats.name: Ward Slumber
feats.description: Just before going to sleep, you can perform a 10-minute ward to protect the slumber of up to eight creatures within 30 feet of you.

feats.name: Warden's Boon
feats.description: You point out vulnerabilities present in your hunted prey, granting the benefits listed in Hunt Prey and your hunter’s edge to an ally until the end of their next turn.

feats.name: Warden's Focus
feats.description: Your connection with your surroundings deepens and expands, allowing you to draw in more of nature’s primal power as you focus.

feats.name: Warden's Guidance
feats.description: You convey your prey’s location to your allies with a series of careful words or gestures.

feats.name: Warden's Step
feats.description: You can guide your allies to move quietly through the wilderness.

feats.name: Warden’s Reload
feats.description: Your mastery of magic and weapons like the crossbow allow you to wield both with equal ease.

feats.name: Warding Jewel
feats.description: A life of hunting and battle has caused your head gem to attune to the waxing moon, which has manifested in the power to protect you from harm.

feats.name: Warding Light
feats.description: You gain a tattoo that serves as a special ward to defend you against Walkena's forces.

feats.name: Warding Rune
feats.description: Your runes provide a warding effect that protects you against a specific school of magic.

feats.name: Warning Shot
feats.description: Who needs words when the roar of a gun is so much more succinct?

feats.name: Warp Likeness
feats.description: You channel some of your own nature through your blow, temporarily warping your target's form to resemble your own.

feats.name: Warp Space
feats.description: You use your magic to bend space, causing your spell to strike from a strange vector.

feats.name: Warped by Rage
feats.description: Rage courses through your body, transforming you into a beast of battle.

feats.name: Warped Constriction
feats.description: The entity inhabiting your body is an aberrant being with unfathomable motivations, and when you hold a foe close, tendrils and tentacles unfurl from your body to crush your foe and pollute it with alien wrongness.
feats.prerequisites: Living Vessel Dedication; your entity is an aberration or outer entity

feats.name: Warped Reflection
feats.description: Due to your origins, your form is more flexible than most.

feats.name: Warpriest’s Armor
feats.description: Your training has helped you adapt to ever-heavier armor.

feats.name: Warren Digger
feats.description: You've learned to put your sturdy claws to work digging through the earth.

feats.name: Warren Friend
feats.description: You're adept at making contact with other ysoki.

feats.name: Warren Navigator
feats.description: You gain the trained proficiency rank in Survival.

feats.name: Warrior Of Legend Dedication
feats.description: You have been given a powerful blessing of battle that is also your cursed doom.

feats.name: Wary Disarmament
feats.description: +2 to AC or saves against devices or traps while disarming

feats.name: Wary Skulker
feats.description: You can perform the Scout exploration activity at the same time as the Avoid Notice exploration activity.

feats.name: Wash Out
feats.description: Toxins seep out of your artificial body quickly.

feats.name: Watch This!
feats.description: A common saying among Firebrands is, “There's always a fool who thinks they can do it better—and they're often right.” You verbally commit to using an action on your next turn to make a melee Strike against the same enemy your ally has missed.

feats.name: Watch Your Back (Archetype)
feats.description: You shout a warning to an ally about encroaching foes.

feats.name: Watch Your Back (Emotion)
feats.description: You menace the target, stoking their fears and drawing their attention.

feats.name: Watcher on the Wall
feats.description: You claim a patron’s symbol that you can etch onto any surface.

feats.name: Watchful Gaze
feats.description: You use your many eyes to look in all directions at once, making you extremely observant for a short period of time.

feats.name: Watchful Halfling
feats.description: You pay close attention to the people around you, allowing you to more easily notice when they act out of character.

feats.name: Water Conjuration
feats.description: You carry the ocean with you wherever you go.

feats.name: Water Dancer
feats.description: You glide through the water with graceful ease.

feats.name: Water Nagaji
feats.description: Much like a water naga, you've formed a connection to a sacred or pristine body of water, either as a home or a place to protect.

feats.name: Water Sprint
feats.description: Experience and training have taught you that water has just enough surface tension for a master sprinter to traverse the surface.
notes: You transform into a small bird, such as a finch or a sparrow, allowing you to eavesdrop on others and gain information you wouldn’t otherwise be able to acquire.

feats.name: Water Step
feats.description: You can Stride across liquid and surfaces that don't support your weight.
feats.source: Player Core 2 pg. 123, Core Rulebook pg. 162

feats.name: Water Strider
feats.description: Water cradles your every step, allowing you to walk on its surface.

feats.name: Water to Water
feats.description: You allow your body to collapse into water, then reconstitute your corporeal form elsewhere.

feats.name: Water Walker
feats.description: When in the throes of your curse, your steps take on a supernatural buoyancy.

feats.name: Waterfowl Stance
feats.description: In your hands, swords dance like rainfall over the waves; who can tell where the storm ends and the sea begins?

feats.name: Waters of Creation
feats.description: Water is the source of life, and you draw upon this primordial force to heal your allies' wounds.

feats.name: Wave Dashes Rocks
feats.description: You slam an unlucky foe with the tremendous power of a plunging wave.

feats.name: Wave Speaker
feats.description: Being part fish yourself, you can speak the language of the sea.

feats.name: Wave Spiral
feats.description: You dip and spin, unleashing a wide whirlpool of water.

feats.name: Wave the Flag
feats.description: You wave your banner, inspiring allies to throw off the shackles of fear.

feats.name: Wavetouched Paragon
feats.description: You have been blessed by the sea, granting you the ability to swim like a fish.

feats.name: Waxed Feathers
feats.description: Your feathers are coated in a waxy substance that repels water.

feats.name: Wayang Lore
feats.description: You can use your knowledge to enhance your performances or aid you in hiding.

feats.name: Wayang Weapon Familiarity
feats.description: You learned to fight with weapons that help you keep your distance or make the most of striking from shadows.

feats.name: Wayfinder Resonance Tinkerer
feats.description: Access a new cantrip by using your Wayfinder.

feats.name: We March On
feats.description: You make sure that your allies push themselves while traveling.

feats.name: We're on the List
feats.description: Emulating Shensen whenever she arrives at a show, you share your knowledge of the region and drop a few important local names to make a good impression and help your allies do the same.
feats.prerequisites: Alter Ego Dedication or Archaeologist Dedication; Trained in Society

feats.name: Weakening Assault
feats.description: With a barrage of blows, you diminish an enemy's strength.

feats.name: Weapon Infusion
feats.description: With a signature flair, you shape blasts of elemental power into the form of a weapon, such as a sword made of whirling wind or a bow that shoots flames.

feats.name: Weapon Proficiency
feats.description: Become trained in a weapon type

feats.name: Weapon Supremacy
feats.description: Your skill with weapons bends the laws of reality, allowing you to continuously attack with speed that would normally require magical assistance.

feats.name: Weapon-Rune Shifter
feats.description: You learn how to alter the magic of weapon runes by using a crystal as a focusing component.
feats.source: Pathfinder #148: Fires of the Haunted City pg. 75
feats.source_book: Pathfinder #148: Fires of the Haunted City

feats.name: Weaver's Web
feats.description: Your swarm can spin dense webs much like those left by stone-gray weaver spiders under eaves and in derelict city buildings, especially along the coasts of Varisia.

feats.name: Web Hunter
feats.description: Through the careful cultivation of highly sensitive hairs, you've developed the ability to sense creatures without seeing them.

feats.name: Web Walker
feats.description: You have plenty of practice navigating webs.

feats.name: Web Weaver
feats.description: You can produce a soft silk to weave into useful items.

feats.name: Webslinger
feats.description: Your natural ability to create silken webs blends with your magical powers, allowing you to create impossibly large webs with great frequency.

feats.name: Weight of Experience
feats.description: The experience you’ve accumulated over multiple lifetimes envelops you like a weighted blanket, providing comfort and bestowing confidence under pressure.

feats.name: Weight of Guilt
feats.description: Guilt clouds the minds of those who ignore your Glimpse of Redemption.

feats.name: Weight of Stone
feats.description: A packed cloud of thundering boulders descends from the sky, beating down everyone in its path.

feats.name: Weighty Impact
feats.description: Your eidolon knocks enemies down.

feats.name: Well of Potential
feats.description: Your mind is a deep well of psychic potential.
feats.prerequisites: focus pool, at least one innate spell from a kashrishi heritage or ancestry feat that shares a tradition with at least one of your focus spells

feats.name: Well-armed
feats.description: Your detachable limbs offer flexibility.

feats.name: Well-Groomed
feats.description: You are fastidious about keeping clean.

feats.name: Well-Met Traveler
feats.description: You naturally adopt a pleasant and affable demeanor when meeting others.

feats.name: Well-Versed
feats.description: You’re resilient to performative influences that aren’t your own.

feats.name: Wellspring Control
feats.description: When you generate a wellspring surge, roll twice on the Wellspring Surges Table and take the result of your choice.

feats.name: Wellspring Mage Dedication
feats.description: There's no longer a limit on how many temporary spell slots you can gain per day from wellspring magic.

feats.name: Werecreature Dedication
feats.description: You're a werecreature, able to shift between your humanoid shape, an animal shape, and a monstrous hybrid of the two.

feats.name: What Could Have Been
feats.description: Rather than conjuring creatures from elsewhere in the world or the planes, you can temporarily pull a much different version of yourself from an alternate timeline.

feats.name: What's That up Your Sleeve?
feats.description: Whether as a dealer or player, you've learned to spot cheaters.

feats.name: Wheedle and Jig
feats.description: You make capering motions and silly sounds to captivate onlookers.

feats.name: Wheeling Grab
feats.description: You cartwheel on your claws, dancing over your foes.

feats.name: Whirling Blade Stance
feats.description: You enter a mindful stance that creates a deep connection between you and your monk weapons, allowing you to manipulate them with your qi, even at a distance.

feats.name: Whirling Clobber
feats.description: After you've grasped a creature with your lash, you swing them around like a whirling hammer, smashing them into all nearby enemies.

feats.name: Whirling Grindstone
feats.description: A whirling grindstone made of flint appears in an unoccupied square within 30 feet.

feats.name: Whirling in the Summer Storm
feats.description: Your hands move in a hypnotic and distracting flurry that throws your foes off-balance before you cast them away with a violent pirouette.

feats.name: Whirling Knockdown
feats.description: You fire your gun while throwing off a target's balance with your melee weapon.

feats.name: Whirling Throw
feats.description: You propel your enemy away.

feats.name: Whirlpool's Pull
feats.description: You briefly conjure a tendril of water that allows you to grab an improvised weapon and then subsume that water to power your magic.

feats.name: Whirlwind Spell
feats.description: You combine the might of a multitarget spell with a whirling flurry of attacks.

feats.name: Whirlwind Stance
feats.description: You use your staff as a defensive implement as well as an offensive one.
feats.source: Pathfinder #151: The Show Must Go On pg. 75
feats.source_book: Pathfinder #151: The Show Must Go On
feats.prerequisites: Staff Acrobat Dedication; expert proficiency in your staff

feats.name: Whirlwind Strike
feats.description: You lash out in a blur of motion, attacking all nearby adversaries.
feats.source: Player Core pg. 150, Player Core 2 pg. 84

feats.name: Whirlwind Toss
feats.description: You whirl a foe to smash into all nearby creatures before throwing them far away.

feats.name: Whisper of Warning
feats.description: Your protective apparitions alert you to an incoming attack.

feats.name: Whisper on the Wind
feats.description: You speak in a whisper, a soft wind carrying your words far away.

feats.name: Whispering Steps
feats.description: Your spell leaves a lingering connection between you and a creature—one through which you can nudge the creature's mind this way or that.

feats.name: Whispers in the Night
feats.description: You weave your illusions with greater ability, allowing you to play tricks and slip through the night.

feats.name: Whispers of Weakness
feats.description: Voices whisper to you how to best lay a creature low.

feats.name: Whitecape
feats.description: You're shorter and wider than many vanaras of your heritage, and the hair on your shoulders and your head is particularly thick and luxurious, like a majestic cape.

feats.name: Whodunnit?
feats.description: You carefully consider your case and narrow down some of the details.

feats.name: Wide Overwatch
feats.description: Through a variety of perceptive techniques, careful routines, and upgrades to your enhanced visual gear, you have become able to observe and maintain your overwatch at a much greater distance.

feats.name: Widen Spell
feats.description: You manipulate the energy of your spell, causing it to spread out and affect a wider area.
feats.source: Player Core pg. 128, Player Core 2 pg. 138

feats.name: Widen the Gap
feats.description: Once you have penetrated a foe’s defenses, you can home in on the same spot to exploit your opponent’s wound and deal some serious damage.

feats.name: Wild Dance
feats.description: The combination of your passion for both life and the battle against evil makes you graceful and unpredictable.

feats.name: Wild Lights
feats.description: When you cast dancing lights, you can modify it to create a single floating light in the shape of a Tiny creature.
feats.prerequisites: Spell Trickster Dedication; ability to cast dancing lights

feats.name: Wild Mimic Dedication
feats.description: Fighting in the wilds has honed your understanding of the unique abilities many creatures have.

feats.name: Wild Speech
feats.description: Your connection to the denizens of the wilds grows ever stronger, and you find yourself able to speak with animals like you would in your native tongue.
feats.prerequisites: Wild Mimic Dedication; Animal Empathy (Ranger) or the ability to speak with a type of animal

feats.name: Wild Stride
feats.description: You can move quickly when using your preferred modes of travel.

feats.name: Wild Winds Gust
feats.description: You build air pressure with repeated motions, before releasing an enormous crescent of rushing wind strikes.

feats.name: Wild Winds Initiate
feats.description: You learn a stance that lets you attack from a distance.

feats.name: Wild Witch's Armaments
feats.description: Your patron's power continues to enhance your natural offensive capabilities.

feats.name: Wild-haired Fury
feats.description: Your broken bones jut at odd angles, yet this pain only adds to your anger and prowess.

feats.name: Wildborn Adept
feats.description: The whispers of the jungle grant you more diverse access to simple primal magic.

feats.name: Wildborn Magic
feats.description: You have learned to access the old magic of wild places.

feats.name: Wilderness Born
feats.description: You’re at home in the wilderness and easily disappear into it.
feats.source: Pathfinder #202: Severed at the Root pg. 69

feats.name: Wilderness Spotter
feats.description: Use Survival for your Initiative when in a specific terrain.

feats.name: Wiles on the Wind
feats.description: Speaking lies, you set them loose upon a drifting wind.

feats.name: Willing Death
feats.description: Once, you died because you valued someone else's life above your own; just as then, you protect an ally by suffering in their stead.

feats.name: Wind Caller
feats.description: You bid the winds to aid you, carrying you through the air and allowing you passage through the strongest headwinds.

feats.name: Wind God's Fan
feats.description: Your fan can stir up even more powerful winds.

feats.name: Wind Jump
feats.description: You gather the wind beneath you, allowing you to soar as you jump.

feats.name: Wind Pillow
feats.description: The winds have whispered to you all your life, and the essence of air itself helps you at times, making you somewhat buoyant when you're suspended in space.

feats.name: Wind Seeker
feats.description: Wings free you from the shackles of the ground below.

feats.name: Wind Tempered
feats.description: You are at home in tempestuous weather and accustomed to even the harshest winds.

feats.name: Wind-Tossed Spell
feats.description: You enhance your spell with elemental air, using the wind to find your target and carry your magic around cover.
feats.prerequisites: Elementalist Dedication; air is in your elemental philosophy
notes: Whether in the heart of a volcanic passageway or the glacial tundras of the Crown of the World, the only temperature you ever personally experience is an oddly comfortable chill.

feats.name: Winding Flow
feats.description: Any journey consists of more than simply reaching your destination.

feats.name: Wing Bounce
feats.description: You rush forward, flapping your wings for a bit of lift, and can use that momentum to knock down a foe.

feats.name: Wing Buffet
feats.description: You have a pair of draconic wings strong enough to batter your foes away and shove them away.

feats.name: Wing Rider
feats.description: Your bond with your dragon has been honed so fine that it can carry you aloft with its full capability.
notes: Your eyes are accustomed to the harsh glare of the sun on snow and ice.

feats.name: Wing Shove
feats.description: You spread your wings wide, pushing foes away from you.

feats.name: Wing Step
feats.description: With a sharp flap of your wings, you stay light on your feet as you move.

feats.name: Winged Leap
feats.description: While drakes and dragons are able flyers, they’re uncomfortable carrying a rider in the air without special training.
feats.prerequisites: dragon companion with the mount special ability; Drake Rider Dedication

feats.name: Winged Warrior Dedication
feats.description: Through rigorous training, you have strengthened your wings, granting you enough thrust to gain additional altitude.
feats.prerequisites: you have permanent wings (such as from an ancestry or graft)

feats.name: Winglet Flight
feats.description: Intense use and exercise have made your winglets more powerful.

feats.name: Winglets
feats.description: Through the lingering influence of your warren's patron, you've sprouted a small set of wings.

feats.name: Wings of Air
feats.description: You can strain to call forth feathered or cloudy wings from your back.

feats.name: Wings of the Moon
feats.description: You can fly long distances without breaks.
feats.prerequisites: Werecreature Dedication; your animal shape has a fly Speed

feats.name: Winter Cat Senses
feats.description: Your eyes are keen and accustomed to winter conditions.

feats.name: Winter Sleet
feats.description: Bone-chilling, swirling sleet surrounds you, cruel as deepest winter.

feats.name: Winter's Clutch
feats.description: Gleaming flakes of chilling snow fall in a 10-foot burst within 60 feet.

feats.name: Wisdom From Another Life
feats.description: You absorbed a wide variety of facts before you died, and your soul still remembers slivers of this precious knowledge.

feats.name: Wish Alchemy
feats.description: You have learned Artokus Kirran's most hidden secrets, granting you the ability to create alchemy infused with the power of wishes.

feats.name: Wisteria-and-Peony Reunion
feats.description: Your roots of qi stand firm, shaking off pains and aches like the returning flowers and leaves shed during winter’s snow.

feats.name: Witch Dedication
feats.description: You cast spells like a witch.

feats.name: Witch Warden
feats.description: You and your family have fought long and hard against witches, particularly the winter witches of Irrisen, and you’ve learned to be wary of their curses and the otherworldly powers their patrons grant.

feats.name: Witch's Armaments
feats.description: Your patron’s power changes your body to ensure you are never defenseless.

feats.name: Witch's Charge
feats.description: You forge a magical link with another creature, granting you awareness of that creature’s condition and creating a conduit for spellcasting.

feats.name: Witch's Communion
feats.description: You can keep watch over multiple charges.
notes: While in Wombat Stance, you gain a Burrow speed equal to the Speed bonus granted by your Incredible Movement ability.

feats.name: Witch's Hut
feats.description: Your home is an animated structure that obeys your commands.

feats.name: Witchwood Seed
feats.description: You touch a creature to implant a malignant seed in its body.

feats.name: Witch’s Bottle
feats.description: You spend 10 minutes and 1 Focus Point brewing a special potion containing the power of one of your hexes that targets a creature.

feats.name: Witch’s Broom
feats.description: A broom is the only steed you need to fly through the night sky.

feats.name: Withstand Death
feats.description: Through repeated exposure, you've trained to resist the damage wrought by undead.

feats.name: Withstand the Storm
feats.description: Your skin hardens like bark and gains the sheen of glazed clay, lessening the wild’s ruinous sting against your body.

feats.name: Witness of Earth
feats.description: The primal magic in your soul offers the patient earth’s timeless counsel.

feats.name: Wizard Dedication
feats.description: You cast spells like a wizard, gaining a spellbook with four common arcane cantrips of your choice.

feats.name: Wolf Drag
feats.description: You rip your enemy off their feet.
notes: You make a quick attack before retreating to safety.

feats.name: Wolf in Sheep's Clothing
feats.description: With a bit of hide, some antlers, and some cast-off fur, you can create a disguise that will fool even an experienced hunter.

feats.name: Wolf Stance
feats.description: Wombat Style
feats.prerequisites: You enter the stance of a wolf, low to the ground with your hands held like fangs.
notes: You enter the stance of the implacable wombat, your reinforced backside ready to jostle and batter those who offend you.

feats.name: Wonder Worker
feats.description: The thaumaturge's path culminates with the working of wonders.
feats.prerequisites: Legendary in Arcana, Legendary in Nature, Legendary in Occultism, or Legendary in Religion

feats.name: Wood Ward
feats.description: With a sweep of your hand, vines and roots burst from the ground along the edge of your space between you and the attacker, creating a natural lattice of wood that grants standard cover.

feats.name: Woodcraft
feats.description: You have a innate familiarity with forested areas.

feats.name: Wooden Mantle
feats.description: Your connection to the magic of the Plane of Wood allows you to call upon the power of plants and trees to protect yourself.

feats.name: Wooden Palisade
feats.description: Planks of wood, embellished with carvings, spring forth to form a wall.

feats.name: Woodworker
feats.description: Denizens of the Plane of Wood take immense pride in the magnificent works of art they can craft from wood, and practicing your own woodcraft helps you feel a connection with your planar heritage.

feats.name: Words of Unraveling
feats.description: You have unlocked abstruse methods to tangle with reality itself, altering the fate of a single individual.
feats.source: Pathfinder #164: Hands of the Devil pg. 76

feats.name: Work Yourself Up
feats.description: You concentrate on your mental state, tapping into that raw emotional energy.

feats.name: World-breaking Footfall
feats.description: You slam the ground and unleash a fearsome roar, sending broken shards of earth flying in all directions.

feats.name: World-protector's Hospitality
feats.description: Through your spiritual power, you impede starvation and restore pantries.

feats.name: World-Wise Vigilance
feats.description: Your keen study of other cultures gives you insights into the ways those cultures fight.

feats.name: Worldsphere Gravity
feats.description: Fists of the Ruby Phoenix
feats.source: Pathfinder #168: King of the Mountain pg. 77
feats.prerequisites: Though creating demiplanes usually requires lengthy rituals, you know how to establish minor planar effects.
notes: Archetype, Death, Divine, Enchantment, Flourish, Mental, Occult, Rare

The ravenous maggots inside you become capable of exploding forth from your attacks into the wounds of an opponent, whispering telepathic words of destruction that invoke horrific flashbacks of Kabriri's transformation from elf to ghoul or psychic images of hundreds of maggots bursting from the victim's flesh all at once.
You built your reanimated construct companion of modular components from various corpses.

feats.name: Worm Caller Dedication
feats.description: You pledge yourself to understanding and emulating one of the most powerful creatures of the Darklands: the mighty cave worm.
feats.source: Pathfinder #194: Cult of the Cave Worm pg. 80
feats.source_book: Pathfinder #194: Cult of the Cave Worm
feats.prerequisites: Trained in Nature or Trained in Cave Worm Lore

feats.name: Worm Empathy
feats.description: You can connect with cave worms (and other worm-related creatures, at the GM's discretion) on a rudimentary level.
feats.source: Pathfinder #194: Cult of the Cave Worm pg. 81
feats.source_book: Pathfinder #194: Cult of the Cave Worm

feats.name: Worm Form
feats.description: You take on the form of a purple worm or transform into a humanoid-worm hybrid, retaining your own head but with a worm's body, transforming into a Huge battle form.
feats.source: Pathfinder #194: Cult of the Cave Worm pg. 81
feats.source_book: Pathfinder #194: Cult of the Cave Worm

feats.name: Worm Sense
feats.description: You emulate the senses of the cave worm.
feats.source: Pathfinder #194: Cult of the Cave Worm pg. 80
feats.source_book: Pathfinder #194: Cult of the Cave Worm

feats.name: Worm's Feast
feats.description: You call forth a brood of infantile cave worms to feast on your enemy's flesh.
feats.source: Pathfinder #194: Cult of the Cave Worm pg. 80
feats.source_book: Pathfinder #194: Cult of the Cave Worm

feats.name: Wormskin
feats.description: Your flesh grows thick and bloated, protecting you against harm.
feats.source: Pathfinder #194: Cult of the Cave Worm pg. 80
feats.source_book: Pathfinder #194: Cult of the Cave Worm

feats.name: Wortwitch
feats.description: You have a particular affinity for leafy plants.

feats.name: Wounded Party
feats.description: Harm to either you or your allies awakens your fury.

feats.name: Wounded Rage
feats.description: You roar in pain, awakening the rage within you.

feats.name: Wrapped in Smoke
feats.description: You ignite a small portion of powder in a rapid, inefficient burn, creating a hazy cloud.

feats.name: Wrath Against the Divine
feats.description: You channel your commitment to removing the divine from the world as you recite the Laws of Mortality.

feats.name: Wrath of the Hold
feats.description: Your tattoos carry the strength of an innumerable horde, and you can expend one use of your storied skin’s Living History ability to animate your tattoos as ghostly assailants that swarm your foes.

feats.name: Wrathful Presence
feats.description: You channel the unending wrath of the erinyes all around you.
feats.prerequisites: Sister of the Golden Erinys Dedication

feats.name: Wronged Monk's Wrath
feats.description: You gain the wronged monk's wrath ki spell.
feats.source: Pathfinder #166: Despair on Danger Island pg. 74

feats.name: Wukong Extension
feats.description: Invoking the name of Sun Wukong’s extending cudgel, Ruyi Bang, you activate hidden levers and cranks in your innovation, making it swiftly extend outward like a battering ram.

feats.name: Wylderheart Dedication
feats.description: You’re primed to face off against threats from the Outer Rifts.

feats.name: Wyldsinger
feats.description: Passion and song are your weapons of choice.

feats.name: Xidao Sea Mine Drop
feats.description: You’ve rigged your armor innovation with a gizmo that can safely synthesize two sea mines a day, holding them in a protected compartment.

feats.name: Yamaraj's Grandeur
feats.description: You have been granted a sliver of the power of the yamaraj, the magistrates of the dead who agreed to allow duskwalkers to exist at all.

feats.name: Yaoguai Historian
feats.description: You know extensively about your own kind.

feats.name: You Don't Smell Right
feats.description: You can sniff out fellow werecreatures and master impersonators alike.

feats.name: You Failed to Account for… This!
feats.description: When your foes try to attack you, you always seem to have some outlandish invention you can pull out at the last second to protect you from whatever attack they throw at you.

feats.name: You Seem Somewhat Familiar
feats.description: You fought hundreds of foes in your various past lives, and now and then, something about a new opponent tugs at your memory, almost as if you defeated their grandparent long ago.

feats.name: You're an Embarrassment!
feats.description: Some Firebrands can't stand it when their allies are ruining their moment, and you're no different.

feats.name: You're Next
feats.description: After downing a foe, you menace another.
feats.source: Player Core pg. 171, Player Core 2 pg. 165

feats.name: You're So Cute!
feats.description: You know how to put on the charm, doing playful tricks to win favor.

feats.name: Zealous Inevitability
feats.description: You channel your zeal through a sacred weapon, bringing a foe closer to their demise.

feats.name: Zealous Rush
feats.description: You bless yourself on the move.

feats.name: Zephyr Guard Dedication
feats.description: As a Zephyr Guard, you’re always vigilant against crime and threats to the city’s safety.
feats.source: Pathfinder #149: Against the Scarlet Triad pg. 81

feats.name: Zip! Zoom!
feats.description: You can fly longer distances before you need to land.

feats.name: Zombie Dedication
feats.description: Despite your death and subsequent reanimation as a rotting corpse, you retain most of your mind and identity.
feats.prerequisites: You died and were animated as a husk zombie.
notes: Come One, Come All, to the Extinction Curse Player's Guide!
You must have a signature trick
You gain an additional signature trick.

feats.name: Zoophonic Communication
feats.description: Your studies have expanded your ability to parley and negotiate into the animal realm.

feats.name: Zoophonic Composition
feats.description: When the inspiration strikes, you can weave messages for animals into your compositions.
